search_text: PAL : Pretext-based Active Learning PAL：基于借口的主动学习 The goal of pool-based active learning is to judiciously select a fixed-sized subset of unlabeled samples from a pool to query an oracle for their labels, in order to maximize the accuracy of a supervised learner. However, the unsaid requirement that the oracle should always assign correct labels is unreasonable for most situations. We propose an active learning technique for deep neural networks that is more robust to mislabeling than the previously proposed techniques. Previous techniques rely on the task network itself to estimate the novelty of the unlabeled samples, but learning the task (generalization) and selecting samples (out-of-distribution detection) can be conflicting goals. We use a separate network to score the unlabeled samples for selection. The scoring network relies on self-supervision for modeling the distribution of the labeled samples to reduce the dependency on potentially noisy labels. To counter the paucity of data, we also deploy another head on the scoring network for regularization via multi-task learning and use an unusual self-balancing hybrid scoring function. Furthermore, we divide each query into sub-queries before labeling to ensure that the query has diverse samples. In addition to having a higher tolerance to mislabeling of samples by the oracle, the resultant technique also produces competitive accuracy in the absence of label noise. The technique also handles the introduction of new classes on-the-fly well by temporarily increasing the sampling rate of these classes. 基于池的主动学习的目标是明智地从池中选择固定大小的未标记样本子集来查询预言机的标签，以最大限度地提高监督学习器的准确性。然而，在大多数情况下，预言机应始终分配正确标签的未提及的要求是不合理的。我们提出了一种用于深度神经网络的主动学习技术，该技术比之前提出的技术更能抵抗错误标记。以前的技术依赖于任务网络本身来估计未标记样本的新颖性，但学习任务（泛化）和选择样本（分布外检测）可能是相互冲突的目标。我们使用单独的网络对未标记的样本进行评分以供选择。评分网络依靠自我监督来对标记样本的分布进行建模，以减少对潜在噪声标签的依赖。为了解决数据缺乏的问题，我们还在评分网络上部署了另一个头，通过多任务学习进行正则化，并使用不寻常的自平衡混合评分函数。此外，我们在标记之前将每个查询划分为子查询，以确保查询具有多样化的样本。除了对预言机错误标记样本具有更高的容忍度之外，所得到的技术还在没有标签噪声的情况下产生了有竞争力的准确性。该技术还可以通过暂时增加这些类的采样率来很好地处理动态引入新类。 本文提出了一种基于预文本的主动学习方法（PAL），旨在提高深度神经网络在存在标签噪声情况下的鲁棒性。 Shubhang Bhatnagar,Sachin Goyal,Darshan Tank,Amit Sethi cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Sihang Guo,Ruohan Zhang,Bo Liu,Yifeng Zhu,Mary Hayhoe,Dana Ballard,Peter Stone
title: Machine versus Human Attention in Deep Reinforcement Learning Tasks
title_zh: 深度强化学习任务中的机器注意力与人类注意力
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms are powerful tools for solving visuomotor decision tasks. However, the trained models are often difficult to interpret, because they are represented as end-to-end deep neural networks. In this paper, we shed light on the inner workings of such trained models by analyzing the pixels that they attend to during task execution, and comparing them with the pixels attended to by humans executing the same tasks. To this end, we investigate the following two questions that, to the best of our knowledge, have not been previously studied. 1) How similar are the visual representations learned by RL agents and humans when performing the same task? and, 2) How do similarities and differences in these learned representations explain RL agents' performance on these tasks? Specifically, we compare the saliency maps of RL agents against visual attention models of human experts when learning to play Atari games. Further, we analyze how hyperparameters of the deep RL algorithm affect the learned representations and saliency maps of the trained agents. The insights provided have the potential to inform novel algorithms for closing the performance gap between human experts and RL agents.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms are powerful tools for solving visuomotor decision tasks. However, the trained models are often difficult to interpret, because they are represented as end-to-end deep neural networks. In this paper, we shed light on the inner workings of such trained models by analyzing the pixels that they attend to during task execution, and comparing them with the pixels attended to by humans executing the same tasks. To this end, we investigate the following two questions that, to the best of our knowledge, have not been previously studied. 1) How similar are the visual representations learned by RL agents and humans when performing the same task? and, 2) How do similarities and differences in these learned representations explain RL agents' performance on these tasks? Specifically, we compare the saliency maps of RL agents against visual attention models of human experts when learning to play Atari games. Further, we analyze how hyperparameters of the deep RL algorithm affect the learned representations and saliency maps of the trained agents. The insights provided have the potential to inform novel algorithms for closing the performance gap between human experts and RL agents.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习 (RL) 算法是解决视觉运动决策任务的强大工具。然而，经过训练的模型通常很难解释，因为它们被表示为端到端的深度神经网络。在本文中，我们通过分析此类训练模型在任务执行过程中关注的像素，并将其与人类执行相同任务时关注的像素进行比较，揭示了此类训练模型的内部工作原理。为此，我们研究了以下两个问题，据我们所知，此前尚未研究过这两个问题。 1) RL 智能体和人类在执行相同任务时学习到的视觉表征有多相似？ 2）这些学习表征的相似点和差异如何解释 RL 智能体在这些任务上的表现？具体来说，我们在学习玩 Atari 游戏时将 RL 智能体的显着图与人类专家的视觉注意力模型进行比较。此外，我们分析了深度强化学习算法的超参数如何影响训练代理的学习表示和显着性图。所提供的见解有可能为新算法提供信息，以缩小人类专家和强化学习代理之间的性能差距。

AI.tldr: 本文通过比较深度强化学习代理与人类在执行相同任务时的视觉注意力机制，分析其内部工作原理及性能差异。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习模型虽强大但难以解释，需通过比较其与人类的视觉表征相似性来提升可解释性与性能。
AI.method: 通过生成RL代理的显著性图并与人类专家的视觉注意力模型对比，分析超参数对表征和显著性图的影响。
AI.result: 发现RL代理与人类在视觉表征上存在相似性与差异性，超参数显著影响代理的注意力模式及任务表现。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为设计缩小人类与RL代理性能差距的新型算法提供了理论依据与实践方向。

authors_text: Daniel C. Ohrenstein,Patrick Brandao,Daniel Toth,Laurence Lovat,Danail Stoyanov,Peter Mountney
title: Detecting small polyps using a Dynamic SSD-GAN
title_zh: 使用动态 SSD-GAN 检测小息肉
comment: Machine Learning for Health (ML4H) at NeurIPS 2020 - Extended Abstract
comments: Machine Learning for Health (ML4H) at NeurIPS 2020 - Extended Abstract
abstract: Endoscopic examinations are used to inspect the throat, stomach and bowel for polyps which could develop into cancer. Machine learning systems can be trained to process colonoscopy images and detect polyps. However, these systems tend to perform poorly on objects which appear visually small in the images. It is shown here that combining the single-shot detector as a region proposal network with an adversarially-trained generator to upsample small region proposals can significantly improve the detection of visually-small polyps. The Dynamic SSD-GAN pipeline introduced in this paper achieved a 12% increase in sensitivity on visually-small polyps compared to a conventional FCN baseline.
summary: Endoscopic examinations are used to inspect the throat, stomach and bowel for polyps which could develop into cancer. Machine learning systems can be trained to process colonoscopy images and detect polyps. However, these systems tend to perform poorly on objects which appear visually small in the images. It is shown here that combining the single-shot detector as a region proposal network with an adversarially-trained generator to upsample small region proposals can significantly improve the detection of visually-small polyps. The Dynamic SSD-GAN pipeline introduced in this paper achieved a 12% increase in sensitivity on visually-small polyps compared to a conventional FCN baseline.
abstract_zh: 内窥镜检查用于检查喉咙、胃和肠道是否有可能发展成癌症的息肉。机器学习系统可以被训练来处理结肠镜检查图像并检测息肉。然而，这些系统对于图像中视觉上很小的物体往往表现不佳。这里显示，将单次检测器作为区域提议网络与经过对抗训练的生成器相结合以对小区域提议进行上采样可以显着改善视觉上小息肉的检测。与传统的 FCN 基线相比，本文引入的动态 SSD-GAN 管道对视觉上较小的息肉的灵敏度提高了 12%。

AI.tldr: 提出一种动态SSD-GAN方法，用于提高内镜图像中视觉小息肉的检测效果
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习系统在检测视觉上较小的息肉时表现不佳，需提升小息肉检测的准确性以预防癌症
AI.method: 结合单次检测器与对抗训练生成器，通过上采样小区域建议来增强检测
AI.result: 相比传统FCN基线，在视觉小息肉检测的敏感度上提升12%
AI.conclusion: 动态SSD-GAN方法有效提升了小息肉检测性能，为内镜检查提供更可靠的辅助工具

authors_text: Tatiana Shavrina,Alena Fenogenova,Anton Emelyanov,Denis Shevelev,Ekaterina Artemova,Valentin Malykh,Vladislav Mikhailov,Maria Tikhonova,Andrey Chertok,Andrey Evlampiev
title: RussianSuperGLUE: A Russian Language Understanding Evaluation Benchmark
title_zh: RussianSuperGLUE：俄语理解评估基准
abstract: In this paper, we introduce an advanced Russian general language understanding evaluation benchmark -- RussianGLUE. Recent advances in the field of universal language models and transformers require the development of a methodology for their broad diagnostics and testing for general intellectual skills - detection of natural language inference, commonsense reasoning, ability to perform simple logical operations regardless of text subject or lexicon. For the first time, a benchmark of nine tasks, collected and organized analogically to the SuperGLUE methodology, was developed from scratch for the Russian language. We provide baselines, human level evaluation, an open-source framework for evaluating models (https://github.com/RussianNLP/RussianSuperGLUE), and an overall leaderboard of transformer models for the Russian language. Besides, we present the first results of comparing multilingual models in the adapted diagnostic test set and offer the first steps to further expanding or assessing state-of-the-art models independently of language.
summary: In this paper, we introduce an advanced Russian general language understanding evaluation benchmark -- RussianGLUE. Recent advances in the field of universal language models and transformers require the development of a methodology for their broad diagnostics and testing for general intellectual skills - detection of natural language inference, commonsense reasoning, ability to perform simple logical operations regardless of text subject or lexicon. For the first time, a benchmark of nine tasks, collected and organized analogically to the SuperGLUE methodology, was developed from scratch for the Russian language. We provide baselines, human level evaluation, an open-source framework for evaluating models (https://github.com/RussianNLP/RussianSuperGLUE), and an overall leaderboard of transformer models for the Russian language. Besides, we present the first results of comparing multilingual models in the adapted diagnostic test set and offer the first steps to further expanding or assessing state-of-the-art models independently of language.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种先进的俄语通用语言理解评估基准——RussianGLUE。通用语言模型和转换器领域的最新进展需要开发一种方法来对其进行广泛的诊断和测试一般智力技能 - 检测自然语言推理、常识推理、执行简单逻辑运算的能力，无论文本主题或词汇如何。首次针对俄语从头开始开发了包含九项任务的基准，这些任务的收集和组织与 SuperGLUE 方法类似。我们提供基线、人类水平评估、用于评估模型的开源框架 (https://github.com/RussianNLP/RussianSuperGLUE) 以及俄语 Transformer 模型的总体排行榜。此外，我们展示了在适应的诊断测试集中比较多语言模型的第一个结果，并提供了进一步扩展或评估独立于语言的最先进模型的第一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为RussianSuperGLUE的俄语语言理解评估基准，包含九个任务，用于测试自然语言推理、常识推理和逻辑运算等能力。
AI.motivation: 随着通用语言模型和变压器技术的进步，需要开发针对俄语的系统性评估方法，以诊断模型在语言理解等通用智力技能上的表现。
AI.method: 基于SuperGLUE框架设计九个俄语任务，构建开源评估框架并提供基线模型、人类水平评估及多语言模型对比实验。
AI.result: 发布俄语模型排行榜，提供多语言模型在诊断测试集的对比结果，并为后续模型扩展和评估奠定基础。
AI.conclusion: RussianSuperGLUE为俄语NLP模型评估提供标准化工具，推动多语言模型能力的独立验证与持续优化。

authors_text: Brijen Thananjeyan,Ashwin Balakrishna,Suraj Nair,Michael Luo,Krishnan Srinivasan,Minho Hwang,Joseph E. Gonzalez,Julian Ibarz,Chelsea Finn,Ken Goldberg
title: Recovery RL: Safe Reinforcement Learning with Learned Recovery Zones
title_zh: 恢复强化学习：具有学习恢复区的安全强化学习
comment: RA-L and ICRA 2021. First two authors contributed equally
comments: RA-L and ICRA 2021. First two authors contributed equally
abstract: Safety remains a central obstacle preventing widespread use of RL in the real world: learning new tasks in uncertain environments requires extensive exploration, but safety requires limiting exploration. We propose Recovery RL, an algorithm which navigates this tradeoff by (1) leveraging offline data to learn about constraint violating zones before policy learning and (2) separating the goals of improving task performance and constraint satisfaction across two policies: a task policy that only optimizes the task reward and a recovery policy that guides the agent to safety when constraint violation is likely. We evaluate Recovery RL on 6 simulation domains, including two contact-rich manipulation tasks and an image-based navigation task, and an image-based obstacle avoidance task on a physical robot. We compare Recovery RL to 5 prior safe RL methods which jointly optimize for task performance and safety via constrained optimization or reward shaping and find that Recovery RL outperforms the next best prior method across all domains. Results suggest that Recovery RL trades off constraint violations and task successes 2 - 20 times more efficiently in simulation domains and 3 times more efficiently in physical experiments. See https://tinyurl.com/rl-recovery for videos and supplementary material.
summary: Safety remains a central obstacle preventing widespread use of RL in the real world: learning new tasks in uncertain environments requires extensive exploration, but safety requires limiting exploration. We propose Recovery RL, an algorithm which navigates this tradeoff by (1) leveraging offline data to learn about constraint violating zones before policy learning and (2) separating the goals of improving task performance and constraint satisfaction across two policies: a task policy that only optimizes the task reward and a recovery policy that guides the agent to safety when constraint violation is likely. We evaluate Recovery RL on 6 simulation domains, including two contact-rich manipulation tasks and an image-based navigation task, and an image-based obstacle avoidance task on a physical robot. We compare Recovery RL to 5 prior safe RL methods which jointly optimize for task performance and safety via constrained optimization or reward shaping and find that Recovery RL outperforms the next best prior method across all domains. Results suggest that Recovery RL trades off constraint violations and task successes 2 - 20 times more efficiently in simulation domains and 3 times more efficiently in physical experiments. See https://tinyurl.com/rl-recovery for videos and supplementary material.
abstract_zh: 安全性仍然是阻碍强化学习在现实世界中广泛使用的主要障碍：在不确定的环境中学习新任务需要广泛的探索，但安全性需要限制探索。我们提出了恢复强化学习（Recovery RL）算法，该算法通过（1）在策略学习之前利用离线数据来了解约束违反区域，以及（2）将提高任务性能和约束满足的目标分离到两个策略中：一个仅优化任务奖励的任务策略和一个在可能违反约束时引导智能体安全的恢复策略。我们在 6 个模拟域上评估恢复强化学习，包括两个富含接触的操纵任务和一个基于图像的导航任务，以及物理机器人上基于图像的避障任务。我们将恢复 RL 与 5 种先前的安全 RL 方法进行比较，这些方法通过约束优化或奖励塑造联合优化任务性能和安全性，并发现恢复 RL 在所有领域都优于次佳先验方法。结果表明，恢复强化学习在约束违反和任务成功之间进行权衡，在模拟领域中的效率提高了 2 - 20 倍，在物理实验中的效率提高了 3 倍。请参阅 https://tinyurl.com/rl-recovery 了解视频和补充材料。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Recovery RL算法，通过学习约束违规区域并分离任务策略与恢复策略，解决强化学习中安全与探索的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 现实环境中强化学习的安全性限制了其应用，传统方法在优化任务性能与约束安全时存在效率低下问题。
AI.method: 利用离线数据预学习约束违规区域，设计双策略架构：任务策略专注任务奖励优化，恢复策略在预测违规时引导安全状态。
AI.result: 在6个仿真领域及物理机器人实验中，Recovery RL相较5种安全RL方法，约束违规与任务成功效率提升2-20倍（仿真）及3倍（物理实验）。
AI.conclusion: Recovery RL通过解耦策略目标与先验约束学习，有效平衡安全与探索，为安全强化学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Guru Subramani,Michael Hagenow,Michael Gleicher,Michael Zinn
title: A Method for Constraint Inference Using Pose and Wrench Measurements
title_zh: 使用姿势和扳手测量进行约束推断的方法
abstract: Many physical tasks such as pulling out a drawer or wiping a table can be modeled with geometric constraints. These geometric constraints are characterized by restrictions on kinematic trajectories and reaction wrenches (forces and moments) of objects under the influence of the constraint. This paper presents a method to infer geometric constraints involving unmodeled objects in human demonstrations using both kinematic and wrench measurements. Our approach takes a recording of a human demonstration and determines what constraints are present, when they occur, and their parameters (e.g. positions). By using both kinematic and wrench information, our methods are able to reliably identify a variety of constraint types, even if the constraints only exist for short durations within the demonstration. We present a systematic approach to fitting arbitrary scleronomic constraint models to kinematic and wrench measurements. Reaction forces are estimated from measurements by removing friction. Position, orientation, force, and moment error metrics are developed to provide systematic comparison between constraint models. By conducting a user study, we show that our methods can reliably identify constraints in realistic situations and confirm the value of including forces and moments in the model regression and selection process.
summary: Many physical tasks such as pulling out a drawer or wiping a table can be modeled with geometric constraints. These geometric constraints are characterized by restrictions on kinematic trajectories and reaction wrenches (forces and moments) of objects under the influence of the constraint. This paper presents a method to infer geometric constraints involving unmodeled objects in human demonstrations using both kinematic and wrench measurements. Our approach takes a recording of a human demonstration and determines what constraints are present, when they occur, and their parameters (e.g. positions). By using both kinematic and wrench information, our methods are able to reliably identify a variety of constraint types, even if the constraints only exist for short durations within the demonstration. We present a systematic approach to fitting arbitrary scleronomic constraint models to kinematic and wrench measurements. Reaction forces are estimated from measurements by removing friction. Position, orientation, force, and moment error metrics are developed to provide systematic comparison between constraint models. By conducting a user study, we show that our methods can reliably identify constraints in realistic situations and confirm the value of including forces and moments in the model regression and selection process.
abstract_zh: 许多物理任务，例如拉出抽屉或擦桌子，都可以使用几何约束进行建模。这些几何约束的特征是在约束的影响下对物体的运动轨迹和反作用力（力和力矩）的限制。本文提出了一种使用运动学和扳手测量来推断人体演示中涉及未建模对象的几何约束的方法。我们的方法记录了人类演示并确定存在哪些约束、何时发生及其参数（例如位置）。通过使用运动学和扳手信息，我们的方法能够可靠地识别各种约束类型，即使约束仅在演示中短暂存在。我们提出了一种将任意硬化约束模型拟合到运动学和扳手测量的系统方法。反作用力是通过消除摩擦来根据测量结果估算的。位置、方向、力和力矩误差度量的开发是为了提供约束模型之间的系统比较。通过进行用户研究，我们表明我们的方法可以可靠地识别现实情况中的约束，并确认在模型回归和选择过程中包含力和力矩的价值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用姿态和力矩测量推断几何约束的方法，用于分析人类演示中的物理任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以准确建模未建模物体的几何约束，且无法有效处理短暂存在的约束类型。
AI.method: 结合运动学轨迹与反作用力测量，通过去除摩擦力估计反应力，并开发位置、力矩等误差指标进行模型比较。
AI.result: 用户实验证实方法能可靠识别多种约束类型，且证明包含力和力矩信息可提升模型回归效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可系统识别复杂场景下的几何约束，尤其适用于短暂存在的约束情况。

search_text: A Method for Constraint Inference Using Pose and Wrench Measurements 使用姿势和扳手测量进行约束推断的方法 Many physical tasks such as pulling out a drawer or wiping a table can be modeled with geometric constraints. These geometric constraints are characterized by restrictions on kinematic trajectories and reaction wrenches (forces and moments) of objects under the influence of the constraint. This paper presents a method to infer geometric constraints involving unmodeled objects in human demonstrations using both kinematic and wrench measurements. Our approach takes a recording of a human demonstration and determines what constraints are present, when they occur, and their parameters (e.g. positions). By using both kinematic and wrench information, our methods are able to reliably identify a variety of constraint types, even if the constraints only exist for short durations within the demonstration. We present a systematic approach to fitting arbitrary scleronomic constraint models to kinematic and wrench measurements. Reaction forces are estimated from measurements by removing friction. Position, orientation, force, and moment error metrics are developed to provide systematic comparison between constraint models. By conducting a user study, we show that our methods can reliably identify constraints in realistic situations and confirm the value of including forces and moments in the model regression and selection process. 许多物理任务，例如拉出抽屉或擦桌子，都可以使用几何约束进行建模。这些几何约束的特征是在约束的影响下对物体的运动轨迹和反作用力（力和力矩）的限制。本文提出了一种使用运动学和扳手测量来推断人体演示中涉及未建模对象的几何约束的方法。我们的方法记录了人类演示并确定存在哪些约束、何时发生及其参数（例如位置）。通过使用运动学和扳手信息，我们的方法能够可靠地识别各种约束类型，即使约束仅在演示中短暂存在。我们提出了一种将任意硬化约束模型拟合到运动学和扳手测量的系统方法。反作用力是通过消除摩擦来根据测量结果估算的。位置、方向、力和力矩误差度量的开发是为了提供约束模型之间的系统比较。通过进行用户研究，我们表明我们的方法可以可靠地识别现实情况中的约束，并确认在模型回归和选择过程中包含力和力矩的价值。 本文提出一种利用姿态和力矩测量推断几何约束的方法，用于分析人类演示中的物理任务。 Guru Subramani,Michael Hagenow,Michael Gleicher,Michael Zinn cs.RO

authors_text: Andre G. Hochuli,Alceu S. Britto Jr,David A. Saji,Jose M. Saavedra,Robert Sabourin,Luiz S. Oliveira
title: A Comprehensive Comparison of End-to-End Approaches for Handwritten Digit String Recognition
title_zh: 手写数字串识别端到端方法的综合比较
abstract: Over the last decades, most approaches proposed for handwritten digit string recognition (HDSR) have resorted to digit segmentation, which is dominated by heuristics, thereby imposing substantial constraints on the final performance. Few of them have been based on segmentation-free strategies where each pixel column has a potential cut location. Recently, segmentation-free strategies has added another perspective to the problem, leading to promising results. However, these strategies still show some limitations when dealing with a large number of touching digits. To bridge the resulting gap, in this paper, we hypothesize that a string of digits can be approached as a sequence of objects. We thus evaluate different end-to-end approaches to solve the HDSR problem, particularly in two verticals: those based on object-detection (e.g., Yolo and RetinaNet) and those based on sequence-to-sequence representation (CRNN). The main contribution of this work lies in its provision of a comprehensive comparison with a critical analysis of the above mentioned strategies on five benchmarks commonly used to assess HDSR, including the challenging Touching Pair dataset, NIST SD19, and two real-world datasets (CAR and CVL) proposed for the ICFHR 2014 competition on HDSR. Our results show that the Yolo model compares favorably against segmentation-free models with the advantage of having a shorter pipeline that minimizes the presence of heuristics-based models. It achieved a 97%, 96%, and 84% recognition rate on the NIST-SD19, CAR, and CVL datasets, respectively.
summary: Over the last decades, most approaches proposed for handwritten digit string recognition (HDSR) have resorted to digit segmentation, which is dominated by heuristics, thereby imposing substantial constraints on the final performance. Few of them have been based on segmentation-free strategies where each pixel column has a potential cut location. Recently, segmentation-free strategies has added another perspective to the problem, leading to promising results. However, these strategies still show some limitations when dealing with a large number of touching digits. To bridge the resulting gap, in this paper, we hypothesize that a string of digits can be approached as a sequence of objects. We thus evaluate different end-to-end approaches to solve the HDSR problem, particularly in two verticals: those based on object-detection (e.g., Yolo and RetinaNet) and those based on sequence-to-sequence representation (CRNN). The main contribution of this work lies in its provision of a comprehensive comparison with a critical analysis of the above mentioned strategies on five benchmarks commonly used to assess HDSR, including the challenging Touching Pair dataset, NIST SD19, and two real-world datasets (CAR and CVL) proposed for the ICFHR 2014 competition on HDSR. Our results show that the Yolo model compares favorably against segmentation-free models with the advantage of having a shorter pipeline that minimizes the presence of heuristics-based models. It achieved a 97%, 96%, and 84% recognition rate on the NIST-SD19, CAR, and CVL datasets, respectively.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几十年中，大多数针对手写数字串识别（HDSR）提出的方法都采用数字分割，而数字分割以启发式为主，从而对最终性能造成了很大的限制。其中很少有基于无分割策略，其中每个像素列都有一个潜在的剪切位置。最近，无分割策略为该问题增添了另一种视角，并取得了有希望的结果。然而，这些策略在处理大量接触数字时仍然表现出一些局限性。为了弥补由此产生的差距，在本文中，我们假设可以将一串数字视为一系列对象。因此，我们评估了解决 HDSR 问题的不同端到端方法，特别是在两个垂直领域：基于对象检测的方法（例如 Yolo 和 RetinaNet）和基于序列到序列表示（CRNN）的方法。这项工作的主要贡献在于，它在五个常用于评估 HDSR 的基准上对上述策略进行了全面比较和批判性分析，包括具有挑战性的 Touching Pair 数据集、NIST SD19 以及为 ICFHR 2014 年 HDSR 竞赛提出的两个现实世界数据集（CAR 和 CVL）。我们的结果表明，Yolo 模型与无分割模型相比具有优势，其优点是管道较短，可以最大限度地减少基于启发式模型的存在。它在 NIST-SD19、CAR 和 CVL 数据集上分别实现了 97%、96% 和 84% 的识别率。

AI.tldr: 本文全面比较了端到端方法在手写数字字符串识别（HDSR）中的应用效果。
AI.motivation: 传统分割方法依赖启发式策略存在性能限制，分割-free方法在处理大量接触数字时仍有不足，需探索更优解决方案。
AI.method: 评估了基于目标检测（如Yolo、RetinaNet）和序列到序列（CRNN）的端到端方法，并在五个基准数据集上进行对比实验。
AI.result: Yolo模型在NIST-SD19、CAR和CVL数据集上的识别率分别为97%、96%和84%，优于分割-free模型。
AI.conclusion: Yolo模型凭借更短的流程和减少启发式依赖，在HDSR任务中展现出显著优势。

authors_text: Kalesha Bullard,Franziska Meier,Douwe Kiela,Joelle Pineau,Jakob Foerster
title: Exploring Zero-Shot Emergent Communication in Embodied Multi-Agent Populations
title_zh: 探索具身多智能体群体中的零样本紧急通信
abstract: Effective communication is an important skill for enabling information exchange and cooperation in multi-agent settings. Indeed, emergent communication is now a vibrant field of research, with common settings involving discrete cheap-talk channels. One limitation of this setting is that it does not allow for the emergent protocols to generalize beyond the training partners. Furthermore, so far emergent communication has primarily focused on the use of symbolic channels. In this work, we extend this line of work to a new modality, by studying agents that learn to communicate via actuating their joints in a 3D environment. We show that under realistic assumptions, a non-uniform distribution of intents and a common-knowledge energy cost, these agents can find protocols that generalize to novel partners. We also explore and analyze specific difficulties associated with finding these solutions in practice. Finally, we propose and evaluate initial training improvements to address these challenges, involving both specific training curricula and providing the latent feature that can be coordinated on during training.
summary: Effective communication is an important skill for enabling information exchange and cooperation in multi-agent settings. Indeed, emergent communication is now a vibrant field of research, with common settings involving discrete cheap-talk channels. One limitation of this setting is that it does not allow for the emergent protocols to generalize beyond the training partners. Furthermore, so far emergent communication has primarily focused on the use of symbolic channels. In this work, we extend this line of work to a new modality, by studying agents that learn to communicate via actuating their joints in a 3D environment. We show that under realistic assumptions, a non-uniform distribution of intents and a common-knowledge energy cost, these agents can find protocols that generalize to novel partners. We also explore and analyze specific difficulties associated with finding these solutions in practice. Finally, we propose and evaluate initial training improvements to address these challenges, involving both specific training curricula and providing the latent feature that can be coordinated on during training.
abstract_zh: 有效的沟通是在多智能体环境中实现信息交换和合作的一项重要技能。事实上，新兴通信现在是一个充满活力的研究领域，其常见设置涉及离散的廉价通话渠道。这种设置的一个限制是它不允许新兴协议推广到培训合作伙伴之外。此外，到目前为止，新兴通信主要集中在符号渠道的使用上。在这项工作中，我们通过研究通过在 3D 环境中驱动关节来学习通信的代理，将这一工作线扩展到一种新的模式。我们表明，在现实的假设、意图的不均匀分布和共同知识的能源成本下，这些代理可以找到可推广到新合作伙伴的协议。我们还探索并分析了在实践中寻找这些解决方案相关的具体困难。最后，我们提出并评估初始培训改进以应对这些挑战，包括具体的培训课程并提供可以在培训期间协调的潜在功能。

AI.tldr: 研究具身多智能体群体在零样本情况下的涌现通信机制，探索其泛化能力及训练方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在通信协议泛化和符号通道上的局限性，需探索更自然的通信方式以提升多智能体协作。
AI.method: 通过三维环境中的关节动作通信，结合非均匀意图分布和共同知识成本，设计训练课程和潜在特征协调机制。
AI.result: 验证了智能体在合理条件下能形成泛化通信协议，并识别了训练中的挑战，提出了有效的改进措施。
AI.conclusion: 证明了具身通信在零样本场景下的可行性，为多智能体协作提供了新思路，未来需进一步优化训练策略。

authors_text: Nitin Kamra,Hao Zhu,Dweep Trivedi,Ming Zhang,Yan Liu
title: Multi-agent Trajectory Prediction with Fuzzy Query Attention
title_zh: 具有模糊查询注意力的多智能体轨迹预测
abstract: Trajectory prediction for scenes with multiple agents and entities is a challenging problem in numerous domains such as traffic prediction, pedestrian tracking and path planning. We present a general architecture to address this challenge which models the crucial inductive biases of motion, namely, inertia, relative motion, intents and interactions. Specifically, we propose a relational model to flexibly model interactions between agents in diverse environments. Since it is well-known that human decision making is fuzzy by nature, at the core of our model lies a novel attention mechanism which models interactions by making continuous-valued (fuzzy) decisions and learning the corresponding responses. Our architecture demonstrates significant performance gains over existing state-of-the-art predictive models in diverse domains such as human crowd trajectories, US freeway traffic, NBA sports data and physics datasets. We also present ablations and augmentations to understand the decision-making process and the source of gains in our model.
summary: Trajectory prediction for scenes with multiple agents and entities is a challenging problem in numerous domains such as traffic prediction, pedestrian tracking and path planning. We present a general architecture to address this challenge which models the crucial inductive biases of motion, namely, inertia, relative motion, intents and interactions. Specifically, we propose a relational model to flexibly model interactions between agents in diverse environments. Since it is well-known that human decision making is fuzzy by nature, at the core of our model lies a novel attention mechanism which models interactions by making continuous-valued (fuzzy) decisions and learning the corresponding responses. Our architecture demonstrates significant performance gains over existing state-of-the-art predictive models in diverse domains such as human crowd trajectories, US freeway traffic, NBA sports data and physics datasets. We also present ablations and augmentations to understand the decision-making process and the source of gains in our model.
abstract_zh: 在交通预测、行人跟踪和路径规划等众多领域中，具有多个代理和实体的场景的轨迹预测是一个具有挑战性的问题。我们提出了一个通用架构来应对这一挑战，该架构对运动的关键归纳偏差进行建模，即惯性、相对运动、意图和交互。具体来说，我们提出了一种关系模型来灵活地建模不同环境中代理之间的交互。众所周知，人类决策本质上是模糊的，因此我们模型的核心在于一种新颖的注意力机制，该机制通过做出连续值（模糊）决策并学习相应的响应来模拟交互。我们的架构在不同领域（例如人群轨迹、美国高速公路交通、NBA 体育数据和物理数据集）中展示了比现有最先进的预测模型显着的性能提升。我们还提出了消融和增强，以了解我们模型中的决策过程和收益来源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模糊查询注意力机制的多智能体轨迹预测模型，通过建模运动惯性、相对运动、意图及交互等关键因素，解决复杂场景下的轨迹预测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法难以有效处理多智能体间的复杂交互关系，且未充分考虑人类决策的模糊性特征，导致在动态场景中预测精度不足。
AI.method: 设计包含关系交互模块的通用架构，核心采用模糊查询注意力机制，通过连续值决策模拟智能体间交互，并结合运动学先验知识建模轨迹演化。
AI.result: 在人群轨迹、交通流量、体育运动及物理模拟等四个领域数据集上均优于现有SOTA方法，消融实验验证了模糊注意力机制对性能提升的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 模糊查询注意力机制有效捕捉多智能体动态交互特性，为复杂场景轨迹预测提供了新的建模范式，未来可拓展至更复杂的多模态决策场景。

authors_text: Yongwei Wang,Xin Ding,Li Ding,Rabab Ward,Z. Jane Wang
title: Perception Matters: Exploring Imperceptible and Transferable Anti-forensics for GAN-generated Fake Face Imagery Detection
title_zh: 感知很重要：探索难以察觉和可转移的反取证，用于 GAN 生成的假人脸图像检测
abstract: Recently, generative adversarial networks (GANs) can generate photo-realistic fake facial images which are perceptually indistinguishable from real face photos, promoting research on fake face detection. Though fake face forensics can achieve high detection accuracy, their anti-forensic counterparts are less investigated. Here we explore more \textit{imperceptible} and \textit{transferable} anti-forensics for fake face imagery detection based on adversarial attacks. Since facial and background regions are often smooth, even small perturbation could cause noticeable perceptual impairment in fake face images. Therefore it makes existing adversarial attacks ineffective as an anti-forensic method. Our perturbation analysis reveals the intuitive reason of the perceptual degradation issue when directly applying existing attacks. We then propose a novel adversarial attack method, better suitable for image anti-forensics, in the transformed color domain by considering visual perception. Simple yet effective, the proposed method can fool both deep learning and non-deep learning based forensic detectors, achieving higher attack success rate and significantly improved visual quality. Specially, when adversaries consider imperceptibility as a constraint, the proposed anti-forensic method can improve the average attack success rate by around 30\% on fake face images over two baseline attacks. \textit{More imperceptible} and \textit{more transferable}, the proposed method raises new security concerns to fake face imagery detection. We have released our code for public use, and hopefully the proposed method can be further explored in related forensic applications as an anti-forensic benchmark.
summary: Recently, generative adversarial networks (GANs) can generate photo-realistic fake facial images which are perceptually indistinguishable from real face photos, promoting research on fake face detection. Though fake face forensics can achieve high detection accuracy, their anti-forensic counterparts are less investigated. Here we explore more \textit{imperceptible} and \textit{transferable} anti-forensics for fake face imagery detection based on adversarial attacks. Since facial and background regions are often smooth, even small perturbation could cause noticeable perceptual impairment in fake face images. Therefore it makes existing adversarial attacks ineffective as an anti-forensic method. Our perturbation analysis reveals the intuitive reason of the perceptual degradation issue when directly applying existing attacks. We then propose a novel adversarial attack method, better suitable for image anti-forensics, in the transformed color domain by considering visual perception. Simple yet effective, the proposed method can fool both deep learning and non-deep learning based forensic detectors, achieving higher attack success rate and significantly improved visual quality. Specially, when adversaries consider imperceptibility as a constraint, the proposed anti-forensic method can improve the average attack success rate by around 30\% on fake face images over two baseline attacks. \textit{More imperceptible} and \textit{more transferable}, the proposed method raises new security concerns to fake face imagery detection. We have released our code for public use, and hopefully the proposed method can be further explored in related forensic applications as an anti-forensic benchmark.
abstract_zh: 最近，生成对抗网络（GAN）可以生成逼真的假脸部图像，这些图像在感知上与真实脸部照片无法区分，从而促进了假脸部检测的研究。尽管假脸取证可以实现很高的检测精度，但其反取证的研究较少。在这里，我们探索更多 \textit{imperceptible} 和 \textit{transferable} 反取证，用于基于对抗性攻击的假人脸图像检测。由于面部和背景区域通常是平滑的，因此即使很小的扰动也可能会导致假面部图像出现明显的感知障碍。因此，它使得现有的对抗性攻击作为反取证方法无效。我们的扰动分析揭示了直接应用现有攻击时感知退化问题的直观原因。然后，我们在考虑视觉感知的变换颜色域中提出了一种新颖的对抗性攻击方法，更适合图像反取证。该方法简单而有效，可以欺骗基于深度学习和非深度学习的取证探测器，实现更高的攻击成功率并显着提高视觉质量。特别是，当对手将不可察觉性视为约束时，所提出的反取证方法可以将假人脸图像的平均攻击成功率比两次基线攻击提高约 30%。 \textit{更难以察觉}和\textit{更可转移}，所提出的方法对虚假人脸图像检测提出了新的安全问题。我们已经发布了代码供公众使用，希望所提出的方法可以作为反取证基准在相关取证应用中得到进一步探索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种更隐蔽且可迁移的对抗性攻击方法，用于应对基于GAN生成的假人脸图像检测的反取证问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法在假人脸图像上易导致感知退化，无法满足反取证对隐蔽性的需求，亟需更有效的抗检测方案。
AI.method: 在转换后的颜色域中设计新型对抗攻击方法，结合视觉感知特性优化扰动分布，同时满足隐蔽性约束。
AI.result: 在两个基准攻击方法基础上提升平均攻击成功率约30%，显著改善视觉质量并欺骗深度学习与非深度学习检测器。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为假人脸检测系统带来新的安全挑战，可作为反取证领域的基准方案公开使用。

authors_text: Yuncheng Hua,Yuan-Fang Li,Guilin Qi,Wei Wu,Jingyao Zhang,Daiqing Qi
title: Less is More: Data-Efficient Complex Question Answering over Knowledge Bases
title_zh: 少即是多：基于知识库的数据高效复杂问答
abstract: Question answering is an effective method for obtaining information from knowledge bases (KB). In this paper, we propose the Neural-Symbolic Complex Question Answering (NS-CQA) model, a data-efficient reinforcement learning framework for complex question answering by using only a modest number of training samples. Our framework consists of a neural generator and a symbolic executor that, respectively, transforms a natural-language question into a sequence of primitive actions, and executes them over the knowledge base to compute the answer. We carefully formulate a set of primitive symbolic actions that allows us to not only simplify our neural network design but also accelerate model convergence. To reduce search space, we employ the copy and masking mechanisms in our encoder-decoder architecture to drastically reduce the decoder output vocabulary and improve model generalizability. We equip our model with a memory buffer that stores high-reward promising programs. Besides, we propose an adaptive reward function. By comparing the generated trial with the trials stored in the memory buffer, we derive the curriculum-guided reward bonus, i.e., the proximity and the novelty. To mitigate the sparse reward problem, we combine the adaptive reward and the reward bonus, reshaping the sparse reward into dense feedback. Also, we encourage the model to generate new trials to avoid imitating the spurious trials while making the model remember the past high-reward trials to improve data efficiency. Our NS-CQA model is evaluated on two datasets: CQA, a recent large-scale complex question answering dataset, and WebQuestionsSP, a multi-hop question answering dataset. On both datasets, our model outperforms the state-of-the-art models. Notably, on CQA, NS-CQA performs well on questions with higher complexity, while only using approximately 1% of the total training samples.

In this paper, we propose the Neural-Symbolic Complex Question Answering (NS-CQA) model, a data-efficient reinforcement learning framework for complex question answering by using only a modest number of training samples. Our framework consists of a neural generator and a symbolic executor that, respectively, transforms a natural-language question into a sequence of primitive actions, and executes them over the knowledge base to compute the answer. We carefully formulate a set of primitive symbolic actions that allows us to not only simplify our neural network design but also accelerate model convergence. To reduce search space, we employ the copy and masking mechanisms in our encoder-decoder architecture to drastically reduce the decoder output vocabulary and improve model generalizability. We equip our model with a memory buffer that stores high-reward promising programs. Besides, we propose an adaptive reward function. By comparing the generated trial with the trials stored in the memory buffer, we derive the curriculum-guided reward bonus, i.e., the proximity and the novelty. To mitigate the sparse reward problem, we combine the adaptive reward and the reward bonus, reshaping the sparse reward into dense feedback. Also, we encourage the model to generate new trials to avoid imitating the spurious trials while making the model remember the past high-reward trials to improve data efficiency. Our NS-CQA model is evaluated on two datasets: CQA, a recent large-scale complex question answering dataset, and WebQuestionsSP, a multi-hop question answering dataset. On both datasets, our model outperforms the state-of-the-art models. Notably, on CQA, NS-CQA performs well on questions with higher complexity, while only using approximately 1% of the total training samples.
abstract_zh: 问答是从知识库（KB）获取信息的有效方法。在本文中，我们提出了神经符号复杂问答（NS-CQA）模型，这是一种数据高效的强化学习框架，仅使用适量的训练样本即可回答复杂的问题。我们的框架由神经生成器和符号执行器组成，它们分别将自然语言问题转换为一系列原始动作，并在知识库上执行它们以计算答案。我们精心制定了一组原始符号动作，不仅可以简化神经网络设计，还可以加速模型收敛。为了减少搜索空间，我们在编码器-解码器架构中采用复制和屏蔽机制，以大幅减少解码器输出词汇并提高模型的泛化性。我们为我们的模型配备了一个内存缓冲区，用于存储高回报的有前途的程序。此外，我们提出了自适应奖励函数。通过将生成的试验与存储在内存缓冲区中的试验进行比较，我们得出课程引导的奖励奖金，即接近性和新颖性。为了缓解稀疏奖励问题，我们将自适应奖励和奖励奖金结合起来，将稀疏奖励重塑为密集反馈。此外，我们鼓励模型生成新的试验，以避免模仿虚假试验，同时使模型记住过去的高奖励试验以提高数据效率。我们的 NS-CQA 模型在两个数据集上进行评估：CQA（最近的大规模复杂问答数据集）和 WebQuestionsSP（多跳问答数据集）。在这两个数据集上，我们的模型都优于最先进的模型。值得注意的是，在 CQA 上，NS-CQA 在复杂度较高的问题上表现良好，同时仅使用总训练样本的约 1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据高效的神经符号复杂问答模型NS-CQA，通过少量训练样本在知识库上实现复杂问题回答。
AI.motivation: 传统复杂问答模型需要大量标注数据，而实际场景中数据获取成本高，需探索数据高效的学习方法。
AI.method: 设计神经生成器与符号执行器联合框架，结合复制掩码机制压缩解码空间，引入记忆缓冲区存储高奖励程序，并采用自适应奖励函数结合新颖性与接近度奖励。
AI.result: 在CQA和WebQuestionsSP数据集上均优于现有方法，尤其在CQA复杂问题上仅用1%训练样本即达到优越性能。
AI.conclusion: NS-CQA通过神经符号协同与奖励机制创新，在保持高性能的同时显著提升数据效率，为复杂问答提供新范式。

search_text: Less is More: Data-Efficient Complex Question Answering over Knowledge Bases 少即是多：基于知识库的数据高效复杂问答 Question answering is an effective method for obtaining information from knowledge bases (KB). Our framework consists of a neural generator and a symbolic executor that, respectively, transforms a natural-language question into a sequence of primitive actions, and executes them over the knowledge base to compute the answer. We carefully formulate a set of primitive symbolic actions that allows us to not only simplify our neural network design but also accelerate model convergence. To reduce search space, we employ the copy and masking mechanisms in our encoder-decoder architecture to drastically reduce the decoder output vocabulary and improve model generalizability. We equip our model with a memory buffer that stores high-reward promising programs. Besides, we propose an adaptive reward function. By comparing the generated trial with the trials stored in the memory buffer, we derive the curriculum-guided reward bonus, i.e., the proximity and the novelty. To mitigate the sparse reward problem, we combine the adaptive reward and the reward bonus, reshaping the sparse reward into dense feedback. Also, we encourage the model to generate new trials to avoid imitating the spurious trials while making the model remember the past high-reward trials to improve data efficiency. Our NS-CQA model is evaluated on two datasets: CQA, a recent large-scale complex question answering dataset, and WebQuestionsSP, a multi-hop question answering dataset. On both datasets, our model outperforms the state-of-the-art models. authors_text: Maciej Besta,Dimitri Stanojevic,Tijana Zivic,Jagpreet Singh,Maurice Hoerold,Torsten Hoefler
title: Log(Graph): A Near-Optimal High-Performance Graph Representation
title_zh: Log(Graph)：一种近乎最优的高性能图表示
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 27th International Conference on Parallel Architectures and Compilation (PACT'18), 2018
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 27th International Conference on Parallel Architectures and Compilation (PACT'18), 2018
abstract: Today's graphs used in domains such as machine learning or social network analysis may contain hundreds of billions of edges. Yet, they are not necessarily stored efficiently, and standard graph representations such as adjacency lists waste a significant number of bits while graph compression schemes such as WebGraph often require time-consuming decompression. To address this, we propose Log(Graph): a graph representation that combines high compression ratios with very low-overhead decompression to enable cheaper and faster graph processing. The key idea is to encode a graph so that the parts of the representation approach or match the respective storage lower bounds. We call our approach "graph logarithmization" because these bounds are usually logarithmic. Our high-performance Log(Graph) implementation based on modern bitwise operations and state-of-the-art succinct data structures achieves high compression ratios as well as performance. For example, compared to the tuned Graph Algorithm Processing Benchmark Suite (GAPBS), it reduces graph sizes by 20-35% while matching GAPBS' performance or even delivering speedups due to reducing amounts of transferred data. It approaches the compression ratio of the established WebGraph compression library while enabling speedups of up to more than 2x. Log(Graph) can improve the design of various graph processing engines or libraries on single NUMA nodes as well as distributed-memory systems.
summary: Today's graphs used in domains such as machine learning or social network analysis may contain hundreds of billions of edges. Yet, they are not necessarily stored efficiently, and standard graph representations such as adjacency lists waste a significant number of bits while graph compression schemes such as WebGraph often require time-consuming decompression. To address this, we propose Log(Graph): a graph representation that combines high compression ratios with very low-overhead decompression to enable cheaper and faster graph processing. The key idea is to encode a graph so that the parts of the representation approach or match the respective storage lower bounds. We call our approach "graph logarithmization" because these bounds are usually logarithmic. Our high-performance Log(Graph) implementation based on modern bitwise operations and state-of-the-art succinct data structures achieves high compression ratios as well as performance. For example, compared to the tuned Graph Algorithm Processing Benchmark Suite (GAPBS), it reduces graph sizes by 20-35% while matching GAPBS' performance or even delivering speedups due to reducing amounts of transferred data. It approaches the compression ratio of the established WebGraph compression library while enabling speedups of up to more than 2x. Log(Graph) can improve the design of various graph processing engines or libraries on single NUMA nodes as well as distributed-memory systems.
abstract_zh: 当今机器学习或社交网络分析等领域使用的图可能包含数千亿条边。然而，它们不一定能有效存储，并且邻接列表等标准图形表示会浪费大量比特，而 WebGraph 等图形压缩方案通常需要耗时的解压缩。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Log(Graph)：一种图表示形式，它将高压缩比与非常低开销的解压缩相结合，以实现更便宜和更快的图处理。关键思想是对图进行编码，以便表示的各个部分接近或匹配相应的存储下限。我们将我们的方法称为“图对数化”，因为这些界限通常是对数的。我们的高性能日志（图）实现基于现代按位运算和最先进的简洁数据结构，实现了高压缩比和性能。例如，与经过调整的图形算法处理基准套件 (GAPBS) 相比，它可以将图形大小减少 20-35%，同时与 GAPBS 的性能相匹配，甚至由于传输数据量的减少而提供加速。它接近已建立的 WebGraph 压缩库的压缩率，同时加速速度高达 2 倍以上。 Log(Graph) 可以改进单个 NUMA 节点以及分布式内存系统上的各种图形处理引擎或库的设计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Log(Graph)的高效图表示方法，结合高压缩比和低开销解压缩，以提升大规模图处理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图存储方法（如邻接表）存在存储效率低、解压缩耗时等问题，而压缩方案（如WebGraph）虽压缩率高但解压缩过程缓慢，难以满足大规模图处理需求。
AI.method: 通过将图结构编码接近理论存储下界（对数级），结合现代位运算和先进简洁数据结构，实现高压缩比与快速解压缩的图表示方法。
AI.result: 相比GAPBS基准测试，图存储体积减少20-35%且性能相当或更优；相比WebGraph压缩库，压缩率相近但速度提升超2倍。
AI.conclusion: Log(Graph)为单节点NUMA系统和分布式内存系统中的图处理引擎设计提供了优化方案，兼顾存储效率与计算性能。

authors_text: Yuncheng Hua,Yuan-Fang Li,Gholamreza Haffari,Guilin Qi,Tongtong Wu
title: Few-Shot Complex Knowledge Base Question Answering via Meta Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过元强化学习进行少样本复杂知识库问答
abstract: Complex question-answering (CQA) involves answering complex natural-language questions on a knowledge base (KB). However, the conventional neural program induction (NPI) approach exhibits uneven performance when the questions have different types, harboring inherently different characteristics, e.g., difficulty level. This paper proposes a meta-reinforcement learning approach to program induction in CQA to tackle the potential distributional bias in questions. Our method quickly and effectively adapts the meta-learned programmer to new questions based on the most similar questions retrieved from the training data. The meta-learned policy is then used to learn a good programming policy, utilizing the trial trajectories and their rewards for similar questions in the support set. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the CQA dataset (Saha et al., 2018) while using only five trial trajectories for the top-5 retrieved questions in each support set, and metatraining on tasks constructed from only 1% of the training set. We have released our code at https://github.com/DevinJake/MRL-CQA.

However, the conventional neural program induction (NPI) approach exhibits uneven performance when the questions have different types, harboring inherently different characteristics, e.g., difficulty level. This paper proposes a meta-reinforcement learning approach to program induction in CQA to tackle the potential distributional bias in questions. Our method quickly and effectively adapts the meta-learned programmer to new questions based on the most similar questions retrieved from the training data. The meta-learned policy is then used to learn a good programming policy, utilizing the trial trajectories and their rewards for similar questions in the support set. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the CQA dataset (Saha et al., 2018) while using only five trial trajectories for the top-5 retrieved questions in each support set, and metatraining on tasks constructed from only 1% of the training set. We have released our code at https://github.com/DevinJake/MRL-CQA.
abstract_zh: 复杂问答 (CQA) 涉及在知识库 (KB) 上回答复杂的自然语言问题。然而，当问题具有不同类型、具有本质上不同的特征（例如难度级别）时，传统的神经程序归纳（NPI）方法表现出不均匀的性能。本文提出了一种元强化学习方法来进行 CQA 中的程序归纳，以解决问题中潜在的分布偏差。我们的方法基于从训练数据中检索到的最相似的问题，快速有效地使元学习程序员适应新问题。然后，元学习策略用于学习良好的编程策略，利用试验轨迹及其对支持集中类似问题的奖励。我们的方法在 CQA 数据集（Saha et al., 2018）上实现了最先进的性能，同时仅对每个支持集中检索到的前 5 个问题使用 5 个试验轨迹，并对仅由 1% 的训练集构建的任务进行元训练。我们已在 https://github.com/DevinJake/MRL-CQA 发布了我们的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于元强化学习的少样本复杂知识库问答方法，以解决传统神经程序归纳方法在处理不同类型问题时的性能不均衡问题。
AI.motivation: 传统神经程序归纳（NPI）方法在处理具有不同内在特征（如难度级别）的复杂问题时表现不一致，存在潜在的分布偏差。
AI.method: 通过元强化学习框架，利用训练数据中检索到的最相似问题快速适应新问题，结合支持集内相似问题的试错轨迹和奖励学习编程策略。
AI.result: 在CQA数据集上以每个支持集仅使用5次试错轨迹和1%训练数据构建的任务中达到最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 元强化学习有效提升了少样本场景下复杂知识库问答的适应能力，显著降低了数据需求。

authors_text: Yuncheng Hua,Yuan-Fang Li,Gholamreza Haffari,Guilin Qi,Wei Wu
title: Retrieve, Program, Repeat: Complex Knowledge Base Question Answering via Alternate Meta-learning
title_zh: 检索、编程、重复：通过替代元学习回答复杂的知识库问题
abstract: A compelling approach to complex question answering is to convert the question to a sequence of actions, which can then be executed on the knowledge base to yield the answer, aka the programmer-interpreter approach. Use similar training questions to the test question, meta-learning enables the programmer to adapt to unseen questions to tackle potential distributional biases quickly. However, this comes at the cost of manually labeling similar questions to learn a retrieval model, which is tedious and expensive. In this paper, we present a novel method that automatically learns a retrieval model alternately with the programmer from weak supervision, i.e., the system's performance with respect to the produced answers. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to train the retrieval model with the programmer jointly. Our system leads to state-of-the-art performance on a large-scale task for complex question answering over knowledge bases. We have released our code at https://github.com/DevinJake/MARL.
summary: A compelling approach to complex question answering is to convert the question to a sequence of actions, which can then be executed on the knowledge base to yield the answer, aka the programmer-interpreter approach. Use similar training questions to the test question, meta-learning enables the programmer to adapt to unseen questions to tackle potential distributional biases quickly. However, this comes at the cost of manually labeling similar questions to learn a retrieval model, which is tedious and expensive. In this paper, we present a novel method that automatically learns a retrieval model alternately with the programmer from weak supervision, i.e., the system's performance with respect to the produced answers. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to train the retrieval model with the programmer jointly. Our system leads to state-of-the-art performance on a large-scale task for complex question answering over knowledge bases. We have released our code at https://github.com/DevinJake/MARL.
abstract_zh: 解决复杂问题的一种引人注目的方法是将问题转换为一系列操作，然后可以在知识库上执行该操作以产生答案，也称为程序员解释器方法。使用与测试问题类似的训练问题，元学习使程序员能够适应看不见的问题，以快速解决潜在的分布偏差。然而，这是以手动标记类似问题来学习检索模型为代价的，这是乏味且昂贵的。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，可以与程序员交替地从弱监督中自动学习检索模型，即系统相对于产生的答案的性能。据我们所知，这是与程序员联合训练检索模型的首次尝试。我们的系统在知识库复杂问题回答的大规模任务中具有最先进的性能。我们已在 https://github.com/DevinJake/MARL 发布了我们的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过交替元学习实现复杂知识库问答的新方法，自动学习检索模型以减少人工标注依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需手动标注相似问题来训练检索模型，成本高昂且效率低，需自动化的弱监督学习方案。
AI.method: 联合训练检索模型与程序生成器，利用系统生成答案的性能作为弱监督信号进行交替元学习。
AI.result: 在大规模复杂知识库问答任务中达到最先进水平，并开源了代码实现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自动联合优化检索与程序生成，有效提升了复杂问答系统的适应性与性能。

authors_text: Shahan Ali Memon
title: Acoustic Correlates of the Voice Qualifiers: A Survey
title_zh: 语音限定符的声学相关性：调查
abstract: Our voices are as distinctive as our faces and fingerprints. There is a spectrum of non-disjoint traits that make our voices unique and identifiable, such as the fundamental frequency, the intensity, and most interestingly the quality of the speech. Voice quality refers to the characteristic features of an individual's voice. Previous research has from time-to-time proven the ubiquity of voice quality in making different paralinguistic inferences. These inferences range from identifying personality traits, to health conditions and beyond. In this manuscript, we first map the paralinguistic voice qualifiers to their acoustic correlates in the light of the previous research and literature. We also determine the openSMILE correlates one could possibly use to measure those correlates. In the second part, we give a set of example paralinguistic inferences that can be made using different acoustic and perceptual voice quality features.
summary: Our voices are as distinctive as our faces and fingerprints. There is a spectrum of non-disjoint traits that make our voices unique and identifiable, such as the fundamental frequency, the intensity, and most interestingly the quality of the speech. Voice quality refers to the characteristic features of an individual's voice. Previous research has from time-to-time proven the ubiquity of voice quality in making different paralinguistic inferences. These inferences range from identifying personality traits, to health conditions and beyond. In this manuscript, we first map the paralinguistic voice qualifiers to their acoustic correlates in the light of the previous research and literature. We also determine the openSMILE correlates one could possibly use to measure those correlates. In the second part, we give a set of example paralinguistic inferences that can be made using different acoustic and perceptual voice quality features.
abstract_zh: 我们的声音就像我们的脸和指纹一样独特。有一系列互不相交的特征使我们的声音独特且可识别，例如基频、强度，以及最有趣的是语音的质量。语音质量是指个人声音的特征。先前的研究已经多次证明语音质量在进行不同的副语言推理时无处不在。这些推论的范围从识别人格特征到健康状况等等。在这份手稿中，我们首先根据之前的研究和文献将副语言语音限定符映射到它们的声学相关性。我们还确定了可以用来衡量这些相关性的 openSMILE 相关性。在第二部分中，我们给出了一组可以使用不同的声学和感知语音质量特征进行的副语言推理示例。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在调查声音质量的声学相关性，并探讨其在副语言推理中的应用。
AI.motivation: 声音质量能够反映个性特征、健康状况等信息，但现有研究缺乏系统性梳理和可操作的测量方法。
AI.method: 通过文献综述将声音特征映射到声学参数，结合openSMILE工具进行测量，并通过案例展示副语言推理过程。
AI.result: 总结了声音质量特征与声学参数的对应关系，提供了openSMILE参数配置示例及具体推理应用场景。
AI.conclusion: 声音质量的声学分析为副语言推理提供了有效途径，openSMILE等工具可促进该领域的实际应用研究。

search_text: Acoustic Correlates of the Voice Qualifiers: A Survey 语音限定符的声学相关性：调查 Our voices are as distinctive as our faces and fingerprints. There is a spectrum of non-disjoint traits that make our voices unique and identifiable, such as the fundamental frequency, the intensity, and most interestingly the quality of the speech. Voice quality refers to the characteristic features of an individual's voice. Previous research has from time-to-time proven the ubiquity of voice quality in making different paralinguistic inferences. These inferences range from identifying personality traits, to health conditions and beyond. In this manuscript, we first map the paralinguistic voice qualifiers to their acoustic correlates in the light of the previous research and literature. We also determine the openSMILE correlates one could possibly use to measure those correlates. In the second part, we give a set of example paralinguistic inferences that can be made using different acoustic and perceptual voice quality features. 我们的声音就像我们的脸和指纹一样独特。有一系列互不相交的特征使我们的声音独特且可识别，例如基频、强度，以及最有趣的是语音的质量。语音质量是指个人声音的特征。先前的研究已经多次证明语音质量在进行不同的副语言推理时无处不在。这些推论的范围从识别人格特征到健康状况等等。在这份手稿中，我们首先根据之前的研究和文献将副语言语音限定符映射到它们的声学相关性。我们还确定了可以用来衡量这些相关性的 openSMILE 相关性。在第二部分中，我们给出了一组可以使用不同的声学和感知语音质量特征进行的副语言推理示例。 本文旨在调查声音质量的声学相关性，并探讨其在副语言推理中的应用。 Shahan Ali Memon cs.SD,cs.MM,eess.AS

authors_text: Danial Maleki,Mehdi Afshari,Morteza Babaie,H. R. Tizhoosh
title: Ink Marker Segmentation in Histopathology Images Using Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习在组织病理学图像中进行墨水标记分割
comment: Accepted for publication in the 15th International Symposium on Visual Computing (ISVC 2020)
comments: Accepted for publication in the 15th International Symposium on Visual Computing (ISVC 2020)
abstract: Due to the recent advancements in machine vision, digital pathology has gained significant attention. Histopathology images are distinctly rich in visual information. The tissue glass slide images are utilized for disease diagnosis. Researchers study many methods to process histopathology images and facilitate fast and reliable diagnosis; therefore, the availability of high-quality slides becomes paramount. The quality of the images can be negatively affected when the glass slides are ink-marked by pathologists to delineate regions of interest. As an example, in one of the largest public histopathology datasets, The Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA), approximately $12\%$ of the digitized slides are affected by manual delineations through ink markings. To process these open-access slide images and other repositories for the design and validation of new methods, an algorithm to detect the marked regions of the images is essential to avoid confusing tissue pixels with ink-colored pixels for computer methods. In this study, we propose to segment the ink-marked areas of pathology patches through a deep network. A dataset from $79$ whole slide images with $4,305$ patches was created and different networks were trained. Finally, the results showed an FPN model with the EffiecentNet-B3 as the backbone was found to be the superior configuration with an F1 score of $94.53\%$.

The tissue glass slide images are utilized for disease diagnosis. Researchers study many methods to process histopathology images and facilitate fast and reliable diagnosis; therefore, the availability of high-quality slides becomes paramount. The quality of the images can be negatively affected when the glass slides are ink-marked by pathologists to delineate regions of interest. As an example, in one of the largest public histopathology datasets, The Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA), approximately $12\%$ of the digitized slides are affected by manual delineations through ink markings. To process these open-access slide images and other repositories for the design and validation of new methods, an algorithm to detect the marked regions of the images is essential to avoid confusing tissue pixels with ink-colored pixels for computer methods. In this study, we propose to segment the ink-marked areas of pathology patches through a deep network. A dataset from $79$ whole slide images with $4,305$ patches was created and different networks were trained. Finally, the results showed an FPN model with the EffiecentNet-B3 as the backbone was found to be the superior configuration with an F1 score of $94.53\%$.
abstract_zh: 由于机器视觉的最新进展，数字病理学受到了极大的关注。组织病理学图像的视觉信息明显丰富。组织载玻片图像用于疾病诊断。研究人员研究了许多处理组织病理学图像并促进快速可靠诊断的方法；因此，高质量幻灯片的可用性变得至关重要。当病理学家用墨水标记载玻片来描绘感兴趣区域时，图像质量可能会受到负面影响。例如，在最大的公共组织病理学数据集之一癌症基因组图谱 (TCGA) 中，大约 12\%$ 的数字化载玻片受到通过墨水标记进行的手动描绘的影响。为了处理这些开放获取的幻灯片图像和其他存储库以设计和验证新方法，检测图像标记区域的算法至关重要，以避免在计算机方法中将组织像素与墨水色像素混淆。在这项研究中，我们建议通过深层网络分割病理斑块的墨水标记区域。创建了一个由 79 美元的整张幻灯片图像和 4,305 美元的补丁组成的数据集，并训练了不同的网络。最后，结果表明以 EffiecentNet-B3 作为主干的 FPN 模型被认为是最佳配置，F1 得分为 $94.53\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的方法，用于分割组织病理学图像中的墨水标记区域。
AI.motivation: 病理切片图像中的手动墨水标记会干扰计算机视觉方法的分析，影响诊断准确性。公开数据集中约12%的图像受此影响，需开发算法以消除干扰。
AI.method: 构建包含79张全切片图像和4,305个图像块的数据集，训练多种网络模型，最终采用FPN架构结合EfficientNet-B3作为主干网络进行分割。
AI.result: 所提出方法在测试中达到94.53%的F1分数，表明其对墨水标记区域的分割效果优异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了病理图像中墨水标记的分割问题，为后续图像分析提供了高质量数据支持。

authors_text: Pedro Quaresma,Walther Neuper,João Marcos
title: Proceedings 9th International Workshop on Theorem Proving Components for Educational Software
title_zh: 第九届教育软件定理证明组件国际研讨会论文集
abstract: The 9th International Workshop on Theorem-Proving Components for Educational Software (ThEdu'20) was scheduled to happen on June 29 as a satellite of the IJCAR-FSCD 2020 joint meeting, in Paris. The COVID-19 pandemic came by surprise, though, and the main conference was virtualised. Fearing that an online meeting would not allow our community to fully reproduce the usual face-to-face networking opportunities of the ThEdu initiative, the Steering Committee of ThEdu decided to cancel our workshop. Given that many of us had already planned and worked for that moment, we decided that ThEdu'20 could still live in the form of an EPTCS volume. The EPTCS concurred with us, recognising this very singular situation, and accepted our proposal of organising a special issue with papers submitted to ThEdu'20. An open call for papers was then issued, and attracted five submissions, all of which have been accepted by our reviewers, who produced three careful reports on each of the contributions. The resulting revised papers are collected in the present volume. We, the volume editors, hope that this collection of papers will help further promoting the development of theorem-proving-based software, and that it will collaborate to improve the mutual understanding between computer mathematicians and stakeholders in education. With some luck, we would actually expect that the very special circumstances set up by the worst sanitary crisis in a century will happen to reinforce the need for the application of certified components and of verification methods for the production of educational software that would be available even when the traditional on-site learning experiences turn out not to be recommendable.
summary: The 9th International Workshop on Theorem-Proving Components for Educational Software (ThEdu'20) was scheduled to happen on June 29 as a satellite of the IJCAR-FSCD 2020 joint meeting, in Paris. The COVID-19 pandemic came by surprise, though, and the main conference was virtualised. Fearing that an online meeting would not allow our community to fully reproduce the usual face-to-face networking opportunities of the ThEdu initiative, the Steering Committee of ThEdu decided to cancel our workshop. Given that many of us had already planned and worked for that moment, we decided that ThEdu'20 could still live in the form of an EPTCS volume. The EPTCS concurred with us, recognising this very singular situation, and accepted our proposal of organising a special issue with papers submitted to ThEdu'20. An open call for papers was then issued, and attracted five submissions, all of which have been accepted by our reviewers, who produced three careful reports on each of the contributions. The resulting revised papers are collected in the present volume. We, the volume editors, hope that this collection of papers will help further promoting the development of theorem-proving-based software, and that it will collaborate to improve the mutual understanding between computer mathematicians and stakeholders in education. With some luck, we would actually expect that the very special circumstances set up by the worst sanitary crisis in a century will happen to reinforce the need for the application of certified components and of verification methods for the production of educational software that would be available even when the traditional on-site learning experiences turn out not to be recommendable.
abstract_zh: 第九届教育软件定理证明组件国际研讨会 (ThEdu'20) 定于 6 月 29 日在巴黎举行，作为 IJCAR-FSCD 2020 联席会议的卫星会议。然而，新冠肺炎 (COVID-19) 大流行来得猝不及防，主要会议是虚拟举行的。由于担心在线会议无法让我们的社区充分重现 ThEdu 倡议通常的面对面交流机会，ThEdu 指导委员会决定取消我们的研讨会。鉴于我们中的许多人已经为那一刻做好了计划和工作，我们决定 ThEdu'20 仍然可以以 EPTCS 卷的形式存在。 EPTCS 同意我们的观点，认识到这种非常特殊的情况，并接受了我们的建议，即组织一期特刊，其中包含提交给 ThEdu'20 的论文。随后发布了公开征集论文，吸引了五篇论文，所有论文均已被我们的审稿人接受，审稿人对每篇论文都制作了三份仔细的报告。由此产生的修订论文收集在本卷中。我们，卷的编辑，希望这本论文集将有助于进一步促进基于定理证明的软件的开发，并合作增进计算机数学家和教育利益相关者之间的相互理解。如果幸运的话，我们实际上预计，一个世纪以来最严重的卫生危机所造成的非常特殊的情况将会加强对认证组件和验证方法的应用的需求，以生产教育软件，即使传统的现场学习体验不值得推荐，这些软件也可以使用。

AI.tldr: 该论文总结了第9届定理证明组件用于教育软件国际研讨会（ThEdu'20）的筹备与成果，尽管因疫情取消线下会议，但仍通过EPTCS特刊形式发布论文集。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情导致原定线下研讨会无法进行，为维持学术交流与促进定理证明技术在教育软件中的应用，决定以特刊形式延续ThEdu'20成果。
AI.method: 通过公开征稿、同行评审（每篇论文三份评审报告）及修订，最终收录五篇论文形成EPTCS特刊。
AI.result: 成功发布包含五篇经评审通过的修订论文的EPTCS特刊，推动了计算机数学家与教育利益相关者的协作。
AI.conclusion: 特殊疫情背景强化了认证组件与验证方法在教育软件开发中的重要性，特刊为未来远程教育提供了技术支撑。

The resulting revised papers are collected in the present volume. We, the volume editors, hope that this collection of papers will help further promoting the development of theorem-proving-based software, and that it will collaborate to improve the mutual understanding between computer mathematicians and stakeholders in education. With some luck, we would actually expect that the very special circumstances set up by the worst sanitary crisis in a century will happen to reinforce the need for the application of certified components and of verification methods for the production of educational software that would be available even when the traditional on-site learning experiences turn out not to be recommendable. 第九届教育软件定理证明组件国际研讨会 (ThEdu'20) 定于 6 月 29 日在巴黎举行，作为 IJCAR-FSCD 2020 联席会议的卫星会议。然而，新冠肺炎 (COVID-19) 大流行来得猝不及防，主要会议是虚拟举行的。由于担心在线会议无法让我们的社区充分重现 ThEdu 倡议通常的面对面交流机会，ThEdu 指导委员会决定取消我们的研讨会。鉴于我们中的许多人已经为那一刻做好了计划和工作，我们决定 ThEdu'20 仍然可以以 EPTCS 卷的形式存在。 EPTCS 同意我们的观点，认识到这种非常特殊的情况，并接受了我们的建议，即组织一期特刊，其中包含提交给 ThEdu'20 的论文。随后发布了公开征集论文，吸引了五篇论文，所有论文均已被我们的审稿人接受，审稿人对每篇论文都制作了三份仔细的报告。由此产生的修订论文收集在本卷中。我们，卷的编辑，希望这本论文集将有助于进一步促进基于定理证明的软件的开发，并合作增进计算机数学家和教育利益相关者之间的相互理解。如果幸运的话，我们实际上预计，一个世纪以来最严重的卫生危机所造成的非常特殊的情况将会加强对认证组件和验证方法的应用的需求，以生产教育软件，即使传统的现场学习体验不值得推荐，这些软件也可以使用。 该论文总结了第9届定理证明组件用于教育软件国际研讨会（ThEdu'20）的筹备与成果，尽管因疫情取消线下会议，但仍通过EPTCS特刊形式发布论文集。 Pedro Quaresma,Walther Neuper,João Marcos cs.AI

authors_text: Cheng Chi,Fangyun Wei,Han Hu
title: RelationNet++: Bridging Visual Representations for Object Detection via Transformer Decoder
title_zh: RelationNet++：通过 Transformer 解码器桥接视觉表示以进行对象检测
abstract: Existing object detection frameworks are usually built on a single format of object/part representation, i.e., anchor/proposal rectangle boxes in RetinaNet and Faster R-CNN, center points in FCOS and RepPoints, and corner points in CornerNet. While these different representations usually drive the frameworks to perform well in different aspects, e.g., better classification or finer localization, it is in general difficult to combine these representations in a single framework to make good use of each strength, due to the heterogeneous or non-grid feature extraction by different representations. This paper presents an attention-based decoder module similar as that in Transformer~\cite{vaswani2017attention} to bridge other representations into a typical object detector built on a single representation format, in an end-to-end fashion. The other representations act as a set of \emph{key} instances to strengthen the main \emph{query} representation features in the vanilla detectors. Novel techniques are proposed towards efficient computation of the decoder module, including a \emph{key sampling} approach and a \emph{shared location embedding} approach. The proposed module is named \emph{bridging visual representations} (BVR). It can perform in-place and we demonstrate its broad effectiveness in bridging other representations into prevalent object detection frameworks, including RetinaNet, Faster R-CNN, FCOS and ATSS, where about $1.5\sim3.0$ AP improvements are achieved. In particular, we improve a state-of-the-art framework with a strong backbone by about $2.0$ AP, reaching $52.7$ AP on COCO test-dev. The resulting network is named RelationNet++. The code will be available at https://github.com/microsoft/RelationNet2.

While these different representations usually drive the frameworks to perform well in different aspects, e.g., better classification or finer localization, it is in general difficult to combine these representations in a single framework to make good use of each strength, due to the heterogeneous or non-grid feature extraction by different representations. This paper presents an attention-based decoder module similar as that in Transformer~\cite{vaswani2017attention} to bridge other representations into a typical object detector built on a single representation format, in an end-to-end fashion. The other representations act as a set of \emph{key} instances to strengthen the main \emph{query} representation features in the vanilla detectors. Novel techniques are proposed towards efficient computation of the decoder module, including a \emph{key sampling} approach and a \emph{shared location embedding} approach. The proposed module is named \emph{bridging visual representations} (BVR). It can perform in-place and we demonstrate its broad effectiveness in bridging other representations into prevalent object detection frameworks, including RetinaNet, Faster R-CNN, FCOS and ATSS, where about $1.5\sim3.0$ AP improvements are achieved. In particular, we improve a state-of-the-art framework with a strong backbone by about $2.0$ AP, reaching $52.7$ AP on COCO test-dev. The resulting network is named RelationNet++. The code will be available at https://github.com/microsoft/RelationNet2.
abstract_zh: 现有的对象检测框架通常建立在单一格式的对象/部分表示之上，即 RetinaNet 和 Faster R-CNN 中的锚点/提议矩形框、FCOS 和 RepPoints 中的中心点以及 CornerNet 中的角点。虽然这些不同的表示通常驱动框架在不同方面表现良好，例如更好的分类或更精细的定位，但由于不同表示的异构或非网格特征提取，通常很难将这些表示组合在单个框架中以充分利用各自的优势。本文提出了一种基于注意力的解码器模块，类似于 Transformer~\cite{vaswani2017attention} 中的解码器模块，以端到端的方式将其他表示桥接到基于单一表示格式构建的典型对象检测器中。其他表示充当一组 \emph{key} 实例，以增强普通检测器中的主要 \emph{query} 表示特征。为了解码器模块的有效计算提出了新的技术，包括 emph{关键采样} 方法和 emph{共享位置嵌入} 方法。所提出的模块被命名为\emph{桥接视觉表示}（BVR）。它可以就地执行，我们展示了其在将其他表示连接到流行的对象检测框架方面的广泛有效性，包括 RetinaNet、Faster R-CNN、FCOS 和 ATSS，其中实现了约 1.5\sim3.0$ 的 AP 改进。特别是，我们将具有强大骨干的最先进框架提高了约 2.0 美元 AP，在 COCO 测试开发上达到 52.7 美元 AP。生成的网络被命名为 RelationNet++。该代码可在 https://github.com/microsoft/RelationNet2 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RelationNet++，通过Transformer解码器模块整合多种视觉表示以提升目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测框架通常依赖单一表示形式（如锚框、中心点等），难以有效融合不同表示的优势。
AI.method: 设计基于注意力机制的BVR模块，利用其他表示作为键实例增强主查询特征，并引入键采样和共享位置嵌入技术提升效率。
AI.result: 在RetinaNet、Faster R-CNN等主流框架中实现1.5~3.0 AP提升，最高达52.7 AP（COCO test-dev）。
AI.conclusion: BVR模块有效弥合了异构表示差异，为多表示融合提供了通用解决方案。

ai_content.result: 在RetinaNet、Faster R-CNN等主流框架中实现1.5~3.0 AP提升，最高达52.7 AP（COCO test-dev）。
ai_content.conclusion: BVR模块有效弥合了异构表示差异，为多表示融合提供了通用解决方案。

authors_text: Jie Zhang,Dongdong Chen,Jing Liao,Weiming Zhang,Gang Hua,Nenghai Yu
title: Passport-aware Normalization for Deep Model Protection
title_zh: 用于深度模型保护的护照感知标准化
comment: Fix typo error. To Appear in NeurIPs 2020, code at "https://github.com/ZJZAC/Passport-aware-Normalization"
comments: Fix typo error. To Appear in NeurIPs 2020, code at "https://github.com/ZJZAC/Passport-aware-Normalization"
abstract: Despite tremendous success in many application scenarios, deep learning faces serious intellectual property (IP) infringement threats. Considering the cost of designing and training a good model, infringements will significantly infringe the interests of the original model owner. Recently, many impressive works have emerged for deep model IP protection. However, they either are vulnerable to ambiguity attacks, or require changes in the target network structure by replacing its original normalization layers and hence cause significant performance drops. To this end, we propose a new passport-aware normalization formulation, which is generally applicable to most existing normalization layers and only needs to add another passport-aware branch for IP protection. This new branch is jointly trained with the target model but discarded in the inference stage. Therefore it causes no structure change in the target model. Only when the model IP is suspected to be stolen by someone, the private passport-aware branch is added back for ownership verification. Through extensive experiments, we verify its effectiveness in both image and 3D point recognition models. It is demonstrated to be robust not only to common attack techniques like fine-tuning and model compression, but also to ambiguity attacks. By further combining it with trigger-set based methods, both black-box and white-box verification can be achieved for enhanced security of deep learning models deployed in real systems. Code can be found at https://github.com/ZJZAC/Passport-aware-Normalization.
summary: Despite tremendous success in many application scenarios, deep learning faces serious intellectual property (IP) infringement threats. Considering the cost of designing and training a good model, infringements will significantly infringe the interests of the original model owner. Recently, many impressive works have emerged for deep model IP protection. However, they either are vulnerable to ambiguity attacks, or require changes in the target network structure by replacing its original normalization layers and hence cause significant performance drops. To this end, we propose a new passport-aware normalization formulation, which is generally applicable to most existing normalization layers and only needs to add another passport-aware branch for IP protection. This new branch is jointly trained with the target model but discarded in the inference stage. Therefore it causes no structure change in the target model. Only when the model IP is suspected to be stolen by someone, the private passport-aware branch is added back for ownership verification. Through extensive experiments, we verify its effectiveness in both image and 3D point recognition models. It is demonstrated to be robust not only to common attack techniques like fine-tuning and model compression, but also to ambiguity attacks. By further combining it with trigger-set based methods, both black-box and white-box verification can be achieved for enhanced security of deep learning models deployed in real systems. Code can be found at https://github.com/ZJZAC/Passport-aware-Normalization.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度学习在许多应用场景中取得了巨大成功，但仍面临着严重的知识产权（IP）侵权威胁。考虑到设计和训练一个好模型的成本，侵权行为将严重损害原模型所有者的利益。近年来，深度模型知识产权保护涌现出许多令人印象深刻的作品。然而，它们要么容易受到歧义攻击，要么需要通过替换其原始规范化层来改变目标网络结构，从而导致性能显着下降。为此，我们提出了一种新的护照感知标准化公式，该公式通常适用于大多数现有的标准化层，并且只需要添加另一个护照感知分支来进行IP保护。这个新分支与目标模型联合训练，但在推理阶段被丢弃。因此，它不会导致目标模型的结构发生变化。只有当模型IP被怀疑被某人窃取时，才会添加回私人护照感知分支以进行所有权验证。通过大量的实验，我们验证了其在图像和 3D 点识别模型中的有效性。它被证明不仅对微调和模型压缩等常见攻击技术具有鲁棒性，而且对歧义攻击也具有鲁棒性。通过进一步将其与基于触发集的方法相结合，可以实现黑盒和白盒验证，以增强实际系统中部署的深度学习模型的安全性。代码可以在 https://github.com/ZJZAC/Passport-aware-Normalization 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为护照感知归一化的新方法，用于保护深度学习模型的知识产权，防止模型被盗用。
AI.motivation: 现有深度模型知识产权保护方法存在易受攻击或性能下降的问题，需一种无需修改模型结构且有效的保护方案。
AI.method: 通过添加一个仅在训练和验证阶段使用的护照感知分支，与目标模型联合训练，推理时移除该分支以保持模型结构不变。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在图像和3D点识别模型中有效，对微调、模型压缩及模糊攻击具有鲁棒性，结合触发集方法可实现黑白盒验证。
AI.conclusion: 护照感知归一化提供了一种结构无损、安全高效的深度模型知识产权保护方案，适用于实际部署场景。

It is demonstrated to be robust not only to common attack techniques like fine-tuning and model compression, but also to ambiguity attacks. By further combining it with trigger-set based methods, both black-box and white-box verification can be achieved for enhanced security of deep learning models deployed in real systems. Code can be found at https://github.com/ZJZAC/Passport-aware-Normalization. 尽管深度学习在许多应用场景中取得了巨大成功，但仍面临着严重的知识产权（IP）侵权威胁。考虑到设计和训练一个好模型的成本，侵权行为将严重损害原模型所有者的利益。近年来，深度模型知识产权保护涌现出许多令人印象深刻的作品。然而，它们要么容易受到歧义攻击，要么需要通过替换其原始规范化层来改变目标网络结构，从而导致性能显着下降。为此，我们提出了一种新的护照感知标准化公式，该公式通常适用于大多数现有的标准化层，并且只需要添加另一个护照感知分支来进行IP保护。这个新分支与目标模型联合训练，但在推理阶段被丢弃。因此，它不会导致目标模型的结构发生变化。只有当模型IP被怀疑被某人窃取时，才会添加回私人护照感知分支以进行所有权验证。通过大量的实验，我们验证了其在图像和 3D 点识别模型中的有效性。它被证明不仅对微调和模型压缩等常见攻击技术具有鲁棒性，而且对歧义攻击也具有鲁棒性。通过进一步将其与基于触发集的方法相结合，可以实现黑盒和白盒验证，以增强实际系统中部署的深度学习模型的安全性。代码可以在 https://github.com/ZJZAC/Passport-aware-Normalization 找到。 本文提出一种名为护照感知归一化的新方法，用于保护深度学习模型的知识产权，防止模型被盗用。 Jie Zhang,Dongdong Chen,Jing Liao,Weiming Zhang,Gang Hua,Nenghai Yu cs.CV

authors_text: Mohandass Muthuraja,Octavio Arriaga,Paul Plöger,Frank Kirchner,Matias Valdenegro-Toro
title: Black-Box Optimization of Object Detector Scales
title_zh: 物体检测器尺度的黑盒优化
abstract: Object detectors have improved considerably in the last years by using advanced CNN architectures. However, many detector hyper-parameters are generally manually tuned, or they are used with values set by the detector authors. Automatic Hyper-parameter optimization has not been explored in improving CNN-based object detectors hyper-parameters. In this work, we propose the use of Black-box optimization methods to tune the prior/default box scales in Faster R-CNN and SSD, using Bayesian Optimization, SMAC, and CMA-ES. We show that by tuning the input image size and prior box anchor scale on Faster R-CNN mAP increases by 2% on PASCAL VOC 2007, and by 3% with SSD. On the COCO dataset with SSD there are mAP improvement in the medium and large objects, but mAP decreases by 1% in small objects. We also perform a regression analysis to find the significant hyper-parameters to tune.
summary: Object detectors have improved considerably in the last years by using advanced CNN architectures. However, many detector hyper-parameters are generally manually tuned, or they are used with values set by the detector authors. Automatic Hyper-parameter optimization has not been explored in improving CNN-based object detectors hyper-parameters. In this work, we propose the use of Black-box optimization methods to tune the prior/default box scales in Faster R-CNN and SSD, using Bayesian Optimization, SMAC, and CMA-ES. We show that by tuning the input image size and prior box anchor scale on Faster R-CNN mAP increases by 2% on PASCAL VOC 2007, and by 3% with SSD. On the COCO dataset with SSD there are mAP improvement in the medium and large objects, but mAP decreases by 1% in small objects. We also perform a regression analysis to find the significant hyper-parameters to tune.
abstract_zh: 通过使用先进的 CNN 架构，目标检测器在过去几年中得到了显着改进。然而，许多检测器超参数通常是手动调整的，或者与检测器作者设置的值一起使用。在改进基于 CNN 的目标检测器超参数方面，尚未探索自动超参数优化。在这项工作中，我们建议使用黑盒优化方法来调整 Faster R-CNN 和 SSD 中的先验/默认框尺度，使用贝叶斯优化、SMAC 和 CMA-ES。我们表明，通过调整 Faster R-CNN 上的输入图像大小和先验框锚定尺度，PASCAL VOC 2007 上的 mAP 增加了 2%，SSD 上的 mAP 增加了 3%。在带有 SSD 的 COCO 数据集上，中型和大型对象的 mAP 有所提高，但小型对象的 mAP 下降了 1%。我们还进行回归分析以找到需要调整的重要超参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用黑盒优化方法自动调整Faster R-CNN和SSD检测器的先验框尺度，以提升目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测器的超参数通常由人工设定或采用作者预设值，缺乏系统化的自动优化方法，限制了性能提升空间。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯优化、SMAC和CMA-ES等黑盒优化算法，对Faster R-CNN和SSD的输入图像尺寸及先验框锚点尺度进行自动调参。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2007数据集上，Faster R-CNN mAP提升2%，SSD提升3%；COCO数据集上SSD对中大型目标mAP提升，但小型目标mAP下降1%。
AI.conclusion: 黑盒优化能有效提升检测器性能，尤其对中大型目标效果显著，但需注意小型目标性能的潜在下降，凸显自动调参的重要性。
