authors_text: Houwen Peng,Hao Du,Hongyuan Yu,Qi Li,Jing Liao,Jianlong Fu
title: Cream of the Crop: Distilling Prioritized Paths For One-Shot Neural Architecture Search
title_zh: 百里挑一：为一次性神经架构搜索提炼优先路径
abstract: One-shot weight sharing methods have recently drawn great attention in neural architecture search due to high efficiency and competitive performance. However, weight sharing across models has an inherent deficiency, i.e., insufficient training of subnetworks in hypernetworks. To alleviate this problem, we present a simple yet effective architecture distillation method. The central idea is that subnetworks can learn collaboratively and teach each other throughout the training process, aiming to boost the convergence of individual models. We introduce the concept of prioritized path, which refers to the architecture candidates exhibiting superior performance during training. Distilling knowledge from the prioritized paths is able to boost the training of subnetworks. Since the prioritized paths are changed on the fly depending on their performance and complexity, the final obtained paths are the cream of the crop. We directly select the most promising one from the prioritized paths as the final architecture, without using other complex search methods, such as reinforcement learning or evolution algorithms. The experiments on ImageNet verify such path distillation method can improve the convergence ratio and performance of the hypernetwork, as well as boosting the training of subnetworks. The discovered architectures achieve superior performance compared to the recent MobileNetV3 and EfficientNet families under aligned settings. Moreover, the experiments on object detection and more challenging search space show the generality and robustness of the proposed method. Code and models are available at https://github.com/microsoft/cream.git.
summary: One-shot weight sharing methods have recently drawn great attention in neural architecture search due to high efficiency and competitive performance. However, weight sharing across models has an inherent deficiency, i.e., insufficient training of subnetworks in hypernetworks. To alleviate this problem, we present a simple yet effective architecture distillation method. The central idea is that subnetworks can learn collaboratively and teach each other throughout the training process, aiming to boost the convergence of individual models. We introduce the concept of prioritized path, which refers to the architecture candidates exhibiting superior performance during training. Distilling knowledge from the prioritized paths is able to boost the training of subnetworks. Since the prioritized paths are changed on the fly depending on their performance and complexity, the final obtained paths are the cream of the crop. We directly select the most promising one from the prioritized paths as the final architecture, without using other complex search methods, such as reinforcement learning or evolution algorithms. The experiments on ImageNet verify such path distillation method can improve the convergence ratio and performance of the hypernetwork, as well as boosting the training of subnetworks. The discovered architectures achieve superior performance compared to the recent MobileNetV3 and EfficientNet families under aligned settings. Moreover, the experiments on object detection and more challenging search space show the generality and robustness of the proposed method. Code and models are available at https://github.com/microsoft/cream.git.
abstract_zh: 由于高效率和有竞争力的性能，一次性权重共享方法最近在神经架构搜索中引起了极大的关注。然而，跨模型的权重共享有一个固有的缺陷，即超网络中子网络的训练不足。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种简单而有效的架构蒸馏方法。其中心思想是子网络可以在整个训练过程中协作学习并互相教导，旨在促进各个模型的收敛。我们引入了优先路径的概念，它指的是在训练期间表现出优越性能的候选架构。从优先路径中提取知识能够促进子网络的训练。由于优先路径会根据其性能和复杂性而动态更改，因此最终获得的路径是百里挑一。我们直接从优先路径中选择最有前途的一个作为最终架构，而不使用其他复杂的搜索方法，例如强化学习或进化算法。在ImageNet上的实验验证了这种路径蒸馏方法可以提高超网络的收敛率和性能，并促进子网络的训练。与最近的 MobileNetV3 和 EfficientNet 系列相比，在一致的设置下，所发现的架构实现了卓越的性能。此外，目标检测和更具挑战性的搜索空间的实验表明了该方法的通用性和鲁棒性。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/microsoft/cream.git 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于优先路径知识蒸馏的一次性神经网络架构搜索方法，通过协作训练提升子网络性能。
AI.motivation: 现有一次性权重共享方法存在子网络训练不足的问题，导致模型收敛效果不佳。
AI.method: 引入优先路径概念，让表现优异的架构候选在训练中相互教学，动态调整路径并直接选择最优架构。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上优于MobileNetV3和EfficientNet，且在目标检测等任务中展现泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简单蒸馏机制有效提升一次性架构搜索的收敛性与性能，无需复杂搜索算法。

authors_text: Guillaume Ducoffe
title: Around the diameter of AT-free graphs
title_zh: 围绕无AT图的直径
abstract: A graph algorithm is truly subquadratic if it runs in ${\cal O}(m^b)$ time on connected $m$-edge graphs, for some positive $b < 2$. Roditty and Vassilevska Williams (STOC'13) proved that under plausible complexity assumptions, there is no truly subquadratic algorithm for computing the diameter of general graphs. In this work, we present positive and negative results on the existence of such algorithms for computing the diameter on some special graph classes. Specifically, three vertices in a graph form an asteroidal triple (AT) if between any two of them there exists a path that avoids the closed neighbourhood of the third one. We call a graph AT-free if it does not contain an AT. We first prove that for all $m$-edge AT-free graphs, one can compute all the eccentricities in truly subquadratic ${\cal O}(m^{3/2})$ time. Then, we extend our study to several subclasses of chordal graphs -- all of them generalizing interval graphs in various ways --, as an attempt to understand which of the properties of AT-free graphs, or natural generalizations of the latter, can help in the design of fast algorithms for the diameter problem on broader graph classes. For instance, for all chordal graphs with a dominating shortest path, there is a linear-time algorithm for computing a diametral pair if the diameter is at least four. However, already for split graphs with a dominating edge, under plausible complexity assumptions, there is no truly subquadratic algorithm for deciding whether the diameter is either $2$ or $3$.
summary: A graph algorithm is truly subquadratic if it runs in ${\cal O}(m^b)$ time on connected $m$-edge graphs, for some positive $b < 2$. Roditty and Vassilevska Williams (STOC'13) proved that under plausible complexity assumptions, there is no truly subquadratic algorithm for computing the diameter of general graphs. In this work, we present positive and negative results on the existence of such algorithms for computing the diameter on some special graph classes. Specifically, three vertices in a graph form an asteroidal triple (AT) if between any two of them there exists a path that avoids the closed neighbourhood of the third one. We call a graph AT-free if it does not contain an AT. We first prove that for all $m$-edge AT-free graphs, one can compute all the eccentricities in truly subquadratic ${\cal O}(m^{3/2})$ time. Then, we extend our study to several subclasses of chordal graphs -- all of them generalizing interval graphs in various ways --, as an attempt to understand which of the properties of AT-free graphs, or natural generalizations of the latter, can help in the design of fast algorithms for the diameter problem on broader graph classes. For instance, for all chordal graphs with a dominating shortest path, there is a linear-time algorithm for computing a diametral pair if the diameter is at least four. However, already for split graphs with a dominating edge, under plausible complexity assumptions, there is no truly subquadratic algorithm for deciding whether the diameter is either $2$ or $3$.
abstract_zh: 如果图算法在连接的 $m$ 边图上运行 ${\cal O}(m^b)$ 时间，并且对于某些正 $b < 2$，则它是真正的次二次方。 Roditty 和 Vassilevska Williams (STOC'13) 证明，在合理的复杂性假设下，不存在真正的次二次算法来计算一般图的直径。在这项工作中，我们对计算某些特殊图类直径的算法的存在提出了正面和负面的结果。具体来说，如果图中的任何两个顶点之间存在一条避开第三个顶点的闭邻域的路径，则图中的三个顶点形成小行星三元组 (AT)。如果图不包含 AT，我们称其为无 AT 的图。我们首先证明，对于所有 $m$ 边无 AT 图，可以在真正的次二次 ${\cal O}(m^{3/2})$ 时间内计算出所有偏心率。然后，我们将研究扩展到弦图的几个子类——所有这些子类都以各种方式概括区间图——试图了解无 AT 图的哪些属性或后者的自然概括，可以帮助设计更广泛图类上直径问题的快速算法。例如，对于所有具有主导最短路径的弦图，如果直径至少为四，则存在用于计算直径对的线性时间算法。然而，对于具有主导边缘的分割图，在合理的复杂性假设下，没有真正的次二次算法来确定直径是 $2$ 还是 $3$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究AT-free图及其子类的直径计算问题，探讨是否存在次二次时间算法。
AI.motivation: 鉴于一般图的直径计算不存在真正次二次算法，作者旨在探索特殊图类（如AT-free图）是否能突破这一限制，并分析其结构特性对算法设计的影响。
AI.method: 通过分析AT-free图的结构特性，结合弦图等子类的性质，设计基于路径和支配集的算法，并利用复杂性假设证明下界。
AI.result: 证明AT-free图可在O(m^3/2)时间计算所有点的偏心度；对部分弦图提出线性时间算法，但证明某些split图的直径判定问题不存在真正次二次算法。
AI.conclusion: AT-free图及特定弦图子类的结构特性可支持高效直径算法，但更广泛的图类可能仍受限于复杂性下界，需进一步研究结构与算法的关系。

search_text: Around the diameter of AT-free graphs 围绕无AT图的直径 A graph algorithm is truly subquadratic if it runs in ${\cal O}(m^b)$ time on connected $m$-edge graphs, for some positive $b < 2$. Roditty and Vassilevska Williams (STOC'13) proved that under plausible complexity assumptions, there is no truly subquadratic algorithm for computing the diameter of general graphs. In this work, we present positive and negative results on the existence of such algorithms for computing the diameter on some special graph classes. Specifically, three vertices in a graph form an asteroidal triple (AT) if between any two of them there exists a path that avoids the closed neighbourhood of the third one. We call a graph AT-free if it does not contain an AT. We first prove that for all $m$-edge AT-free graphs, one can compute all the eccentricities in truly subquadratic ${\cal O}(m^{3/2})$ time. Then, we extend our study to several subclasses of chordal graphs -- all of them generalizing interval graphs in various ways --, as an attempt to understand which of the properties of AT-free graphs, or natural generalizations of the latter, can help in the design of fast algorithms for the diameter problem on broader graph classes. For instance, for all chordal graphs with a dominating shortest path, there is a linear-time algorithm for computing a diametral pair if the diameter is at least four. However, already for split graphs with a dominating edge, under plausible complexity assumptions, there is no truly subquadratic algorithm for deciding whether the diameter is either $2$ or $3$. 如果图算法在连接的 $m$ 边图上运行 ${\cal O}(m^b)$ 时间，并且对于某些正 $b < 2$，则它是真正的次二次方。 Roditty 和 Vassilevska Williams (STOC'13) 证明，在合理的复杂性假设下，不存在真正的次二次算法来计算一般图的直径。在这项工作中，我们对计算某些特殊图类直径的算法的存在提出了正面和负面的结果。具体来说，如果图中的任何两个顶点之间存在一条避开第三个顶点的闭邻域的路径，则图中的三个顶点形成小行星三元组 (AT)。如果图不包含 AT，我们称其为无 AT 的图。我们首先证明，对于所有 $m$ 边无 AT 图，可以在真正的次二次 ${\cal O}(m^{3/2})$ 时间内计算出所有偏心率。然后，我们将研究扩展到弦图的几个子类——所有这些子类都以各种方式概括区间图——试图了解无 AT 图的哪些属性或后者的自然概括，可以帮助设计更广泛图类上直径问题的快速算法。例如，对于所有具有主导最短路径的弦图，如果直径至少为四，则存在用于计算直径对的线性时间算法。然而，对于具有主导边缘的分割图，在合理的复杂性假设下，没有真正的次二次算法来确定直径是 $2$ 还是 $3$。 本文研究AT-free图及其子类的直径计算问题，探讨是否存在次二次时间算法。 Guillaume Ducoffe cs.DS

authors_text: Ahmed El Alaoui,Mark Sellke
title: Algorithmic pure states for the negative spherical perceptron
title_zh: 负球形感知器的算法纯态
abstract: We consider the spherical perceptron with Gaussian disorder. This is the set $S$ of points $σ\in \mathbb{R}^N$ on the sphere of radius $\sqrt{N}$ satisfying $\langle g_a , σ\rangle \ge κ\sqrt{N}\,$ for all $1 \le a \le M$, where $(g_a)_{a=1}^M$ are independent standard gaussian vectors and $κ\in \mathbb{R}$ is fixed. Various characteristics of $S$ such as its surface measure and the largest $M$ for which it is non-empty, were computed heuristically in statistical physics in the asymptotic regime $N \to \infty$, $M/N \to α$. The case $κ<0$ is of special interest as $S$ is conjectured to exhibit a hierarchical tree-like geometry known as "full replica-symmetry breaking" (FRSB) close to the satisfiability threshold $α_{\text{SAT}}(κ)$, and whose characteristics are captured by a Parisi variational principle akin to the one appearing in the Sherrington-Kirkpatrick model. In this paper we design an efficient algorithm which, given oracle access to the solution of the Parisi variational principle, exploits this conjectured FRSB structure for $κ<0$ and outputs a vector $\hatσ$ satisfying $\langle g_a , \hatσ\rangle \ge κ\sqrt{N}$ for all $1\le a \le M$ and lying on a sphere of non-trivial radius $\sqrt{\bar{q} N}$, where $\bar{q} \in (0,1)$ is the right-end of the support of the associated Parisi measure. We expect $\hatσ$ to be approximately the barycenter of a pure state of the spherical perceptron. Moreover we expect that $\bar{q} \to 1$ as $α\to α_{\text{SAT}}(κ)$, so that $\big\langle g_a,\hatσ/|\hatσ|\big\rangle \geq (κ-o(1))\sqrt{N}$ near criticality.
summary: We consider the spherical perceptron with Gaussian disorder. This is the set $S$ of points $σ\in \mathbb{R}^N$ on the sphere of radius $\sqrt{N}$ satisfying $\langle g_a , σ\rangle \ge κ\sqrt{N}\,$ for all $1 \le a \le M$, where $(g_a)_{a=1}^M$ are independent standard gaussian vectors and $κ\in \mathbb{R}$ is fixed. Various characteristics of $S$ such as its surface measure and the largest $M$ for which it is non-empty, were computed heuristically in statistical physics in the asymptotic regime $N \to \infty$, $M/N \to α$. The case $κ<0$ is of special interest as $S$ is conjectured to exhibit a hierarchical tree-like geometry known as "full replica-symmetry breaking" (FRSB) close to the satisfiability threshold $α_{\text{SAT}}(κ)$, and whose characteristics are captured by a Parisi variational principle akin to the one appearing in the Sherrington-Kirkpatrick model. In this paper we design an efficient algorithm which, given oracle access to the solution of the Parisi variational principle, exploits this conjectured FRSB structure for $κ<0$ and outputs a vector $\hatσ$ satisfying $\langle g_a , \hatσ\rangle \ge κ\sqrt{N}$ for all $1\le a \le M$ and lying on a sphere of non-trivial radius $\sqrt{\bar{q} N}$, where $\bar{q} \in (0,1)$ is the right-end of the support of the associated Parisi measure. We expect $\hatσ$ to be approximately the barycenter of a pure state of the spherical perceptron. Moreover we expect that $\bar{q} \to 1$ as $α\to α_{\text{SAT}}(κ)$, so that $\big\langle g_a,\hatσ/|\hatσ|\big\rangle \geq (κ-o(1))\sqrt{N}$ near criticality.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑具有高斯无序的球形感知器。这是半径为 $\sqrt{N}$ 的球体上的点 $σ\in \mathbb{R}^N$ 的集合 $S$，对于所有 $1 \le a \le M$ 满足 $\langle g_a , σ\rangle \ge κ\sqrt{N}\,$，其中 $(g_a)_{a=1}^M$ 是独立的标准高斯向量，$κ\in \mathbb{R}$是固定的。 $S$ 的各种特征，例如其表面测量和非空的最大 $M$，是在统计物理学中在渐进状态 $N \to \infty$、$M/N \to α$ 下启发式计算的。 $κ<0$ 的情况特别令人感兴趣，因为 $S$ 被推测表现出一种称为“完全复制对称破缺”（FRSB）的分层树状几何结构，接近可满足性阈值 $α_{\text{SAT}}(κ)$，并且其特征由类似于 Sherrington-Kirkpatrick 模型中出现的 Parisi 变分原理捕获。在本文中，我们设计了一种有效的算法，在oracle访问Parisi变分原理的解决方案的情况下，利用这种推测的FRSB结构$κ<0$，并输出一个向量$\hatσ$，对于所有$1\le a \le M$，满足$\langle g_a，\hatσ\rangle \ge κ\sqrt{N}$，并且位于非平凡半径$\sqrt{\bar{q}的球体上N}$，其中 $\bar{q} \in (0,1)$ 是关联 Parisi 测度的支持度的右端。我们期望 $\hatσ$ 大约是球形感知器纯状态的重心。此外，我们预计 $\bar{q} \to 1$ 为 $α\to α_{\text{SAT}}(κ)$，因此 $\big\langle g_a,\hatσ/|\hatσ|\big\rangle \geq (κ-o(1))\sqrt{N}$ 接近临界点。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种高效算法，利用巴黎i变分原理的解，在负κ条件下构造满足球形感知机约束的向量，并分析其几何结构。
AI.motivation: 研究负κ情况下球形感知机解集的层次化几何结构（FRSB），揭示其与统计物理中巴黎i变分原理的关联，推动理解高维约束满足问题的临界行为。
AI.method: 基于巴黎i变分原理的解作为预言机，结合FRSB结构假设，构造满足内积约束的向量并分析其球面半径与巴黎i测度的关系。
AI.result: 提出算法输出满足约束的向量，其半径与巴黎i测度右端点相关，且在临界点附近半径趋于1，推测为纯态质心。
AI.conclusion: 算法验证了FRSB结构与巴黎i原理的关联性，为高维感知机临界行为提供了计算支持，深化了对复杂约束系统纯态几何的理解。

authors_text: Yoohwan Kwon,Hee-Soo Heo,Bong-Jin Lee,Joon Son Chung
title: The ins and outs of speaker recognition: lessons from VoxSRC 2020
title_zh: 说话人识别的细节：VoxSRC 2020 的经验教训
abstract: The VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge (VoxSRC) at Interspeech 2020 offers a challenging evaluation for speaker recognition systems, which includes celebrities playing different parts in movies. The goal of this work is robust speaker recognition of utterances recorded in these challenging environments. We utilise variants of the popular ResNet architecture for speaker recognition and perform extensive experiments using a range of loss functions and training parameters. To this end, we optimise an efficient training framework that allows powerful models to be trained with limited time and resources. Our trained models demonstrate improvements over most existing works with lighter models and a simple pipeline. The paper shares the lessons learned from our participation in the challenge.
summary: The VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge (VoxSRC) at Interspeech 2020 offers a challenging evaluation for speaker recognition systems, which includes celebrities playing different parts in movies. The goal of this work is robust speaker recognition of utterances recorded in these challenging environments. We utilise variants of the popular ResNet architecture for speaker recognition and perform extensive experiments using a range of loss functions and training parameters. To this end, we optimise an efficient training framework that allows powerful models to be trained with limited time and resources. Our trained models demonstrate improvements over most existing works with lighter models and a simple pipeline. The paper shares the lessons learned from our participation in the challenge.
abstract_zh: Interspeech 2020 上的 VoxCeleb 说话人识别挑战赛 (VoxSRC) 为说话人识别系统提供了具有挑战性的评估，其中包括在电影中扮演不同角色的名人。这项工作的目标是对这些具有挑战性的环境中记录的话语进行强大的说话人识别。我们利用流行的 ResNet 架构的变体进行说话人识别，并使用一系列损失函数和训练参数进行广泛的实验。为此，我们优化了一个高效的训练框架，允许在有限的时间和资源下训练强大的模型。我们经过训练的模型通过更轻的模型和简单的管道展示了对大多数现有作品的改进。本文分享了我们参与挑战的经验教训。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究在VoxSRC 2020挑战赛中如何通过改进说话人识别系统，在复杂环境下（如电影中名人扮演不同角色）实现鲁棒的说话人识别。
AI.motivation: 现有说话人识别系统在面对电影等复杂场景时表现不足，需开发更高效的模型和训练框架以应对挑战。
AI.method: 采用改进的ResNet架构，结合多种损失函数和训练参数，优化高效训练框架以减少资源消耗。
AI.result: 轻量级模型与简单流水线在多数基准测试中表现优于现有方法，验证了高效训练框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过VoxSRC 2020挑战赛的实践，证明了优化模型结构与训练策略对提升说话人识别鲁棒性的重要性。

search_text: The ins and outs of speaker recognition: lessons from VoxSRC 2020 说话人识别的细节：VoxSRC 2020 的经验教训 The VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge (VoxSRC) at Interspeech 2020 offers a challenging evaluation for speaker recognition systems, which includes celebrities playing different parts in movies. The goal of this work is robust speaker recognition of utterances recorded in these challenging environments. We utilise variants of the popular ResNet architecture for speaker recognition and perform extensive experiments using a range of loss functions and training parameters. To this end, we optimise an efficient training framework that allows powerful models to be trained with limited time and resources. Our trained models demonstrate improvements over most existing works with lighter models and a simple pipeline. The paper shares the lessons learned from our participation in the challenge. authors_text: Lap Chi Lau,Hong Zhou
title: A Local Search Framework for Experimental Design
title_zh: 实验设计的本地搜索框架
comment: Improved probability bound in Theorem 1.4. A preliminary version accepted by SODA 2021
comments: Improved probability bound in Theorem 1.4. A preliminary version accepted by SODA 2021
abstract: We present a local search framework to design and analyze both combinatorial algorithms and rounding algorithms for experimental design problems. This framework provides a unifying approach to match and improve all known results in D/A/E-design and to obtain new results in previously unknown settings. For combinatorial algorithms, we provide a new analysis of the classical Fedorov's exchange method. We prove that this simple local search algorithm works well as long as there exists an almost optimal solution with good condition number. Moreover, we design a new combinatorial local search algorithm for E-design using the regret minimization framework. For rounding algorithms, we provide a unified randomized exchange algorithm to match and improve previous results for D/A/E-design. Furthermore, the algorithm works in the more general setting to approximately satisfy multiple knapsack constraints, which can be used for weighted experimental design and for incorporating fairness constraints into experimental design.
summary: We present a local search framework to design and analyze both combinatorial algorithms and rounding algorithms for experimental design problems. This framework provides a unifying approach to match and improve all known results in D/A/E-design and to obtain new results in previously unknown settings. For combinatorial algorithms, we provide a new analysis of the classical Fedorov's exchange method. We prove that this simple local search algorithm works well as long as there exists an almost optimal solution with good condition number. Moreover, we design a new combinatorial local search algorithm for E-design using the regret minimization framework. For rounding algorithms, we provide a unified randomized exchange algorithm to match and improve previous results for D/A/E-design. Furthermore, the algorithm works in the more general setting to approximately satisfy multiple knapsack constraints, which can be used for weighted experimental design and for incorporating fairness constraints into experimental design.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个局部搜索框架来设计和分析实验设计问题的组合算法和舍入算法。该框架提供了一种统一的方法来匹配和改进 D/A/E 设计中的所有已知结果，并在以前未知的设置中获得新结果。对于组合算法，我们提供了对经典 Fedorov 交换方法的新分析。我们证明，只要存在具有良好条件数的几乎最优解，这种简单的局部搜索算法就可以很好地工作。此外，我们使用遗憾最小化框架设计了一种新的电子设计组合局部搜索算法。对于舍入算法，我们提供统一的随机交换算法来匹配和改进之前的 D/A/E 设计结果。此外，该算法在更通用的设置下工作，近似满足多个背包约束，可用于加权实验设计并将公平约束纳入实验设计。

AI.tldr: 提出一种局部搜索框架，用于改进实验设计中的组合和舍入算法，以统一和提升D/A/E设计结果，并解决新场景下的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有实验设计算法在处理复杂约束或新场景时存在局限，需更灵活的框架来统一和优化不同设计准则。
AI.method: 基于局部搜索框架，结合组合优化与随机化技术，设计适用于多种实验设计准则的算法，并扩展至多约束场景。
AI.result: 实现了对D/A/E设计的统一优化，提出了新的E设计算法，支持多约束条件，提升了算法适用性和性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为实验设计提供了灵活高效的解决方案，推动了组合优化与随机算法在该领域的应用。

authors_text: Guillaume Ducoffe
title: Isometric embeddings in trees and their use in the diameter problem
title_zh: 树木中的等距嵌入及其在直径问题中的应用
abstract: We prove that given a discrete space with $n$ points which is either embedded in a system of $k$ trees, or the Cartesian product of $k$ trees, we can compute all eccentricities in ${\cal O}(2^{{\cal O}(k\log{k})}(N+n)^{1+o(1)})$ time, where $N$ is the cumulative total order over all these $k$ trees. This is near optimal under the Strong Exponential-Time Hypothesis, even in the very special case of an $n$-vertex graph embedded in a system of $ω(\log{n})$ spanning trees. However, given such an embedding in the strong product of $k$ trees, there is a much faster ${\cal O}(N + kn)$-time algorithm for this problem. All our positive results can be turned into approximation algorithms for the graphs and finite spaces with a quasi isometric embedding in trees, if such embedding is given as input, where the approximation factor (resp., the approximation constant) depends on the distortion of the embedding (resp., of its stretch). The existence of embeddings in the Cartesian product of finitely many trees has been thoroughly investigated for cube-free median graphs. We give the first-known quasi linear-time algorithm for computing the diameter within this graph class. It does not require an embedding in a product of trees to be given as part of the input. On our way, being given an $n$-node tree $T$, we propose a data structure with ${\cal O}(n\log{n})$ pre-processing time in order to compute in ${\cal O}(k\log^2{n})$ time the eccentricity of any subset of $k$ nodes. We combine the latter technical contribution, of independent interest, with a recent distance-labeling scheme that was designed for cube-free median graphs.
summary: We prove that given a discrete space with $n$ points which is either embedded in a system of $k$ trees, or the Cartesian product of $k$ trees, we can compute all eccentricities in ${\cal O}(2^{{\cal O}(k\log{k})}(N+n)^{1+o(1)})$ time, where $N$ is the cumulative total order over all these $k$ trees. This is near optimal under the Strong Exponential-Time Hypothesis, even in the very special case of an $n$-vertex graph embedded in a system of $ω(\log{n})$ spanning trees. However, given such an embedding in the strong product of $k$ trees, there is a much faster ${\cal O}(N + kn)$-time algorithm for this problem. All our positive results can be turned into approximation algorithms for the graphs and finite spaces with a quasi isometric embedding in trees, if such embedding is given as input, where the approximation factor (resp., the approximation constant) depends on the distortion of the embedding (resp., of its stretch). The existence of embeddings in the Cartesian product of finitely many trees has been thoroughly investigated for cube-free median graphs. We give the first-known quasi linear-time algorithm for computing the diameter within this graph class. It does not require an embedding in a product of trees to be given as part of the input. On our way, being given an $n$-node tree $T$, we propose a data structure with ${\cal O}(n\log{n})$ pre-processing time in order to compute in ${\cal O}(k\log^2{n})$ time the eccentricity of any subset of $k$ nodes. We combine the latter technical contribution, of independent interest, with a recent distance-labeling scheme that was designed for cube-free median graphs.
abstract_zh: 我们证明，给定一个具有 $n$ 个点的离散空间，该空间要么嵌入 $k$ 树的系统中，要么嵌入 $k$ 树的笛卡尔积，我们可以在 ${\cal O}(2^{{\cal O}(k\log{k})}(N+n)^{1+o(1)})$ 时间内计算所有偏心率，其中 $N$ 是所有这些 $k$ 树的累积总阶数。在强指数时间假设下，这几乎是最佳的，即使在嵌入 $ω(\log{n})$ 生成树系统中的 $n$ 顶点图的特殊情况下也是如此。然而，考虑到 $k$ 树的强乘积中的这种嵌入，对于这个问题有一个更快的 ${\cal O}(N + kn)$ 时间算法。我们所有的积极结果都可以转化为图和有限空间的近似算法，在树中具有准等距嵌入，如果这种嵌入作为输入给出，其中近似因子（分别是近似常数）取决于嵌入的失真（分别是其拉伸）。对于无立方中值图，有限多树的笛卡尔积中嵌入的存在性已经得到了彻底的研究。我们给出了第一个已知的准线性时间算法来计算该图类中的直径。它不需要嵌入作为输入的一部分给出的树的乘积。在我们的过程中，给定一个 $n$ 节点树 $T$，我们提出了一个具有 ${\cal O}(n\log{n})$ 预处理时间的数据结构，以便在 ${\cal O}(k\log^2{n})$ 时间内计算 $k$ 节点的任何子集的偏心率。我们将后一个具有独立兴趣的技术贡献与最近为无立方体中值图设计的距离标记方案结合起来。

AI.tldr: 研究离散空间嵌入树结构后计算所有点偏心距的高效算法，并探讨其在直径问题中的应用。
AI.motivation: 针对嵌入树结构的图或空间，寻找计算直径和偏心距的近似最优算法，以解决传统方法在复杂度上的不足。
AI.method: 通过设计基于树嵌入的算法，结合准等距嵌入特性，提出分情况处理的复杂度优化方案，并开发辅助数据结构提升效率。
AI.result: 实现近似最优时间复杂度的算法，对特定树乘积结构提出线性时间方案，首次在准线性时间内计算无立方体中位图的直径。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为树嵌入图的直径计算提供了高效解决方案，且算法复杂度与嵌入失真参数相关，具有理论与应用价值。

motivation: 针对嵌入树结构的图或空间，寻找计算直径和偏心距的近似最优算法，以解决传统方法在复杂度上的不足。
method: 通过设计基于树嵌入的算法，结合准等距嵌入特性，提出分情况处理的复杂度优化方案，并开发辅助数据结构提升效率。
result: 实现近似最优时间复杂度的算法，对特定树乘积结构提出线性时间方案，首次在准线性时间内计算无立方体中位图的直径。
conclusion: 该方法为树嵌入图的直径计算提供了高效解决方案，且算法复杂度与嵌入失真参数相关，具有理论与应用价值。
search_text: Isometric embeddings in trees and their use in the diameter problem 树木中的等距嵌入及其在直径问题中的应用 We prove that given a discrete space with $n$ points which is either embedded in a system of $k$ trees, or the Cartesian product of $k$ trees, we can compute all eccentricities in ${\cal O}(2^{{\cal O}(k\log{k})}(N+n)^{1+o(1)})$ time, where $N$ is the cumulative total order over all these $k$ trees. This is near optimal under the Strong Exponential-Time Hypothesis, even in the very special case of an $n$-vertex graph embedded in a system of $ω(\log{n})$ spanning trees. However, given such an embedding in the strong product of $k$ trees, there is a much faster ${\cal O}(N + kn)$-time algorithm for this problem. All our positive results can be turned into approximation algorithms for the graphs and finite spaces with a quasi isometric embedding in trees, if such embedding is given as input, where the approximation factor (resp., the approximation constant) depends on the distortion of the embedding (resp., of its stretch). The existence of embeddings in the Cartesian product of finitely many trees has been thoroughly investigated for cube-free median graphs. We give the first-known quasi linear-time algorithm for computing the diameter within this graph class. It does not require an embedding in a product of trees to be given as part of the input. On our way, being given an $n$-node tree $T$, we propose a data structure with ${\cal O}(n\log{n})$ pre-processing time in order to compute in ${\cal O}(k\log^2{n})$ time the eccentricity of any subset of $k$ nodes. We combine the latter technical contribution, of independent interest, with a recent distance-labeling scheme that was designed for cube-free median graphs. 我们证明，给定一个具有 $n$ 个点的离散空间，该空间要么嵌入 $k$ 树的系统中，要么嵌入 $k$ 树的笛卡尔积，我们可以在 ${\cal O}(2^{{\cal O}(k\log{k})}(N+n)^{1+o(1)})$ 时间内计算所有偏心率，其中 $N$ 是所有这些 $k$ 树的累积总阶数。在强指数时间假设下，这几乎是最佳的，即使在嵌入 $ω(\log{n})$ 生成树系统中的 $n$ 顶点图的特殊情况下也是如此。然而，考虑到 $k$ 树的强乘积中的这种嵌入，对于这个问题有一个更快的 ${\cal O}(N + kn)$ 时间算法。我们所有的积极结果都可以转化为图和有限空间的近似算法，在树中具有准等距嵌入，如果这种嵌入作为输入给出，其中近似因子（分别是近似常数）取决于嵌入的失真（分别是其拉伸）。对于无立方中值图，有限多树的笛卡尔积中嵌入的存在性已经得到了彻底的研究。我们给出了第一个已知的准线性时间算法来计算该图类中的直径。它不需要嵌入作为输入的一部分给出的树的乘积。在我们的过程中，给定一个 $n$ 节点树 $T$，我们提出了一个具有 ${\cal O}(n\log{n})$ 预处理时间的数据结构，以便在 ${\cal O}(k\log^2{n})$ 时间内计算 $k$ 节点的任何子集的偏心率。我们将后一个具有独立兴趣的技术贡献与最近为无立方体中值图设计的距离标记方案结合起来。 研究离散空间嵌入树结构后计算所有点偏心距的高效算法，并探讨其在直径问题中的应用。 Guillaume Ducoffe cs.DS

authors_text: Guillaume Ducoffe
title: Eccentricity queries and beyond using Hub Labels
title_zh: 使用集线器标签进行偏心率查询及其他查询
comment: Abstract shortened to respect the arXiv limit of 1920 characters
comments: Abstract shortened to respect the arXiv limit of 1920 characters
abstract: Hub labeling schemes are popular methods for computing distances on road networks and other large complex networks, often answering to a query within a few microseconds for graphs with millions of edges. In this work, we study their algorithmic applications beyond distance queries. We focus on eccentricity queries and distance-sum queries, for several versions of these problems on directed weighted graphs, that is in part motivated by their importance in facility location problems. On the negative side, we show conditional lower bounds for these above problems on unweighted undirected sparse graphs, via standard constructions from "Fine-grained" complexity. However, things take a different turn when the hub labels have a sublogarithmic size. Indeed, given a hub labeling of maximum label size $\leq k$, after pre-processing the labels in total $2^{{O}(k)} \cdot |V|^{1+o(1)}$ time, we can compute both the eccentricity and the distance-sum of any vertex in $2^{{O}(k)} \cdot |V|^{o(1)}$ time. It can also be applied to the fast global computation of some topological indices. Finally, as a by-product of our approach, on any fixed class of unweighted graphs with bounded expansion, we can decide whether the diameter of an $n$-vertex graph in the class is at most $k$ in $f(k) \cdot n^{1+o(1)}$ time, for some "explicit" function $f$.

In this work, we study their algorithmic applications beyond distance queries. We focus on eccentricity queries and distance-sum queries, for several versions of these problems on directed weighted graphs, that is in part motivated by their importance in facility location problems. On the negative side, we show conditional lower bounds for these above problems on unweighted undirected sparse graphs, via standard constructions from "Fine-grained" complexity. However, things take a different turn when the hub labels have a sublogarithmic size. Indeed, given a hub labeling of maximum label size $\leq k$, after pre-processing the labels in total $2^{{O}(k)} \cdot |V|^{1+o(1)}$ time, we can compute both the eccentricity and the distance-sum of any vertex in $2^{{O}(k)} \cdot |V|^{o(1)}$ time. It can also be applied to the fast global computation of some topological indices. Finally, as a by-product of our approach, on any fixed class of unweighted graphs with bounded expansion, we can decide whether the diameter of an $n$-vertex graph in the class is at most $k$ in $f(k) \cdot n^{1+o(1)}$ time, for some "explicit" function $f$.
abstract_zh: 集线器标签方案是计算道路网络和其他大型复杂网络距离的流行方法，通常在几微秒内回答具有数百万条边的图的查询。在这项工作中，我们研究了它们在距离查询之外的算法应用。我们专注于有向加权图上这些问题的几个版本的偏心率查询和距离和查询，部分原因是它们在设施位置问题中的重要性。消极的一面是，我们通过“细粒度”复杂性的标准构造，在未加权无向稀疏图上显示了上述问题的条件下界。然而，当集线器标签具有亚对数大小时，情况会发生不同的变化。事实上，给定最大标签大小 $\leq k$ 的中心标签，在总共 $2^{{O}(k)} \cdot |V|^{1+o(1)}$ 时间内预处理标签后，我们可以在 $2^{{O}(k)} \cdot |V|^{o(1)}$ 时间内计算任何顶点的偏心率和距离总和。它还可以应用于一些拓扑指标的快速全局计算。最后，作为我们方法的副产品，在具有有界扩展的任何固定类别的未加权图上，对于某些“显式”函数 $f$，我们可以在 $f(k) \cdot n^{1+o(1)}$ 时间内决定该类中 $n$ 顶点图的直径是否至多为 $k$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用Hub标签进行eccentricity查询和distance-sum查询的算法应用，并分析其在不同图结构下的复杂度。
AI.motivation: Hub标签方案在快速距离查询中表现优异，但其在eccentricity和distance-sum等扩展问题上的应用尚不明确，且需探索理论限制与优化方法。
AI.method: 通过条件复杂度理论分析无权图的下界，结合次对数大小Hub标签的预处理方法，设计高效计算eccentricity和distance-sum的算法，并利用图的扩展性特性优化直径判断。
AI.result: 在无权稀疏图中证明了相关问题的条件下界，但次对数标签大小下可实现近线性时间预处理与查询；同时提出针对有界扩展图类的快速直径判定方法。
AI.conclusion: Hub标签在特定约束下能高效处理扩展网络问题，但需权衡标签大小与计算复杂度，且理论下界揭示了某些场景的固有难度。

authors_text: Jiunhan Chen,Zhenyu Gao
title: A Framework for Learning Predator-prey Agents from Simulation to Real World
title_zh: 从模拟到现实世界学习捕食者-被捕食者代理的框架
abstract: In this paper, we propose an evolutionary predatorprey robot system which can be generally implemented from simulation to the real world. We design the closed-loop robot system with camera and infrared sensors as inputs of controller. Both the predators and prey are co-evolved by NeuroEvolution of Augmenting Topologies (NEAT) to learn the expected behaviours. We design a framework that integrate Gym of OpenAI, Robot Operating System (ROS), Gazebo. In such a framework, users only need to focus on algorithms without being worried about the detail of manipulating robots in both simulation and the real world. Combining simulations, real-world evolution, and robustness analysis, it can be applied to develop the solutions for the predator-prey tasks. For the convenience of users, the source code and videos of the simulated and real world are published on Github.
summary: In this paper, we propose an evolutionary predatorprey robot system which can be generally implemented from simulation to the real world. We design the closed-loop robot system with camera and infrared sensors as inputs of controller. Both the predators and prey are co-evolved by NeuroEvolution of Augmenting Topologies (NEAT) to learn the expected behaviours. We design a framework that integrate Gym of OpenAI, Robot Operating System (ROS), Gazebo. In such a framework, users only need to focus on algorithms without being worried about the detail of manipulating robots in both simulation and the real world. Combining simulations, real-world evolution, and robustness analysis, it can be applied to develop the solutions for the predator-prey tasks. For the convenience of users, the source code and videos of the simulated and real world are published on Github.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种进化的捕食者机器人系统，该系统可以从模拟到现实世界普遍实现。我们设计了闭环机器人系统，以摄像头和红外传感器作为控制器的输入。捕食者和猎物都通过增强拓扑神经进化（NEAT）共同​​进化，以学习预期的行为。我们设计了一个集成 OpenAI 的 Gym、机器人操作系统（ROS）、Gazebo 的框架。在这样的框架中，用户只需要关注算法，而不必担心在模拟和现实世界中操纵机器人的细节。结合模拟、现实世界进化和鲁棒性分析，它可以用于开发捕食者-被捕食者任务的解决方案。为了方便用户，模拟世界和现实世界的源代码和视频都发布在Github上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个从模拟环境到真实世界的捕食者-猎物机器人学习框架，通过神经进化算法实现智能体行为的协同进化。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人系统难以实现从模拟环境到真实世界的无缝迁移，且缺乏针对捕食者-猎物动态交互的鲁棒性验证方法。
AI.method: 基于NEAT算法协同进化捕食者与猎物行为，整合Gazebo仿真、ROS系统和OpenAI Gym框架，构建端到端的仿真-现实联合训练平台。
AI.result: 成功实现仿真环境与实体机器人之间的行为迁移，验证了框架在复杂动态场景下的鲁棒性，并开源了完整代码与实验视频。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为智能体从模拟到现实的迁移提供了标准化解决方案，推动了进化算法在机器人领域的实际应用研究。

In such a framework, users only need to focus on algorithms without being worried about the detail of manipulating robots in both simulation and the real world. Combining simulations, real-world evolution, and robustness analysis, it can be applied to develop the solutions for the predator-prey tasks. For the convenience of users, the source code and videos of the simulated and real world are published on Github. 在本文中，我们提出了一种进化的捕食者机器人系统，该系统可以从模拟到现实世界普遍实现。我们设计了闭环机器人系统，以摄像头和红外传感器作为控制器的输入。捕食者和猎物都通过增强拓扑神经进化（NEAT）共同​​进化，以学习预期的行为。我们设计了一个集成 OpenAI 的 Gym、机器人操作系统（ROS）、Gazebo 的框架。在这样的框架中，用户只需要关注算法，而不必担心在模拟和现实世界中操纵机器人的细节。结合模拟、现实世界进化和鲁棒性分析，它可以用于开发捕食者-被捕食者任务的解决方案。为了方便用户，模拟世界和现实世界的源代码和视频都发布在Github上。 本文提出一个从模拟环境到真实世界的捕食者-猎物机器人学习框架，通过神经进化算法实现智能体行为的协同进化。 Jiunhan Chen,Zhenyu Gao cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Bobak T. Kiani,Giacomo De Palma,Dirk Englund,William Kaminsky,Milad Marvian,Seth Lloyd
title: Quantum advantage for differential equation analysis
title_zh: 微分方程分析的量子优势
abstract: Quantum algorithms for both differential equation solving and for machine learning potentially offer an exponential speedup over all known classical algorithms. However, there also exist obstacles to obtaining this potential speedup in useful problem instances. The essential obstacle for quantum differential equation solving is that outputting useful information may require difficult post-processing, and the essential obstacle for quantum machine learning is that inputting the training set is a difficult task just by itself. In this paper, we demonstrate, when combined, these difficulties solve one another. We show how the output of quantum differential equation solving can serve as the input for quantum machine learning, allowing dynamical analysis in terms of principal components, power spectra, and wavelet decompositions. To illustrate this, we consider continuous time Markov processes on epidemiological and social networks. These quantum algorithms provide an exponential advantage over existing classical Monte Carlo methods.
summary: Quantum algorithms for both differential equation solving and for machine learning potentially offer an exponential speedup over all known classical algorithms. However, there also exist obstacles to obtaining this potential speedup in useful problem instances. The essential obstacle for quantum differential equation solving is that outputting useful information may require difficult post-processing, and the essential obstacle for quantum machine learning is that inputting the training set is a difficult task just by itself. In this paper, we demonstrate, when combined, these difficulties solve one another. We show how the output of quantum differential equation solving can serve as the input for quantum machine learning, allowing dynamical analysis in terms of principal components, power spectra, and wavelet decompositions. To illustrate this, we consider continuous time Markov processes on epidemiological and social networks. These quantum algorithms provide an exponential advantage over existing classical Monte Carlo methods.
abstract_zh: 用于微分方程求解和机器学习的量子算法可能比所有已知的经典算法提供指数级的加速。然而，在有用的问题实例中获得这种潜在的加速也存在障碍。量子微分方程求解的本质障碍是输出有用信息可能需要困难的后处理，而量子机器学习的本质障碍是输入训练集本身就是一项困难的任务。在本文中，我们证明，当这些困难结合起来时，可以相互解决。我们展示了量子微分方程求解的输出如何作为量子机器学习的输入，从而允许根据主成分、功率谱和小波分解进行动态分析。为了说明这一点，我们考虑流行病学和社交网络上的连续时间马尔可夫过程。这些量子算法比现有的经典蒙特卡罗方法具有指数优势。

AI.tldr: 本文展示了量子算法在微分方程分析中的优势，通过结合量子微分方程求解与量子机器学习，解决传统方法的瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 量子算法在微分方程求解和机器学习中可能提供指数级加速，但各自存在瓶颈，需探索其结合的可能性。
AI.method: 将量子微分方程求解的输出作为量子机器学习的输入，用于动态分析，如主成分、功率谱和小波分解，并在流行病学和社会网络模型中验证。
AI.result: 证明量子算法在连续时间马尔可夫过程分析中，相比经典蒙特卡洛方法具有指数级加速。
AI.conclusion: 结合量子微分方程求解与机器学习可克服各自瓶颈，为复杂系统分析提供实际量子优势。

authors_text: Vaishnavh Nagarajan,Anders Andreassen,Behnam Neyshabur
title: Understanding the Failure Modes of Out-of-Distribution Generalization
title_zh: 了解分布外泛化的故障模式
abstract: Empirical studies suggest that machine learning models often rely on features, such as the background, that may be spuriously correlated with the label only during training time, resulting in poor accuracy during test-time. In this work, we identify the fundamental factors that give rise to this behavior, by explaining why models fail this way {\em even} in easy-to-learn tasks where one would expect these models to succeed. In particular, through a theoretical study of gradient-descent-trained linear classifiers on some easy-to-learn tasks, we uncover two complementary failure modes. These modes arise from how spurious correlations induce two kinds of skews in the data: one geometric in nature, and another, statistical in nature. Finally, we construct natural modifications of image classification datasets to understand when these failure modes can arise in practice. We also design experiments to isolate the two failure modes when training modern neural networks on these datasets.
summary: Empirical studies suggest that machine learning models often rely on features, such as the background, that may be spuriously correlated with the label only during training time, resulting in poor accuracy during test-time. In this work, we identify the fundamental factors that give rise to this behavior, by explaining why models fail this way {\em even} in easy-to-learn tasks where one would expect these models to succeed. In particular, through a theoretical study of gradient-descent-trained linear classifiers on some easy-to-learn tasks, we uncover two complementary failure modes. These modes arise from how spurious correlations induce two kinds of skews in the data: one geometric in nature, and another, statistical in nature. Finally, we construct natural modifications of image classification datasets to understand when these failure modes can arise in practice. We also design experiments to isolate the two failure modes when training modern neural networks on these datasets.
abstract_zh: 实证研究表明，机器学习模型通常依赖于背景等特征，这些特征可能仅在训练期间与标签虚假相关，从而导致测试期间的准确性较差。在这项工作中，我们通过解释为什么模型在易于学习的任务中以这种方式失败（甚至人们期望这些模型能够成功），确定了引起这种行为的基本因素。特别是，通过在一些易于学习的任务上对梯度下降训练的线性分类器进行理论研究，我们发现了两种互补的故障模式。这些模式是由于虚假相关性如何在数据中引起两种偏差而产生的：一种是几何性质的，另一种是统计性质的。最后，我们构建图像分类数据集的自然修改，以了解这些故障模式在实践中何时会出现。在这些数据集上训练现代神经网络时，我们还设计了实验来隔离两种故障模式。

AI.tldr: 分析机器学习模型在分布外泛化中的失败模式，揭示其根本原因并提出实验验证方法。
AI.motivation: 解决模型在分布外任务中表现不佳的问题，探讨其背后的根本原因，尤其是简单任务中因虚假相关性导致的失败。
AI.method: 通过理论分析梯度下降训练的线性分类器，并设计修改后的图像分类数据集和实验来验证两种失败模式。
AI.result: 识别出两种互补的失败模式：几何偏差和统计偏差，并通过实验验证了这些模式在神经网络中的存在。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了分布外泛化失败的两种根本因素，提供了理论和实验框架，为提升模型泛化能力提供指导。

authors_text: Divyam Anshumaan,Akshay Agarwal,Mayank Vatsa,Richa Singh
title: WaveTransform: Crafting Adversarial Examples via Input Decomposition
title_zh: WaveTransform：通过输入分解制作对抗性示例
comment: ECCV Workshop Adversarial Robustness in the Real World 2020, 17 pages, 3 Tables, 6 Figures
comments: ECCV Workshop Adversarial Robustness in the Real World 2020, 17 pages, 3 Tables, 6 Figures
abstract: Frequency spectrum has played a significant role in learning unique and discriminating features for object recognition. Both low and high frequency information present in images have been extracted and learnt by a host of representation learning techniques, including deep learning. Inspired by this observation, we introduce a novel class of adversarial attacks, namely `WaveTransform', that creates adversarial noise corresponding to low-frequency and high-frequency subbands, separately (or in combination). The frequency subbands are analyzed using wavelet decomposition; the subbands are corrupted and then used to construct an adversarial example. Experiments are performed using multiple databases and CNN models to establish the effectiveness of the proposed WaveTransform attack and analyze the importance of a particular frequency component. The robustness of the proposed attack is also evaluated through its transferability and resiliency against a recent adversarial defense algorithm. Experiments show that the proposed attack is effective against the defense algorithm and is also transferable across CNNs.
summary: Frequency spectrum has played a significant role in learning unique and discriminating features for object recognition. Both low and high frequency information present in images have been extracted and learnt by a host of representation learning techniques, including deep learning. Inspired by this observation, we introduce a novel class of adversarial attacks, namely `WaveTransform', that creates adversarial noise corresponding to low-frequency and high-frequency subbands, separately (or in combination). The frequency subbands are analyzed using wavelet decomposition; the subbands are corrupted and then used to construct an adversarial example. Experiments are performed using multiple databases and CNN models to establish the effectiveness of the proposed WaveTransform attack and analyze the importance of a particular frequency component. The robustness of the proposed attack is also evaluated through its transferability and resiliency against a recent adversarial defense algorithm. Experiments show that the proposed attack is effective against the defense algorithm and is also transferable across CNNs.
abstract_zh: 频谱在学习物体识别的独特和区分特征方面发挥了重要作用。图像中存在的低频和高频信息都可以通过包括深度学习在内的一系列表示学习技术来提取和学习。受这一观察的启发，我们引入了一类新颖的对抗性攻击，即“WaveTransform”，它分别（或组合）创建与低频和高频子带相对应的对抗性噪声。使用小波分解来分析频率子带；子带被破坏，然后用于构建对抗性示例。使用多个数据库和 CNN 模型进行实验，以确定所提出的 WaveTransform 攻击的有效性并分析特定频率分量的重要性。所提出的攻击的鲁棒性还通过其针对最近的对抗性防御算法的可转移性和弹性进行了评估。实验表明，所提出的攻击对于防御算法是有效的，并且还可以跨 CNN 转移。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为WaveTransform的新对抗攻击方法，通过小波分解图像的频率子带并分别破坏低频和高频成分来生成对抗样本。
AI.motivation: 图像的低频和高频信息对物体识别至关重要，但现有对抗攻击未充分研究频率成分的独立影响，因此需探索基于频率分解的新型攻击方式。
AI.method: 使用小波分解提取图像低频和高频子带，分别对子带添加扰动后再重构图像，生成针对特定频率成分的对抗样本，并测试其跨模型迁移性与对防御算法的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明WaveTransform在多个数据集和CNN模型上均有效，能成功绕过最新防御算法，且对抗样本具有跨模型迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: WaveTransform通过频率子带分解验证了不同频段对模型决策的影响，证明了该攻击方法在对抗防御和迁移性方面的有效性。

ai_content_json.method: 使用小波分解提取图像低频和高频子带，分别对子带添加扰动后再重构图像，生成针对特定频率成分的对抗样本，并测试其跨模型迁移性与对防御算法的鲁棒性。
ai_content_json.result: 实验表明WaveTransform在多个数据集和CNN模型上均有效，能成功绕过最新防御算法，且对抗样本具有跨模型迁移能力。
ai_content_json.conclusion: WaveTransform通过频率子带分解验证了不同频段对模型决策的影响，证明了该攻击方法在对抗防御和迁移性方面的有效性。

search_text: WaveTransform: Crafting Adversarial Examples via Input Decomposition WaveTransform：通过输入分解制作对抗性示例 Frequency spectrum has played a significant role in learning unique and discriminating features for object recognition. Both low and high frequency information present in images have been extracted and learnt by a host of representation learning techniques, including deep learning. Inspired by this observation, we introduce a novel class of adversarial attacks, namely `WaveTransform', that creates adversarial noise corresponding to low-frequency and high-frequency subbands, separately (or in combination). The frequency subbands are analyzed using wavelet decomposition; the subbands are corrupted and then used to construct an adversarial example. Experiments are performed using multiple databases and CNN models to establish the effectiveness of the proposed WaveTransform attack and analyze the importance of a particular frequency component. The robustness of the proposed attack is also evaluated through its transferability and resiliency against a recent adversarial defense algorithm. Experiments show that the proposed attack is effective against the defense algorithm and is also transferable across CNNs. 频谱在学习物体识别的独特和区分特征方面发挥了重要作用。图像中存在的低频和高频信息都可以通过包括深度学习在内的一系列表示学习技术来提取和学习。受这一观察的启发，我们引入了一类新颖的对抗性攻击，即“WaveTransform”，它分别（或组合）创建与低频和高频子带相对应的对抗性噪声。使用小波分解来分析频率子带；子带被破坏，然后用于构建对抗性示例。使用多个数据库和 CNN 模型进行实验，以确定所提出的 WaveTransform 攻击的有效性并分析特定频率分量的重要性。所提出的攻击的鲁棒性还通过其针对最近的对抗性防御算法的可转移性和弹性进行了评估。实验表明，所提出的攻击对于防御算法是有效的，并且还可以跨 CNN 转移。 本文提出一种名为WaveTransform的新对抗攻击方法，通过小波分解图像的频率子带并分别破坏低频和高频成分来生成对抗样本。 Divyam Anshumaan,Akshay Agarwal,Mayank Vatsa,Richa Singh cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Antonina Kolokolova,Mitchell Billard,Robert Bishop,Moustafa Elsisy,Zachary Northcott,Laura Graves,Vineel Nagisetty,Heather Patey
title: GANs & Reels: Creating Irish Music using a Generative Adversarial Network
title_zh: GAN 和 Reels：使用生成对抗网络创作爱尔兰音乐
abstract: In this paper we present a method for algorithmic melody generation using a generative adversarial network without recurrent components. Music generation has been successfully done using recurrent neural networks, where the model learns sequence information that can help create authentic sounding melodies. Here, we use DC-GAN architecture with dilated convolutions and towers to capture sequential information as spatial image information, and learn long-range dependencies in fixed-length melody forms such as Irish traditional reel.
summary: In this paper we present a method for algorithmic melody generation using a generative adversarial network without recurrent components. Music generation has been successfully done using recurrent neural networks, where the model learns sequence information that can help create authentic sounding melodies. Here, we use DC-GAN architecture with dilated convolutions and towers to capture sequential information as spatial image information, and learn long-range dependencies in fixed-length melody forms such as Irish traditional reel.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种使用没有循环组件的生成对抗网络来生成算法旋律的方法。音乐生成已经使用循环神经网络成功完成，其中模型学习序列信息，可以帮助创建真实的听起来的旋律。在这里，我们使用具有扩张卷积和塔的 DC-GAN 架构来捕获序列信息作为空间图像信息，并学习固定长度旋律形式（例如爱尔兰传统卷轴）的长程依赖性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的算法生成爱尔兰传统音乐旋律的方法，特别针对固定长度的reel形式。
AI.motivation: 传统音乐生成多依赖循环神经网络（RNN），但本文旨在探索非循环结构的GAN在捕捉序列长期依赖关系的潜力，以生成更符合爱尔兰传统风格的旋律。
AI.method: 采用DC-GAN架构，结合扩张卷积和塔结构，将旋律的序列信息转化为图像的空间信息，从而学习固定长度旋律中的长期依赖关系。
AI.result: 成功生成符合爱尔兰传统音乐风格的reel旋律，验证了该方法在非循环结构下捕捉序列信息的有效性。
AI.conclusion: GAN架构可通过空间信息建模实现有效音乐生成，为固定长度旋律创作提供了新思路，展示了生成对抗网络在音乐领域的应用潜力。

authors_text: David R. Karger,David P. Williamson
title: Recursive Random Contraction Revisited
title_zh: 重温递归随机收缩
comment: To appear in the Symposium on Simplicity in Algorithms 2021 (SOSA 2021)
comments: To appear in the Symposium on Simplicity in Algorithms 2021 (SOSA 2021)
abstract: In this note, we revisit the recursive random contraction algorithm of Karger and Stein for finding a minimum cut in a graph. Our revisit is occasioned by a paper of Fox, Panigrahi, and Zhang which gives an extension of the Karger-Stein algorithm to minimum cuts and minimum $k$-cuts in hypergraphs. When specialized to the case of graphs, the algorithm is somewhat different than the original Karger-Stein algorithm. We show that the analysis becomes particularly clean in this case: we can prove that the probability that a fixed minimum cut in an $n$ node graph is returned by the algorithm is bounded below by $1/(2H_n-2)$, where $H_n$ is the $n$th harmonic number. We also consider other similar variants of the algorithm, and show that no such algorithm can achieve an asymptotically better probability of finding a fixed minimum cut.
summary: In this note, we revisit the recursive random contraction algorithm of Karger and Stein for finding a minimum cut in a graph. Our revisit is occasioned by a paper of Fox, Panigrahi, and Zhang which gives an extension of the Karger-Stein algorithm to minimum cuts and minimum $k$-cuts in hypergraphs. When specialized to the case of graphs, the algorithm is somewhat different than the original Karger-Stein algorithm. We show that the analysis becomes particularly clean in this case: we can prove that the probability that a fixed minimum cut in an $n$ node graph is returned by the algorithm is bounded below by $1/(2H_n-2)$, where $H_n$ is the $n$th harmonic number. We also consider other similar variants of the algorithm, and show that no such algorithm can achieve an asymptotically better probability of finding a fixed minimum cut.
abstract_zh: 在这篇文章中，我们重新审视了 Karger 和 Stein 的递归随机收缩算法，用于寻找图中的最小割。 Fox、Panigrahi 和Zhang 的一篇论文引起了我们的重温，该论文将 Karger-Stein 算法扩展到超图中的最小割和最小 $k$ 割。当专门针对图的情况时，该算法与原始的 Karger-Stein 算法有些不同。我们表明，在这种情况下，分析变得特别清晰：我们可以证明，算法返回 $n$ 节点图中的固定最小割的概率以下为 $1/(2H_n-2)$，其中 $H_n$ 是第 $n$ 个调和数。我们还考虑了该算法的其他类似变体，并表明没有这样的算法可以实现找到固定最小割的渐近更好的概率。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视Karger-Stein的递归随机收缩算法，分析其在图中寻找最小割的概率，并证明其下界。
AI.motivation: 受Fox等人的研究启发，该算法在超图中的扩展促使对原算法在图中的性能进行更清晰的分析。
AI.method: 通过数学分析，结合调和数理论，证明算法返回固定最小割的概率下界，并比较其他变体算法。
AI.result: 证明算法返回固定最小割的概率至少为1/(2H_n-2)，且无其他算法能实现渐进更优概率。
AI.conclusion: 该分析为原算法提供了理论保证，并确立了其在渐进性能上的最优性。

authors_text: Antonio Stanziola,Simon R. Arridge,Ben T. Cox,Bradley E. Treeby
title: A Helmholtz equation solver using unsupervised learning: Application to transcranial ultrasound
title_zh: 使用无监督学习的亥姆霍兹方程求解器：在经颅超声中的应用
abstract: Transcranial ultrasound therapy is increasingly used for the non-invasive treatment of brain disorders. However, conventional numerical wave solvers are currently too computationally expensive to be used online during treatments to predict the acoustic field passing through the skull (e.g., to account for subject-specific dose and targeting variations). As a step towards real-time predictions, in the current work, a fast iterative solver for the heterogeneous Helmholtz equation in 2D is developed using a fully-learned optimizer. The lightweight network architecture is based on a modified UNet that includes a learned hidden state. The network is trained using a physics-based loss function and a set of idealized sound speed distributions with fully unsupervised training (no knowledge of the true solution is required). The learned optimizer shows excellent performance on the test set, and is capable of generalization well outside the training examples, including to much larger computational domains, and more complex source and sound speed distributions, for example, those derived from x-ray computed tomography images of the skull.
summary: Transcranial ultrasound therapy is increasingly used for the non-invasive treatment of brain disorders. However, conventional numerical wave solvers are currently too computationally expensive to be used online during treatments to predict the acoustic field passing through the skull (e.g., to account for subject-specific dose and targeting variations). As a step towards real-time predictions, in the current work, a fast iterative solver for the heterogeneous Helmholtz equation in 2D is developed using a fully-learned optimizer. The lightweight network architecture is based on a modified UNet that includes a learned hidden state. The network is trained using a physics-based loss function and a set of idealized sound speed distributions with fully unsupervised training (no knowledge of the true solution is required). The learned optimizer shows excellent performance on the test set, and is capable of generalization well outside the training examples, including to much larger computational domains, and more complex source and sound speed distributions, for example, those derived from x-ray computed tomography images of the skull.
abstract_zh: 经颅超声疗法越来越多地用于脑部疾病的非侵入性治疗。然而，传统的数值波解算器目前的计算成本太高，无法在治疗期间在线使用来预测穿过头骨的声场（例如，考虑到受试者特定的剂量和目标变化）。作为实现实时预测的一步，在当前的工作中，使用完全学习的优化器开发了二维异构亥姆霍兹方程的快速迭代求解器。轻量级网络架构基于修改后的 UNet，其中包括学习的隐藏状态。该网络使用基于物理的损失函数和一组理想化的声速分布进行训练，并进行完全无监督的训练（不需要了解真实的解决方案）。学习到的优化器在测试集上表现出出色的性能，并且能够在训练示例之外进行泛化，包括更大的计算域以及更复杂的源和声速分布，例如从头骨的 X 射线计算机断层扫描图像导出的分布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于无监督学习的快速迭代求解器，用于解决经颅超声治疗中的二维非均匀Helmholtz方程问题。
AI.motivation: 传统数值波求解器计算成本过高，无法在治疗过程中实时预测颅骨内的声场分布，需开发更高效的实时预测方法。
AI.method: 设计轻量级修改UNet网络架构，包含学习隐藏状态，通过物理损失函数进行无监督训练，无需真实解标签。
AI.result: 该求解器在测试集表现优异，可泛化至更大计算域及复杂声速分布（如CT图像重建的颅骨数据）。
AI.conclusion: 无监督学习方法为经颅超声治疗的实时声场预测提供了可行方案，展示了物理感知神经网络的潜力。

search_text: A Helmholtz equation solver using unsupervised learning: Application to transcranial ultrasound 使用无监督学习的亥姆霍兹方程求解器：在经颅超声中的应用 Transcranial ultrasound therapy is increasingly used for the non-invasive treatment of brain disorders. However, conventional numerical wave solvers are currently too computationally expensive to be used online during treatments to predict the acoustic field passing through the skull (e.g., to account for subject-specific dose and targeting variations). As a step towards real-time predictions, in the current work, a fast iterative solver for the heterogeneous Helmholtz equation in 2D is developed using a fully-learned optimizer. The lightweight network architecture is based on a modified UNet that includes a learned hidden state. The network is trained using a physics-based loss function and a set of idealized sound speed distributions with fully unsupervised training (no knowledge of the true solution is required). The learned optimizer shows excellent performance on the test set, and is capable of generalization well outside the training examples, including to much larger computational domains, and more complex source and sound speed distributions, for example, those derived from x-ray computed tomography images of the skull. 经颅超声疗法越来越多地用于脑部疾病的非侵入性治疗。然而，传统的数值波解算器目前的计算成本太高，无法在治疗期间在线使用来预测穿过头骨的声场（例如，考虑到受试者特定的剂量和目标变化）。作为实现实时预测的一步，在当前的工作中，使用完全学习的优化器开发了二维异构亥姆霍兹方程的快速迭代求解器。轻量级网络架构基于修改后的 UNet，其中包括学习的隐藏状态。该网络使用基于物理的损失函数和一组理想化的声速分布进行训练，并进行完全无监督的训练（不需要了解真实的解决方案）。学习到的优化器在测试集上表现出出色的性能，并且能够在训练示例之外进行泛化，包括更大的计算域以及更复杂的源和声速分布，例如从头骨的 X 射线计算机断层扫描图像导出的分布。 本文提出一种基于无监督学习的快速迭代求解器，用于解决经颅超声治疗中的二维非均匀Helmholtz方程问题。 Antonio Stanziola,Simon R. Arridge,Ben T. Cox,Bradley E. Treeby physics.comp-ph,cs.LG,eess.IV,physics.med-ph

authors_text: Jesper Larsson Träff,Manuel Pöter
title: A more Pragmatic Implementation of the Lock-free, Ordered, Linked List
title_zh: 更实用的无锁有序链表实现
abstract: The lock-free, ordered, linked list is an important, standard example of a concurrent data structure. An obvious, practical drawback of textbook implementations is that failed compare-and-swap (CAS) operations lead to retraversal of the entire list (retries), which is particularly harmful for such a linear-time data structure. We alleviate this drawback by first observing that failed CAS operations under some conditions do not require a full retry, and second by maintaining approximate backwards pointers that are used to find a closer starting position in the list for operation retry. Experiments with both a worst-case deterministic benchmark, and a standard, randomized, mixed-operation throughput benchmark on three shared-memory systems (Intel Xeon, AMD EPYC, SPARC-T5) show practical improvements ranging from significant, to dramatic, several orders of magnitude.
summary: The lock-free, ordered, linked list is an important, standard example of a concurrent data structure. An obvious, practical drawback of textbook implementations is that failed compare-and-swap (CAS) operations lead to retraversal of the entire list (retries), which is particularly harmful for such a linear-time data structure. We alleviate this drawback by first observing that failed CAS operations under some conditions do not require a full retry, and second by maintaining approximate backwards pointers that are used to find a closer starting position in the list for operation retry. Experiments with both a worst-case deterministic benchmark, and a standard, randomized, mixed-operation throughput benchmark on three shared-memory systems (Intel Xeon, AMD EPYC, SPARC-T5) show practical improvements ranging from significant, to dramatic, several orders of magnitude.
abstract_zh: 无锁有序链表是并发数据结构的一个重要的标准示例。教科书实现的一个明显的实际缺点是，失败的比较和交换（CAS）操作会导致整个列表的重新遍历（重试），这对于这种线性时间数据结构尤其有害。我们首先观察到在某些情况下失败的 CAS 操作不需要完全重试，然后通过维护近似向后指针来缓解此缺点，这些指针用于在列表中查找更接近的起始位置以进行操作重试。在三个共享内存系统（Intel Xeon、AMD EPYC、SPARC-T5）上对最坏情况确定性基准测试和标准随机混合操作吞吐量基准测试进行的实验表明，实际改进范围从显着到显着，有几个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种更实用的无锁有序链表实现方法，通过优化失败的CAS操作处理机制以减少性能损耗。
AI.motivation: 传统无锁有序链表实现中，失败的CAS操作会导致整个链表的重试，造成线性时间开销，严重影响实际应用效率。
AI.method: 通过两个关键优化：1) 识别部分CAS失败无需全链表重试的条件；2) 维护近似反向指针以定位更接近的重试起点。
AI.result: 在三种共享内存系统上实验显示，该方法实现从显著到数量级的性能提升，最高达数个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了无锁链表的重试问题，通过局部重试优化和反向指针机制，在实际场景中显著提升性能。

authors_text: Ahmad B Qasim,Arnd Pettirsch
title: Recurrent Neural Networks for video object detection
title_zh: 用于视频对象检测的循环神经网络
abstract: There is lots of scientific work about object detection in images. For many applications like for example autonomous driving the actual data on which classification has to be done are videos. This work compares different methods, especially those which use Recurrent Neural Networks to detect objects in videos. We differ between feature-based methods, which feed feature maps of different frames into the recurrent units, box-level methods, which feed bounding boxes with class probabilities into the recurrent units and methods which use flow networks. This study indicates common outcomes of the compared methods like the benefit of including the temporal context into object detection and states conclusions and guidelines for video object detection networks.
summary: There is lots of scientific work about object detection in images. For many applications like for example autonomous driving the actual data on which classification has to be done are videos. This work compares different methods, especially those which use Recurrent Neural Networks to detect objects in videos. We differ between feature-based methods, which feed feature maps of different frames into the recurrent units, box-level methods, which feed bounding boxes with class probabilities into the recurrent units and methods which use flow networks. This study indicates common outcomes of the compared methods like the benefit of including the temporal context into object detection and states conclusions and guidelines for video object detection networks.
abstract_zh: 关于图像中的对象检测有很多科学工作。对于许多应用（例如自动驾驶）来说，必须进行分类的实际数据是视频。这项工作比较了不同的方法，特别是那些使用循环神经网络来检测视频中的对象的方法。基于特征的方法（将不同帧的特征图输入循环单元）、框级方法（将具有类概率的边界框输入循环单元）和使用流网络的方法之间存在差异。这项研究表明了比较方法的共同结果，例如将时间上下文纳入对象检测的好处，并陈述了视频对象检测网络的结论和指南。

AI.tldr: 本文主要比较了不同循环神经网络方法在视频目标检测中的应用效果
AI.motivation: 尽管图像目标检测研究较多，但实际应用如自动驾驶需要处理视频数据，因此需要探索适用于视频的检测方法
AI.method: 比较了三种方法：基于特征图的RNN方法、基于边界框的RNN方法以及结合光流网络的方法
AI.result: 研究发现将时间上下文信息纳入检测过程能提升视频目标检测的性能
AI.conclusion: 结论强调了时间上下文的重要性，并为构建视频目标检测网络提供了指导建议

authors_text: Jia Qian,Hiba Nassar,Lars Kai Hansen
title: Minimal Model Structure Analysis for Input Reconstruction in Federated Learning
title_zh: 联邦学习中输入重构的最小模型结构分析
abstract: \ac{fl} proposed a distributed \ac{ml} framework where every distributed worker owns a complete copy of global model and their own data. The training is occurred locally, which assures no direct transmission of training data. However, the recent work \citep{zhu2019deep} demonstrated that input data from a neural network may be reconstructed only using knowledge of gradients of that network, which completely breached the promise of \ac{fl} and sabotaged the user privacy. In this work, we aim to further explore the theoretical limits of reconstruction, speedup and stabilize the reconstruction procedure. We show that a single input may be reconstructed with the analytical form, regardless of network depth using a fully-connected neural network with one hidden node. Then we generalize this result to a gradient averaged over batches of size $B$. In this case, the full batch can be reconstructed if the number of hidden units exceeds $B$. For a \ac{cnn}, the number of required kernels in convolutional layers is decided by multiple factors, e.g., padding, kernel and stride size, etc. We require the number of kernels $h\geq (\frac{d}{d^{\prime}})^2C$, where we define $d$ as input width, $d^{\prime}$ as output width after convolutional layer, and $C$ as channel number of input. We validate our observation and demonstrate the improvements using bio-medical (fMRI, \ac{wbc}) and benchmark data (MNIST, Kuzushiji-MNIST, CIFAR100, ImageNet and face images).
summary: \ac{fl} proposed a distributed \ac{ml} framework where every distributed worker owns a complete copy of global model and their own data. The training is occurred locally, which assures no direct transmission of training data. However, the recent work \citep{zhu2019deep} demonstrated that input data from a neural network may be reconstructed only using knowledge of gradients of that network, which completely breached the promise of \ac{fl} and sabotaged the user privacy. In this work, we aim to further explore the theoretical limits of reconstruction, speedup and stabilize the reconstruction procedure. We show that a single input may be reconstructed with the analytical form, regardless of network depth using a fully-connected neural network with one hidden node. Then we generalize this result to a gradient averaged over batches of size $B$. In this case, the full batch can be reconstructed if the number of hidden units exceeds $B$. For a \ac{cnn}, the number of required kernels in convolutional layers is decided by multiple factors, e.g., padding, kernel and stride size, etc. We require the number of kernels $h\geq (\frac{d}{d^{\prime}})^2C$, where we define $d$ as input width, $d^{\prime}$ as output width after convolutional layer, and $C$ as channel number of input. We validate our observation and demonstrate the improvements using bio-medical (fMRI, \ac{wbc}) and benchmark data (MNIST, Kuzushiji-MNIST, CIFAR100, ImageNet and face images).
abstract_zh: \ac{fl} 提出了一个分布式 \ac{ml} 框架，其中每个分布式工作人员都拥有全局模型和自己数据的完整副本。训练在本地进行，这确保了训练数据不会直接传输。然而，最近的工作 \citep{zhu2019deep} 证明，来自神经网络的输入数据只能使用该网络的梯度知识来重建，这完全违反了 \ac{fl} 的承诺并破坏了用户隐私。在这项工作中，我们的目标是进一步探索重建的理论极限，加速和稳定重建过程。我们证明，使用具有一个隐藏节点的全连接神经网络，无论网络深度如何，都可以通过分析形式重建单个输入。然后我们将此结果推广到大小为 $B$ 的批次上平均的梯度。在这种情况下，如果隐藏单元的数量超过 $B$，则可以重建整个批次。对于\ac{cnn}，卷积层中所需的内核数量由多个因素决定，例如填充、内核和步幅大小等。我们需要内核数量$h\geq (\frac{d}{d^{\prime}})^2C$，其中我们定义$d$为输入宽度，$d^{\prime}$为卷积层后的输出宽度，$C$为输入的通道数。我们使用生物医学（fMRI、\ac{wbc}）和基准数据（MNIST、Kuzushiji-MNIST、CIFAR100、ImageNet 和人脸图像）验证了我们的观察结果并展示了改进。

AI.tldr: 本文研究联邦学习中基于梯度的输入重建问题，分析了最小模型结构对重建过程的影响，并提出了理论限制和改进方法。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习虽通过本地训练保护数据隐私，但已有研究证明梯度信息可能被用于重建原始输入，威胁用户隐私。本文旨在探索重建的理论极限并提升重建效率与稳定性。
AI.method: 通过解析方法推导全连接网络和卷积神经网络的最小模型结构（如隐藏单元数、卷积核数量），结合批量梯度平均场景，提出理论公式并进行生物医学和基准数据集验证。
AI.result: 证明单隐藏节点全连接网络可重建单个输入，批量梯度下隐藏单元数需超过批量大小；CNN卷积核数量需满足公式约束。实验验证了理论分析的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了联邦学习中输入重建的理论边界，为设计更安全的隐私保护机制提供了理论依据，有助于优化模型结构以抵御潜在攻击。

search_text: Minimal Model Structure Analysis for Input Reconstruction in Federated Learning 联邦学习中输入重构的最小模型结构分析 \ac{fl} proposed a distributed \ac{ml} framework where every distributed worker owns a complete copy of global model and their own data. The training is occurred locally, which assures no direct transmission of training data. However, the recent work \citep{zhu2019deep} demonstrated that input data from a neural network may be reconstructed only using knowledge of gradients of that network, which completely breached the promise of \ac{fl} and sabotaged the user privacy. In this work, we aim to further explore the theoretical limits of reconstruction, speedup and stabilize the reconstruction procedure. We show that a single input may be reconstructed with the analytical form, regardless of network depth using a fully-connected neural network with one hidden node. Then we generalize this result to a gradient averaged over batches of size $B$. In this case, the full batch can be reconstructed if the number of hidden units exceeds $B$. For a \ac{cnn}, the number of required kernels in convolutional layers is decided by multiple factors, e.g., padding, kernel and stride size, etc. We require the number of kernels $h\geq (\frac{d}{d^{\prime}})^2C$, where we define $d$ as input width, $d^{\prime}$ as output width after convolutional layer, and $C$ as channel number of input. We validate our observation and demonstrate the improvements using bio-medical (fMRI, \ac{wbc}) and benchmark data (MNIST, Kuzushiji-MNIST, CIFAR100, ImageNet and face images). \ac{fl} 提出了一个分布式 \ac{ml} 框架，其中每个分布式工作人员都拥有全局模型和自己数据的完整副本。训练在本地进行，这确保了训练数据不会直接传输。然而，最近的工作 \citep{zhu2019deep} 证明，来自神经网络的输入数据只能使用该网络的梯度知识来重建，这完全违反了 \ac{fl} 的承诺并破坏了用户隐私。在这项工作中，我们的目标是进一步探索重建的理论极限，加速和稳定重建过程。我们证明，使用具有一个隐藏节点的全连接神经网络，无论网络深度如何，都可以通过分析形式重建单个输入。然后我们将此结果推广到大小为 $B$ 的批次上平均的梯度。在这种情况下，如果隐藏单元的数量超过 $B$，则可以重建整个批次。对于\ac{cnn}，卷积层中所需的内核数量由多个因素决定，例如填充、内核和步幅大小等。我们需要内核数量$h\geq (\frac{d}{d^{\prime}})^2C$，其中我们定义$d$为输入宽度，$d^{\prime}$为卷积层后的输出宽度，$C$为输入的通道数。我们使用生物医学（fMRI、\ac{wbc}）和基准数据（MNIST、Kuzushiji-MNIST、CIFAR100、ImageNet 和人脸图像）验证了我们的观察结果并展示了改进。 本文研究联邦学习中基于梯度的输入重建问题，分析了最小模型结构对重建过程的影响，并提出了理论限制和改进方法。 Jia Qian,Hiba Nassar,Lars Kai Hansen cs.CR,cs.DC,eess.IV

authors_text: Andrew Brown,Jaesung Huh,Arsha Nagrani,Joon Son Chung,Andrew Zisserman
title: Playing a Part: Speaker Verification at the Movies
title_zh: 扮演角色：电影中的演讲者验证
comment: The first three authors contributed equally to this work
comments: The first three authors contributed equally to this work
abstract: The goal of this work is to investigate the performance of popular speaker recognition models on speech segments from movies, where often actors intentionally disguise their voice to play a character. We make the following three contributions: (i) We collect a novel, challenging speaker recognition dataset called VoxMovies, with speech for 856 identities from almost 4000 movie clips. VoxMovies contains utterances with varying emotion, accents and background noise, and therefore comprises an entirely different domain to the interview-style, emotionally calm utterances in current speaker recognition datasets such as VoxCeleb; (ii) We provide a number of domain adaptation evaluation sets, and benchmark the performance of state-of-the-art speaker recognition models on these evaluation pairs. We demonstrate that both speaker verification and identification performance drops steeply on this new data, showing the challenge in transferring models across domains; and finally (iii) We show that simple domain adaptation paradigms improve performance, but there is still large room for improvement.
summary: The goal of this work is to investigate the performance of popular speaker recognition models on speech segments from movies, where often actors intentionally disguise their voice to play a character. We make the following three contributions: (i) We collect a novel, challenging speaker recognition dataset called VoxMovies, with speech for 856 identities from almost 4000 movie clips. VoxMovies contains utterances with varying emotion, accents and background noise, and therefore comprises an entirely different domain to the interview-style, emotionally calm utterances in current speaker recognition datasets such as VoxCeleb; (ii) We provide a number of domain adaptation evaluation sets, and benchmark the performance of state-of-the-art speaker recognition models on these evaluation pairs. We demonstrate that both speaker verification and identification performance drops steeply on this new data, showing the challenge in transferring models across domains; and finally (iii) We show that simple domain adaptation paradigms improve performance, but there is still large room for improvement.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的目标是研究流行的说话人识别模型在电影语音片段上的表现，在电影中，演员经常故意伪装自己的声音来扮演角色。我们做出以下三项贡献：(i) 我们收集了一个新颖且具有挑战性的说话人识别数据集，称为 VoxMovies，其中包含来自近 4000 个电影剪辑的 856 个身份的语音。 VoxMovies 包含具有不同情感、口音和背景噪音的话语，因此与当前说话人识别数据集（例如 VoxCeleb）中采访风格、情感平静的话语完全不同。 （ii）我们提供了许多领域适应评估集，并在这些评估对上对最先进的说话人识别模型的性能进行了基准测试。我们证明了说话人验证和识别性能在这些新数据上急剧下降，显示出跨领域转移模型的挑战；最后（iii）我们证明简单的域适应范例可以提高性能，但仍有很大的改进空间。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究现有说话人识别模型在电影语音片段中的性能，特别是演员刻意伪装声音的场景。
AI.motivation: 现有说话人识别数据集（如VoxCeleb）以平静访谈风格语音为主，而电影语音包含更多情感、口音和背景噪声，需验证模型跨领域适应能力。
AI.method: 构建包含856个身份、近4000个电影片段的VoxMovies数据集；设计领域适应评估集；测试最新模型性能并应用简单领域适应方法。
AI.result: 模型在电影数据上验证/识别性能显著下降，领域适应方法部分缓解问题，但仍有较大提升空间。
AI.conclusion: 当前模型难以应对电影语音的领域差异，需进一步研究有效的跨领域适应技术。

authors_text: Julieta Martinez,Jashan Shewakramani,Ting Wei Liu,Ioan Andrei Bârsan,Wenyuan Zeng,Raquel Urtasun
title: Permute, Quantize, and Fine-tune: Efficient Compression of Neural Networks
title_zh: 排列、量化和微调：神经网络的高效压缩
abstract: Compressing large neural networks is an important step for their deployment in resource-constrained computational platforms. In this context, vector quantization is an appealing framework that expresses multiple parameters using a single code, and has recently achieved state-of-the-art network compression on a range of core vision and natural language processing tasks. Key to the success of vector quantization is deciding which parameter groups should be compressed together. Previous work has relied on heuristics that group the spatial dimension of individual convolutional filters, but a general solution remains unaddressed. This is desirable for pointwise convolutions (which dominate modern architectures), linear layers (which have no notion of spatial dimension), and convolutions (when more than one filter is compressed to the same codeword). In this paper we make the observation that the weights of two adjacent layers can be permuted while expressing the same function. We then establish a connection to rate-distortion theory and search for permutations that result in networks that are easier to compress. Finally, we rely on an annealed quantization algorithm to better compress the network and achieve higher final accuracy. We show results on image classification, object detection, and segmentation, reducing the gap with the uncompressed model by 40 to 70% with respect to the current state of the art.
summary: Compressing large neural networks is an important step for their deployment in resource-constrained computational platforms. In this context, vector quantization is an appealing framework that expresses multiple parameters using a single code, and has recently achieved state-of-the-art network compression on a range of core vision and natural language processing tasks. Key to the success of vector quantization is deciding which parameter groups should be compressed together. Previous work has relied on heuristics that group the spatial dimension of individual convolutional filters, but a general solution remains unaddressed. This is desirable for pointwise convolutions (which dominate modern architectures), linear layers (which have no notion of spatial dimension), and convolutions (when more than one filter is compressed to the same codeword). In this paper we make the observation that the weights of two adjacent layers can be permuted while expressing the same function. We then establish a connection to rate-distortion theory and search for permutations that result in networks that are easier to compress. Finally, we rely on an annealed quantization algorithm to better compress the network and achieve higher final accuracy. We show results on image classification, object detection, and segmentation, reducing the gap with the uncompressed model by 40 to 70% with respect to the current state of the art.
abstract_zh: 压缩大型神经网络是其在资源受限的计算平台中部署的重要一步。在这种情况下，矢量量化是一个有吸引力的框架，它使用单个代码表达多个参数，并且最近在一系列核心视觉和自然语言处理任务上实现了最先进的网络压缩。矢量量化成功的关键是决定哪些参数组应该被压缩在一起。以前的工作依赖于对各个卷积滤波器的空间维度进行分组的启发式方法，但通用的解决方案仍未得到解决。这对于逐点卷积（在现代架构中占主导地位）、线性层（没有空间维度的概念）和卷积（当多个滤波器被压缩为同一码字时）是可取的。在本文中，我们观察到两个相邻层的权重可以在表达相同的函数时进行排列。然后，我们建立与率失真理论的联系，并搜索导致更容易压缩的网络的排列。最后，我们依靠退火量化算法来更好地压缩网络并获得更高的最终精度。我们展示了图像分类、对象检测和分割方面的结果，与当前技术水平相比，与未压缩模型的差距缩小了 40% 到 70%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过置换、量化和微调来高效压缩神经网络的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有向量量化方法在处理点卷积、线性层及多滤波器压缩时存在局限性，需更通用的压缩方案。
AI.method: 通过置换相邻层权重保持函数等效性，结合率失真理论优化分组，并采用退火量化算法提升压缩效果。
AI.result: 在图像分类、检测和分割任务中，压缩模型与原始模型的性能差距缩小40-70%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为不同网络结构提供了高效的通用压缩方案，显著提升压缩后模型精度。

search_text: Permute, Quantize, and Fine-tune: Efficient Compression of Neural Networks 排列、量化和微调：神经网络的高效压缩 Compressing large neural networks is an important step for their deployment in resource-constrained computational platforms. In this context, vector quantization is an appealing framework that expresses multiple parameters using a single code, and has recently achieved state-of-the-art network compression on a range of core vision and natural language processing tasks. Key to the success of vector quantization is deciding which parameter groups should be compressed together. Previous work has relied on heuristics that group the spatial dimension of individual convolutional filters, but a general solution remains unaddressed. This is desirable for pointwise convolutions (which dominate modern architectures), linear layers (which have no notion of spatial dimension), and convolutions (when more than one filter is compressed to the same codeword). In this paper we make the observation that the weights of two adjacent layers can be permuted while expressing the same function. We then establish a connection to rate-distortion theory and search for permutations that result in networks that are easier to compress. Finally, we rely on an annealed quantization algorithm to better compress the network and achieve higher final accuracy. We show results on image classification, object detection, and segmentation, reducing the gap with the uncompressed model by 40 to 70% with respect to the current state of the art. 压缩大型神经网络是其在资源受限的计算平台中部署的重要一步。在这种情况下，矢量量化是一个有吸引力的框架，它使用单个代码表达多个参数，并且最近在一系列核心视觉和自然语言处理任务上实现了最先进的网络压缩。矢量量化成功的关键是决定哪些参数组应该被压缩在一起。以前的工作依赖于对各个卷积滤波器的空间维度进行分组的启发式方法，但通用的解决方案仍未得到解决。这对于逐点卷积（在现代架构中占主导地位）、线性层（没有空间维度的概念）和卷积（当多个滤波器被压缩为同一码字时）是可取的。在本文中，我们观察到两个相邻层的权重可以在表达相同的函数时进行排列。然后，我们建立与率失真理论的联系，并搜索导致更容易压缩的网络的排列。最后，我们依靠退火量化算法来更好地压缩网络并获得更高的最终精度。我们展示了图像分类、对象检测和分割方面的结果，与当前技术水平相比，与未压缩模型的差距缩小了 40% 到 70%。 本文提出一种通过置换、量化和微调来高效压缩神经网络的方法。 Julieta Martinez,Jashan Shewakramani,Ting Wei Liu,Ioan Andrei Bârsan,Wenyuan Zeng,Raquel Urtasun cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Feng Li,Runmin Cong,Huihui Bai,Yifan He,Yao Zhao,Ce Zhu
title: Learning Deep Interleaved Networks with Asymmetric Co-Attention for Image Restoration
title_zh: 学习具有非对称共同关注的深度交错网络以进行图像恢复
abstract: Recently, convolutional neural network (CNN) has demonstrated significant success for image restoration (IR) tasks (e.g., image super-resolution, image deblurring, rain streak removal, and dehazing). However, existing CNN based models are commonly implemented as a single-path stream to enrich feature representations from low-quality (LQ) input space for final predictions, which fail to fully incorporate preceding low-level contexts into later high-level features within networks, thereby producing inferior results. In this paper, we present a deep interleaved network (DIN) that learns how information at different states should be combined for high-quality (HQ) images reconstruction. The proposed DIN follows a multi-path and multi-branch pattern allowing multiple interconnected branches to interleave and fuse at different states. In this way, the shallow information can guide deep representative features prediction to enhance the feature expression ability. Furthermore, we propose asymmetric co-attention (AsyCA) which is attached at each interleaved node to model the feature dependencies. Such AsyCA can not only adaptively emphasize the informative features from different states, but also improves the discriminative ability of networks. Our presented DIN can be trained end-to-end and applied to various IR tasks. Comprehensive evaluations on public benchmarks and real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed DIN perform favorably against the state-of-the-art methods quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: Recently, convolutional neural network (CNN) has demonstrated significant success for image restoration (IR) tasks (e.g., image super-resolution, image deblurring, rain streak removal, and dehazing). However, existing CNN based models are commonly implemented as a single-path stream to enrich feature representations from low-quality (LQ) input space for final predictions, which fail to fully incorporate preceding low-level contexts into later high-level features within networks, thereby producing inferior results. In this paper, we present a deep interleaved network (DIN) that learns how information at different states should be combined for high-quality (HQ) images reconstruction. The proposed DIN follows a multi-path and multi-branch pattern allowing multiple interconnected branches to interleave and fuse at different states. In this way, the shallow information can guide deep representative features prediction to enhance the feature expression ability. Furthermore, we propose asymmetric co-attention (AsyCA) which is attached at each interleaved node to model the feature dependencies. Such AsyCA can not only adaptively emphasize the informative features from different states, but also improves the discriminative ability of networks. Our presented DIN can be trained end-to-end and applied to various IR tasks. Comprehensive evaluations on public benchmarks and real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed DIN perform favorably against the state-of-the-art methods quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 最近，卷积神经网络（CNN）在图像恢复（IR）任务（例如图像超分辨率、图像去模糊、雨纹去除和去雾）方面取得了巨大成功。然而，现有的基于 CNN 的模型通常被实现为单路径流，以丰富来自低质量 (LQ) 输入空间的特征表示以进行最终预测，这无法将先前的低级上下文完全合并到网络中后来的高级特征中，从而产生较差的结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种深度交错网络（DIN），它学习如何组合不同状态的信息以进行高质量（HQ）图像重建。提议的 DIN 遵循多路径和多分支模式，允许多个互连分支在不同状态下交织和融合。这样，浅层信息可以指导深层代表特征预测，增强特征表达能力。此外，我们提出了非对称共同注意（AsyCA），它附加在每个交错节点上以对特征依赖性进行建模。这种AsyCA不仅可以自适应地强调不同状态的信息特征，还可以提高网络的判别能力。我们提出的 DIN 可以进行端到端训练并应用于各种 IR 任务。对公共基准和现实世界数据集的综合评估表明，所提出的 DIN 在定量和定性方面均优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种深度交织网络（DIN），结合不对称共注意力机制，用于图像修复任务。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于CNN的图像修复模型通常采用单路径流，无法充分整合早期低级上下文信息到后续高级特征中，导致修复效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出深度交织网络（DIN），采用多路径和多分支结构，允许不同分支在不同状态下交织融合。同时引入不对称共注意力机制（AsyCA），用于建模不同状态下的特征依赖关系。
AI.result: 在多个公开基准和真实数据集上的实验表明，DIN在定量和定性方面均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DIN通过多路径结构和AsyCA机制有效提升了图像修复的质量，具有广泛的应用前景。
