search_text: Learning Deep Interleaved Networks with Asymmetric Co-Attention for Image Restoration 学习具有非对称共同关注的深度交错网络以进行图像恢复 Recently, convolutional neural network (CNN) has demonstrated significant success for image restoration (IR) tasks (e.g., image super-resolution, image deblurring, rain streak removal, and dehazing). However, existing CNN based models are commonly implemented as a single-path stream to enrich feature representations from low-quality (LQ) input space for final predictions, which fail to fully incorporate preceding low-level contexts into later high-level features within networks, thereby producing inferior results. In this paper, we present a deep interleaved network (DIN) that learns how information at different states should be combined for high-quality (HQ) images reconstruction. The proposed DIN follows a multi-path and multi-branch pattern allowing multiple interconnected branches to interleave and fuse at different states. Furthermore, we propose asymmetric co-attention (AsyCA) which is attached at each interleaved node to model the feature dependencies. Such AsyCA can not only adaptively emphasize the informative features from different states, but also improves the discriminative ability of networks. Our presented DIN can be trained end-to-end and applied to various IR tasks. Comprehensive evaluations on public benchmarks and real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed DIN perform favorably against the state-of-the-art methods quantitatively and qualitatively. 最近，卷积神经网络（CNN）在图像恢复（IR）任务（例如图像超分辨率、图像去模糊、雨纹去除和去雾）方面取得了巨大成功。然而，现有的基于 CNN 的模型通常被实现为单路径流，以丰富来自低质量 (LQ) 输入空间的特征表示以进行最终预测，这无法将先前的低级上下文完全合并到网络中后来的高级特征中，从而产生较差的结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种深度交错网络（DIN），它学习如何组合不同状态的信息以进行高质量（HQ）图像重建。提议的 DIN 遵循多路径和多分支模式，允许多个互连分支在不同状态下交织和融合。这样，浅层信息可以指导深层代表特征预测，增强特征表达能力。此外，我们提出了非对称共同注意（AsyCA），它附加在每个交错节点上以对特征依赖性进行建模。这种AsyCA不仅可以自适应地强调不同状态的信息特征，还可以提高网络的判别能力。我们提出的 DIN 可以进行端到端训练并应用于各种 IR 任务。对公共基准和现实世界数据集的综合评估表明，所提出的 DIN 在定量和定性方面均优于最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种深度交织网络（DIN），结合不对称共注意力机制，用于图像修复任务。 Feng Li,Runmin Cong,Huihui Bai,Yifan He,Yao Zhao,Ce Zhu cs.CV

authors_text: Isaac Gerg,Vishal Monga
title: Deep Autofocus for Synthetic Aperture Sonar
title_zh: 合成孔径声纳的深度自动对焦
abstract: Synthetic aperture sonar (SAS) requires precise positional and environmental information to produce well-focused output during the image reconstruction step. However, errors in these measurements are commonly present resulting in defocused imagery. To overcome these issues, an \emph{autofocus} algorithm is employed as a post-processing step after image reconstruction for the purpose of improving image quality using the image content itself. These algorithms are usually iterative and metric-based in that they seek to optimize an image sharpness metric. In this letter, we demonstrate the potential of machine learning, specifically deep learning, to address the autofocus problem. We formulate the problem as a self-supervised, phase error estimation task using a deep network we call Deep Autofocus. Our formulation has the advantages of being non-iterative (and thus fast) and not requiring ground truth focused-defocused images pairs as often required by other deblurring deep learning methods. We compare our technique against a set of common sharpness metrics optimized using gradient descent over a real-world dataset. Our results demonstrate Deep Autofocus can produce imagery that is perceptually as good as benchmark iterative techniques but at a substantially lower computational cost. We conclude that our proposed Deep Autofocus can provide a more favorable cost-quality trade-off than state-of-the-art alternatives with significant potential of future research.
summary: Synthetic aperture sonar (SAS) requires precise positional and environmental information to produce well-focused output during the image reconstruction step. However, errors in these measurements are commonly present resulting in defocused imagery. To overcome these issues, an \emph{autofocus} algorithm is employed as a post-processing step after image reconstruction for the purpose of improving image quality using the image content itself. These algorithms are usually iterative and metric-based in that they seek to optimize an image sharpness metric. In this letter, we demonstrate the potential of machine learning, specifically deep learning, to address the autofocus problem. We formulate the problem as a self-supervised, phase error estimation task using a deep network we call Deep Autofocus. Our formulation has the advantages of being non-iterative (and thus fast) and not requiring ground truth focused-defocused images pairs as often required by other deblurring deep learning methods. We compare our technique against a set of common sharpness metrics optimized using gradient descent over a real-world dataset. Our results demonstrate Deep Autofocus can produce imagery that is perceptually as good as benchmark iterative techniques but at a substantially lower computational cost. We conclude that our proposed Deep Autofocus can provide a more favorable cost-quality trade-off than state-of-the-art alternatives with significant potential of future research.
abstract_zh: 合成孔径声纳 (SAS) 需要精确的位置和环境信息，以便在图像重建步骤中产生聚焦良好的输出。然而，这些测量中通常存在错误，导致图像散焦。为了克服这些问题，采用 \emph{autofocus} 算法作为图像重建后的后处理步骤，以便利用图像内容本身来提高图像质量。这些算法通常是迭代的且基于度量的，因为它们寻求优化图像清晰度度量。在这封信中，我们展示了机器学习（特别是深度学习）在解决自动对焦问题方面的潜力。我们使用称为“深度自动对焦”的深度网络将该问题表述为自我监督的相位误差估计任务。我们的公式具有非迭代（因此速度快）的优点，并且不需要其他去模糊深度学习方法经常需要的地面真实聚焦散焦图像对。我们将我们的技术与在现实世界数据集上使用梯度下降优化的一组常见锐度指标进行比较。我们的结果表明，深度自动对焦可以产生在感知上与基准迭代技术一样好的图像，但计算成本却低得多。我们的结论是，我们提出的深度自动对焦可以提供比最先进的替代方案更有利的成本质量权衡，并且具有未来研究的巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的合成孔径声纳（SAS）图像自动对焦方法，称为Deep Autofocus。
AI.motivation: 传统SAS图像重建依赖精确的位置和环境信息，但测量误差会导致图像失焦。现有自动对焦算法多为迭代优化，计算成本高且依赖成对的清晰-模糊图像数据。
AI.method: 将自动对焦问题建模为自监督的相位误差估计任务，设计深度神经网络Deep Autofocus直接估计相位误差，无需迭代计算和真实标注数据。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上实验表明，该方法生成的图像视觉质量与基准迭代方法相当，但计算成本显著降低。
AI.conclusion: Deep Autofocus在计算成本与图像质量的权衡上优于现有方法，为SAS自动对焦提供了新的研究方向。

search_text: Deep Autofocus for Synthetic Aperture Sonar 合成孔径声纳的深度自动对焦 Synthetic aperture sonar (SAS) requires precise positional and environmental information to produce well-focused output during the image reconstruction step. However, errors in these measurements are commonly present resulting in defocused imagery. To overcome these issues, an \emph{autofocus} algorithm is employed as a post-processing step after image reconstruction for the purpose of improving image quality using the image content itself. These algorithms are usually iterative and metric-based in that they seek to optimize an image sharpness metric. In this letter, we demonstrate the potential of machine learning, specifically deep learning, to address the autofocus problem. We formulate the problem as a self-supervised, phase error estimation task using a deep network we call Deep Autofocus. Our formulation has the advantages of being non-iterative (and thus fast) and not requiring ground truth focused-defocused images pairs as often required by other deblurring deep learning methods. We compare our technique against a set of common sharpness metrics optimized using gradient descent over a real-world dataset. Our results demonstrate Deep Autofocus can produce imagery that is perceptually as good as benchmark iterative techniques but at a substantially lower computational cost. We conclude that our proposed Deep Autofocus can provide a more favorable cost-quality trade-off than state-of-the-art alternatives with significant potential of future research. 合成孔径声纳 (SAS) 需要精确的位置和环境信息，以便在图像重建步骤中产生聚焦良好的输出。然而，这些测量中通常存在错误，导致图像散焦。为了克服这些问题，采用 \emph{autofocus} 算法作为图像重建后的后处理步骤，以便利用图像内容本身来提高图像质量。这些算法通常是迭代的且基于度量的，因为它们寻求优化图像清晰度度量。在这封信中，我们展示了机器学习（特别是深度学习）在解决自动对焦问题方面的潜力。我们使用称为“深度自动对焦”的深度网络将该问题表述为自我监督的相位误差估计任务。我们的公式具有非迭代（因此速度快）的优点，并且不需要其他去模糊深度学习方法经常需要的地面真实聚焦散焦图像对。我们将我们的技术与在现实世界数据集上使用梯度下降优化的一组常见锐度指标进行比较。我们的结果表明，深度自动对焦可以产生在感知上与基准迭代技术一样好的图像，但计算成本却低得多。我们的结论是，我们提出的深度自动对焦可以提供比最先进的替代方案更有利的成本质量权衡，并且具有未来研究的巨大潜力。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的合成孔径声纳（SAS）图像自动对焦方法，称为Deep Autofocus。 Isaac Gerg,Vishal Monga eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Lennart Husvogt,Stefan B. Ploner,Siyu Chen,Daniel Stromer,Julia Schottenhamml,A. Yasin Alibhai,Eric Moult,Nadia K. Waheed,James G. Fujimoto,Andreas Maier
title: Maximum a posteriori signal recovery for optical coherence tomography angiography image generation and denoising
title_zh: 光学相干断层扫描血管造影图像生成和去噪的最大后验信号恢复
comment: 14 pages, 4 figures, to be published in Biomedical Optics Express
comments: 14 pages, 4 figures, to be published in Biomedical Optics Express
abstract: Optical coherence tomography angiography (OCTA) is a novel and clinically promising imaging modality to image retinal and sub-retinal vasculature. Based on repeated optical coherence tomography (OCT) scans, intensity changes are observed over time and used to compute OCTA image data. OCTA data are prone to noise and artifacts caused by variations in flow speed and patient movement. We propose a novel iterative maximum a posteriori signal recovery algorithm in order to generate OCTA volumes with reduced noise and increased image quality. This algorithm is based on previous work on probabilistic OCTA signal models and maximum likelihood estimates. Reconstruction results using total variation minimization and wavelet shrinkage for regularization were compared against an OCTA ground truth volume, merged from six co-registered single OCTA volumes. The results show a significant improvement in peak signal-to-noise ratio and structural similarity. The presented algorithm brings together OCTA image generation and Bayesian statistics and can be developed into new OCTA image generation and denoising algorithms.

Based on repeated optical coherence tomography (OCT) scans, intensity changes are observed over time and used to compute OCTA image data. OCTA data are prone to noise and artifacts caused by variations in flow speed and patient movement. We propose a novel iterative maximum a posteriori signal recovery algorithm in order to generate OCTA volumes with reduced noise and increased image quality. This algorithm is based on previous work on probabilistic OCTA signal models and maximum likelihood estimates. Reconstruction results using total variation minimization and wavelet shrinkage for regularization were compared against an OCTA ground truth volume, merged from six co-registered single OCTA volumes. The results show a significant improvement in peak signal-to-noise ratio and structural similarity. The presented algorithm brings together OCTA image generation and Bayesian statistics and can be developed into new OCTA image generation and denoising algorithms.
abstract_zh: 光学相干断层扫描血管造影（OCTA）是一种新颖且具有临床前景的成像方式，用于对视网膜和视网膜下脉管系统进行成像。基于重复的光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 扫描，观察强度随时间的变化，并用于计算 OCTA 图像数据。 OCTA 数据容易受到流速变化和患者移动引起的噪声和伪影的影响。我们提出了一种新颖的迭代最大后验信号恢复算法，以生成具有降低噪声和提高图像质量的 OCTA 体积。该算法基于之前关于概率 OCTA 信号模型和最大似然估计的工作。将使用总变差最小化和小波收缩进行正则化的重建结果与 OCTA 地面实况体积进行比较，该体积由六个共同配准的单个 OCTA 体积合并而成。结果显示峰值信噪比和结构相似性显着改善。该算法将 OCTA 图像生成和贝叶斯统计结合在一起，可以开发成新的 OCTA 图像生成和去噪算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最大后验估计的迭代算法，用于光学相干断层扫描血管造影（OCTA）图像的生成与去噪。
AI.motivation: OCTA图像易受噪声和伪影影响，导致血管结构显示不清晰，需改进图像重建方法以提高质量。
AI.method: 结合概率OCTA信号模型与贝叶斯统计，设计迭代最大后验信号恢复算法，并采用总变分最小化和小波收缩进行正则化处理。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在峰值信噪比（PSNR）和结构相似性（SSIM）指标上均优于传统方法，图像质量显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效融合OCTA图像生成与贝叶斯统计，为后续开发更先进的OCTA去噪与重建技术提供理论支持。

authors_text: Nathan D. Ratliff,Karl Van Wyk,Mandy Xie,Anqi Li,Muhammad Asif Rana
title: Optimization Fabrics for Behavioral Design
title_zh: 用于行为设计的优化面料
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2008.02399
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2008.02399
abstract: A common approach to the provably stable design of reactive behavior, exemplified by operational space control, is to reduce the problem to the design of virtual classical mechanical systems (energy shaping). This framework is widely used, and through it we gain stability, but at the price of expressivity. This work presents a comprehensive theoretical framework expanding this approach showing that there is a much larger class of differential equations generalizing classical mechanical systems (and the broader class of Lagrangian systems) and greatly expanding their expressivity while maintaining the same governing stability principles. At the core of our framework is a class of differential equations we call fabrics which constitute a behavioral medium across which we can optimize a potential function. These fabrics shape the system's behavior during optimization but still always provably converge to a local minimum, making them a building block of stable behavioral design. We build the theoretical foundations of our framework here and provide a simple empirical demonstration of a practical class of geometric fabrics, which additionally exhibit a natural geometric path consistency making them convenient for flexible and intuitive behavioral design.
summary: A common approach to the provably stable design of reactive behavior, exemplified by operational space control, is to reduce the problem to the design of virtual classical mechanical systems (energy shaping). This framework is widely used, and through it we gain stability, but at the price of expressivity. This work presents a comprehensive theoretical framework expanding this approach showing that there is a much larger class of differential equations generalizing classical mechanical systems (and the broader class of Lagrangian systems) and greatly expanding their expressivity while maintaining the same governing stability principles. At the core of our framework is a class of differential equations we call fabrics which constitute a behavioral medium across which we can optimize a potential function. These fabrics shape the system's behavior during optimization but still always provably converge to a local minimum, making them a building block of stable behavioral design. We build the theoretical foundations of our framework here and provide a simple empirical demonstration of a practical class of geometric fabrics, which additionally exhibit a natural geometric path consistency making them convenient for flexible and intuitive behavioral design.
abstract_zh: 可证明反应行为稳定设计的常见方法（以操作空间控制为例）是将问题简化为虚拟经典机械系统（能量整形）的设计。这个框架被广泛使用，通过它我们获得了稳定性，但代价是表达能力。这项工作提出了一个全面的理论框架，扩展了这种方法，表明存在一个更大类别的微分方程，它概括了经典机械系统（以及更广泛的拉格朗日系统），并极大地扩展了它们的表达能力，同时保持了相同的控制稳定性原理。我们框架的核心是一类微分方程，我们称之为结构，它构成了我们可以优化潜在函数的行为媒介。这些结构在优化过程中塑造系统的行为，但仍然可以证明始终收敛到局部最小值，使它们成为稳定行为设计的构建块。我们在这里构建了我们框架的理论基础，并提供了实用的几何结构类别的简单实证演示，它们还表现出自然的几何路径一致性，使它们方便灵活和直观的行为设计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为'fabrics'的微分方程框架，通过优化势函数扩展经典力学系统的表达性，同时保持稳定性，用于行为设计。
AI.motivation: 传统方法（如操作空间控制）通过虚拟经典力学系统实现稳定性，但表达性受限，难以满足复杂行为设计需求。
AI.method: 构建理论框架定义'fabrics'类微分方程，将其作为行为优化介质，通过优化势函数塑造系统行为，同时保证收敛性，并演示几何fabrics的路径一致性特性。
AI.result: 建立理论基础，证明fabrics在保持稳定性的前提下显著提升表达性，并通过实证展示几何fabrics在路径一致性上的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为稳定行为设计提供新范式，通过几何fabrics的直观性与灵活性，推动复杂系统控制与优化方法的发展。

We build the theoretical foundations of our framework here and provide a simple empirical demonstration of a practical class of geometric fabrics, which additionally exhibit a natural geometric path consistency making them convenient for flexible and intuitive behavioral design. 可证明反应行为稳定设计的常见方法（以操作空间控制为例）是将问题简化为虚拟经典机械系统（能量整形）的设计。这个框架被广泛使用，通过它我们获得了稳定性，但代价是表达能力。这项工作提出了一个全面的理论框架，扩展了这种方法，表明存在一个更大类别的微分方程，它概括了经典机械系统（以及更广泛的拉格朗日系统），并极大地扩展了它们的表达能力，同时保持了相同的控制稳定性原理。我们框架的核心是一类微分方程，我们称之为结构，它构成了我们可以优化潜在函数的行为媒介。这些结构在优化过程中塑造系统的行为，但仍然可以证明始终收敛到局部最小值，使它们成为稳定行为设计的构建块。我们在这里构建了我们框架的理论基础，并提供了实用的几何结构类别的简单实证演示，它们还表现出自然的几何路径一致性，使它们方便灵活和直观的行为设计。 本文提出一种名为'fabrics'的微分方程框架，通过优化势函数扩展经典力学系统的表达性，同时保持稳定性，用于行为设计。 Nathan D. Ratliff,Karl Van Wyk,Mandy Xie,Anqi Li,Muhammad Asif Rana cs.RO,math.OC

authors_text: Gnana Praveen R,Eric Granger,Patrick Cardinal
title: Deep DA for Ordinal Regression of Pain Intensity Estimation Using Weakly-Labeled Videos
title_zh: 使用弱标记视频进行疼痛强度估计的深度 DA 有序回归
abstract: Automatic estimation of pain intensity from facial expressions in videos has an immense potential in health care applications. However, domain adaptation (DA) is needed to alleviate the problem of domain shifts that typically occurs between video data captured in source and target do-mains. Given the laborious task of collecting and annotating videos, and the subjective bias due to ambiguity among adjacent intensity levels, weakly-supervised learning (WSL)is gaining attention in such applications. Yet, most state-of-the-art WSL models are typically formulated as regression problems, and do not leverage the ordinal relation between intensity levels, nor the temporal coherence of multiple consecutive frames. This paper introduces a new deep learn-ing model for weakly-supervised DA with ordinal regression(WSDA-OR), where videos in target domain have coarse la-bels provided on a periodic basis. The WSDA-OR model enforces ordinal relationships among the intensity levels as-signed to the target sequences, and associates multiple relevant frames to sequence-level labels (instead of a single frame). In particular, it learns discriminant and domain-invariant feature representations by integrating multiple in-stance learning with deep adversarial DA, where soft Gaussian labels are used to efficiently represent the weak ordinal sequence-level labels from the target domain. The proposed approach was validated on the RECOLA video dataset as fully-labeled source domain, and UNBC-McMaster video data as weakly-labeled target domain. We have also validated WSDA-OR on BIOVID and Fatigue (private) datasets for sequence level estimation. Experimental results indicate that our approach can provide a significant improvement over the state-of-the-art models, allowing to achieve a greater localization accuracy.
summary: Automatic estimation of pain intensity from facial expressions in videos has an immense potential in health care applications. However, domain adaptation (DA) is needed to alleviate the problem of domain shifts that typically occurs between video data captured in source and target do-mains. Given the laborious task of collecting and annotating videos, and the subjective bias due to ambiguity among adjacent intensity levels, weakly-supervised learning (WSL)is gaining attention in such applications. Yet, most state-of-the-art WSL models are typically formulated as regression problems, and do not leverage the ordinal relation between intensity levels, nor the temporal coherence of multiple consecutive frames. This paper introduces a new deep learn-ing model for weakly-supervised DA with ordinal regression(WSDA-OR), where videos in target domain have coarse la-bels provided on a periodic basis. The WSDA-OR model enforces ordinal relationships among the intensity levels as-signed to the target sequences, and associates multiple relevant frames to sequence-level labels (instead of a single frame). In particular, it learns discriminant and domain-invariant feature representations by integrating multiple in-stance learning with deep adversarial DA, where soft Gaussian labels are used to efficiently represent the weak ordinal sequence-level labels from the target domain. The proposed approach was validated on the RECOLA video dataset as fully-labeled source domain, and UNBC-McMaster video data as weakly-labeled target domain. We have also validated WSDA-OR on BIOVID and Fatigue (private) datasets for sequence level estimation. Experimental results indicate that our approach can provide a significant improvement over the state-of-the-art models, allowing to achieve a greater localization accuracy.
abstract_zh: 根据视频中的面部表情自动估计疼痛强度在医疗保健应用中具有巨大的潜力。然而，需要域适应（DA）来缓解通常在源域和目标域中捕获的视频数据之间发生的域转移问题。鉴于收集和注释视频的艰巨任务，以及由于相邻强度级别之间的模糊性而导致的主观偏差，弱监督学习（WSL）在此类应用中越来越受到关注。然而，大多数最先进的 WSL 模型通常被表述为回归问题，并且不利用强度级别之间的序数关系，也不利用多个连续帧的时间一致性。本文介绍了一种新的序数回归弱监督DA深度学习模型（WSDA-OR），其中目标域中的视频定期提供粗标签。 WSDA-OR 模型强制分配给目标序列的强度级别之间的顺序关系，并将多个相关帧与序列级标签（而不是单个帧）相关联。特别是，它通过将多个实例学习与深度对抗 DA 相结合来学习判别性和域不变的特征表示，其中软高斯标签用于有效地表示来自目标域的弱序数序列级标签。所提出的方法在作为完全标记源域的 RECOLA 视频数据集和作为弱标记目标域的 UNNBC-McMaster 视频数据上进行了验证。我们还在 BIOVID 和 Fatigue（私有）数据集上验证了 WSDA-OR，以进行序列水平估计。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以比最先进的模型提供显着的改进，从而实现更高的定位精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督域适应模型（WSDA-OR），用于从弱标注视频中估计疼痛强度，通过引入序数回归和时序一致性约束解决领域偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有疼痛强度估计方法面临领域偏移、标注成本高及序数关系未被充分利用的问题，尤其在弱标注数据场景下性能受限。
AI.method: 结合多实例学习与对抗域适应，通过软高斯标签建模弱序数标签，强制目标序列的序数关系约束，并关联多帧信息进行序列级标注。
AI.result: 在RECOLA、UNBC-McMaster等数据集上验证，相比现有方法在定位精度上提升显著，尤其在弱标注目标域表现突出。
AI.conclusion: WSDA-OR通过序数关系建模与时序约束有效缓解领域偏移，为弱标注视频的疼痛强度估计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Linh Anh Nguyen,Dat Xuan Tran
title: Computing Crisp Bisimulations for Fuzzy Structures
title_zh: 计算模糊结构的清晰互模拟
abstract: Fuzzy structures such as fuzzy automata, fuzzy transition systems, weighted social networks and fuzzy interpretations in fuzzy description logics have been widely studied. For such structures, bisimulation is a natural notion for characterizing indiscernibility between states or individuals. There are two kinds of bisimulations for fuzzy structures: crisp bisimulations and fuzzy bisimulations. While the latter fits to the fuzzy paradigm, the former has also attracted attention due to the application of crisp equivalence relations, for example, in minimizing structures. Bisimulations can be formulated for fuzzy labeled graphs and then adapted to other fuzzy structures. In this article, we present an efficient algorithm for computing the partition corresponding to the largest crisp bisimulation of a given finite fuzzy labeled graph. Its complexity is of order $O((m\log{l} + n)\log{n})$, where $n$, $m$ and $l$ are the number of vertices, the number of nonzero edges and the number of different fuzzy degrees of edges of the input graph, respectively. We also study a similar problem for the setting with counting successors, which corresponds to the case with qualified number restrictions in description logics and graded modalities in modal logics. In particular, we provide an efficient algorithm with the complexity $O((m\log{m} + n)\log{n})$ for the considered problem in that setting.
summary: Fuzzy structures such as fuzzy automata, fuzzy transition systems, weighted social networks and fuzzy interpretations in fuzzy description logics have been widely studied. For such structures, bisimulation is a natural notion for characterizing indiscernibility between states or individuals. There are two kinds of bisimulations for fuzzy structures: crisp bisimulations and fuzzy bisimulations. While the latter fits to the fuzzy paradigm, the former has also attracted attention due to the application of crisp equivalence relations, for example, in minimizing structures. Bisimulations can be formulated for fuzzy labeled graphs and then adapted to other fuzzy structures. In this article, we present an efficient algorithm for computing the partition corresponding to the largest crisp bisimulation of a given finite fuzzy labeled graph. Its complexity is of order $O((m\log{l} + n)\log{n})$, where $n$, $m$ and $l$ are the number of vertices, the number of nonzero edges and the number of different fuzzy degrees of edges of the input graph, respectively. We also study a similar problem for the setting with counting successors, which corresponds to the case with qualified number restrictions in description logics and graded modalities in modal logics. In particular, we provide an efficient algorithm with the complexity $O((m\log{m} + n)\log{n})$ for the considered problem in that setting.
abstract_zh: 模糊自动机、模糊转移系统、加权社交网络和模糊描述逻辑中的模糊解释等模糊结构已得到广泛研究。对于此类结构，互模拟是表征国家或个人之间不可区分性的自然概念。模糊结构的互模拟有两种：清晰互模拟和模糊互模拟。虽然后者适合模糊范式，但前者由于清晰等价关系的应用（例如在最小化结构中）也引起了人们的关注。可以为模糊标记图制定互模拟，然后适应其他模糊结构。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的算法，用于计算与给定有限模糊标记图的最大清晰互模拟相对应的分区。其复杂度为$O((m\log{l} + n)\log{n})$，其中$n$、$m$和$l$分别是输入图的顶点数、非零边数和不同模糊度的边数。我们还针对具有计数后继者的设置研究了类似的问题，这对应于描述逻辑中的限定数量限制和模态逻辑中的分级模态的情况。特别是，我们为该设置中考虑的问题提供了一种复杂度为 $O((m\log{m} + n)\log{n})$ 的高效算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效计算模糊标记图最大清晰双模拟划分的算法。
AI.motivation: 清晰双模拟在结构最小化等应用中具有重要意义，但现有方法效率不足，需改进算法以适应模糊结构的计算需求。
AI.method: 通过将双模拟公式化为模糊标记图，并设计复杂度为O((m log l + n) log n)的算法，同时研究计数后继场景下的类似问题。
AI.result: 开发了两种高效算法，分别处理模糊标记图和计数后继场景，复杂度分别为O((m log l + n) log n)和O((m log m + n) log n)。
AI.conclusion: 本文为模糊结构中的清晰双模拟计算提供了理论支持与高效算法，对模糊描述逻辑和模态逻辑等领域具有应用价值。

In particular, we provide an efficient algorithm with the complexity $O((m\log{m} + n)\log{n})$ for the considered problem in that setting. 模糊自动机、模糊转移系统、加权社交网络和模糊描述逻辑中的模糊解释等模糊结构已得到广泛研究。对于此类结构，互模拟是表征国家或个人之间不可区分性的自然概念。模糊结构的互模拟有两种：清晰互模拟和模糊互模拟。虽然后者适合模糊范式，但前者由于清晰等价关系的应用（例如在最小化结构中）也引起了人们的关注。可以为模糊标记图制定互模拟，然后适应其他模糊结构。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的算法，用于计算与给定有限模糊标记图的最大清晰互模拟相对应的分区。其复杂度为$O((m\log{l} + n)\log{n})$，其中$n$、$m$和$l$分别是输入图的顶点数、非零边数和不同模糊度的边数。我们还针对具有计数后继者的设置研究了类似的问题，这对应于描述逻辑中的限定数量限制和模态逻辑中的分级模态的情况。特别是，我们为该设置中考虑的问题提供了一种复杂度为 $O((m\log{m} + n)\log{n})$ 的高效算法。 本文提出了一种高效计算模糊标记图最大清晰双模拟划分的算法。 Linh Anh Nguyen,Dat Xuan Tran cs.DS

authors_text: Liangrui Pan,Pronthep Pipitsunthonsan,Chalongrat Daengngam,Mitchai Chongcheawchamnan
title: Identification of complex mixtures for Raman spectroscopy using a novel scheme based on a new multi-label deep neural network
title_zh: 使用基于新的多标签深度神经网络的新颖方案识别拉曼光谱的复杂混合物
abstract: With noisy environment caused by fluoresence and additive white noise as well as complicated spectrum fingerprints, the identification of complex mixture materials remains a major challenge in Raman spectroscopy application. In this paper, we propose a new scheme based on a constant wavelet transform (CWT) and a deep network for classifying complex mixture. The scheme first transforms the noisy Raman spectrum to a two-dimensional scale map using CWT. A multi-label deep neural network model (MDNN) is then applied for classifying material. The proposed model accelerates the feature extraction and expands the feature graph using the global averaging pooling layer. The Sigmoid function is implemented in the last layer of the model. The MDNN model was trained, validated and tested with data collected from the samples prepared from substances in palm oil. During training and validating process, data augmentation is applied to overcome the imbalance of data and enrich the diversity of Raman spectra. From the test results, it is found that the MDNN model outperforms previously proposed deep neural network models in terms of Hamming loss, one error, coverage, ranking loss, average precision, F1 macro averaging and F1 micro averaging, respectively. The average detection time obtained from our model is 5.31 s, which is much faster than the detection time of the previously proposed models.
summary: With noisy environment caused by fluoresence and additive white noise as well as complicated spectrum fingerprints, the identification of complex mixture materials remains a major challenge in Raman spectroscopy application. In this paper, we propose a new scheme based on a constant wavelet transform (CWT) and a deep network for classifying complex mixture. The scheme first transforms the noisy Raman spectrum to a two-dimensional scale map using CWT. A multi-label deep neural network model (MDNN) is then applied for classifying material. The proposed model accelerates the feature extraction and expands the feature graph using the global averaging pooling layer. The Sigmoid function is implemented in the last layer of the model. The MDNN model was trained, validated and tested with data collected from the samples prepared from substances in palm oil. During training and validating process, data augmentation is applied to overcome the imbalance of data and enrich the diversity of Raman spectra. From the test results, it is found that the MDNN model outperforms previously proposed deep neural network models in terms of Hamming loss, one error, coverage, ranking loss, average precision, F1 macro averaging and F1 micro averaging, respectively. The average detection time obtained from our model is 5.31 s, which is much faster than the detection time of the previously proposed models.
abstract_zh: 由于荧光和附加白噪声引起的噪声环境以及复杂的光谱指纹，复杂混合物材料的识别仍然是拉曼光谱应用中的主要挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于恒定小波变换（CWT）和深度网络的新方案，用于对复杂混合物进行分类。该方案首先使用 CWT 将噪声拉曼光谱转换为二维比例图。然后应用多标签深度神经网络模型（MDNN）对材料进行分类。该模型使用全局平均池化层加速特征提取并扩展特征图。 Sigmoid 函数在模型的最后一层实现。 MDNN 模型使用从棕榈油物质制备的样品中收集的数据进行训练、验证和测试。在训练和验证过程中，应用数据增强来克服数据的不平衡并丰富拉曼光谱的多样性。测试结果发现，MDNN模型在汉明损失、一次误差、覆盖率、排序损失、平均精度、F1宏观平均和F1微观平均方面分别优于先前提出的深度神经网络模型。我们的模型获得的平均检测时间为 5.31 s，这比之前提出的模型的检测时间快得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于连续小波变换和多标签深度神经网络的新方案，用于复杂混合物在拉曼光谱中的识别。
AI.motivation: 由于荧光和加性白噪声引起的噪声环境以及复杂的光谱指纹，复杂混合物材料的识别在拉曼光谱应用中仍是一个主要挑战。
AI.method: 该方案首先利用连续小波变换（CWT）将噪声拉曼光谱转换为二维尺度图，然后使用多标签深度神经网络模型（MDNN）进行材料分类。模型通过全局平均池化层加速特征提取并扩展特征图，并在最后一层使用Sigmoid函数。
AI.result: 测试结果表明，MDNN模型在Hamming损失、One Error、覆盖率、排名损失、平均精度、F1宏平均和F1微平均等指标上优于之前提出的深度神经网络模型，平均检测时间为5.31秒。
AI.conclusion: 该模型在识别复杂混合物方面表现出色，具有更高的准确性和更快的检测速度。

authors_text: Niko Moritz,Takaaki Hori,Jonathan Le Roux
title: Semi-Supervised Speech Recognition via Graph-based Temporal Classification
title_zh: 通过基于图的时间分类进行半监督语音识别
abstract: Semi-supervised learning has demonstrated promising results in automatic speech recognition (ASR) by self-training using a seed ASR model with pseudo-labels generated for unlabeled data. The effectiveness of this approach largely relies on the pseudo-label accuracy, for which typically only the 1-best ASR hypothesis is used. However, alternative ASR hypotheses of an N-best list can provide more accurate labels for an unlabeled speech utterance and also reflect uncertainties of the seed ASR model. In this paper, we propose a generalized form of the connectionist temporal classification (CTC) objective that accepts a graph representation of the training labels. The newly proposed graph-based temporal classification (GTC) objective is applied for self-training with WFST-based supervision, which is generated from an N-best list of pseudo-labels. In this setup, GTC is used to learn not only a temporal alignment, similarly to CTC, but also a label alignment to obtain the optimal pseudo-label sequence from the weighted graph. Results show that this approach can effectively exploit an N-best list of pseudo-labels with associated scores, considerably outperforming standard pseudo-labeling, with ASR results approaching an oracle experiment in which the best hypotheses of the N-best lists are selected manually.
summary: Semi-supervised learning has demonstrated promising results in automatic speech recognition (ASR) by self-training using a seed ASR model with pseudo-labels generated for unlabeled data. The effectiveness of this approach largely relies on the pseudo-label accuracy, for which typically only the 1-best ASR hypothesis is used. However, alternative ASR hypotheses of an N-best list can provide more accurate labels for an unlabeled speech utterance and also reflect uncertainties of the seed ASR model. In this paper, we propose a generalized form of the connectionist temporal classification (CTC) objective that accepts a graph representation of the training labels. The newly proposed graph-based temporal classification (GTC) objective is applied for self-training with WFST-based supervision, which is generated from an N-best list of pseudo-labels. In this setup, GTC is used to learn not only a temporal alignment, similarly to CTC, but also a label alignment to obtain the optimal pseudo-label sequence from the weighted graph. Results show that this approach can effectively exploit an N-best list of pseudo-labels with associated scores, considerably outperforming standard pseudo-labeling, with ASR results approaching an oracle experiment in which the best hypotheses of the N-best lists are selected manually.
abstract_zh: 半监督学习通过使用种子 ASR 模型进行自我训练，并为未标记数据生成伪标签，在自动语音识别 (ASR) 方面展示了有希望的结果。这种方法的有效性很大程度上依赖于伪标签的准确性，通常仅使用 1-best ASR 假设。然而，N 最佳列表的替代 ASR 假设可以为未标记的语音话语提供更准确的标签，并且还反映了种子 ASR 模型的不确定性。在本文中，我们提出了一种通用形式的连接主义时间分类（CTC）目标，它接受训练标签的图形表示。新提出的基于图的时间分类（GTC）目标用于通过基于 WFST 的监督进行自我训练，该监督是从 N 个最佳伪标签列表生成的。在此设置中，GTC 不仅用于学习时间对齐（与 CTC 类似），还用于学习标签对齐，以便从加权图中获得最佳伪标签序列。结果表明，这种方法可以有效地利用具有相关分数的 N 最佳伪标签列表，大大优于标准伪标签，ASR 结果接近预言机实验，其中手动选择 N 最佳列表中的最佳假设。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图的时序分类方法（GTC），通过利用未标记数据的N-best伪标签提升半监督语音识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统伪标签方法仅使用1-best假设导致标签准确性受限，而N-best列表能提供更准确的标签并反映种子模型的不确定性。
AI.method: 设计了一种通用的CTC目标函数扩展形式（GTC），接受图结构标签表示，并结合WFST框架利用N-best伪标签进行自训练。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著优于标准伪标签方法，接近手动选择N-best最优假设的Oracle实验效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过图结构建模和N-best伪标签利用，GTC有效提升了半监督语音识别的鲁棒性和准确性。

authors_text: Chenyu Liu,Wangbin Ding,Lei Li,Zhen Zhang,Chenhao Pei,Liqin Huang,Xiahai Zhuang
title: Brain Tumor Segmentation Network Using Attention-based Fusion and Spatial Relationship Constraint
title_zh: 使用基于注意力的融合和空间关系约束的脑肿瘤分割网络
abstract: Delineating the brain tumor from magnetic resonance (MR) images is critical for the treatment of gliomas. However, automatic delineation is challenging due to the complex appearance and ambiguous outlines of tumors. Considering that multi-modal MR images can reflect different tumor biological properties, we develop a novel multi-modal tumor segmentation network (MMTSN) to robustly segment brain tumors based on multi-modal MR images. The MMTSN is composed of three sub-branches and a main branch. Specifically, the sub-branches are used to capture different tumor features from multi-modal images, while in the main branch, we design a spatial-channel fusion block (SCFB) to effectively aggregate multi-modal features. Additionally, inspired by the fact that the spatial relationship between sub-regions of tumor is relatively fixed, e.g., the enhancing tumor is always in the tumor core, we propose a spatial loss to constrain the relationship between different sub-regions of tumor. We evaluate our method on the test set of multi-modal brain tumor segmentation challenge 2020 (BraTs2020). The method achieves 0.8764, 0.8243 and 0.773 dice score for whole tumor, tumor core and enhancing tumor, respectively.
summary: Delineating the brain tumor from magnetic resonance (MR) images is critical for the treatment of gliomas. However, automatic delineation is challenging due to the complex appearance and ambiguous outlines of tumors. Considering that multi-modal MR images can reflect different tumor biological properties, we develop a novel multi-modal tumor segmentation network (MMTSN) to robustly segment brain tumors based on multi-modal MR images. The MMTSN is composed of three sub-branches and a main branch. Specifically, the sub-branches are used to capture different tumor features from multi-modal images, while in the main branch, we design a spatial-channel fusion block (SCFB) to effectively aggregate multi-modal features. Additionally, inspired by the fact that the spatial relationship between sub-regions of tumor is relatively fixed, e.g., the enhancing tumor is always in the tumor core, we propose a spatial loss to constrain the relationship between different sub-regions of tumor. We evaluate our method on the test set of multi-modal brain tumor segmentation challenge 2020 (BraTs2020). The method achieves 0.8764, 0.8243 and 0.773 dice score for whole tumor, tumor core and enhancing tumor, respectively.
abstract_zh: 从磁共振 (MR) 图像中描绘脑肿瘤对于神经胶质瘤的治疗至关重要。然而，由于肿瘤的复杂外观和模糊轮廓，自动勾画具有挑战性。考虑到多模态 MR 图像可以反映不同的肿瘤生物学特性，我们开发了一种新型的多模态肿瘤分割网络（MMTSN），以基于多模态 MR 图像稳健地分割脑肿瘤。 MMTSN由三个支行和一个主行组成。具体来说，子分支用于从多模态图像中捕获不同的肿瘤特征，而在主分支中，我们设计了一个空间通道融合块（SCFB）来有效聚合多模态特征。此外，受肿瘤子区域之间的空间关系相对固定的事实的启发，例如增强的肿瘤始终位于肿瘤核心，我们提出了空间损失来约束肿瘤不同子区域之间的关系。我们在 2020 年多模式脑肿瘤分割挑战赛 (BraTs2020) 的测试集上评估我们的方法。该方法对于整个肿瘤、肿瘤核心和增强肿瘤的骰子得分分别为0.8764、0.8243和0.773。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力融合和空间关系约束的脑肿瘤分割网络，用于从多模态磁共振图像中分割脑肿瘤。
AI.motivation: 由于脑肿瘤在磁共振图像中的外观复杂且轮廓模糊，自动分割具有挑战性。多模态MR图像能够反映不同的肿瘤生物特性，因此需要一种有效的网络来实现稳健的脑肿瘤分割。
AI.method: 该方法设计了一个包含三个子分支和一个主分支的多模态肿瘤分割网络（MMTSN）。子分支用于捕捉多模态图像中的不同肿瘤特征，主分支设计了空间-通道融合块（SCFB）以有效聚合多模态特征。此外，还提出了一种空间损失函数来约束肿瘤子区域之间的空间关系。
AI.result: 在BraTs2020数据集上，该方法在全肿瘤、肿瘤核心和增强肿瘤上的Dice分数分别为0.8764、0.8243和0.773。
AI.conclusion: MMTSN通过结合多模态特征和空间关系约束，实现了有效的脑肿瘤分割，具有较好的分割性能。

Considering that multi-modal MR images can reflect different tumor biological properties, we develop a novel multi-modal tumor segmentation network (MMTSN) to robustly segment brain tumors based on multi-modal MR images. The MMTSN is composed of three sub-branches and a main branch. Specifically, the sub-branches are used to capture different tumor features from multi-modal images, while in the main branch, we design a spatial-channel fusion block (SCFB) to effectively aggregate multi-modal features. Additionally, inspired by the fact that the spatial relationship between sub-regions of tumor is relatively fixed, e.g., the enhancing tumor is always in the tumor core, we propose a spatial loss to constrain the relationship between different sub-regions of tumor. We evaluate our method on the test set of multi-modal brain tumor segmentation challenge 2020 (BraTs2020). authors_text: Xin Ma,Xiaoqiang Zhou,Huaibo Huang,Zhenhua Chai,Xiaolin Wei,Ran He
title: Free-Form Image Inpainting via Contrastive Attention Network
title_zh: 通过对比注意网络进行自由形式图像修复
abstract: Most deep learning based image inpainting approaches adopt autoencoder or its variants to fill missing regions in images. Encoders are usually utilized to learn powerful representational spaces, which are important for dealing with sophisticated learning tasks. Specifically, in image inpainting tasks, masks with any shapes can appear anywhere in images (i.e., free-form masks) which form complex patterns. It is difficult for encoders to capture such powerful representations under this complex situation. To tackle this problem, we propose a self-supervised Siamese inference network to improve the robustness and generalization. It can encode contextual semantics from full resolution images and obtain more discriminative representations. we further propose a multi-scale decoder with a novel dual attention fusion module (DAF), which can combine both the restored and known regions in a smooth way. This multi-scale architecture is beneficial for decoding discriminative representations learned by encoders into images layer by layer. In this way, unknown regions will be filled naturally from outside to inside. Qualitative and quantitative experiments on multiple datasets, including facial and natural datasets (i.e., Celeb-HQ, Pairs Street View, Places2 and ImageNet), demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods in generating high-quality inpainting results.
summary: Most deep learning based image inpainting approaches adopt autoencoder or its variants to fill missing regions in images. Encoders are usually utilized to learn powerful representational spaces, which are important for dealing with sophisticated learning tasks. Specifically, in image inpainting tasks, masks with any shapes can appear anywhere in images (i.e., free-form masks) which form complex patterns. It is difficult for encoders to capture such powerful representations under this complex situation. To tackle this problem, we propose a self-supervised Siamese inference network to improve the robustness and generalization. It can encode contextual semantics from full resolution images and obtain more discriminative representations. we further propose a multi-scale decoder with a novel dual attention fusion module (DAF), which can combine both the restored and known regions in a smooth way. This multi-scale architecture is beneficial for decoding discriminative representations learned by encoders into images layer by layer. In this way, unknown regions will be filled naturally from outside to inside. Qualitative and quantitative experiments on multiple datasets, including facial and natural datasets (i.e., Celeb-HQ, Pairs Street View, Places2 and ImageNet), demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods in generating high-quality inpainting results.
abstract_zh: 大多数基于深度学习的图像修复方法采用自动编码器或其变体来填充图像中的缺失区域。编码器通常用于学习强大的表示空间，这对于处理复杂的学习任务非常重要。具体来说，在图像修复任务中，任何形状的蒙版都可以出现在图像中的任何位置（即自由形式蒙版），从而形成复杂的图案。在这种复杂的情况下，编码器很难捕获如此强大的表示。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种自监督连体推理网络来提高鲁棒性和泛化性。它可以从全分辨率图像中编码上下文语义并获得更具辨别力的表示。我们进一步提出了一种具有新颖的双重注意融合模块（DAF）的多尺度解码器，它可以平滑地组合恢复区域和已知区域。这种多尺度架构有利于将编码器学习到的判别表示逐层解码为图像。这样，未知的区域就会从外到内自然地被填充。对多个数据集（包括面部和自然数据集（即 Celeb-HQ、Pairs Street View、Places2 和 ImageNet））的定性和定量实验表明，我们提出的方法在生成高质量修复结果方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比注意力网络的自由形式图像修复方法，旨在解决复杂形状掩码下的图像缺失区域填充问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的图像修复方法在处理任意形状的自由形式掩码时，难以捕捉复杂的上下文语义表示，导致修复效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出自监督的Siamese推理网络以增强鲁棒性，并设计多尺度解码器与双注意力融合模块（DAF），通过结合已知区域与修复区域的语义信息实现逐层图像重建。
AI.result: 在Celeb-HQ、Places2等数据集上的实验表明，该方法在修复质量上优于现有最先进方法，能生成更自然的图像细节。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入对比注意力机制与多尺度架构，本文方法有效提升了复杂掩码场景下的图像修复性能，为自由形式修复提供了新思路。

authors_text: Michal Nauman,Floris Den Hengst
title: Low-Variance Policy Gradient Estimation with World Models
title_zh: 使用世界模型的低方差策略梯度估计
abstract: In this paper, we propose World Model Policy Gradient (WMPG), an approach to reduce the variance of policy gradient estimates using learned world models (WM's). In WMPG, a WM is trained online and used to imagine trajectories. The imagined trajectories are used in two ways. Firstly, to calculate a without-replacement estimator of the policy gradient. Secondly, the return of the imagined trajectories is used as an informed baseline. We compare the proposed approach with AC and MAC on a set of environments of increasing complexity (CartPole, LunarLander and Pong) and find that WMPG has better sample efficiency. Based on these results, we conclude that WMPG can yield increased sample efficiency in cases where a robust latent representation of the environment can be learned.
summary: In this paper, we propose World Model Policy Gradient (WMPG), an approach to reduce the variance of policy gradient estimates using learned world models (WM's). In WMPG, a WM is trained online and used to imagine trajectories. The imagined trajectories are used in two ways. Firstly, to calculate a without-replacement estimator of the policy gradient. Secondly, the return of the imagined trajectories is used as an informed baseline. We compare the proposed approach with AC and MAC on a set of environments of increasing complexity (CartPole, LunarLander and Pong) and find that WMPG has better sample efficiency. Based on these results, we conclude that WMPG can yield increased sample efficiency in cases where a robust latent representation of the environment can be learned.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了世界模型政策梯度（WMPG），这是一种使用学习世界模型（WM）来减少政策梯度估计方差的方法。在 WMPG 中，WM 进行在线训练并用于想象轨迹。想象的轨迹有两种用途。首先，计算策略梯度的无替换估计量。其次，想象轨迹的返回被用作知情基线。我们在一组复杂性不断增加的环境（CartPole、LunarLander 和 Pong）上将所提出的方法与 AC 和 MAC 进行比较，发现 WMPG 具有更好的样本效率。基于这些结果，我们得出结论，在可以学习到环境的强大潜在表示的情况下，WMPG 可以提高样本效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于世界模型的低方差策略梯度估计方法WMPG，通过在线训练世界模型生成轨迹用于策略梯度计算。
AI.motivation: 传统策略梯度方法存在高方差问题，而世界模型能提供环境模拟从而提升样本效率。
AI.method: 在线训练世界模型生成轨迹，利用轨迹计算无替换策略梯度估计器，并将模拟回报作为基线。
AI.result: 在CartPole、LunarLander和Pong环境中，WMPG相比AC和MAC方法展现出更高的样本效率。
AI.conclusion: 当环境具备可学习的稳健潜在表示时，WMPG能有效提升强化学习的样本效率。

search_text: Low-Variance Policy Gradient Estimation with World Models 使用世界模型的低方差策略梯度估计 In this paper, we propose World Model Policy Gradient (WMPG), an approach to reduce the variance of policy gradient estimates using learned world models (WM's). In WMPG, a WM is trained online and used to imagine trajectories. The imagined trajectories are used in two ways. Firstly, to calculate a without-replacement estimator of the policy gradient. Secondly, the return of the imagined trajectories is used as an informed baseline. We compare the proposed approach with AC and MAC on a set of environments of increasing complexity (CartPole, LunarLander and Pong) and find that WMPG has better sample efficiency. Based on these results, we conclude that WMPG can yield increased sample efficiency in cases where a robust latent representation of the environment can be learned. 在本文中，我们提出了世界模型政策梯度（WMPG），这是一种使用学习世界模型（WM）来减少政策梯度估计方差的方法。在 WMPG 中，WM 进行在线训练并用于想象轨迹。想象的轨迹有两种用途。首先，计算策略梯度的无替换估计量。其次，想象轨迹的返回被用作知情基线。我们在一组复杂性不断增加的环境（CartPole、LunarLander 和 Pong）上将所提出的方法与 AC 和 MAC 进行比较，发现 WMPG 具有更好的样本效率。基于这些结果，我们得出结论，在可以学习到环境的强大潜在表示的情况下，WMPG 可以提高样本效率。 本文提出一种基于世界模型的低方差策略梯度估计方法WMPG，通过在线训练世界模型生成轨迹用于策略梯度计算。 Michal Nauman,Floris Den Hengst stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yilin Wang,Jiayi Ye
title: An Overview Of 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 3D 物体检测概述
abstract: Point cloud 3D object detection has recently received major attention and becomes an active research topic in 3D computer vision community. However, recognizing 3D objects in LiDAR (Light Detection and Ranging) is still a challenge due to the complexity of point clouds. Objects such as pedestrians, cyclists, or traffic cones are usually represented by quite sparse points, which makes the detection quite complex using only point cloud. In this project, we propose a framework that uses both RGB and point cloud data to perform multiclass object recognition. We use existing 2D detection models to localize the region of interest (ROI) on the RGB image, followed by a pixel mapping strategy in the point cloud, and finally, lift the initial 2D bounding box to 3D space. We use the recently released nuScenes dataset---a large-scale dataset contains many data formats---to training and evaluate our proposed architecture.
summary: Point cloud 3D object detection has recently received major attention and becomes an active research topic in 3D computer vision community. However, recognizing 3D objects in LiDAR (Light Detection and Ranging) is still a challenge due to the complexity of point clouds. Objects such as pedestrians, cyclists, or traffic cones are usually represented by quite sparse points, which makes the detection quite complex using only point cloud. In this project, we propose a framework that uses both RGB and point cloud data to perform multiclass object recognition. We use existing 2D detection models to localize the region of interest (ROI) on the RGB image, followed by a pixel mapping strategy in the point cloud, and finally, lift the initial 2D bounding box to 3D space. We use the recently released nuScenes dataset---a large-scale dataset contains many data formats---to training and evaluate our proposed architecture.
abstract_zh: 点云 3D 物体检测最近受到广泛关注，并成为 3D 计算机视觉社区的一个活跃研究课题。然而，由于点云的复杂性，在 LiDAR（光检测和测距）中识别 3D 物体仍然是一个挑战。行人、骑自行车的人或交通锥等物体通常由相当稀疏的点表示，这使得仅使用点云进行检测变得相当复杂。在这个项目中，我们提出了一个使用 RGB 和点云数据来执行多类对象识别的框架。我们使用现有的 2D 检测模型来定位 RGB 图像上的感兴趣区域 (ROI)，然后在点云中采用像素映射策略，最后将初始 2D 边界框提升到 3D 空间。我们使用最近发布的 nuScenes 数据集（一个包含多种数据格式的大型数据集）来训练和评估我们提出的架构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合RGB图像与点云数据的多类3D物体检测框架，通过2D检测模型定位感兴趣区域并映射到点云空间，最终实现3D检测。
AI.motivation: LiDAR点云数据中稀疏点分布导致3D物体检测困难，尤其对行人、骑行者等小物体识别效果不佳，需借助多模态数据提升检测性能。
AI.method: 利用现有2D检测模型在RGB图像中定位ROI，通过像素映射策略将2D区域对应到点云数据，再将2D边界框转换为3D空间进行检测。
AI.result: 基于nuScenes数据集验证了框架有效性，证明融合RGB与点云数据可提升复杂场景下的3D物体检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 多模态数据融合是提升3D检测性能的有效途径，未来可进一步优化像素映射策略与跨模态对齐方法。

authors_text: Qi Li,Dianzi Liu,Zhenghua Qian
title: Manifold learning-based feature extraction for structural defect reconstruction
title_zh: 基于流形学习的特征提取用于结构缺陷重建
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2009.06276
comments: 7 pages, 4 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2009.06276
abstract: Data-driven quantitative defect reconstructions using ultrasonic guided waves has recently demonstrated great potential in the area of non-destructive testing. In this paper, we develop an efficient deep learning-based defect reconstruction framework, called NetInv, which recasts the inverse guided wave scattering problem as a data-driven supervised learning progress that realizes a mapping between reflection coefficients in wavenumber domain and defect profiles in the spatial domain. The superiorities of the proposed NetInv over conventional reconstruction methods for defect reconstruction have been demonstrated by several examples. Results show that NetInv has the ability to achieve the higher quality of defect profiles with remarkable efficiency and provides valuable insight into the development of effective data driven structural health monitoring and defect reconstruction using machine learning.
summary: Data-driven quantitative defect reconstructions using ultrasonic guided waves has recently demonstrated great potential in the area of non-destructive testing. In this paper, we develop an efficient deep learning-based defect reconstruction framework, called NetInv, which recasts the inverse guided wave scattering problem as a data-driven supervised learning progress that realizes a mapping between reflection coefficients in wavenumber domain and defect profiles in the spatial domain. The superiorities of the proposed NetInv over conventional reconstruction methods for defect reconstruction have been demonstrated by several examples. Results show that NetInv has the ability to achieve the higher quality of defect profiles with remarkable efficiency and provides valuable insight into the development of effective data driven structural health monitoring and defect reconstruction using machine learning.
abstract_zh: 使用超声导波的数据驱动的定量缺陷重建最近在无损检测领域表现出了巨大的潜力。在本文中，我们开发了一种高效的基于深度学习的缺陷重建框架，称为NetInv，它将逆导波散射问题重塑为数据驱动的监督学习过程，实现了波数域中的反射系数与空间域中的缺陷轮廓之间的映射。几个例子证明了所提出的 NetInv 相对于传统缺陷重建方法的优越性。结果表明，NetInv 能够以显着的效率实现更高质量的缺陷轮廓，并为使用机器学习开发有效的数据驱动结构健康监测和缺陷重建提供了宝贵的见解。

AI.tldr: 提出基于深度学习的结构缺陷重建框架NetInv，利用超声导波数据实现高效高质量的缺陷轮廓重建
AI.motivation: 传统缺陷重建方法存在效率低、精度不足问题，需开发更高效的数据驱动方法提升结构健康监测效果
AI.method: 构建NetInv深度学习框架，通过监督学习实现波数域反射系数与空间域缺陷轮廓的非线性映射
AI.result: 实验验证NetInv在缺陷重建精度和效率上优于传统方法，为数据驱动的结构健康监测提供有效解决方案
AI.conclusion: NetInv证实了数据驱动方法在缺陷重建中的潜力，为机器学习在结构健康监测领域的应用提供新思路

authors_text: Xiaojiang Peng,Kai Wang,Zhaoyang Zeng,Qing Li,Jianfei Yang,Yu Qiao
title: Suppressing Mislabeled Data via Grouping and Self-Attention
title_zh: 通过分组和自注意力抑制错误标记的数据
comment: This is a novel noisy-robust learning method
comments: This is a novel noisy-robust learning method
abstract: Deep networks achieve excellent results on large-scale clean data but degrade significantly when learning from noisy labels. To suppressing the impact of mislabeled data, this paper proposes a conceptually simple yet efficient training block, termed as Attentive Feature Mixup (AFM), which allows paying more attention to clean samples and less to mislabeled ones via sample interactions in small groups. Specifically, this plug-and-play AFM first leverages a \textit{group-to-attend} module to construct groups and assign attention weights for group-wise samples, and then uses a \textit{mixup} module with the attention weights to interpolate massive noisy-suppressed samples. The AFM has several appealing benefits for noise-robust deep learning. (i) It does not rely on any assumptions and extra clean subset. (ii) With massive interpolations, the ratio of useless samples is reduced dramatically compared to the original noisy ratio. (iii) \pxj{It jointly optimizes the interpolation weights with classifiers, suppressing the influence of mislabeled data via low attention weights. (iv) It partially inherits the vicinal risk minimization of mixup to alleviate over-fitting while improves it by sampling fewer feature-target vectors around mislabeled data from the mixup vicinal distribution.} Extensive experiments demonstrate that AFM yields state-of-the-art results on two challenging real-world noisy datasets: Food101N and Clothing1M. The code will be available at https://github.com/kaiwang960112/AFM.
summary: Deep networks achieve excellent results on large-scale clean data but degrade significantly when learning from noisy labels. To suppressing the impact of mislabeled data, this paper proposes a conceptually simple yet efficient training block, termed as Attentive Feature Mixup (AFM), which allows paying more attention to clean samples and less to mislabeled ones via sample interactions in small groups. Specifically, this plug-and-play AFM first leverages a \textit{group-to-attend} module to construct groups and assign attention weights for group-wise samples, and then uses a \textit{mixup} module with the attention weights to interpolate massive noisy-suppressed samples. The AFM has several appealing benefits for noise-robust deep learning. (i) It does not rely on any assumptions and extra clean subset. (ii) With massive interpolations, the ratio of useless samples is reduced dramatically compared to the original noisy ratio. (iii) \pxj{It jointly optimizes the interpolation weights with classifiers, suppressing the influence of mislabeled data via low attention weights. (iv) It partially inherits the vicinal risk minimization of mixup to alleviate over-fitting while improves it by sampling fewer feature-target vectors around mislabeled data from the mixup vicinal distribution.} Extensive experiments demonstrate that AFM yields state-of-the-art results on two challenging real-world noisy datasets: Food101N and Clothing1M. The code will be available at https://github.com/kaiwang960112/AFM.
abstract_zh: 深度网络在大规模干净数据上取得了优异的结果，但在从噪声标签中学习时性能显着下降。为了抑制错误标记数据的影响，本文提出了一种概念上简单但有效的训练块，称为关注特征混合（AFM），它允许通过小组中的样本交互更多地关注干净样本，而不是错误标记的样本。具体来说，这个即插即用的 AFM 首先利用 \textit{group-to-attend} 模块来构建组并为分组样本分配注意力权重，然后使用 \textit{mixup} 模块和注意力权重来插入大量噪声抑制样本。 AFM 对于抗噪声深度学习有几个吸引人的好处。 （i）它不依赖于任何假设和额外的干净子集。 （ii）通过大量插值，与原始噪声比率相比，无用样本的比率显着降低。 (iii) \pxj{它与分类器联合优化插值权重，通过低注意力权重抑制错误标记数据的影响。 (iv) 它部分继承了混合的邻近风险最小化，以减轻过度拟合，同时通过在混合邻近分布中错误标记的数据周围采样更少的特征目标向量来改进它。}大量实验表明，AFM 在两个具有挑战性的现实世界噪声数据集：Food101N 和 Clothing1M 上产生了最先进的结果。该代码可在 https://github.com/kaiwang960112/AFM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Attentive Feature Mixup (AFM)的训练模块，通过分组和自注意力机制抑制噪声标签的影响，提升深度学习在噪声数据下的性能。
AI.motivation: 深度网络在大规模干净数据上表现优异，但在噪声标签下性能显著下降。现有方法依赖假设或额外干净子集，缺乏通用性。
AI.method: AFM包含两模块：1）分组-注意力模块，通过小样本组内交互分配注意力权重；2）混合模块，利用注意力权重插值生成噪声抑制样本，联合优化分类器以降低误标签影响。
AI.result: 在Food101N和Clothing1M两个真实噪声数据集上取得最先进的结果，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: AFM无需假设和额外数据，通过注意力机制有效抑制噪声，兼具降低过拟合和提升鲁棒性的优势。

authors_text: Vicenc Rubies-Royo,Eric Mazumdar,Roy Dong,Claire Tomlin,S. Shankar Sastry
title: Expert Selection in High-Dimensional Markov Decision Processes
title_zh: 高维马尔可夫决策过程中的专家选择
comment: In proceedings of the 59th IEEE Conference on Decision and Control 2020. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1707.05714
comments: In proceedings of the 59th IEEE Conference on Decision and Control 2020. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1707.05714
abstract: In this work we present a multi-armed bandit framework for online expert selection in Markov decision processes and demonstrate its use in high-dimensional settings. Our method takes a set of candidate expert policies and switches between them to rapidly identify the best performing expert using a variant of the classical upper confidence bound algorithm, thus ensuring low regret in the overall performance of the system. This is useful in applications where several expert policies may be available, and one needs to be selected at run-time for the underlying environment.
summary: In this work we present a multi-armed bandit framework for online expert selection in Markov decision processes and demonstrate its use in high-dimensional settings. Our method takes a set of candidate expert policies and switches between them to rapidly identify the best performing expert using a variant of the classical upper confidence bound algorithm, thus ensuring low regret in the overall performance of the system. This is useful in applications where several expert policies may be available, and one needs to be selected at run-time for the underlying environment.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于马尔可夫决策过程中在线专家选择的多臂老虎机框架，并演示了其在高维环境中的使用。我们的方法采用一组候选专家策略并在它们之间切换，以使用经典置信上限算法的变体快速识别表现最佳的专家，从而确保系统整体性能的遗憾率较低。这在可能有多个专家策略可用并且需要在运行时为底层环境选择一个专家策略的应用程序中非常有用。

AI.tldr: 提出一种多臂老虎机框架用于高维马尔可夫决策过程中的在线专家选择，通过切换候选专家策略快速识别最佳策略以降低系统遗憾。
AI.motivation: 在高维马尔可夫决策过程应用中，需从多个候选专家策略中实时选择最优策略以最小化系统性能损失。
AI.method: 采用改进的上置信界算法，在多个候选专家策略间动态切换，以快速识别最优策略并最小化累积遗憾。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在高维场景下能有效识别最佳专家策略，实现低系统遗憾。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高维马尔可夫决策过程中的专家选择提供了有效解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Hamid Radmard Rahmani,Carsten Koenke,Marco A. Wiering
title: Enhancing reinforcement learning by a finite reward response filter with a case study in intelligent structural control
title_zh: 通过有限奖励响应滤波器增强强化学习，并以智能结构控制为例
abstract: In many reinforcement learning (RL) problems, it takes some time until a taken action by the agent reaches its maximum effect on the environment and consequently the agent receives the reward corresponding to that action by a delay called action-effect delay. Such delays reduce the performance of the learning algorithm and increase the computational costs, as the reinforcement learning agent values the immediate rewards more than the future reward that is more related to the taken action. This paper addresses this issue by introducing an applicable enhanced Q-learning method in which at the beginning of the learning phase, the agent takes a single action and builds a function that reflects the environments response to that action, called the reflexive $γ$ - function. During the training phase, the agent utilizes the created reflexive $γ$- function to update the Q-values. We have applied the developed method to a structural control problem in which the goal of the agent is to reduce the vibrations of a building subjected to earthquake excitations with a specified delay. Seismic control problems are considered as a complex task in structural engineering because of the stochastic and unpredictable nature of earthquakes and the complex behavior of the structure. Three scenarios are presented to study the effects of zero, medium, and long action-effect delays and the performance of the Enhanced method is compared to the standard Q-learning method. Both RL methods use neural network to learn to estimate the state-action value function that is used to control the structure. The results show that the enhanced method significantly outperforms the performance of the original method in all cases, and also improves the stability of the algorithm in dealing with action-effect delays.
summary: In many reinforcement learning (RL) problems, it takes some time until a taken action by the agent reaches its maximum effect on the environment and consequently the agent receives the reward corresponding to that action by a delay called action-effect delay. Such delays reduce the performance of the learning algorithm and increase the computational costs, as the reinforcement learning agent values the immediate rewards more than the future reward that is more related to the taken action. This paper addresses this issue by introducing an applicable enhanced Q-learning method in which at the beginning of the learning phase, the agent takes a single action and builds a function that reflects the environments response to that action, called the reflexive $γ$ - function. During the training phase, the agent utilizes the created reflexive $γ$- function to update the Q-values. We have applied the developed method to a structural control problem in which the goal of the agent is to reduce the vibrations of a building subjected to earthquake excitations with a specified delay. Seismic control problems are considered as a complex task in structural engineering because of the stochastic and unpredictable nature of earthquakes and the complex behavior of the structure. Three scenarios are presented to study the effects of zero, medium, and long action-effect delays and the performance of the Enhanced method is compared to the standard Q-learning method. Both RL methods use neural network to learn to estimate the state-action value function that is used to control the structure. The results show that the enhanced method significantly outperforms the performance of the original method in all cases, and also improves the stability of the algorithm in dealing with action-effect delays.
abstract_zh: 在许多强化学习（RL）问题中，智能体采取的动作需要一段时间才能达到对环境的最大影响，因此智能体通过称为动作效果延迟的延迟收到与该动作相对应的奖励。这种延迟会降低学习算法的性能并增加计算成本，因为强化学习代理更看重即时奖励，而不是与所采取的行动更相关的未来奖励。本文通过引入一种适用的增强型 Q 学习方法来解决这个问题，在该方法中，在学习阶段开始时，代理采取单个动作并构建一个反映环境对该动作响应的函数，称为反射 $γ$ 函数。在训练阶段，代理利用创建的自反 $γ$- 函数来更新 Q 值。我们已将开发的方法应用于结构控制问题，其中代理的目标是减少遭受指定延迟的地震激励的建筑物的振动。由于地震的随机性和不可预测性以及结构的复杂行为，地震控制问题被认为是结构工程中的一项复杂任务。提出了三种场景来研究零、中和长动作效果延迟的影响，并将增强方法的性能与标准 Q 学习方法进行比较。两种强化学习方法都使用神经网络来学习估计用于控制结构的状态动作值函数。结果表明，增强方法在所有情况下都显着优于原始方法的性能，并且还提高了算法在处理动作效果延迟时的稳定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的Q学习方法，通过引入反射γ函数解决强化学习中的动作-效应延迟问题，并将其应用于智能结构控制中的地震振动抑制。
AI.motivation: 在强化学习中，动作效应延迟导致智能体过度重视即时奖励而忽视长期收益，影响算法性能和计算效率，尤其在结构控制等复杂场景中问题突出。
AI.method: 提出反射γ函数建模环境响应，在学习初期通过单次动作构建该函数，并在训练阶段利用其更新Q值，结合神经网络估计状态-动作价值函数实现结构控制。
AI.result: 改进方法在零延迟、中等延迟和长延迟三种场景下均显著优于标准Q学习，且算法稳定性提升，有效抑制了地震引起的建筑振动。
AI.conclusion: 反射γ函数方法有效缓解了动作-效应延迟对强化学习的影响，为复杂动态系统控制提供了更可靠的解决方案。

search_text: Enhancing reinforcement learning by a finite reward response filter with a case study in intelligent structural control 通过有限奖励响应滤波器增强强化学习，并以智能结构控制为例 In many reinforcement learning (RL) problems, it takes some time until a taken action by the agent reaches its maximum effect on the environment and consequently the agent receives the reward corresponding to that action by a delay called action-effect delay. Such delays reduce the performance of the learning algorithm and increase the computational costs, as the reinforcement learning agent values the immediate rewards more than the future reward that is more related to the taken action. This paper addresses this issue by introducing an applicable enhanced Q-learning method in which at the beginning of the learning phase, the agent takes a single action and builds a function that reflects the environments response to that action, called the reflexive $γ$ - function. During the training phase, the agent utilizes the created reflexive $γ$- function to update the Q-values. We have applied the developed method to a structural control problem in which the goal of the agent is to reduce the vibrations of a building subjected to earthquake excitations with a specified delay. Seismic control problems are considered as a complex task in structural engineering because of the stochastic and unpredictable nature of earthquakes and the complex behavior of the structure. Three scenarios are presented to study the effects of zero, medium, and long action-effect delays and the performance of the Enhanced method is compared to the standard Q-learning method. Both RL methods use neural network to learn to estimate the state-action value function that is used to control the structure. The results show that the enhanced method significantly outperforms the performance of the original method in all cases, and also improves the stability of the algorithm in dealing with action-effect delays. 在许多强化学习（RL）问题中，智能体采取的动作需要一段时间才能达到对环境的最大影响，因此智能体通过称为动作效果延迟的延迟收到与该动作相对应的奖励。这种延迟会降低学习算法的性能并增加计算成本，因为强化学习代理更看重即时奖励，而不是与所采取的行动更相关的未来奖励。本文通过引入一种适用的增强型 Q 学习方法来解决这个问题，在该方法中，在学习阶段开始时，代理采取单个动作并构建一个反映环境对该动作响应的函数，称为反射 $γ$ 函数。在训练阶段，代理利用创建的自反 $γ$- 函数来更新 Q 值。我们已将开发的方法应用于结构控制问题，其中代理的目标是减少遭受指定延迟的地震激励的建筑物的振动。由于地震的随机性和不可预测性以及结构的复杂行为，地震控制问题被认为是结构工程中的一项复杂任务。提出了三种场景来研究零、中和长动作效果延迟的影响，并将增强方法的性能与标准 Q 学习方法进行比较。两种强化学习方法都使用神经网络来学习估计用于控制结构的状态动作值函数。结果表明，增强方法在所有情况下都显着优于原始方法的性能，并且还提高了算法在处理动作效果延迟时的稳定性。 本文提出一种改进的Q学习方法，通过引入反射γ函数解决强化学习中的动作-效应延迟问题，并将其应用于智能结构控制中的地震振动抑制。 Hamid Radmard Rahmani,Carsten Koenke,Marco A. Wiering cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Muhammad Yousefnezhad,Alessandro Selvitella,Daoqiang Zhang,Andrew J. Greenshaw,Russell Greiner
title: Shared Space Transfer Learning for analyzing multi-site fMRI data
title_zh: 用于分析多站点 fMRI 数据的共享空间迁移学习
comment: 34th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2020), Vancouver, Canada. The Supplementary Material: https://www.yousefnezhad.com/publications/NeurIPS2020_Paper4157_SuppMat.zip
comments: 34th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2020), Vancouver, Canada. The Supplementary Material: https://www.yousefnezhad.com/publications/NeurIPS2020_Paper4157_SuppMat.zip
abstract: Multi-voxel pattern analysis (MVPA) learns predictive models from task-based functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) data, for distinguishing when subjects are performing different cognitive tasks -- e.g., watching movies or making decisions. MVPA works best with a well-designed feature set and an adequate sample size. However, most fMRI datasets are noisy, high-dimensional, expensive to collect, and with small sample sizes. Further, training a robust, generalized predictive model that can analyze homogeneous cognitive tasks provided by multi-site fMRI datasets has additional challenges. This paper proposes the Shared Space Transfer Learning (SSTL) as a novel transfer learning (TL) approach that can functionally align homogeneous multi-site fMRI datasets, and so improve the prediction performance in every site. SSTL first extracts a set of common features for all subjects in each site. It then uses TL to map these site-specific features to a site-independent shared space in order to improve the performance of the MVPA. SSTL uses a scalable optimization procedure that works effectively for high-dimensional fMRI datasets. The optimization procedure extracts the common features for each site by using a single-iteration algorithm and maps these site-specific common features to the site-independent shared space. We evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed method for transferring between various cognitive tasks. Our comprehensive experiments validate that SSTL achieves superior performance to other state-of-the-art analysis techniques.
summary: Multi-voxel pattern analysis (MVPA) learns predictive models from task-based functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) data, for distinguishing when subjects are performing different cognitive tasks -- e.g., watching movies or making decisions. MVPA works best with a well-designed feature set and an adequate sample size. However, most fMRI datasets are noisy, high-dimensional, expensive to collect, and with small sample sizes. Further, training a robust, generalized predictive model that can analyze homogeneous cognitive tasks provided by multi-site fMRI datasets has additional challenges. This paper proposes the Shared Space Transfer Learning (SSTL) as a novel transfer learning (TL) approach that can functionally align homogeneous multi-site fMRI datasets, and so improve the prediction performance in every site. SSTL first extracts a set of common features for all subjects in each site. It then uses TL to map these site-specific features to a site-independent shared space in order to improve the performance of the MVPA. SSTL uses a scalable optimization procedure that works effectively for high-dimensional fMRI datasets. The optimization procedure extracts the common features for each site by using a single-iteration algorithm and maps these site-specific common features to the site-independent shared space. We evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed method for transferring between various cognitive tasks. Our comprehensive experiments validate that SSTL achieves superior performance to other state-of-the-art analysis techniques.
abstract_zh: 多体素模式分析 (MVPA) 从基于任务的功能磁共振成像 (fMRI) 数据中学习预测模型，用于区分受试者何时执行不同的认知任务，例如看电影或做出决策。 MVPA 在具有精心设计的功能集和足够的样本量的情况下效果最佳。然而，大多数功能磁共振成像数据集都是嘈杂的、高维的、收集成本高且样本量小的。此外，训练一个强大的、通用的预测模型来分析多站点功能磁共振成像数据集提供的同质认知任务还面临着额外的挑战。本文提出共享空间迁移学习（SSTL）作为一种新颖的迁移学习（TL）方法，可以在功能上对齐同质多站点 fMRI 数据集，从而提高每个站点的预测性能。 SSTL 首先为每个站点中的所有主题提取一组共同特征。然后，它使用 TL 将这些特定于站点的功能映射到与站点无关的共享空间，以提高 MVPA 的性能。 SSTL 使用可扩展的优化程序，可以有效地处理高维 fMRI 数据集。优化过程通过使用单次迭代算法提取每个站点的共同特征，并将这些特定于站点的共同特征映射到与站点无关的共享空间。我们评估所提出的方法在各种认知任务之间转移的有效性。我们的综合实验验证了 SSTL 的性能优于其他最先进的分析技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出共享空间迁移学习（SSTL）方法，用于对齐多站点fMRI数据，提升多变量模式分析（MVPA）的预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有fMRI数据存在噪声大、高维、样本量小等问题，且跨站点数据的异质性导致模型泛化能力差，需开发新型迁移学习方法解决跨站点任务分析难题。
AI.method: SSTL通过提取各站点的共性特征，并利用迁移学习将其映射到跨站点共享空间，结合可扩展优化算法实现特征对齐与预测模型训练。
AI.result: 实验验证SSTL在多种认知任务转移场景下均优于现有先进方法，显著提升跨站点fMRI数据的预测准确率。
AI.conclusion: SSTL为多站点fMRI数据分析提供了有效解决方案，其共享空间对齐策略能显著增强模型泛化能力，具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: Mustafa Safa Ozdayi,Murat Kantarcioglu,Rishabh Iyer
title: Improving Accuracy of Federated Learning in Non-IID Settings
title_zh: 提高非独立同分布环境中联邦学习的准确性
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) is a decentralized machine learning protocol that allows a set of participating agents to collaboratively train a model without sharing their data. This makes FL particularly suitable for settings where data privacy is desired. However, it has been observed that the performance of FL is closely tied with the local data distributions of agents. Particularly, in settings where local data distributions vastly differ among agents, FL performs rather poorly with respect to the centralized training. To address this problem, we hypothesize the reasons behind the performance degradation, and develop some techniques to address these reasons accordingly. In this work, we identify four simple techniques that can improve the performance of trained models without incurring any additional communication overhead to FL, but rather, some light computation overhead either on the client, or the server-side. In our experimental analysis, combination of our techniques improved the validation accuracy of a model trained via FL by more than 12% with respect to our baseline. This is about 5% less than the accuracy of the model trained on centralized data.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) is a decentralized machine learning protocol that allows a set of participating agents to collaboratively train a model without sharing their data. This makes FL particularly suitable for settings where data privacy is desired. However, it has been observed that the performance of FL is closely tied with the local data distributions of agents. Particularly, in settings where local data distributions vastly differ among agents, FL performs rather poorly with respect to the centralized training. To address this problem, we hypothesize the reasons behind the performance degradation, and develop some techniques to address these reasons accordingly. In this work, we identify four simple techniques that can improve the performance of trained models without incurring any additional communication overhead to FL, but rather, some light computation overhead either on the client, or the server-side. In our experimental analysis, combination of our techniques improved the validation accuracy of a model trained via FL by more than 12% with respect to our baseline. This is about 5% less than the accuracy of the model trained on centralized data.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 是一种去中心化机器学习协议，允许一组参与代理协作训练模型，而无需共享数据。这使得 FL 特别适合需要数据隐私的设置。然而，据观察，FL 的性能与智能体的本地数据分布密切相关。特别是，在代理之间本地数据分布差异很大的情况下，FL 在集中训练方面表现相当差。为了解决这个问题，我们假设了性能下降背后的原因，并开发了一些技术来相应地解决这些原因。在这项工作中，我们确定了四种简单的技术，可以提高训练模型的性能，而不会给 FL 带来任何额外的通信开销，而是在客户端或服务器端产生一些少量的计算开销。在我们的实验分析中，我们的技术组合将通过 FL 训练的模型的验证准确性相对于我们的基线提高了 12% 以上。这比在集中数据上训练的模型的准确度低约 5%。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过提出四种轻量级计算技术，提升非独立同分布（Non-IID）场景下联邦学习（FL）的模型准确性。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习在数据分布差异大的场景下表现不佳，而集中式训练的模型精度更高，因此需要解决非IID数据导致的性能下降问题。
AI.method: 提出四种无需额外通信开销的技术，通过客户端或服务器端的轻量计算优化模型训练过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，结合四种技术后，联邦学习模型的验证准确率较基线提升12%，但仍比集中式训练模型低约5%。
AI.conclusion: 所提技术能有效缓解非IID场景下的联邦学习性能问题，但与集中式训练仍存在精度差距。

ai_content.tldr: 本文旨在通过提出四种轻量级计算技术，提升非独立同分布（Non-IID）场景下联邦学习（FL）的模型准确性。
ai_content.motivation: 联邦学习在数据分布差异大的场景下表现不佳，而集中式训练的模型精度更高，因此需要解决非IID数据导致的性能下降问题。
ai_content.method: 提出四种无需额外通信开销的技术，通过客户端或服务器端的轻量计算优化模型训练过程。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，结合四种技术后，联邦学习模型的验证准确率较基线提升12%，但仍比集中式训练模型低约5%。
ai_content.conclusion: 所提技术能有效缓解非IID场景下的联邦学习性能问题，但与集中式训练仍存在精度差距。

search_text: Improving Accuracy of Federated Learning in Non-IID Settings 提高非独立同分布环境中联邦学习的准确性 Federated Learning (FL) is a decentralized machine learning protocol that allows a set of participating agents to collaboratively train a model without sharing their data. This makes FL particularly suitable for settings where data privacy is desired. However, it has been observed that the performance of FL is closely tied with the local data distributions of agents. Particularly, in settings where local data distributions vastly differ among agents, FL performs rather poorly with respect to the centralized training. To address this problem, we hypothesize the reasons behind the performance degradation, and develop some techniques to address these reasons accordingly. In this work, we identify four simple techniques that can improve the performance of trained models without incurring any additional communication overhead to FL, but rather, some light computation overhead either on the client, or the server-side. In our experimental analysis, combination of our techniques improved the validation accuracy of a model trained via FL by more than 12% with respect to our baseline. This is about 5% less than the accuracy of the model trained on centralized data. 联邦学习 (FL) 是一种去中心化机器学习协议，允许一组参与代理协作训练模型，而无需共享数据。这使得 FL 特别适合需要数据隐私的设置。然而，据观察，FL 的性能与智能体的本地数据分布密切相关。特别是，在代理之间本地数据分布差异很大的情况下，FL 在集中训练方面表现相当差。为了解决这个问题，我们假设了性能下降背后的原因，并开发了一些技术来相应地解决这些原因。在这项工作中，我们确定了四种简单的技术，可以提高训练模型的性能，而不会给 FL 带来任何额外的通信开销，而是在客户端或服务器端产生一些少量的计算开销。在我们的实验分析中，我们的技术组合将通过 FL 训练的模型的验证准确性相对于我们的基线提高了 12% 以上。这比在集中数据上训练的模型的准确度低约 5%。 本文旨在通过提出四种轻量级计算技术，提升非独立同分布（Non-IID）场景下联邦学习（FL）的模型准确性。 Mustafa Safa Ozdayi,Murat Kantarcioglu,Rishabh Iyer cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DC

authors_text: Niya Stoimenova,Rebecca Price
title: Exploring the Nuances of Designing (with/for) Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 探索（使用/为）人工智能设计的细微差别
abstract: Solutions relying on artificial intelligence are devised to predict data patterns and answer questions that are clearly defined, involve an enumerable set of solutions, clear rules, and inherently binary decision mechanisms. Yet, as they become exponentially implemented in our daily activities, they begin to transcend these initial boundaries and to affect the larger sociotechnical system in which they are situated. In this arrangement, a solution is under pressure to surpass true or false criteria and move to an ethical evaluation of right and wrong. Neither algorithmic solutions, nor purely humanistic ones will be enough to fully mitigate undesirable outcomes in the narrow state of AI or its future incarnations. We must take a holistic view. In this paper we explore the construct of infrastructure as a means to simultaneously address algorithmic and societal issues when designing AI.
summary: Solutions relying on artificial intelligence are devised to predict data patterns and answer questions that are clearly defined, involve an enumerable set of solutions, clear rules, and inherently binary decision mechanisms. Yet, as they become exponentially implemented in our daily activities, they begin to transcend these initial boundaries and to affect the larger sociotechnical system in which they are situated. In this arrangement, a solution is under pressure to surpass true or false criteria and move to an ethical evaluation of right and wrong. Neither algorithmic solutions, nor purely humanistic ones will be enough to fully mitigate undesirable outcomes in the narrow state of AI or its future incarnations. We must take a holistic view. In this paper we explore the construct of infrastructure as a means to simultaneously address algorithmic and societal issues when designing AI.
abstract_zh: 依赖人工智能的解决方案旨在预测数据模式并回答明确定义的问题，涉及一组可枚举的解决方案、明确的规则和固有的二元决策机制。然而，随着它们在我们的日常活动中呈指数级地实施，它们开始超越这些最初的界限，并影响它们所在的更大的社会技术系统。在这种安排下，解决方案面临着超越真实或错误标准并转向对正确和错误的道德评估的压力。无论是算法解决方案还是纯粹的人文解决方案都不足以充分减轻人工智能或其未来化身的狭隘状态中的不良后果。我们必须有一个整体的看法。在本文中，我们探讨了基础设施的构建，作为设计人工智能时同时解决算法和社会问题的一种手段。

AI.tldr: 探讨设计AI时如何通过基础设施同时解决算法和社会问题
AI.motivation: 随着AI应用扩展，传统解决方案无法应对伦理和社会问题，需寻找更全面的方法
AI.method: 通过分析基础设施在AI设计中的作用，结合算法与社会因素进行综合分析
AI.result: 提出基础设施作为整合算法与社会考量的框架，促进更全面的AI设计
AI.conclusion: 强调在AI设计中需结合基础设施以平衡技术与社会需求，推动负责任的AI发展

authors_text: Anastasis Kratsios,Behnoosh Zamanlooy
title: Learning Sub-Patterns in Piecewise Continuous Functions
title_zh: 学习分段连续函数中的子模式
comment: 16 Pages + 7 Page Appendix, 9 Figures, and 6 Tables
comments: 16 Pages + 7 Page Appendix, 9 Figures, and 6 Tables
abstract: Most stochastic gradient descent algorithms can optimize neural networks that are sub-differentiable in their parameters; however, this implies that the neural network's activation function must exhibit a degree of continuity which limits the neural network model's uniform approximation capacity to continuous functions. This paper focuses on the case where the discontinuities arise from distinct sub-patterns, each defined on different parts of the input space. We propose a new discontinuous deep neural network model trainable via a decoupled two-step procedure that avoids passing gradient updates through the network's only and strategically placed, discontinuous unit. We provide approximation guarantees for our architecture in the space of bounded continuous functions and universal approximation guarantees in the space of piecewise continuous functions which we introduced herein. We present a novel semi-supervised two-step training procedure for our discontinuous deep learning model, tailored to its structure, and we provide theoretical support for its effectiveness. The performance of our model and trained with the propose procedure is evaluated experimentally on both real-world financial datasets and synthetic datasets.
summary: Most stochastic gradient descent algorithms can optimize neural networks that are sub-differentiable in their parameters; however, this implies that the neural network's activation function must exhibit a degree of continuity which limits the neural network model's uniform approximation capacity to continuous functions. This paper focuses on the case where the discontinuities arise from distinct sub-patterns, each defined on different parts of the input space. We propose a new discontinuous deep neural network model trainable via a decoupled two-step procedure that avoids passing gradient updates through the network's only and strategically placed, discontinuous unit. We provide approximation guarantees for our architecture in the space of bounded continuous functions and universal approximation guarantees in the space of piecewise continuous functions which we introduced herein. We present a novel semi-supervised two-step training procedure for our discontinuous deep learning model, tailored to its structure, and we provide theoretical support for its effectiveness. The performance of our model and trained with the propose procedure is evaluated experimentally on both real-world financial datasets and synthetic datasets.
abstract_zh: 大多数随机梯度下降算法可以优化参数可微分的神经网络；然而，这意味着神经网络的激活函数必须表现出一定程度的连续性，这限制了神经网络模型对连续函数的均匀逼近能力。本文重点讨论不连续性由不同子模式引起的情况，每个子模式定义在输入空间的不同部分。我们提出了一种新的不连续深度神经网络模型，可通过解耦的两步过程进行训练，避免通过网络唯一且战略性放置的不连续单元传递梯度更新。我们为我们的架构在有界连续函数空间中提供近似保证，并在本文介绍的分段连续函数空间中提供通用近似保证。我们针对不连续深度学习模型的结构提出了一种新颖的半监督两步训练程序，并为其有效性提供了理论支持。我们的模型的性能和使用建议程序训练的性能在现实世界的金融数据集和合成数据集上进行了实验评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可处理分段连续函数中子模式的新型不连续深度神经网络模型，并设计了相应的训练方法。
AI.motivation: 传统梯度下降算法要求神经网络参数可次微分，导致激活函数需保持连续性，限制了模型对分段连续函数的逼近能力。
AI.method: 设计包含战略放置不连续单元的网络结构，采用两阶段解耦训练流程避免梯度传递，并提出半监督训练方法。
AI.result: 在金融数据集和合成数据集实验中验证了模型有效性，理论证明其在连续函数空间和分段连续函数空间的逼近能力。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过结构创新和训练方法改进，有效解决了分段连续函数中子模式学习问题，扩展了神经网络的应用范围。
