authors_text: Felix Köster,Dominik Ehlert,Kathy Lüdge
title: Limitations of the recall capabilities in delay based reservoir computing systems
title_zh: 基于延迟的储层计算系统召回能力的局限性
abstract: We analyze the memory capacity of a delay based reservoir computer with a Hopf normal form as nonlinearity and numerically compute the linear as well as the higher order recall capabilities. A possible physical realisation could be a laser with external cavity, for which the information is fed via electrical injection. A task independent quantification of the computational capability of the reservoir system is done via a complete orthonormal set of basis functions. Our results suggest that even for constant readout dimension the total memory capacity is dependent on the ratio between the information input period, also called the clock cycle, and the time delay in the system. Optimal performance is found for a time delay about 1.6 times the clock cycle
summary: We analyze the memory capacity of a delay based reservoir computer with a Hopf normal form as nonlinearity and numerically compute the linear as well as the higher order recall capabilities. A possible physical realisation could be a laser with external cavity, for which the information is fed via electrical injection. A task independent quantification of the computational capability of the reservoir system is done via a complete orthonormal set of basis functions. Our results suggest that even for constant readout dimension the total memory capacity is dependent on the ratio between the information input period, also called the clock cycle, and the time delay in the system. Optimal performance is found for a time delay about 1.6 times the clock cycle
abstract_zh: 我们分析了具有 Hopf 范式非线性的基于延迟的储层计算机的存储容量，并数值计算了线性和高阶召回能力。一种可能的物理实现是具有外腔的激光器，通过电注入为其提供信息。储层系统计算能力的独立于任务的量化是通过一组完整的正交基函数来完成的。我们的结果表明，即使对于恒定的读出尺寸，总存储容量也取决于信息输入周期（也称为时钟周期）与系统中的时间延迟之间的比率。发现最佳性能的时间延迟约为时钟周期的 1.6 倍

AI.tldr: 本文分析了基于延迟的储层计算系统的回忆能力限制，重点研究记忆容量与延迟时间及信息输入周期的关系。
AI.motivation: 延迟储层计算系统在信息处理中具有潜力，但其回忆能力的限制及优化参数尚不明确，需系统性分析以指导实际应用。
AI.method: 采用Hopf正规形作为非线性函数，结合理论分析与数值计算，通过正交基函数集量化储层计算能力。
AI.result: 总记忆容量依赖于信息输入周期（时钟周期）与系统延迟时间的比率，最佳性能出现在延迟时间约为时钟周期的1.6倍时。
AI.conclusion: 延迟时间与时钟周期的比率是影响储层系统性能的关键因素，该发现为系统设计与优化提供了理论依据。

search_text: Limitations of the recall capabilities in delay based reservoir computing systems 基于延迟的储层计算系统召回能力的局限性 We analyze the memory capacity of a delay based reservoir computer with a Hopf normal form as nonlinearity and numerically compute the linear as well as the higher order recall capabilities. A possible physical realisation could be a laser with external cavity, for which the information is fed via electrical injection. A task independent quantification of the computational capability of the reservoir system is done via a complete orthonormal set of basis functions. Our results suggest that even for constant readout dimension the total memory capacity is dependent on the ratio between the information input period, also called the clock cycle, and the time delay in the system. Optimal performance is found for a time delay about 1.6 times the clock cycle 我们分析了具有 Hopf 范式非线性的基于延迟的储层计算机的存储容量，并数值计算了线性和高阶召回能力。一种可能的物理实现是具有外腔的激光器，通过电注入为其提供信息。储层系统计算能力的独立于任务的量化是通过一组完整的正交基函数来完成的。我们的结果表明，即使对于恒定的读出尺寸，总存储容量也取决于信息输入周期（也称为时钟周期）与系统中的时间延迟之间的比率。发现最佳性能的时间延迟约为时钟周期的 1.6 倍 本文分析了基于延迟的储层计算系统的回忆能力限制，重点研究记忆容量与延迟时间及信息输入周期的关系。 Felix Köster,Dominik Ehlert,Kathy Lüdge cs.ET,cs.LG,nlin.AO,nlin.CD,physics.optics

authors_text: Jiahong Wei,Zhun Fan
title: Genetic U-Net: Automatically Designed Deep Networks for Retinal Vessel Segmentation Using a Genetic Algorithm
title_zh: Genetic U-Net：使用遗传算法自动设计用于视网膜血管分割的深度网络
abstract: Recently, many methods based on hand-designed convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved promising results in automatic retinal vessel segmentation. However, these CNNs remain constrained in capturing retinal vessels in complex fundus images. To improve their segmentation performance, these CNNs tend to have many parameters, which may lead to overfitting and high computational complexity. Moreover, the manual design of competitive CNNs is time-consuming and requires extensive empirical knowledge. Herein, a novel automated design method, called Genetic U-Net, is proposed to generate a U-shaped CNN that can achieve better retinal vessel segmentation but with fewer architecture-based parameters, thereby addressing the above issues. First, we devised a condensed but flexible search space based on a U-shaped encoder-decoder. Then, we used an improved genetic algorithm to identify better-performing architectures in the search space and investigated the possibility of finding a superior network architecture with fewer parameters. The experimental results show that the architecture obtained using the proposed method offered a superior performance with less than 1% of the number of the original U-Net parameters in particular and with significantly fewer parameters than other state-of-the-art models. Furthermore, through in-depth investigation of the experimental results, several effective operations and patterns of networks to generate superior retinal vessel segmentations were identified.
summary: Recently, many methods based on hand-designed convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved promising results in automatic retinal vessel segmentation. However, these CNNs remain constrained in capturing retinal vessels in complex fundus images. To improve their segmentation performance, these CNNs tend to have many parameters, which may lead to overfitting and high computational complexity. Moreover, the manual design of competitive CNNs is time-consuming and requires extensive empirical knowledge. Herein, a novel automated design method, called Genetic U-Net, is proposed to generate a U-shaped CNN that can achieve better retinal vessel segmentation but with fewer architecture-based parameters, thereby addressing the above issues. First, we devised a condensed but flexible search space based on a U-shaped encoder-decoder. Then, we used an improved genetic algorithm to identify better-performing architectures in the search space and investigated the possibility of finding a superior network architecture with fewer parameters. The experimental results show that the architecture obtained using the proposed method offered a superior performance with less than 1% of the number of the original U-Net parameters in particular and with significantly fewer parameters than other state-of-the-art models. Furthermore, through in-depth investigation of the experimental results, several effective operations and patterns of networks to generate superior retinal vessel segmentations were identified.
abstract_zh: 最近，许多基于手工设计的卷积神经网络（CNN）的方法在自动视网膜血管分割方面取得了可喜的结果。然而，这些 CNN 在捕获复杂眼底图像中的视网膜血管方面仍然受到限制。为了提高分割性能，这些 CNN 往往有很多参数，这可能会导致过度拟合和高计算复杂度。此外，竞争性 CNN 的手动设计非常耗时，并且需要大量的经验知识。本文提出了一种称为 Genetic U-Net 的新型自动化设计方法来生成 U 形 CNN，该方法可以实现更好的视网膜血管分割，但基于架构的参数更少，从而解决上述问题。首先，我们设计了一个基于 U 形编码器-解码器的压缩但灵活的搜索空间。然后，我们使用改进的遗传算法来识别搜索空间中性能更好的架构，并研究以更少的参数找到更好的网络架构的可能性。实验结果表明，使用所提出的方法获得的架构提供了优越的性能，尤其是原始 U-Net 参数数量不到 1%，并且参数比其他最先进的模型要少得多。此外，通过对实验结果的深入研究，确定了几种有效的网络操作和模式来生成优质的视网膜血管分割。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于遗传算法的自动设计方法Genetic U-Net，用于生成参数更少且分割性能更优的视网膜血管分割网络。
AI.motivation: 传统手工艺设计的CNN在复杂眼底图像中分割视网膜血管时存在参数冗余、易过拟合及计算复杂度高问题，且手动设计耗时且依赖经验。
AI.method: 构建基于U型编码器-解码器的压缩搜索空间，并采用改进遗传算法搜索最优网络架构，通过参数约束优化分割性能。
AI.result: 所提方法在参数量仅为原始U-Net的1%时仍取得更优分割效果，显著优于其他先进模型，并发现若干有效网络操作模式。
AI.conclusion: 遗传算法驱动的自动网络设计可有效平衡参数效率与分割精度，为医学图像分割提供新思路。

authors_text: Sukhpal Singh Gill,Adarsh Kumar,Harvinder Singh,Manmeet Singh,Kamalpreet Kaur,Muhammad Usman,Rajkumar Buyya
title: Quantum Computing: A Taxonomy, Systematic Review and Future Directions
title_zh: 量子计算：分类、系统回顾和未来方向
comment: 37 pages, 7 figures, 12 tables; paper accepted for publication in "Software: Practice and Experience", Wiley Press, USA on Sept. 22, 2021
comments: 37 pages, 7 figures, 12 tables; paper accepted for publication in "Software: Practice and Experience", Wiley Press, USA on Sept. 22, 2021
abstract: Quantum computing is an emerging paradigm with the potential to offer significant computational advantage over conventional classical computing by exploiting quantum-mechanical principles such as entanglement and superposition. It is anticipated that this computational advantage of quantum computing will help to solve many complex and computationally intractable problems in several areas such as drug design, data science, clean energy, finance, industrial chemical development, secure communications, and quantum chemistry. In recent years, tremendous progress in both quantum hardware development and quantum software/algorithm have brought quantum computing much closer to reality. Indeed, the demonstration of quantum supremacy marks a significant milestone in the Noisy Intermediate Scale Quantum (NISQ) era - the next logical step being the quantum advantage whereby quantum computers solve a real-world problem much more efficiently than classical computing. As the quantum devices are expected to steadily scale up in the next few years, quantum decoherence and qubit interconnectivity are two of the major challenges to achieve quantum advantage in the NISQ era. Quantum computing is a highly topical and fast-moving field of research with significant ongoing progress in all facets. This article presents a comprehensive review of quantum computing literature, and taxonomy of quantum computing. Further, the proposed taxonomy is used to map various related studies to identify the research gaps. A detailed overview of quantum software tools and technologies, post-quantum cryptography and quantum computer hardware development to document the current state-of-the-art in the respective areas. We finish the article by highlighting various open challenges and promising future directions for research.

abstract_zh: 量子计算是一种新兴范式，通过利用纠缠和叠加等量子力学原理，有可能比传统经典计算提供显着的计算优势。预计量子计算的这种计算优势将有助于解决药物设计、数据科学、清洁能源、金融、工业化学品开发、安全通信和量子化学等多个领域的许多复杂且计算棘手的问题。近年来，量子硬件开发和量子软件/算法的巨大进步使量子计算更接近现实。事实上，量子霸权的展示标志着嘈杂中尺度量子（NISQ）时代的一个重要里程碑——下一个合乎逻辑的步骤是量子优势，量子计算机将比经典计算更有效地解决现实世界的问题。随着量子器件预计在未来几年稳步扩大规模，量子退相干和量子位互连是 NISQ 时代实现量子优势的两个主要挑战。量子计算是一个高度热门且发展迅速的研究领域，在各个方面都在取得重大进展。本文对量子计算文献和量子计算分类进行了全面回顾。此外，所提出的分类法用于绘制各种相关研究，以确定研究差距。详细概述量子软件工具和技术、后量子密码学和量子计算机硬件开发，以记录各个领域当前的最新技术。我们通过强调各种开放挑战和有希望的未来研究方向来结束本文。

AI.tldr: 本文对量子计算领域进行系统综述，提出分类框架，分析技术现状并指出未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 量子计算可能在多个领域带来计算优势，但面临NISQ时代的技术挑战，需系统梳理研究进展与空白。
AI.method: 通过文献综述构建量子计算分类体系，映射相关研究，总结软件工具、硬件发展及后量子密码学现状。
AI.result: 提出量子计算分类框架，识别研究空白，总结当前技术状态，并阐述实现量子优势的关键挑战与未来方向。
AI.conclusion: 量子计算需解决退相干与互连性问题，未来研究应聚焦硬件扩展、算法优化及跨学科应用探索。

search_text: Quantum Computing: A Taxonomy, Systematic Review and Future Directions 量子计算：分类、系统回顾和未来方向 Quantum computing is an emerging paradigm with the potential to offer significant computational advantage over conventional classical computing by exploiting quantum-mechanical principles such as entanglement and superposition. It is anticipated that this computational advantage of quantum computing will help to solve many complex and computationally intractable problems in several areas such as drug design, data science, clean energy, finance, industrial chemical development, secure communications, and quantum chemistry. In recent years, tremendous progress in both quantum hardware development and quantum software/algorithm have brought quantum computing much closer to reality. Indeed, the demonstration of quantum supremacy marks a significant milestone in the Noisy Intermediate Scale Quantum (NISQ) era - the next logical step being the quantum advantage whereby quantum computers solve a real-world problem much more efficiently than classical computing. As the quantum devices are expected to steadily scale up in the next few years, quantum decoherence and qubit interconnectivity are two of the major challenges to achieve quantum advantage in the NISQ era. Quantum computing is a highly topical and fast-moving field of research with significant ongoing progress in all facets. This article presents a comprehensive review of quantum computing literature, and taxonomy of quantum computing. Further, the proposed taxonomy is used to map various related studies to identify the research gaps. A detailed overview of quantum software tools and technologies, post-quantum cryptography and quantum computer hardware development to document the current state-of-the-art in the respective areas. We finish the article by highlighting various open challenges and promising future directions for research. 量子计算是一种新兴范式，通过利用纠缠和叠加等量子力学原理，有可能比传统经典计算提供显着的计算优势。预计量子计算的这种计算优势将有助于解决药物设计、数据科学、清洁能源、金融、工业化学品开发、安全通信和量子化学等多个领域的许多复杂且计算棘手的问题。近年来，量子硬件开发和量子软件/算法的巨大进步使量子计算更接近现实。事实上，量子霸权的展示标志着嘈杂中尺度量子（NISQ）时代的一个重要里程碑——下一个合乎逻辑的步骤是量子优势，量子计算机将比经典计算更有效地解决现实世界的问题。随着量子器件预计在未来几年稳步扩大规模，量子退相干和量子位互连是 NISQ 时代实现量子优势的两个主要挑战。量子计算是一个高度热门且发展迅速的研究领域，在各个方面都在取得重大进展。本文对量子计算文献和量子计算分类进行了全面回顾。此外，所提出的分类法用于绘制各种相关研究，以确定研究差距。详细概述量子软件工具和技术、后量子密码学和量子计算机硬件开发，以记录各个领域当前的最新技术。我们通过强调各种开放挑战和有希望的未来研究方向来结束本文。 本文对量子计算领域进行系统综述，提出分类框架，分析技术现状并指出未来研究方向。 Sukhpal Singh Gill,Adarsh Kumar,Harvinder Singh,Manmeet Singh,Kamalpreet Kaur,Muhammad Usman,Rajkumar Buyya cs.ET,cs.DC

authors_text: Yesheng Zhang,Xu Zhao,Dahong Qian
title: An End to End Network Architecture for Fundamental Matrix Estimation
title_zh: 用于基本矩阵估计的端到端网络架构
abstract: In this paper, we present a novel end-to-end network architecture to estimate fundamental matrix directly from stereo images. To establish a complete working pipeline, different deep neural networks in charge of finding correspondences in images, performing outlier rejection and calculating fundamental matrix, are integrated into an end-to-end network architecture. To well train the network and preserve geometry properties of fundamental matrix, a new loss function is introduced. To evaluate the accuracy of estimated fundamental matrix more reasonably, we design a new evaluation metric which is highly consistent with visualization result. Experiments conducted on both outdoor and indoor data-sets show that this network outperforms traditional methods as well as previous deep learning based methods on various metrics and achieves significant performance improvements.
summary: In this paper, we present a novel end-to-end network architecture to estimate fundamental matrix directly from stereo images. To establish a complete working pipeline, different deep neural networks in charge of finding correspondences in images, performing outlier rejection and calculating fundamental matrix, are integrated into an end-to-end network architecture. To well train the network and preserve geometry properties of fundamental matrix, a new loss function is introduced. To evaluate the accuracy of estimated fundamental matrix more reasonably, we design a new evaluation metric which is highly consistent with visualization result. Experiments conducted on both outdoor and indoor data-sets show that this network outperforms traditional methods as well as previous deep learning based methods on various metrics and achieves significant performance improvements.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的端到端网络架构，可以直接从立体图像估计基本矩阵。为了建立完整的工作流程，负责查找图像中的对应关系、执行异常值拒绝和计算基本矩阵的不同深度神经网络被集成到端到端网络架构中。为了很好地训练网络并保留基本矩阵的几何特性，引入了一种新的损失函数。为了更合理地评估估计基本矩阵的准确性，我们设计了一种与可视化结果高度一致的新评估指标。在室外和室内数据集上进行的实验表明，该网络在各种指标上都优于传统方法以及之前基于深度学习的方法，并实现了显着的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端网络架构，直接从立体图像中估计基础矩阵。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需分步处理对应点匹配、异常值剔除和矩阵计算，流程复杂且效率低，本文旨在构建统一的端到端框架以提升性能。
AI.method: 整合对应点检测、异常值剔除和基础矩阵计算的深度网络，设计保持几何特性的损失函数，并提出与可视化结果高度一致的新评估指标。
AI.result: 在室内外数据集上优于传统方法和现有深度学习方法，在多项指标上实现显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过端到端架构和优化设计，在基础矩阵估计任务中展现出优越性，验证了其有效性与实用性。

authors_text: Kelly Payette,Priscille de Dumast,Hamza Kebiri,Ivan Ezhov,Johannes C. Paetzold,Suprosanna Shit,Asim Iqbal,Romesa Khan,Raimund Kottke,Patrice Grehten,Hui Ji,Levente Lanczi,Marianna Nagy,Monika Beresova,Thi Dao Nguyen,Giancarlo Natalucci,Theofanis Karayannis,Bjoern Menze,Meritxell Bach Cuadra,Andras Jakab
title: An automatic multi-tissue human fetal brain segmentation benchmark using the Fetal Tissue Annotation Dataset
title_zh: 使用胎儿组织注释数据集的自动多组织人类胎儿大脑分割基准
comment: This is a preprint of an article published in Nature Scientific Data. The final authenticated version is available online at: https://doi.org/10.1038/s41597-021-00946-3
comments: This is a preprint of an article published in Nature Scientific Data. The final authenticated version is available online at: https://doi.org/10.1038/s41597-021-00946-3
abstract: It is critical to quantitatively analyse the developing human fetal brain in order to fully understand neurodevelopment in both normal fetuses and those with congenital disorders. To facilitate this analysis, automatic multi-tissue fetal brain segmentation algorithms are needed, which in turn requires open databases of segmented fetal brains. Here we introduce a publicly available database of 50 manually segmented pathological and non-pathological fetal magnetic resonance brain volume reconstructions across a range of gestational ages (20 to 33 weeks) into 7 different tissue categories (external cerebrospinal fluid, grey matter, white matter, ventricles, cerebellum, deep grey matter, brainstem/spinal cord). In addition, we quantitatively evaluate the accuracy of several automatic multi-tissue segmentation algorithms of the developing human fetal brain. Four research groups participated, submitting a total of 10 algorithms, demonstrating the benefits the database for the development of automatic algorithms.
summary: It is critical to quantitatively analyse the developing human fetal brain in order to fully understand neurodevelopment in both normal fetuses and those with congenital disorders. To facilitate this analysis, automatic multi-tissue fetal brain segmentation algorithms are needed, which in turn requires open databases of segmented fetal brains. Here we introduce a publicly available database of 50 manually segmented pathological and non-pathological fetal magnetic resonance brain volume reconstructions across a range of gestational ages (20 to 33 weeks) into 7 different tissue categories (external cerebrospinal fluid, grey matter, white matter, ventricles, cerebellum, deep grey matter, brainstem/spinal cord). In addition, we quantitatively evaluate the accuracy of several automatic multi-tissue segmentation algorithms of the developing human fetal brain. Four research groups participated, submitting a total of 10 algorithms, demonstrating the benefits the database for the development of automatic algorithms.
abstract_zh: 为了充分了解正常胎儿和先天性疾病胎儿的神经发育，定量分析人类胎儿大脑的发育至关重要。为了促进这种分析，需要自动多组织胎儿大脑分割算法，这反过来又需要分割胎儿大脑的开放数据库。在这里，我们介绍了一个公开的数据库，其中包含 50 个手动分段的病理和非病理胎儿磁共振脑体积重建，涵盖不同胎龄（20 至 33 周），分为 7 个不同的组织类别（外部脑脊液、灰质、白质、心室、小脑、深部灰质、脑干/脊髓）。此外，我们还定量评估了发育中的人类胎儿大脑的几种自动多组织分割算法的准确性。四个研究小组参与，共提交了10个算法，展示了数据库对于自动算法开发的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个公开的胎儿脑分割数据集，并评估了多种自动分割算法的准确性。
AI.motivation: 定量分析胎儿脑发育对理解正常及患病胎儿的神经发育至关重要，但缺乏公开的分割数据库和算法评估。
AI.method: 构建包含50例手动分割的胎儿MRI数据集（覆盖20-33周孕龄，7种组织类型），并邀请四个研究团队提交10种自动分割算法进行评估。
AI.result: 发布了多组织胎儿脑分割基准数据集，并验证了不同算法在分割任务中的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为自动分割算法的研发提供了重要资源，有助于推动胎儿脑发育研究的标准化和自动化。

authors_text: Iztok Fister Jr.,Iztok Fister
title: A brief overview of swarm intelligence-based algorithms for numerical association rule mining
title_zh: 基于群体智能的数值关联规则挖掘算法概述
abstract: Numerical Association Rule Mining is a popular variant of Association Rule Mining, where numerical attributes are handled without discretization. This means that the algorithms for dealing with this problem can operate directly, not only with categorical, but also with numerical attributes. Until recently, a big portion of these algorithms were based on a stochastic nature-inspired population-based paradigm. As a result, evolutionary and swarm intelligence-based algorithms showed big efficiency for dealing with the problem. In line with this, the main mission of this chapter is to make a historical overview of swarm intelligence-based algorithms for Numerical Association Rule Mining, as well as to present the main features of these algorithms for the observed problem. A taxonomy of the algorithms was proposed on the basis of the applied features found in this overview. Challenges, waiting in the future, finish this paper.
summary: Numerical Association Rule Mining is a popular variant of Association Rule Mining, where numerical attributes are handled without discretization. This means that the algorithms for dealing with this problem can operate directly, not only with categorical, but also with numerical attributes. Until recently, a big portion of these algorithms were based on a stochastic nature-inspired population-based paradigm. As a result, evolutionary and swarm intelligence-based algorithms showed big efficiency for dealing with the problem. In line with this, the main mission of this chapter is to make a historical overview of swarm intelligence-based algorithms for Numerical Association Rule Mining, as well as to present the main features of these algorithms for the observed problem. A taxonomy of the algorithms was proposed on the basis of the applied features found in this overview. Challenges, waiting in the future, finish this paper.
abstract_zh: 数值关联规则挖掘是关联规则挖掘的一种流行变体，其中数值属性的处理无需离散化。这意味着处理这个问题的算法可以直接操作，不仅可以操作分类属性，还可以操作数值属性。直到最近，这些算法的很大一部分都是基于随机自然启发的基于群体的范式。因此，基于进化和群体智能的算法在处理该问题方面表现出了很高的效率。与此相一致，本章的主要任务是对基于群体智能的数值关联规则挖掘算法进行历史概述，并针对观察到的问题介绍这些算法的主要特征。根据本概述中发现的应用特征提出了算法的分类。挑战，等待未来，完成本文。

AI.method: 本文通过历史回顾的方式，总结了基于群体智能的数值关联规则挖掘算法，并根据其特征提出了一个分类体系。
AI.result: 提出了一个基于特征的算法分类体系，并总结了这些算法在数值关联规则挖掘中的主要特点。
AI.conclusion: 群体智能算法在数值关联规则挖掘中具有良好的应用前景，但仍有许多挑战需要进一步研究。

search_text: A brief overview of swarm intelligence-based algorithms for numerical association rule mining 基于群体智能的数值关联规则挖掘算法概述 Numerical Association Rule Mining is a popular variant of Association Rule Mining, where numerical attributes are handled without discretization. This means that the algorithms for dealing with this problem can operate directly, not only with categorical, but also with numerical attributes. Until recently, a big portion of these algorithms were based on a stochastic nature-inspired population-based paradigm. As a result, evolutionary and swarm intelligence-based algorithms showed big efficiency for dealing with the problem. In line with this, the main mission of this chapter is to make a historical overview of swarm intelligence-based algorithms for Numerical Association Rule Mining, as well as to present the main features of these algorithms for the observed problem. A taxonomy of the algorithms was proposed on the basis of the applied features found in this overview. Challenges, waiting in the future, finish this paper. 数值关联规则挖掘是关联规则挖掘的一种流行变体，其中数值属性的处理无需离散化。这意味着处理这个问题的算法可以直接操作，不仅可以操作分类属性，还可以操作数值属性。直到最近，这些算法的很大一部分都是基于随机自然启发的基于群体的范式。因此，基于进化和群体智能的算法在处理该问题方面表现出了很高的效率。与此相一致，本章的主要任务是对基于群体智能的数值关联规则挖掘算法进行历史概述，并针对观察到的问题介绍这些算法的主要特征。根据本概述中发现的应用特征提出了算法的分类。挑战，等待未来，完成本文。 本文综述了基于群体智能算法的数值关联规则挖掘方法。 Iztok Fister Jr.,Iztok Fister cs.NE

authors_text: Xiang Hao,Xiangdong Su,Zhiyu Wang,Hui Zhang,Batushiren
title: UNetGAN: A Robust Speech Enhancement Approach in Time Domain for Extremely Low Signal-to-noise Ratio Condition
title_zh: UNetGAN：一种针对极低信噪比条件的时域鲁棒语音增强方法
abstract: Speech enhancement at extremely low signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) condition is a very challenging problem and rarely investigated in previous works. This paper proposes a robust speech enhancement approach (UNetGAN) based on U-Net and generative adversarial learning to deal with this problem. This approach consists of a generator network and a discriminator network, which operate directly in the time domain. The generator network adopts a U-Net like structure and employs dilated convolution in the bottleneck of it. We evaluate the performance of the UNetGAN at low SNR conditions (up to -20dB) on the public benchmark. The result demonstrates that it significantly improves the speech quality and substantially outperforms the representative deep learning models, including SEGAN, cGAN fo SE, Bidirectional LSTM using phase-sensitive spectrum approximation cost function (PSA-BLSTM) and Wave-U-Net regarding Short-Time Objective Intelligibility (STOI) and Perceptual evaluation of speech quality (PESQ).
summary: Speech enhancement at extremely low signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) condition is a very challenging problem and rarely investigated in previous works. This paper proposes a robust speech enhancement approach (UNetGAN) based on U-Net and generative adversarial learning to deal with this problem. This approach consists of a generator network and a discriminator network, which operate directly in the time domain. The generator network adopts a U-Net like structure and employs dilated convolution in the bottleneck of it. We evaluate the performance of the UNetGAN at low SNR conditions (up to -20dB) on the public benchmark. The result demonstrates that it significantly improves the speech quality and substantially outperforms the representative deep learning models, including SEGAN, cGAN fo SE, Bidirectional LSTM using phase-sensitive spectrum approximation cost function (PSA-BLSTM) and Wave-U-Net regarding Short-Time Objective Intelligibility (STOI) and Perceptual evaluation of speech quality (PESQ).
abstract_zh: 极低信噪比（SNR）条件下的语音增强是一个非常具有挑战性的问题，在以前的工作中很少进行研究。本文提出了一种基于 U-Net 和生成对抗学习的鲁棒语音增强方法（UNetGAN）来处理这个问题。该方法由生成器网络和鉴别器网络组成，直接在时域中运行。生成器网络采用类似 U-Net 的结构，并在其瓶颈处采用扩张卷积。我们在公共基准上评估了 UNetGAN 在低 SNR 条件（高达 -20dB）下的性能。结果表明，它显着提高了语音质量，并且大大优于代表性的深度学习模型，包括SEGAN、cGAN fo SE、使用相敏频谱近似成本函数的双向LSTM（PSA-BLSTM）以及关于短时客观清晰度（STOI）和语音质量感知评估（PESQ）的Wave-U-Net。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于U-Net和生成对抗网络（GAN）的时域语音增强方法UNetGAN，用于解决极低信噪比（SNR）条件下的语音增强问题。
AI.motivation: 极低信噪比（如-20dB）下的语音增强是现有研究中较少关注的挑战性问题，传统方法在极端噪声环境下效果有限。
AI.method: 设计包含生成器和判别器的对抗网络，生成器采用U-Net结构并在瓶颈层引入空洞卷积，直接在时域处理语音信号，通过对抗训练优化增强效果。
AI.result: 在-20dB低SNR条件下，UNetGAN在STOI和PESQ指标上显著优于SEGAN、cGAN fo SE、PSA-BLSTM和Wave-U-Net等主流深度学习模型。
AI.conclusion: UNetGAN通过时域对抗学习有效提升了极低信噪比下的语音增强性能，验证了其在极端噪声环境中的鲁棒性和优越性。

authors_text: Sherif A. S. Mohamed,Jawad N. Yasin,Mohammad-Hashem Haghbayan,Antonio Miele,Jukka Heikkonen,Hannu Tenhunen,Juha Plosila
title: Asynchronous Corner Tracking Algorithm based on Lifetime of Events for DAVIS Cameras
title_zh: DAVIS相机基于事件生命周期的异步角点跟踪算法
comment: Accepted to 15th International Symposium on Visual Computing (ISVC2020)
comments: Accepted to 15th International Symposium on Visual Computing (ISVC2020)
abstract: Event cameras, i.e., the Dynamic and Active-pixel Vision Sensor (DAVIS) ones, capture the intensity changes in the scene and generates a stream of events in an asynchronous fashion. The output rate of such cameras can reach up to 10 million events per second in high dynamic environments. DAVIS cameras use novel vision sensors that mimic human eyes. Their attractive attributes, such as high output rate, High Dynamic Range (HDR), and high pixel bandwidth, make them an ideal solution for applications that require high-frequency tracking. Moreover, applications that operate in challenging lighting scenarios can exploit the high HDR of event cameras, i.e., 140 dB compared to 60 dB of traditional cameras. In this paper, a novel asynchronous corner tracking method is proposed that uses both events and intensity images captured by a DAVIS camera. The Harris algorithm is used to extract features, i.e., frame-corners from keyframes, i.e., intensity images. Afterward, a matching algorithm is used to extract event-corners from the stream of events. Events are solely used to perform asynchronous tracking until the next keyframe is captured. Neighboring events, within a window size of 5x5 pixels around the event-corner, are used to calculate the velocity and direction of extracted event-corners by fitting the 2D planar using a randomized Hough transform algorithm. Experimental evaluation showed that our approach is able to update the location of the extracted corners up to 100 times during the blind time of traditional cameras, i.e., between two consecutive intensity images.
summary: Event cameras, i.e., the Dynamic and Active-pixel Vision Sensor (DAVIS) ones, capture the intensity changes in the scene and generates a stream of events in an asynchronous fashion. The output rate of such cameras can reach up to 10 million events per second in high dynamic environments. DAVIS cameras use novel vision sensors that mimic human eyes. Their attractive attributes, such as high output rate, High Dynamic Range (HDR), and high pixel bandwidth, make them an ideal solution for applications that require high-frequency tracking. Moreover, applications that operate in challenging lighting scenarios can exploit the high HDR of event cameras, i.e., 140 dB compared to 60 dB of traditional cameras. In this paper, a novel asynchronous corner tracking method is proposed that uses both events and intensity images captured by a DAVIS camera. The Harris algorithm is used to extract features, i.e., frame-corners from keyframes, i.e., intensity images. Afterward, a matching algorithm is used to extract event-corners from the stream of events. Events are solely used to perform asynchronous tracking until the next keyframe is captured. Neighboring events, within a window size of 5x5 pixels around the event-corner, are used to calculate the velocity and direction of extracted event-corners by fitting the 2D planar using a randomized Hough transform algorithm. Experimental evaluation showed that our approach is able to update the location of the extracted corners up to 100 times during the blind time of traditional cameras, i.e., between two consecutive intensity images.
abstract_zh: 事件摄像机，即动态和主动像素视觉传感器 (DAVIS)，捕获场景中的强度变化并以异步方式生成事件流。在高动态环境中，此类摄像机的输出速率可达每秒 1000 万个事件。 DAVIS 相机使用模仿人眼的新型视觉传感器。它们具有高输出率、高动态范围 (HDR) 和高像素带宽等极具吸引力的属性，使其成为需要高频跟踪的应用的理想解决方案。此外，在具有挑战性的照明场景中运行的应用程序可以利用事件摄像机的高 HDR，即 140 dB，而传统摄像机为 60 dB。本文提出了一种新颖的异步角点跟踪方法，该方法使用 DAVIS 相机捕获的事件和强度图像。 Harris 算法用于从关键帧（即强度图像）中提取特征，即帧角。然后，使用匹配算法从事件流中提取事件角点。事件仅用于执行异步跟踪，直到捕获下一个关键帧。事件角周围 5x5 像素窗口大小内的相邻事件用于通过使用随机霍夫变换算法拟合 2D 平面来计算提取的事件角的速度和方向。实验评估表明，我们的方法能够在传统相机的盲区内（即两个连续强度图像之间）更新提取的角点位置多达 100 次。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于事件生命周期的异步角点跟踪算法，结合DAVIS相机的事件流和强度图像进行高动态场景下的实时跟踪。
AI.motivation: 传统相机在高动态场景下存在动态范围有限和盲区更新不足的问题，而DAVIS事件相机的高输出率和HDR特性可提升跟踪性能，但需解决异步事件与强度图像的融合问题。
AI.method: 采用Harris算法从强度图像关键帧提取角点，通过匹配算法从事件流中提取事件角点；利用5x5邻域事件和随机霍夫变换计算速度与方向，实现异步跟踪直至下一关键帧。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在传统相机两次强度图像间的盲区内可更新角点位置达100次，显著提升动态场景下的跟踪频率和精度。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法有效融合事件与强度图像数据，克服了传统相机的局限性，在高动态范围和高频跟踪场景中具有应用潜力。

ai_content_json.method: 采用Harris算法从强度图像关键帧提取角点，通过匹配算法从事件流中提取事件角点；利用5x5邻域事件和随机霍夫变换计算速度与方向，实现异步跟踪直至下一关键帧。
ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，该方法在传统相机两次强度图像间的盲区内可更新角点位置达100次，显著提升动态场景下的跟踪频率和精度。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 所提算法有效融合事件与强度图像数据，克服了传统相机的局限性，在高动态范围和高频跟踪场景中具有应用潜力。

search_text: Asynchronous Corner Tracking Algorithm based on Lifetime of Events for DAVIS Cameras DAVIS相机基于事件生命周期的异步角点跟踪算法 Event cameras, i.e., the Dynamic and Active-pixel Vision Sensor (DAVIS) ones, capture the intensity changes in the scene and generates a stream of events in an asynchronous fashion. The output rate of such cameras can reach up to 10 million events per second in high dynamic environments. DAVIS cameras use novel vision sensors that mimic human eyes. Their attractive attributes, such as high output rate, High Dynamic Range (HDR), and high pixel bandwidth, make them an ideal solution for applications that require high-frequency tracking. Moreover, applications that operate in challenging lighting scenarios can exploit the high HDR of event cameras, i.e., 140 dB compared to 60 dB of traditional cameras. In this paper, a novel asynchronous corner tracking method is proposed that uses both events and intensity images captured by a DAVIS camera. The Harris algorithm is used to extract features, i.e., frame-corners from keyframes, i.e., intensity images. Afterward, a matching algorithm is used to extract event-corners from the stream of events. Events are solely used to perform asynchronous tracking until the next keyframe is captured. Neighboring events, within a window size of 5x5 pixels around the event-corner, are used to calculate the velocity and direction of extracted event-corners by fitting the 2D planar using a randomized Hough transform algorithm. Experimental evaluation showed that our approach is able to update the location of the extracted corners up to 100 times during the blind time of traditional cameras, i.e., between two consecutive intensity images. 事件摄像机，即动态和主动像素视觉传感器 (DAVIS)，捕获场景中的强度变化并以异步方式生成事件流。在高动态环境中，此类摄像机的输出速率可达每秒 1000 万个事件。 DAVIS 相机使用模仿人眼的新型视觉传感器。它们具有高输出率、高动态范围 (HDR) 和高像素带宽等极具吸引力的属性，使其成为需要高频跟踪的应用的理想解决方案。此外，在具有挑战性的照明场景中运行的应用程序可以利用事件摄像机的高 HDR，即 140 dB，而传统摄像机为 60 dB。本文提出了一种新颖的异步角点跟踪方法，该方法使用 DAVIS 相机捕获的事件和强度图像。 Harris 算法用于从关键帧（即强度图像）中提取特征，即帧角。然后，使用匹配算法从事件流中提取事件角点。事件仅用于执行异步跟踪，直到捕获下一个关键帧。事件角周围 5x5 像素窗口大小内的相邻事件用于通过使用随机霍夫变换算法拟合 2D 平面来计算提取的事件角的速度和方向。实验评估表明，我们的方法能够在传统相机的盲区内（即两个连续强度图像之间）更新提取的角点位置多达 100 次。 本文提出了一种基于事件生命周期的异步角点跟踪算法，结合DAVIS相机的事件流和强度图像进行高动态场景下的实时跟踪。 Sherif A. S. Mohamed,Jawad N. Yasin,Mohammad-Hashem Haghbayan,Antonio Miele,Jukka Heikkonen,Hannu Tenhunen,Juha Plosila cs.CV

authors_text: Jawad N. Yasin,Sherif A. S. Mohamed,Mohammad-hashem Haghbayan,Jukka Heikkonen,Hannu Tenhunen,Muhammad Mehboob Yasin,Juha Plosila
title: Night vision obstacle detection and avoidance based on Bio-Inspired Vision Sensors
title_zh: 基于仿生视觉传感器的夜视障碍物检测和规避
abstract: Moving towards autonomy, unmanned vehicles rely heavily on state-of-the-art collision avoidance systems (CAS). However, the detection of obstacles especially during night-time is still a challenging task since the lighting conditions are not sufficient for traditional cameras to function properly. Therefore, we exploit the powerful attributes of event-based cameras to perform obstacle detection in low lighting conditions. Event cameras trigger events asynchronously at high output temporal rate with high dynamic range of up to 120 $dB$. The algorithm filters background activity noise and extracts objects using robust Hough transform technique. The depth of each detected object is computed by triangulating 2D features extracted utilising LC-Harris. Finally, asynchronous adaptive collision avoidance (AACA) algorithm is applied for effective avoidance. Qualitative evaluation is compared using event-camera and traditional camera.
summary: Moving towards autonomy, unmanned vehicles rely heavily on state-of-the-art collision avoidance systems (CAS). However, the detection of obstacles especially during night-time is still a challenging task since the lighting conditions are not sufficient for traditional cameras to function properly. Therefore, we exploit the powerful attributes of event-based cameras to perform obstacle detection in low lighting conditions. Event cameras trigger events asynchronously at high output temporal rate with high dynamic range of up to 120 $dB$. The algorithm filters background activity noise and extracts objects using robust Hough transform technique. The depth of each detected object is computed by triangulating 2D features extracted utilising LC-Harris. Finally, asynchronous adaptive collision avoidance (AACA) algorithm is applied for effective avoidance. Qualitative evaluation is compared using event-camera and traditional camera.
abstract_zh: 无人驾驶车辆在走向自主化的过程中严重依赖最先进的防撞系统（CAS）。然而，由于照明条件不足以让传统摄像头正常工作，因此障碍物检测（尤其是在夜间）仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。因此，我们利用基于事件的摄像机的强大属性在低光照条件下执行障碍物检测。事件摄像机以高输出时间速率异步触发事件，动态范围高达 120 $dB$。该算法过滤背景活动噪声并使用稳健的霍夫变换技术提取对象。每个检测到的物体的深度是通过对利用 LC-Harris 提取的 2D 特征进行三角测量来计算的。最后，应用异步自适应碰撞避免（AACA）算法进行有效规避。使用事件相机和传统相机进行定性评估比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于生物启发视觉传感器的夜间障碍物检测与避障方法，利用事件相机解决传统相机在低光环境下的检测难题。
AI.motivation: 传统相机在夜间光照不足时无法有效检测障碍物，而事件相机具有高动态范围和异步触发特性，适合低光环境下的实时障碍物检测。
AI.method: 采用事件相机捕捉异步事件数据，通过背景噪声过滤和鲁棒霍夫变换提取物体；结合LC-Harris算法计算深度，最后应用异步自适应避障算法实现路径规划。
AI.result: 定性评估显示，事件相机在夜间障碍物检测与避障任务中相较传统相机具有更优的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 事件相机结合生物启发算法可有效提升夜间低光环境下的障碍物检测与避障能力，为自动驾驶提供可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Xiang Hao,Xiangdong Su,Radu Horaud,Xiaofei Li
title: FullSubNet: A Full-Band and Sub-Band Fusion Model for Real-Time Single-Channel Speech Enhancement
title_zh: FullSubNet：用于实时单通道语音增强的全带和子带融合模型
comment: 5 pages, submitted to 2021 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2021)
comments: 5 pages, submitted to 2021 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2021)
abstract: This paper proposes a full-band and sub-band fusion model, named as FullSubNet, for single-channel real-time speech enhancement. Full-band and sub-band refer to the models that input full-band and sub-band noisy spectral feature, output full-band and sub-band speech target, respectively. The sub-band model processes each frequency independently. Its input consists of one frequency and several context frequencies. The output is the prediction of the clean speech target for the corresponding frequency. These two types of models have distinct characteristics. The full-band model can capture the global spectral context and the long-distance cross-band dependencies. However, it lacks the ability to modeling signal stationarity and attending the local spectral pattern. The sub-band model is just the opposite. In our proposed FullSubNet, we connect a pure full-band model and a pure sub-band model sequentially and use practical joint training to integrate these two types of models' advantages. We conducted experiments on the DNS challenge (INTERSPEECH 2020) dataset to evaluate the proposed method. Experimental results show that full-band and sub-band information are complementary, and the FullSubNet can effectively integrate them. Besides, the performance of the FullSubNet also exceeds that of the top-ranked methods in the DNS Challenge (INTERSPEECH 2020).
summary: This paper proposes a full-band and sub-band fusion model, named as FullSubNet, for single-channel real-time speech enhancement. Full-band and sub-band refer to the models that input full-band and sub-band noisy spectral feature, output full-band and sub-band speech target, respectively. The sub-band model processes each frequency independently. Its input consists of one frequency and several context frequencies. The output is the prediction of the clean speech target for the corresponding frequency. These two types of models have distinct characteristics. The full-band model can capture the global spectral context and the long-distance cross-band dependencies. However, it lacks the ability to modeling signal stationarity and attending the local spectral pattern. The sub-band model is just the opposite. In our proposed FullSubNet, we connect a pure full-band model and a pure sub-band model sequentially and use practical joint training to integrate these two types of models' advantages. We conducted experiments on the DNS challenge (INTERSPEECH 2020) dataset to evaluate the proposed method. Experimental results show that full-band and sub-band information are complementary, and the FullSubNet can effectively integrate them. Besides, the performance of the FullSubNet also exceeds that of the top-ranked methods in the DNS Challenge (INTERSPEECH 2020).
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于单通道实时语音增强的全带和子带融合模型，称为FullSubNet。全带和子带分别是指输入全带和子带噪声频谱特征，输出全带和子带语音目标的模型。子带模型独立处理每个频率。其输入由一个频率和多个上下文频率组成。输出是相应频率的干净语音目标的预测。这两类模型具有鲜明的特点。全频段模型可以捕获全局光谱背景和长距离跨频段依赖性。然而，它缺乏对信号平稳性进行建模和关注局部频谱模式的能力。子带模型正好相反。在我们提出的FullSubNet中，我们依次连接纯全带模型和纯子带模型，并使用实际的联合训练来整合这两种模型的优点。我们在 DNS Challenge (INTERSPEECH 2020) 数据集上进行了实验来评估所提出的方法。实验结果表明，全带和子带信息是互补的，FullSubNet可以有效地整合它们。此外，FullSubNet的性能也超过了DNS挑战赛（INTERSPEECH 2020）中排名靠前的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FullSubNet的全频带与子频带融合模型，用于实时单通道语音增强。
AI.motivation: 全频带模型能捕捉全局频谱上下文但缺乏局部细节建模能力，子频带模型则相反，需结合两者优势以提升语音增强效果。
AI.method: 通过依次连接纯全频带模型与纯子频带模型，并采用实际联合训练方式整合两种模型的特性。
AI.result: 在DNS挑战赛数据集上实验表明，FullSubNet有效融合了全频带与子频带信息，性能超越了该竞赛的顶级方法。
AI.conclusion: 全频带与子频带信息具有互补性，FullSubNet通过融合两者优势实现了更优的实时语音增强效果。

However, it lacks the ability to modeling signal stationarity and attending the local spectral pattern. The sub-band model is just the opposite. In our proposed FullSubNet, we connect a pure full-band model and a pure sub-band model sequentially and use practical joint training to integrate these two types of models' advantages. We conducted experiments on the DNS challenge (INTERSPEECH 2020) dataset to evaluate the proposed method. Experimental results show that full-band and sub-band information are complementary, and the FullSubNet can effectively integrate them. Besides, the performance of the FullSubNet also exceeds that of the top-ranked methods in the DNS Challenge (INTERSPEECH 2020). 本文提出了一种用于单通道实时语音增强的全带和子带融合模型，称为FullSubNet。全带和子带分别是指输入全带和子带噪声频谱特征，输出全带和子带语音目标的模型。子带模型独立处理每个频率。其输入由一个频率和多个上下文频率组成。输出是相应频率的干净语音目标的预测。这两类模型具有鲜明的特点。全频段模型可以捕获全局光谱背景和长距离跨频段依赖性。然而，它缺乏对信号平稳性进行建模和关注局部频谱模式的能力。子带模型正好相反。在我们提出的FullSubNet中，我们依次连接纯全带模型和纯子带模型，并使用实际的联合训练来整合这两种模型的优点。我们在 DNS Challenge (INTERSPEECH 2020) 数据集上进行了实验来评估所提出的方法。实验结果表明，全带和子带信息是互补的，FullSubNet可以有效地整合它们。此外，FullSubNet的性能也超过了DNS挑战赛（INTERSPEECH 2020）中排名靠前的方法。 本文提出了一种名为FullSubNet的全频带与子频带融合模型，用于实时单通道语音增强。 Xiang Hao,Xiangdong Su,Radu Horaud,Xiaofei Li eess.AS,cs.SD,eess.SP

authors_text: Sherif A. S. Mohamed,Jawad N. Yasin,Mohammad-hashem Haghbayan,Antonio Miele,Jukka Heikkonen,Hannu Tenhunen,Juha Plosila
title: Dynamic Resource-aware Corner Detection for Bio-inspired Vision Sensors
title_zh: 适用于仿生视觉传感器的动态资源感知角点检测
comment: Accepted to 25th international conference on pattern recognition (ICPR 2020)
comments: Accepted to 25th international conference on pattern recognition (ICPR 2020)
abstract: Event-based cameras are vision devices that transmit only brightness changes with low latency and ultra-low power consumption. Such characteristics make event-based cameras attractive in the field of localization and object tracking in resource-constrained systems. Since the number of generated events in such cameras is huge, the selection and filtering of the incoming events are beneficial from both increasing the accuracy of the features and reducing the computational load. In this paper, we present an algorithm to detect asynchronous corners from a stream of events in real-time on embedded systems. The algorithm is called the Three Layer Filtering-Harris or TLF-Harris algorithm. The algorithm is based on an events' filtering strategy whose purpose is 1) to increase the accuracy by deliberately eliminating some incoming events, i.e., noise, and 2) to improve the real-time performance of the system, i.e., preserving a constant throughput in terms of input events per second, by discarding unnecessary events with a limited accuracy loss. An approximation of the Harris algorithm, in turn, is used to exploit its high-quality detection capability with a low-complexity implementation to enable seamless real-time performance on embedded computing platforms. The proposed algorithm is capable of selecting the best corner candidate among neighbors and achieves an average execution time savings of 59 % compared with the conventional Harris score. Moreover, our approach outperforms the competing methods, such as eFAST, eHarris, and FA-Harris, in terms of real-time performance, and surpasses Arc* in terms of accuracy.
summary: Event-based cameras are vision devices that transmit only brightness changes with low latency and ultra-low power consumption. Such characteristics make event-based cameras attractive in the field of localization and object tracking in resource-constrained systems. Since the number of generated events in such cameras is huge, the selection and filtering of the incoming events are beneficial from both increasing the accuracy of the features and reducing the computational load. In this paper, we present an algorithm to detect asynchronous corners from a stream of events in real-time on embedded systems. The algorithm is called the Three Layer Filtering-Harris or TLF-Harris algorithm. The algorithm is based on an events' filtering strategy whose purpose is 1) to increase the accuracy by deliberately eliminating some incoming events, i.e., noise, and 2) to improve the real-time performance of the system, i.e., preserving a constant throughput in terms of input events per second, by discarding unnecessary events with a limited accuracy loss. An approximation of the Harris algorithm, in turn, is used to exploit its high-quality detection capability with a low-complexity implementation to enable seamless real-time performance on embedded computing platforms. The proposed algorithm is capable of selecting the best corner candidate among neighbors and achieves an average execution time savings of 59 % compared with the conventional Harris score. Moreover, our approach outperforms the competing methods, such as eFAST, eHarris, and FA-Harris, in terms of real-time performance, and surpasses Arc* in terms of accuracy.
abstract_zh: 基于事件的相机是仅传输亮度变化的视觉设备，具有低延迟和超低功耗。这些特性使得基于事件的相机在资源受限系统中的定位和对象跟踪领域具有吸引力。由于此类相机中生成的事件数量巨大，因此对传入事件的选择和过滤有利于提高特征的准确性和减少计算负载。在本文中，我们提出了一种在嵌入式系统上实时检测事件流中的异步角点的算法。该算法称为三层过滤-Harris 或TLF-Harris 算法。该算法基于事件过滤策略，其目的是 1) 通过故意消除一些传入事件（即噪声）来提高准确性，2) 提高系统的实时性能，即通过丢弃精度损失有限的不必要事件来保持每秒输入事件的恒定吞吐量。哈里斯算法的近似值又被用来利用其高质量的检测能力和低复杂度的实现，以在嵌入式计算平台上实现无缝的实时性能。所提出的算法能够在邻居中选择最佳的角点候选，并且与传统的 Harris 评分相比，平均执行时间节省 59%。此外，我们的方法在实时性能方面优于 eFAST、eHarris 和 FA-Harris 等竞争方法，并在准确性方面超越 Arc*。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态资源感知的角点检测算法TLF-Harris，用于生物启发式视觉传感器的实时事件流处理。
AI.motivation: 事件相机产生的事件数据量巨大，传统方法难以兼顾实时性与检测精度，需设计高效过滤策略以降低计算负载并提升特征准确性。
AI.method: 提出三层过滤策略结合简化Harris算法，通过事件筛选消除噪声、维持恒定吞吐量，并在嵌入式平台实现低复杂度高精度的实时角点检测。
AI.result: 相较传统Harris算法平均节省59%执行时间，在实时性上优于eFAST、eHarris等方法，在精度上超越Arc*算法。
AI.conclusion: TLF-Harris算法通过事件过滤与算法简化，在资源受限系统中实现了兼顾实时性与检测精度的角点检测，为事件相机应用提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Jawad N. Yasin,Sherif A. S. Mohamed,Mohammad-Hashem Haghbayan,Jukka Heikkonen,Hannu Tenhunen,Muhammad Mehboob Yasin,Juha Plosila
title: Dynamic Formation Reshaping Based on Point Set Registration in a Swarm of Drones
title_zh: 基于点集配准的无人机群动态编队重塑
comment: Accepted to the Future of Information and Communication Conference (FICC) 2021
comments: Accepted to the Future of Information and Communication Conference (FICC) 2021
abstract: This work focuses on the formation reshaping in an optimized manner in autonomous swarm of drones. Here, the two main problems are: 1) how to break and reshape the initial formation in an optimal manner, and 2) how to do such reformation while minimizing the overall deviation of the drones and the overall time, i.e., without slowing down. To address the first problem, we introduce a set of routines for the drones/agents to follow while reshaping to a secondary formation shape. And the second problem is resolved by utilizing the temperature function reduction technique, originally used in the point set registration process. The goal is to be able to dynamically reform the shape of multi-agent based swarm in near-optimal manner while going through narrow openings between, for instance obstacles, and then bringing the agents back to their original shape after passing through the narrow passage using point set registration technique.
summary: This work focuses on the formation reshaping in an optimized manner in autonomous swarm of drones. Here, the two main problems are: 1) how to break and reshape the initial formation in an optimal manner, and 2) how to do such reformation while minimizing the overall deviation of the drones and the overall time, i.e., without slowing down. To address the first problem, we introduce a set of routines for the drones/agents to follow while reshaping to a secondary formation shape. And the second problem is resolved by utilizing the temperature function reduction technique, originally used in the point set registration process. The goal is to be able to dynamically reform the shape of multi-agent based swarm in near-optimal manner while going through narrow openings between, for instance obstacles, and then bringing the agents back to their original shape after passing through the narrow passage using point set registration technique.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的重点是在自主无人机群中以优化的方式重塑编队。这里，两个主要问题是：1）如何以最佳方式打破和重塑初始编队；2）如何在进行这种改造的同时最小化无人机的整体偏差和整体时间，即不减速。为了解决第一个问题，我们引入了一组无人机/特工在重塑为次级编队形状时要遵循的例程。第二个问题是通过利用最初用于点集配准过程的温度函数约简技术来解决的。目标是能够以接近最佳的方式动态地改变基于多智能体的群体的形状，同时穿过障碍物之间的狭窄开口，然后使用点集配准技术在穿过狭窄通道后将智能体恢复到原始形状。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了无人机群在通过狭窄通道时的动态编队重塑问题，提出基于点集配准技术的优化方法。
AI.motivation: 无人机群在复杂环境中需动态调整编队以通过障碍物，同时保持编队形态完整性和运动效率。
AI.method: 设计编队重塑规则并引入点集配准中的温度函数降维技术，实现编队变形与恢复的最优控制。
AI.result: 成功实现无人机群在狭窄通道中的编队动态调整，最小化整体偏移量和完成时间。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了多智能体编队在动态环境中的形态重塑问题，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Giulia Vezzani,Michael Neunert,Markus Wulfmeier,Rae Jeong,Thomas Lampe,Noah Siegel,Roland Hafner,Abbas Abdolmaleki,Martin Riedmiller,Francesco Nori
title: "What, not how": Solving an under-actuated insertion task from scratch
title_zh: “什么，而不是如何”：从头开始解决欠驱动的插入任务
abstract: Robot manipulation requires a complex set of skills that need to be carefully combined and coordinated to solve a task. Yet, most ReinforcementLearning (RL) approaches in robotics study tasks which actually consist only of a single manipulation skill, such as grasping an object or inserting a pre-grasped object. As a result the skill ('how' to solve the task) but not the actual goal of a complete manipulation ('what' to solve) is specified. In contrast, we study a complex manipulation goal that requires an agent to learn and combine diverse manipulation skills. We propose a challenging, highly under-actuated peg-in-hole task with a free, rotational asymmetrical peg, requiring a broad range of manipulation skills. While correct peg (re-)orientation is a requirement for successful insertion, there is no reward associated with it. Hence an agent needs to understand this pre-condition and learn the skill to fulfil it. The final insertion reward is sparse, allowing freedom in the solution and leading to complex emerging behaviour not envisioned during the task design. We tackle the problem in a multi-task RL framework using Scheduled Auxiliary Control (SAC-X) combined with Regularized Hierarchical Policy Optimization (RHPO) which successfully solves the task in simulation and from scratch on a single robot where data is severely limited.
summary: Robot manipulation requires a complex set of skills that need to be carefully combined and coordinated to solve a task. Yet, most ReinforcementLearning (RL) approaches in robotics study tasks which actually consist only of a single manipulation skill, such as grasping an object or inserting a pre-grasped object. As a result the skill ('how' to solve the task) but not the actual goal of a complete manipulation ('what' to solve) is specified. In contrast, we study a complex manipulation goal that requires an agent to learn and combine diverse manipulation skills. We propose a challenging, highly under-actuated peg-in-hole task with a free, rotational asymmetrical peg, requiring a broad range of manipulation skills. While correct peg (re-)orientation is a requirement for successful insertion, there is no reward associated with it. Hence an agent needs to understand this pre-condition and learn the skill to fulfil it. The final insertion reward is sparse, allowing freedom in the solution and leading to complex emerging behaviour not envisioned during the task design. We tackle the problem in a multi-task RL framework using Scheduled Auxiliary Control (SAC-X) combined with Regularized Hierarchical Policy Optimization (RHPO) which successfully solves the task in simulation and from scratch on a single robot where data is severely limited.
abstract_zh: 机器人操作需要一套复杂的技能，需要仔细组合和协调才能解决任务。然而，机器人研究任务中的大多数强化学习（RL）方法实际上只包含单一的操作技能，例如抓取物体或插入预先抓取的物体。因此，指定了技能（“如何”解决任务），但没有指定完整操作的实际目标（“解决什么”）。相比之下，我们研究一个复杂的操纵目标，需要代理学习并结合不同的操纵技能。我们提出了一项具有挑战性的、高度欠驱动的孔中钉任务，该任务具有自由、旋转不对称的钉，需要广泛的操纵技能。虽然正确的钉子（重新）方向是成功插入的必要条件，但没有与之相关的奖励。因此，智能体需要理解这个前提条件并学习实现它的技能。最终的插入奖励是稀疏的，允许解决方案自由并导致任务设计期间未预见到的复杂的新兴行为。我们使用计划辅助控制（SAC-X）与正则化分层策略优化（RHPO）相结合的多任务强化学习框架来解决该问题，成功地在数据严重有限的单个机器人上从头开始模拟解决了该任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从零开始解决欠驱动插孔任务的方法，要求智能体自主学习调整非对称圆柱体方位并完成插入。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法多聚焦单一操作技能（如抓取），而实际复杂任务需组合多种技能。传统方法仅规定操作方式（how）而非任务目标（what），导致难以解决需要多技能协同的复杂问题。
AI.method: 采用多任务强化学习框架，结合调度辅助控制（SAC-X）与正则化分层策略优化（RHPO）算法，在数据受限条件下实现任务求解。
AI.result: 算法在模拟环境中成功完成任务，并在单台实际机器人上实现从零训练的插孔操作，展现出复杂技能的自主学习能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过强调任务目标而非具体操作方式，提出的方法验证了复杂欠驱动任务的可行性，为机器人自主学习多技能组合提供了新思路。

search_text: "What, not how": Solving an under-actuated insertion task from scratch “什么，而不是如何”：从头开始解决欠驱动的插入任务 Robot manipulation requires a complex set of skills that need to be carefully combined and coordinated to solve a task. Yet, most ReinforcementLearning (RL) approaches in robotics study tasks which actually consist only of a single manipulation skill, such as grasping an object or inserting a pre-grasped object. As a result the skill ('how' to solve the task) but not the actual goal of a complete manipulation ('what' to solve) is specified. In contrast, we study a complex manipulation goal that requires an agent to learn and combine diverse manipulation skills. We propose a challenging, highly under-actuated peg-in-hole task with a free, rotational asymmetrical peg, requiring a broad range of manipulation skills. While correct peg (re-)orientation is a requirement for successful insertion, there is no reward associated with it. Hence an agent needs to understand this pre-condition and learn the skill to fulfil it. The final insertion reward is sparse, allowing freedom in the solution and leading to complex emerging behaviour not envisioned during the task design. We tackle the problem in a multi-task RL framework using Scheduled Auxiliary Control (SAC-X) combined with Regularized Hierarchical Policy Optimization (RHPO) which successfully solves the task in simulation and from scratch on a single robot where data is severely limited. 机器人操作需要一套复杂的技能，需要仔细组合和协调才能解决任务。然而，机器人研究任务中的大多数强化学习（RL）方法实际上只包含单一的操作技能，例如抓取物体或插入预先抓取的物体。因此，指定了技能（“如何”解决任务），但没有指定完整操作的实际目标（“解决什么”）。相比之下，我们研究一个复杂的操纵目标，需要代理学习并结合不同的操纵技能。我们提出了一项具有挑战性的、高度欠驱动的孔中钉任务，该任务具有自由、旋转不对称的钉，需要广泛的操纵技能。虽然正确的钉子（重新）方向是成功插入的必要条件，但没有与之相关的奖励。因此，智能体需要理解这个前提条件并学习实现它的技能。最终的插入奖励是稀疏的，允许解决方案自由并导致任务设计期间未预见到的复杂的新兴行为。我们使用计划辅助控制（SAC-X）与正则化分层策略优化（RHPO）相结合的多任务强化学习框架来解决该问题，成功地在数据严重有限的单个机器人上从头开始模拟解决了该任务。 本文提出一种从零开始解决欠驱动插孔任务的方法，要求智能体自主学习调整非对称圆柱体方位并完成插入。 Giulia Vezzani,Michael Neunert,Markus Wulfmeier,Rae Jeong,Thomas Lampe,Noah Siegel,Roland Hafner,Abbas Abdolmaleki,Martin Riedmiller,Francesco Nori cs.RO

authors_text: Nwigbo Kenule Tuador,Duong Hung Pham,Jérôme Michetti,Adrian Basarab,Denis Kouamé
title: A Novel Fast 3D Single Image Super-Resolution Algorithm
title_zh: 一种新颖的快速3D单图像超分辨率算法
abstract: This paper introduces a novel computationally efficient method of solving the 3D single image super-resolution (SR) problem, i.e., reconstruction of a high-resolution volume from its low-resolution counterpart. The main contribution lies in the original way of handling simultaneously the associated decimation and blurring operators, based on their underlying properties in the frequency domain. In particular, the proposed decomposition technique of the 3D decimation operator allows a straightforward implementation for Tikhonov regularization, and can be further used to take into consideration other regularization functions such as the total variation, enabling the computational cost of state-of-the-art algorithms to be considerably decreased. Numerical experiments carried out showed that the proposed approach outperforms existing 3D SR methods.
summary: This paper introduces a novel computationally efficient method of solving the 3D single image super-resolution (SR) problem, i.e., reconstruction of a high-resolution volume from its low-resolution counterpart. The main contribution lies in the original way of handling simultaneously the associated decimation and blurring operators, based on their underlying properties in the frequency domain. In particular, the proposed decomposition technique of the 3D decimation operator allows a straightforward implementation for Tikhonov regularization, and can be further used to take into consideration other regularization functions such as the total variation, enabling the computational cost of state-of-the-art algorithms to be considerably decreased. Numerical experiments carried out showed that the proposed approach outperforms existing 3D SR methods.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种计算高效的新方法来解决 3D 单图像超分辨率 (SR) 问题，即从低分辨率对应体重建高分辨率体积。主要贡献在于基于频域中的基本属性同时处理相关抽取和模糊运算符的原始方法。特别是，所提出的 3D 抽取算子分解技术允许直接实现 Tikhonov 正则化，并且可以进一步用于考虑其他正则化函数，例如总变分，从而大大降低最先进算法的计算成本。进行的数值实验表明，所提出的方法优于现有的 3D SR 方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效的3D单图像超分辨率算法，用于从低分辨率图像重建高分辨率体积。
AI.motivation: 现有3D超分辨率方法计算成本高，需更高效算法处理下采样和模糊操作。
AI.method: 基于频率域特性分解3D下采样算子，结合Tikhonov及总变异正则化，降低计算成本。
AI.result: 数值实验表明该方法在重建质量上优于现有3D超分辨率技术。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在保持高质量的同时显著提升计算效率，为3D超分辨率提供新思路。

authors_text: Arslan Ali,Andrea Migliorati,Tiziano Bianchi,Enrico Magli
title: Beyond cross-entropy: learning highly separable feature distributions for robust and accurate classification
title_zh: 超越交叉熵：学习高度可分离的特征分布以实现稳健且准确的分类
abstract: Deep learning has shown outstanding performance in several applications including image classification. However, deep classifiers are known to be highly vulnerable to adversarial attacks, in that a minor perturbation of the input can easily lead to an error. Providing robustness to adversarial attacks is a very challenging task especially in problems involving a large number of classes, as it typically comes at the expense of an accuracy decrease. In this work, we propose the Gaussian class-conditional simplex (GCCS) loss: a novel approach for training deep robust multiclass classifiers that provides adversarial robustness while at the same time achieving or even surpassing the classification accuracy of state-of-the-art methods. Differently from other frameworks, the proposed method learns a mapping of the input classes onto target distributions in a latent space such that the classes are linearly separable. Instead of maximizing the likelihood of target labels for individual samples, our objective function pushes the network to produce feature distributions yielding high inter-class separation. The mean values of the distributions are centered on the vertices of a simplex such that each class is at the same distance from every other class. We show that the regularization of the latent space based on our approach yields excellent classification accuracy and inherently provides robustness to multiple adversarial attacks, both targeted and untargeted, outperforming state-of-the-art approaches over challenging datasets.
summary: Deep learning has shown outstanding performance in several applications including image classification. However, deep classifiers are known to be highly vulnerable to adversarial attacks, in that a minor perturbation of the input can easily lead to an error. Providing robustness to adversarial attacks is a very challenging task especially in problems involving a large number of classes, as it typically comes at the expense of an accuracy decrease. In this work, we propose the Gaussian class-conditional simplex (GCCS) loss: a novel approach for training deep robust multiclass classifiers that provides adversarial robustness while at the same time achieving or even surpassing the classification accuracy of state-of-the-art methods. Differently from other frameworks, the proposed method learns a mapping of the input classes onto target distributions in a latent space such that the classes are linearly separable. Instead of maximizing the likelihood of target labels for individual samples, our objective function pushes the network to produce feature distributions yielding high inter-class separation. The mean values of the distributions are centered on the vertices of a simplex such that each class is at the same distance from every other class. We show that the regularization of the latent space based on our approach yields excellent classification accuracy and inherently provides robustness to multiple adversarial attacks, both targeted and untargeted, outperforming state-of-the-art approaches over challenging datasets.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在包括图像分类在内的多种应用中表现出了出色的性能。然而，众所周知，深度分类器非常容易受到对抗性攻击，因为输入的微小扰动很容易导致错误。为对抗性攻击提供鲁棒性是一项非常具有挑战性的任务，特别是在涉及大量类的问题中，因为它通常以准确性下降为代价。在这项工作中，我们提出了高斯类条件单纯形（GCCS）损失：一种训练深度鲁棒多类分类器的新方法，它提供对抗鲁棒性，同时实现甚至超越最先进方法的分类精度。与其他框架不同，所提出的方法学习输入类到潜在空间中目标分布的映射，使得类是线性可分离的。我们的目标函数不是最大化单个样本的目标标签的可能性，而是推动网络产生产生高类间分离的特征分布。分布的平均值以单纯形的顶点为中心，使得每个类与其他每个类的距离相同。我们表明，基于我们的方法的潜在空间正则化产生了出色的分类准确性，并且本质上为多种对抗性攻击（有针对性的和无针对性的）提供了鲁棒性，在具有挑战性的数据集上优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的损失函数GCCS，用于训练鲁棒且准确的多类分类器，解决对抗攻击问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度分类器在对抗攻击下易失效，且提升鲁棒性通常牺牲准确性，需寻找兼顾两者的方法。
AI.method: 通过学习潜在空间中线性可分的类分布，使类均值位于单纯形顶点，保证类间等距，提升分离度。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，GCCS方法在分类准确率和对抗鲁棒性均优于现有技术，尤其在复杂场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: GCCS通过潜在空间正则化，实现高准确率与对抗鲁棒性的统一，为多类分类提供新思路。

Providing robustness to adversarial attacks is a very challenging task especially in problems involving a large number of classes, as it typically comes at the expense of an accuracy decrease. In this work, we propose the Gaussian class-conditional simplex (GCCS) loss: a novel approach for training deep robust multiclass classifiers that provides adversarial robustness while at the same time achieving or even surpassing the classification accuracy of state-of-the-art methods. Differently from other frameworks, the proposed method learns a mapping of the input classes onto target distributions in a latent space such that the classes are linearly separable. Instead of maximizing the likelihood of target labels for individual samples, our objective function pushes the network to produce feature distributions yielding high inter-class separation. The mean values of the distributions are centered on the vertices of a simplex such that each class is at the same distance from every other class. We show that the regularization of the latent space based on our approach yields excellent classification accuracy and inherently provides robustness to multiple adversarial attacks, both targeted and untargeted, outperforming state-of-the-art approaches over challenging datasets. 深度学习在包括图像分类在内的多种应用中表现出了出色的性能。然而，众所周知，深度分类器非常容易受到对抗性攻击，因为输入的微小扰动很容易导致错误。为对抗性攻击提供鲁棒性是一项非常具有挑战性的任务，特别是在涉及大量类的问题中，因为它通常以准确性下降为代价。在这项工作中，我们提出了高斯类条件单纯形（GCCS）损失：一种训练深度鲁棒多类分类器的新方法，它提供对抗鲁棒性，同时实现甚至超越最先进方法的分类精度。与其他框架不同，所提出的方法学习输入类到潜在空间中目标分布的映射，使得类是线性可分离的。我们的目标函数不是最大化单个样本的目标标签的可能性，而是推动网络产生产生高类间分离的特征分布。分布的平均值以单纯形的顶点为中心，使得每个类与其他每个类的距离相同。我们表明，基于我们的方法的潜在空间正则化产生了出色的分类准确性，并且本质上为多种对抗性攻击（有针对性的和无针对性的）提供了鲁棒性，在具有挑战性的数据集上优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种新的损失函数GCCS，用于训练鲁棒且准确的多类分类器，解决对抗攻击问题。 Arslan Ali,Andrea Migliorati,Tiziano Bianchi,Enrico Magli cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Marc Alexa
title: Iteratively reweighted greedy set cover
title_zh: 迭代重新加权贪婪集覆盖
abstract: We empirically analyze a simple heuristic for large sparse set cover problems. It uses the weighted greedy algorithm as a basic building block. By multiplicative updates of the weights attached to the elements, the greedy solution is iteratively improved. The implementation of this algorithm is trivial and the algorithm is essentially free of parameters that would require tuning. More iterations can only improve the solution. This set of features makes the approach attractive for practical problems.
summary: We empirically analyze a simple heuristic for large sparse set cover problems. It uses the weighted greedy algorithm as a basic building block. By multiplicative updates of the weights attached to the elements, the greedy solution is iteratively improved. The implementation of this algorithm is trivial and the algorithm is essentially free of parameters that would require tuning. More iterations can only improve the solution. This set of features makes the approach attractive for practical problems.
abstract_zh: 我们对大型稀疏集覆盖问题的简单启发式进行了实证分析。它使用加权贪婪算法作为基本构建块。通过对元素的权重进行乘法更新，贪婪解决方案得到迭代改进。该算法的实现很简单，并且该算法基本上没有需要调整的参数。更多的迭代只能改进解决方案。这组特征使得该方法对于解决实际问题很有吸引力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于大规模稀疏集合覆盖问题的迭代加权贪心算法，并通过实证分析其有效性。
AI.motivation: 针对大规模稀疏集合覆盖问题，现有方法常因参数调整复杂或效率不足，本文旨在提出一种无需参数调优且易于实现的启发式算法。
AI.method: 该方法以加权贪心算法为基础，通过乘法更新元素权重，迭代优化贪心解，且算法实现简单，无需复杂参数调整。
AI.result: 实证结果表明，该算法在解决大规模稀疏集合覆盖问题时表现良好，且随着迭代次数增加，解的质量持续提升。
AI.conclusion: 该算法因其简单性和无需参数调整的优势，适用于实际中的大规模稀疏集合覆盖问题，且更多迭代可进一步优化解。

authors_text: Alban Laflaquière
title: Emergence of Spatial Coordinates via Exploration
title_zh: 通过探索产生空间坐标
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures, BabyMind Workshop at NeurIPS 2020
comments: 4 pages, 2 figures, BabyMind Workshop at NeurIPS 2020
abstract: Spatial knowledge is a fundamental building block for the development of advanced perceptive and cognitive abilities. Traditionally, in robotics, the Euclidean (x,y,z) coordinate system and the agent's forward model are defined a priori. We show that a naive agent can autonomously build an internal coordinate system, with the same dimension and metric regularity as the external space, simply by learning to predict the outcome of sensorimotor transitions in a self-supervised way.
summary: Spatial knowledge is a fundamental building block for the development of advanced perceptive and cognitive abilities. Traditionally, in robotics, the Euclidean (x,y,z) coordinate system and the agent's forward model are defined a priori. We show that a naive agent can autonomously build an internal coordinate system, with the same dimension and metric regularity as the external space, simply by learning to predict the outcome of sensorimotor transitions in a self-supervised way.
abstract_zh: 空间知识是发展高级感知和认知能力的基本组成部分。传统上，在机器人技术中，欧几里得（x，y，z）坐标系和代理的前向模型是先验定义的。我们证明，简单地通过学习以自我监督的方式预测感觉运动转换的结果，天真的智能体可以自主构建一个内部坐标系，其与外部空间具有相同的维度和度量规律。

AI.tldr: 研究智能体如何通过探索自主构建与外部空间一致的内部坐标系统
AI.motivation: 传统机器人依赖先验定义的坐标系，缺乏自主构建空间认知的能力，限制了其适应复杂环境的能力
AI.method: 通过自监督学习，让智能体预测传感器运动转换的结果，从而自主构建内部坐标系统
AI.result: 实验表明，智能体能够自主建立与外部空间在维度和度量规律上一致的内部坐标系统
AI.conclusion: 该研究为机器人自主构建空间认知能力提供了新方法，无需依赖先验坐标系

authors_text: Li Tao,Xueting Wang,Toshihiko Yamasaki
title: Pretext-Contrastive Learning: Toward Good Practices in Self-supervised Video Representation Leaning
title_zh: 借口对比学习：自监督视频表示学习的良好实践
abstract: Recently, pretext-task based methods are proposed one after another in self-supervised video feature learning. Meanwhile, contrastive learning methods also yield good performance. Usually, new methods can beat previous ones as claimed that they could capture "better" temporal information. However, there exist setting differences among them and it is hard to conclude which is better. It would be much more convincing in comparison if these methods have reached as closer to their performance limits as possible. In this paper, we start from one pretext-task baseline, exploring how far it can go by combining it with contrastive learning, data pre-processing, and data augmentation. A proper setting has been found from extensive experiments, with which huge improvements over the baselines can be achieved, indicating a joint optimization framework can boost both pretext task and contrastive learning. We denote the joint optimization framework as Pretext-Contrastive Learning (PCL). The other two pretext task baselines are used to validate the effectiveness of PCL. And we can easily outperform current state-of-the-art methods in the same training manner, showing the effectiveness and the generality of our proposal. It is convenient to treat PCL as a standard training strategy and apply it to many other works in self-supervised video feature learning.
summary: Recently, pretext-task based methods are proposed one after another in self-supervised video feature learning. Meanwhile, contrastive learning methods also yield good performance. Usually, new methods can beat previous ones as claimed that they could capture "better" temporal information. However, there exist setting differences among them and it is hard to conclude which is better. It would be much more convincing in comparison if these methods have reached as closer to their performance limits as possible. In this paper, we start from one pretext-task baseline, exploring how far it can go by combining it with contrastive learning, data pre-processing, and data augmentation. A proper setting has been found from extensive experiments, with which huge improvements over the baselines can be achieved, indicating a joint optimization framework can boost both pretext task and contrastive learning. We denote the joint optimization framework as Pretext-Contrastive Learning (PCL). The other two pretext task baselines are used to validate the effectiveness of PCL. And we can easily outperform current state-of-the-art methods in the same training manner, showing the effectiveness and the generality of our proposal. It is convenient to treat PCL as a standard training strategy and apply it to many other works in self-supervised video feature learning.
abstract_zh: 最近，在自监督视频特征学习中，基于借口任务的方法被相继提出。同时，对比学习方法也取得了良好的效果。通常，新方法可以击败以前的方法，据称它们可以捕获“更好”的时间信息。但它们之间存在设置差异，很难断定哪个更好。如果这些方法尽可能接近其性能极限，那么相比之下会更有说服力。在本文中，我们从一个借口任务基线开始，探索将其与对比学习、数据预处理和数据增强相结合可以走多远。通过大量的实验发现了一个合适的设置，可以在基线上实现巨大的改进，这表明联合优化框架可以促进借口任务和对比学习。我们将联合优化框架表示为借口对比学习（PCL）。另外两个借口任务基线用于验证 PCL 的有效性。而且我们可以以相同的训练方式轻松超越当前最先进的方法，显示了我们建议的有效性和通用性。可以很方便地将 PCL 作为标准训练策略并将其应用到自监督视频特征学习中的许多其他工作中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合预文本任务与对比学习的联合优化框架（PCL），以提升自监督视频表征学习的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有预文本任务和对比学习方法因设置差异难以公平比较，需探索更优的联合训练策略以接近性能上限。
AI.method: 从预文本任务基线出发，结合对比学习、数据预处理和增强技术，通过大量实验确定最佳设置，构建联合优化框架PCL。
AI.result: PCL在相同训练方式下显著优于基线和现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性与通用性。
AI.conclusion: PCL可作为标准训练策略，广泛应用于自监督视频表征学习领域。

We denote the joint optimization framework as Pretext-Contrastive Learning (PCL). The other two pretext task baselines are used to validate the effectiveness of PCL. And we can easily outperform current state-of-the-art methods in the same training manner, showing the effectiveness and the generality of our proposal. It is convenient to treat PCL as a standard training strategy and apply it to many other works in self-supervised video feature learning. 最近，在自监督视频特征学习中，基于借口任务的方法被相继提出。同时，对比学习方法也取得了良好的效果。通常，新方法可以击败以前的方法，据称它们可以捕获“更好”的时间信息。但它们之间存在设置差异，很难断定哪个更好。如果这些方法尽可能接近其性能极限，那么相比之下会更有说服力。在本文中，我们从一个借口任务基线开始，探索将其与对比学习、数据预处理和数据增强相结合可以走多远。通过大量的实验发现了一个合适的设置，可以在基线上实现巨大的改进，这表明联合优化框架可以促进借口任务和对比学习。我们将联合优化框架表示为借口对比学习（PCL）。另外两个借口任务基线用于验证 PCL 的有效性。而且我们可以以相同的训练方式轻松超越当前最先进的方法，显示了我们建议的有效性和通用性。可以很方便地将 PCL 作为标准训练策略并将其应用到自监督视频特征学习中的许多其他工作中。 本文提出了一种结合预文本任务与对比学习的联合优化框架（PCL），以提升自监督视频表征学习的效果。 Li Tao,Xueting Wang,Toshihiko Yamasaki cs.CV

authors_text: Siddharth Sigtia,John Bridle,Hywel Richards,Pascal Clark,Erik Marchi,Vineet Garg
title: Progressive Voice Trigger Detection: Accuracy vs Latency
title_zh: 渐进式语音触发检测：准确性与延迟
abstract: We present an architecture for voice trigger detection for virtual assistants. The main idea in this work is to exploit information in words that immediately follow the trigger phrase. We first demonstrate that by including more audio context after a detected trigger phrase, we can indeed get a more accurate decision. However, waiting to listen to more audio each time incurs a latency increase. Progressive Voice Trigger Detection allows us to trade-off latency and accuracy by accepting clear trigger candidates quickly, but waiting for more context to decide whether to accept more marginal examples. Using a two-stage architecture, we show that by delaying the decision for just 3% of detected true triggers in the test set, we are able to obtain a relative improvement of 66% in false rejection rate, while incurring only a negligible increase in latency.
summary: We present an architecture for voice trigger detection for virtual assistants. The main idea in this work is to exploit information in words that immediately follow the trigger phrase. We first demonstrate that by including more audio context after a detected trigger phrase, we can indeed get a more accurate decision. However, waiting to listen to more audio each time incurs a latency increase. Progressive Voice Trigger Detection allows us to trade-off latency and accuracy by accepting clear trigger candidates quickly, but waiting for more context to decide whether to accept more marginal examples. Using a two-stage architecture, we show that by delaying the decision for just 3% of detected true triggers in the test set, we are able to obtain a relative improvement of 66% in false rejection rate, while incurring only a negligible increase in latency.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于虚拟助理的语音触发检测的架构。这项工作的主要思想是利用紧随触发短语之后的单词中的信息。我们首先证明，通过在检测到的触发短语后包含更多音频上下文，我们确实可以获得更准确的决策。但是，每次等待收听更多音频都会导致延迟增加。渐进式语音触发检测允许我们通过快速接受明确的触发候选者来权衡延迟和准确性，但等待更多上下文来决定是否接受更多边缘示例。使用两阶段架构，我们表明，通过延迟测试集中仅检测到的 3% 的真实触发的决策，我们能够将错误拒绝率相对提高 66%，同时延迟的增加可以忽略不计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种语音触发检测架构，在准确率与延迟之间实现平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有语音助手触发检测方法难以同时兼顾高准确率与低延迟，需寻找二者间的有效权衡方案。
AI.method: 采用两阶段架构：快速接受明确触发候选，对边缘案例延迟决策以获取更多上下文信息。
AI.result: 仅延迟3%的触发决策即可使误拒率降低66%，且延迟增幅微乎其微。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过动态调整决策时机，在保持低延迟的同时显著提升检测鲁棒性，为语音助手优化提供新思路。

authors_text: Salman S. Khan,Varun Sundar,Vivek Boominathan,Ashok Veeraraghavan,Kaushik Mitra
title: FlatNet: Towards Photorealistic Scene Reconstruction from Lensless Measurements
title_zh: FlatNet：通过无镜头测量实现真实感场景重建
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI) 2020. Supplementary material attached. For project website, see https://siddiquesalman.github.io/flatnet/
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI) 2020. Supplementary material attached. For project website, see https://siddiquesalman.github.io/flatnet/
abstract: Lensless imaging has emerged as a potential solution towards realizing ultra-miniature cameras by eschewing the bulky lens in a traditional camera. Without a focusing lens, the lensless cameras rely on computational algorithms to recover the scenes from multiplexed measurements. However, the current iterative-optimization-based reconstruction algorithms produce noisier and perceptually poorer images. In this work, we propose a non-iterative deep learning based reconstruction approach that results in orders of magnitude improvement in image quality for lensless reconstructions. Our approach, called $\textit{FlatNet}$, lays down a framework for reconstructing high-quality photorealistic images from mask-based lensless cameras, where the camera's forward model formulation is known. FlatNet consists of two stages: (1) an inversion stage that maps the measurement into a space of intermediate reconstruction by learning parameters within the forward model formulation, and (2) a perceptual enhancement stage that improves the perceptual quality of this intermediate reconstruction. These stages are trained together in an end-to-end manner. We show high-quality reconstructions by performing extensive experiments on real and challenging scenes using two different types of lensless prototypes: one which uses a separable forward model and another, which uses a more general non-separable cropped-convolution model. Our end-to-end approach is fast, produces photorealistic reconstructions, and is easy to adopt for other mask-based lensless cameras.
summary: Lensless imaging has emerged as a potential solution towards realizing ultra-miniature cameras by eschewing the bulky lens in a traditional camera. Without a focusing lens, the lensless cameras rely on computational algorithms to recover the scenes from multiplexed measurements. However, the current iterative-optimization-based reconstruction algorithms produce noisier and perceptually poorer images. In this work, we propose a non-iterative deep learning based reconstruction approach that results in orders of magnitude improvement in image quality for lensless reconstructions. Our approach, called $\textit{FlatNet}$, lays down a framework for reconstructing high-quality photorealistic images from mask-based lensless cameras, where the camera's forward model formulation is known. FlatNet consists of two stages: (1) an inversion stage that maps the measurement into a space of intermediate reconstruction by learning parameters within the forward model formulation, and (2) a perceptual enhancement stage that improves the perceptual quality of this intermediate reconstruction. These stages are trained together in an end-to-end manner. We show high-quality reconstructions by performing extensive experiments on real and challenging scenes using two different types of lensless prototypes: one which uses a separable forward model and another, which uses a more general non-separable cropped-convolution model. Our end-to-end approach is fast, produces photorealistic reconstructions, and is easy to adopt for other mask-based lensless cameras.
abstract_zh: 无镜头成像已成为通过避开传统相机中笨重的镜头来实现超微型相机的潜在解决方案。由于没有聚焦镜头，无镜头相机依靠计算算法从多重测量中恢复场景。然而，当前基于迭代优化的重建算法会产生噪声更大、感知效果更差的图像。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于非迭代深度学习的重建方法，该方法可将无透镜重建的图像质量提高几个数量级。我们的方法称为 $\textit{FlatNet}$，建立了一个框架，用于从基于掩模的无镜头相机重建高质量的真实感图像，其中相机的前向模型公式是已知的。 FlatNet 包含两个阶段：(1) 反转阶段，通过学习正向模型公式中的参数将测量映射到中间重建空间；(2) 感知增强阶段，提高中间重建的感知质量。这些阶段以端到端的方式一起训练。我们通过使用两种不同类型的无透镜原型对真实且具有挑战性的场景进行广泛的实验来展示高质量的重建：一种使用可分离的前向模型，另一种使用更通用的不可分离的裁剪卷积模型。我们的端到端方法速度快，可以产生逼真的重建，并且很容易应用于其他基于掩模的无镜头相机。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的非迭代方法FlatNet，用于从无镜头相机的测量数据中重建高质量的逼真图像。
AI.motivation: 传统无镜头成像依赖迭代优化算法，但存在图像噪声大、视觉质量差的问题，亟需更高效且高质量的重建方法。
AI.method: FlatNet分为两阶段：1) 通过学习前向模型参数将测量数据映射到中间重建空间；2) 通过感知增强提升中间结果的视觉质量。采用端到端训练框架，适配两种无镜头相机模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，FlatNet在真实复杂场景中显著提升图像质量，重建速度快，且能适配不同类型的无镜头原型系统。
AI.conclusion: FlatNet通过深度学习端到端框架有效解决了无镜头成像的重建难题，为后续相关技术应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Paola Ardón,Maria E. Cabrera,Èric Pairet,Ronald P. A. Petrick,Subramanian Ramamoorthy,Katrin S. Lohan,Maya Cakmak
title: Affordance-Aware Handovers with Human Arm Mobility Constraints
title_zh: 具有人类手臂移动性限制的可供性感知切换
abstract: Reasoning about object handover configurations allows an assistive agent to estimate the appropriateness of handover for a receiver with different arm mobility capacities. While there are existing approaches for estimating the effectiveness of handovers, their findings are limited to users without arm mobility impairments and to specific objects. Therefore, current state-of-the-art approaches are unable to hand over novel objects to receivers with different arm mobility capacities. We propose a method that generalises handover behaviours to previously unseen objects, subject to the constraint of a user's arm mobility levels and the task context. We propose a heuristic-guided hierarchically optimised cost whose optimisation adapts object configurations for receivers with low arm mobility. This also ensures that the robot grasps consider the context of the user's upcoming task, i.e., the usage of the object. To understand preferences over handover configurations, we report on the findings of an online study, wherein we presented different handover methods, including ours, to $259$ users with different levels of arm mobility. We find that people's preferences over handover methods are correlated to their arm mobility capacities. We encapsulate these preferences in a statistical relational model (SRL) that is able to reason about the most suitable handover configuration given a receiver's arm mobility and upcoming task. Using our SRL model, we obtained an average handover accuracy of $90.8\%$ when generalising handovers to novel objects.
summary: Reasoning about object handover configurations allows an assistive agent to estimate the appropriateness of handover for a receiver with different arm mobility capacities. While there are existing approaches for estimating the effectiveness of handovers, their findings are limited to users without arm mobility impairments and to specific objects. Therefore, current state-of-the-art approaches are unable to hand over novel objects to receivers with different arm mobility capacities. We propose a heuristic-guided hierarchically optimised cost whose optimisation adapts object configurations for receivers with low arm mobility. This also ensures that the robot grasps consider the context of the user's upcoming task, i.e., the usage of the object.
