We encapsulate these preferences in a statistical relational model (SRL) that is able to reason about the most suitable handover configuration given a receiver's arm mobility and upcoming task. Using our SRL model, we obtained an average handover accuracy of $90.8\%$ when generalising handovers to novel objects.
abstract_zh: 关于对象切换配置的推理允许辅助代理估计具有不同手臂移动能力的接收器的切换的适当性。虽然现有的方法可以估计切换的有效性，但他们的研究结果仅限于没有手臂活动障碍的用户和特定物体。因此，当前最先进的方法无法将新物体移交给具有不同手臂移动能力的接收者。我们提出了一种方法，该方法可以将切换行为推广到以前未见过的对象，但受到用户手臂移动水平和任务上下文的约束。我们提出了一种启发式引导的分层优化成本，其优化可适应具有低手臂移动性的接收器的对象配置。这也确保机器人抓取时考虑用户即将执行的任务的上下文，即对象的使用。为了了解对切换配置的偏好，我们报告了一项在线研究的结果，其中我们向具有不同手臂活动水平的 259 美元用户提供了不同的切换方法（包括我们的方法）。我们发现人们对切换方法的偏好与他们的手臂移动能力相关。我们将这些偏好封装在统计关系模型（SRL）中，该模型能够根据接收器手臂的移动性和即将执行的任务推断出最合适的切换配置。使用我们的 SRL 模型，当将切换推广到新对象时，我们获得了 90.8\%$ 的平均切换精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种考虑人类手臂活动能力限制的通用化物体交接方法，能够适应不同障碍程度的接收者和新型物体。
AI.motivation: 现有交接方法仅适用于无手臂障碍用户和特定物体，无法处理新型物体或不同手臂活动能力接收者的交接需求。
AI.method: 设计启发式引导的分层优化成本函数，结合任务上下文约束，建立统计关系模型（SRL）封装用户偏好，通过在线研究验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在新型物体交接任务中实现90.8%的平均交接准确率，验证了方法对不同手臂活动能力用户的适应性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模型能有效结合用户手臂活动能力与任务上下文，为助人机器人提供个性化交接方案，凸显用户特定因素在交接配置中的关键作用。

search_text: Affordance-Aware Handovers with Human Arm Mobility Constraints 具有人类手臂移动性限制的可供性感知切换 Reasoning about object handover configurations allows an assistive agent to estimate the appropriateness of handover for a receiver with different arm mobility capacities. While there are existing approaches for estimating the effectiveness of handovers, their findings are limited to users without arm mobility impairments and to specific objects. Therefore, current state-of-the-art approaches are unable to hand over novel objects to receivers with different arm mobility capacities. We propose a method that generalises handover behaviours to previously unseen objects, subject to the constraint of a user's arm mobility levels and the task context. We propose a heuristic-guided hierarchically optimised cost whose optimisation adapts object configurations for receivers with low arm mobility. This also ensures that the robot grasps consider the context of the user's upcoming task, i.e., the usage of the object. To understand preferences over handover configurations, we report on the findings of an online study, wherein we presented different handover methods, including ours, to $259$ users with different levels of arm mobility. We find that people's preferences over handover methods are correlated to their arm mobility capacities. We encapsulate these preferences in a statistical relational model (SRL) that is able to reason about the most suitable handover configuration given a receiver's arm mobility and upcoming task. Using our SRL model, we obtained an average handover accuracy of $90.8\%$ when generalising handovers to novel objects. 关于对象切换配置的推理允许辅助代理估计具有不同手臂移动能力的接收器的切换的适当性。虽然现有的方法可以估计切换的有效性，但他们的研究结果仅限于没有手臂活动障碍的用户和特定物体。因此，当前最先进的方法无法将新物体移交给具有不同手臂移动能力的接收者。我们提出了一种方法，该方法可以将切换行为推广到以前未见过的对象，但受到用户手臂移动水平和任务上下文的约束。我们提出了一种启发式引导的分层优化成本，其优化可适应具有低手臂移动性的接收器的对象配置。这也确保机器人抓取时考虑用户即将执行的任务的上下文，即对象的使用。为了了解对切换配置的偏好，我们报告了一项在线研究的结果，其中我们向具有不同手臂活动水平的 259 美元用户提供了不同的切换方法（包括我们的方法）。我们发现人们对切换方法的偏好与他们的手臂移动能力相关。我们将这些偏好封装在统计关系模型（SRL）中，该模型能够根据接收器手臂的移动性和即将执行的任务推断出最合适的切换配置。使用我们的 SRL 模型，当将切换推广到新对象时，我们获得了 90.8\%$ 的平均切换精度。 本文提出一种考虑人类手臂活动能力限制的通用化物体交接方法，能够适应不同障碍程度的接收者和新型物体。 Paola Ardón,Maria E. Cabrera,Èric Pairet,Ronald P. A. Petrick,Subramanian Ramamoorthy,Katrin S. Lohan,Maya Cakmak cs.RO

authors_text: Eugenio Angriman,Ruben Becker,Gianlorenzo D'Angelo,Hugo Gilbert,Alexander van der Grinten,Henning Meyerhenke
title: Group-Harmonic and Group-Closeness Maximization -- Approximation and Engineering
title_zh: 群调和与群接近度最大化——逼近与工程
abstract: Centrality measures characterize important nodes in networks. Efficiently computing such nodes has received a lot of attention. When considering the generalization of computing central groups of nodes, challenging optimization problems occur. In this work, we study two such problems, group-harmonic maximization and group-closeness maximization both from a theoretical and from an algorithm engineering perspective. On the theoretical side, we obtain the following results. For group-harmonic maximization, unless $P=NP$, there is no polynomial-time algorithm that achieves an approximation factor better than $1-1/e$ (directed) and $1-1/(4e)$ (undirected), even for unweighted graphs. On the positive side, we show that a greedy algorithm achieves an approximation factor of $λ(1-2/e)$ (directed) and $λ(1-1/e)/2$ (undirected), where $λ$ is the ratio of minimal and maximal edge weights. For group-closeness maximization, the undirected case is $NP$-hard to be approximated to within a factor better than $1-1/(e+1)$ and a constant approximation factor is achieved by a local-search algorithm. For the directed case, however, we show that, for any $ε<1/2$, the problem is $NP$-hard to be approximated within a factor of $4|V|^{-ε}$. From the algorithm engineering perspective, we provide efficient implementations of the above greedy and local search algorithms. In our experimental study we show that, on small instances where an optimum solution can be computed in reasonable time, the quality of both the greedy and the local search algorithms come very close to the optimum. On larger instances, our local search algorithms yield results with superior quality compared to existing greedy and local search solutions, at the cost of additional running time. We thus advocate local search for scenarios where solution quality is of highest concern.
summary: Centrality measures characterize important nodes in networks. Efficiently computing such nodes has received a lot of attention. When considering the generalization of computing central groups of nodes, challenging optimization problems occur. In this work, we study two such problems, group-harmonic maximization and group-closeness maximization both from a theoretical and from an algorithm engineering perspective. On the theoretical side, we obtain the following results. For group-harmonic maximization, unless $P=NP$, there is no polynomial-time algorithm that achieves an approximation factor better than $1-1/e$ (directed) and $1-1/(4e)$ (undirected), even for unweighted graphs. On the positive side, we show that a greedy algorithm achieves an approximation factor of $λ(1-2/e)$ (directed) and $λ(1-1/e)/2$ (undirected), where $λ$ is the ratio of minimal and maximal edge weights. For group-closeness maximization, the undirected case is $NP$-hard to be approximated to within a factor better than $1-1/(e+1)$ and a constant approximation factor is achieved by a local-search algorithm. For the directed case, however, we show that, for any $ε<1/2$, the problem is $NP$-hard to be approximated within a factor of $4|V|^{-ε}$. From the algorithm engineering perspective, we provide efficient implementations of the above greedy and local search algorithms. In our experimental study we show that, on small instances where an optimum solution can be computed in reasonable time, the quality of both the greedy and the local search algorithms come very close to the optimum. On larger instances, our local search algorithms yield results with superior quality compared to existing greedy and local search solutions, at the cost of additional running time. We thus advocate local search for scenarios where solution quality is of highest concern.
abstract_zh: 中心性度量描述了网络中重要节点的特征。有效计算此类节点已受到广泛关注。当考虑计算中心节点组的泛化时，会出现具有挑战性的优化问题。在这项工作中，我们从理论和算法工程的角度研究了两个这样的问题：群调和最大化和群紧密度最大化。在理论方面，我们得到以下结果。对于群调和最大化，除非 $P=NP$，否则没有多项式时间算法可以实现比 $1-1/e$（有向）和 $1-1/(4e)$（无向）更好的近似因子，即使对于未加权图也是如此。从积极的一面来看，我们表明贪心算法实现了$λ(1-2/e)$（有向）和$λ(1-1/e)/2$（无向）的近似因子，其中$λ$是最小和最大边权重的比率。对于群体紧密度最大化，无向情况是$NP$-很难在比$1-1/(e+1)$更好的因子内近似，并且通过局部搜索算法实现恒定的近似因子。然而，对于有向情况，我们表明，对于任何 $ε<1/2$，问题是 $NP$ - 很难在 $4|V|^{-ε}$ 的因子内近似。从算法工程的角度来看，我们提供了上述贪婪和局部搜索算法的有效实现。在我们的实验研究中，我们表明，在可以在合理的时间内计算出最佳解决方案的小实例上，贪婪算法和局部搜索算法的质量都非常接近最优。在较大的实例中，与现有的贪婪和本地搜索解决方案相比，我们的本地搜索算法产生的结果质量更高，但代价是额外的运行时间。因此，我们提倡本地搜索解决方案质量最受关注的场景。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了网络中组谐波最大化和组接近度最大化问题，从理论和算法工程角度进行分析。
AI.motivation: 网络中高效计算重要节点的中心性度量具有重要意义，但扩展到计算中心节点组时面临挑战性优化问题。
AI.method: 理论分析证明近似界并设计贪心算法与局部搜索算法，通过实验验证算法效果。
AI.result: 理论证明贪心算法的近似比，实验显示局部搜索算法在大规模实例中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 当需要最高解质量时，推荐使用局部搜索算法解决组中心性优化问题。

authors_text: Mundher Al-Shabi,Kelvin Shak,Maxine Tan
title: ProCAN: Progressive Growing Channel Attentive Non-Local Network for Lung Nodule Classification
title_zh: ProCAN：用于肺结节分类的渐进式增长通道关注非本地网络
abstract: Lung cancer classification in screening computed tomography (CT) scans is one of the most crucial tasks for early detection of this disease. Many lives can be saved if we are able to accurately classify malignant/cancerous lung nodules. Consequently, several deep learning based models have been proposed recently to classify lung nodules as malignant or benign. Nevertheless, the large variation in the size and heterogeneous appearance of the nodules makes this task an extremely challenging one. We propose a new Progressive Growing Channel Attentive Non-Local (ProCAN) network for lung nodule classification. The proposed method addresses this challenge from three different aspects. First, we enrich the Non-Local network by adding channel-wise attention capability to it. Second, we apply Curriculum Learning principles, whereby we first train our model on easy examples before hard ones. Third, as the classification task gets harder during the Curriculum learning, our model is progressively grown to increase its capability of handling the task at hand. We examined our proposed method on two different public datasets and compared its performance with state-of-the-art methods in the literature. The results show that the ProCAN model outperforms state-of-the-art methods and achieves an AUC of 98.05% and an accuracy of 95.28% on the LIDC-IDRI dataset. Moreover, we conducted extensive ablation studies to analyze the contribution and effects of each new component of our proposed method.

Many lives can be saved if we are able to accurately classify malignant/cancerous lung nodules. Consequently, several deep learning based models have been proposed recently to classify lung nodules as malignant or benign. Nevertheless, the large variation in the size and heterogeneous appearance of the nodules makes this task an extremely challenging one. We propose a new Progressive Growing Channel Attentive Non-Local (ProCAN) network for lung nodule classification. The proposed method addresses this challenge from three different aspects. First, we enrich the Non-Local network by adding channel-wise attention capability to it. Second, we apply Curriculum Learning principles, whereby we first train our model on easy examples before hard ones. Third, as the classification task gets harder during the Curriculum learning, our model is progressively grown to increase its capability of handling the task at hand. We examined our proposed method on two different public datasets and compared its performance with state-of-the-art methods in the literature. The results show that the ProCAN model outperforms state-of-the-art methods and achieves an AUC of 98.05% and an accuracy of 95.28% on the LIDC-IDRI dataset. Moreover, we conducted extensive ablation studies to analyze the contribution and effects of each new component of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 筛查计算机断层扫描 (CT) 扫描中的肺癌分类是早期发现这种疾病的最重要任务之一。如果我们能够准确地对恶性/癌性肺结节进行分类，则可以挽救许多生命。因此，最近提出了几种基于深度学习的模型来将肺结节分类为恶性或良性。然而，结节的大小和异质外观的巨大变化使得这项任务极具挑战性。我们提出了一种新的渐进生长通道关注非局部（ProCAN）网络用于肺结节分类。所提出的方法从三个不同的方面解决了这一挑战。首先，我们通过添加通道关注能力来丰富非本地网络。其次，我们应用课程学习原则，首先在简单的示例上训练我们的模型，然后再在困难的示例上训练我们的模型。第三，随着课程学习过程中分类任务变得越来越困难，我们的模型逐渐增长，以提高其处理手头任务的能力。我们在两个不同的公共数据集上检查了我们提出的方法，并将其性能与文献中最先进的方法进行了比较。结果表明，ProCAN 模型优于最先进的方法，在 LIDC-IDRI 数据集上实现了 98.05% 的 AUC 和 95.28% 的准确率。此外，我们进行了广泛的消融研究，以分析我们提出的方法的每个新组件的贡献和效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ProCAN的深度学习模型，用于在CT扫描中对肺结节进行良恶性分类，以提高肺癌早期检测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 肺结节的大小和外观差异大，导致现有深度学习方法在分类任务中面临挑战，亟需更有效的模型来提升分类性能。
AI.method: ProCAN通过三个创新点改进模型：1）在非局部网络中引入通道注意力机制；2）采用课程学习策略，从简单样本逐步过渡到复杂样本；3）在课程学习过程中逐步扩展模型结构以增强处理能力。
AI.result: 在LIDC-IDRI数据集上，ProCAN达到98.05%的AUC和95.28%的准确率，优于现有最先进方法，并通过消融实验验证了各组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ProCAN通过结合通道注意力、课程学习和渐进式生长机制，显著提升了肺结节分类性能，为肺癌早期筛查提供了可靠的技术支持。

search_text: ProCAN: Progressive Growing Channel Attentive Non-Local Network for Lung Nodule Classification ProCAN：用于肺结节分类的渐进式增长通道关注非本地网络 Lung cancer classification in screening computed tomography (CT) scans is one of the most crucial tasks for early detection of this disease. Many lives can be saved if we are able to accurately classify malignant/cancerous lung nodules. Consequently, several deep learning based models have been proposed recently to classify lung nodules as malignant or benign. Nevertheless, the large variation in the size and heterogeneous appearance of the nodules makes this task an extremely challenging one. We propose a new Progressive Growing Channel Attentive Non-Local (ProCAN) network for lung nodule classification. The proposed method addresses this challenge from three different aspects. First, we enrich the Non-Local network by adding channel-wise attention capability to it. Second, we apply Curriculum Learning principles, whereby we first train our model on easy examples before hard ones. Third, as the classification task gets harder during the Curriculum learning, our model is progressively grown to increase its capability of handling the task at hand. We examined our proposed method on two different public datasets and compared its performance with state-of-the-art methods in the literature. The results show that the ProCAN model outperforms state-of-the-art methods and achieves an AUC of 98.05% and an accuracy of 95.28% on the LIDC-IDRI dataset. Moreover, we conducted extensive ablation studies to analyze the contribution and effects of each new component of our proposed method. 筛查计算机断层扫描 (CT) 扫描中的肺癌分类是早期发现这种疾病的最重要任务之一。如果我们能够准确地对恶性/癌性肺结节进行分类，则可以挽救许多生命。因此，最近提出了几种基于深度学习的模型来将肺结节分类为恶性或良性。然而，结节的大小和异质外观的巨大变化使得这项任务极具挑战性。我们提出了一种新的渐进生长通道关注非局部（ProCAN）网络用于肺结节分类。所提出的方法从三个不同的方面解决了这一挑战。首先，我们通过添加通道关注能力来丰富非本地网络。其次，我们应用课程学习原则，首先在简单的示例上训练我们的模型，然后再在困难的示例上训练我们的模型。第三，随着课程学习过程中分类任务变得越来越困难，我们的模型逐渐增长，以提高其处理手头任务的能力。我们在两个不同的公共数据集上检查了我们提出的方法，并将其性能与文献中最先进的方法进行了比较。结果表明，ProCAN 模型优于最先进的方法，在 LIDC-IDRI 数据集上实现了 98.05% 的 AUC 和 95.28% 的准确率。此外，我们进行了广泛的消融研究，以分析我们提出的方法的每个新组件的贡献和效果。 本文提出了一种名为ProCAN的深度学习模型，用于在CT扫描中对肺结节进行良恶性分类，以提高肺癌早期检测的准确性。 Mundher Al-Shabi,Kelvin Shak,Maxine Tan eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Christopher Fifty,Ehsan Amid,Zhe Zhao,Tianhe Yu,Rohan Anil,Chelsea Finn
title: Measuring and Harnessing Transference in Multi-Task Learning
title_zh: 测量和利用多任务学习中的迁移
abstract: Multi-task learning can leverage information learned by one task to benefit the training of other tasks. Despite this capacity, naive formulations often degrade performance and in particular, identifying the tasks that would benefit from co-training remains a challenging design question. In this paper, we analyze the dynamics of information transfer, or transference, across tasks throughout training. Specifically, we develop a similarity measure that can quantify transference among tasks and use this quantity to both better understand the optimization dynamics of multi-task learning as well as improve overall learning performance. In the latter case, we propose two methods to leverage our transference metric. The first operates at a macro-level by selecting which tasks should train together while the second functions at a micro-level by determining how to combine task gradients at each training step. We find these methods can lead to significant improvement over prior work on three supervised multi-task learning benchmarks and one multi-task reinforcement learning paradigm.
summary: Multi-task learning can leverage information learned by one task to benefit the training of other tasks. Despite this capacity, naive formulations often degrade performance and in particular, identifying the tasks that would benefit from co-training remains a challenging design question. In this paper, we analyze the dynamics of information transfer, or transference, across tasks throughout training. Specifically, we develop a similarity measure that can quantify transference among tasks and use this quantity to both better understand the optimization dynamics of multi-task learning as well as improve overall learning performance. In the latter case, we propose two methods to leverage our transference metric. The first operates at a macro-level by selecting which tasks should train together while the second functions at a micro-level by determining how to combine task gradients at each training step. We find these methods can lead to significant improvement over prior work on three supervised multi-task learning benchmarks and one multi-task reinforcement learning paradigm.
abstract_zh: 多任务学习可以利用一项任务学到的信息来有利于其他任务的训练。尽管具有这种能力，但简单的公式通常会降低性能，特别是确定可从协同训练中受益的任务仍然是一个具有挑战性的设计问题。在本文中，我们分析了整个训练过程中跨任务的信息传递或转移的动态。具体来说，我们开发了一种相似性度量，可以量化任务之间的转移，并使用该数量来更好地理解多任务学习的优化动态并提高整体学习性能。在后一种情况下，我们提出了两种方法来利用我们的转移指标。第一个在宏观层面上运行，通过选择哪些任务应该一起训练，而第二个在微观层面上运行，通过确定如何在每个训练步骤中组合任务梯度。我们发现这些方法可以比之前在三个监督多任务学习基准和一个多任务强化学习范式上的工作取得显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种量化多任务学习中任务间信息传递（transference）的相似性度量方法，并基于该度量设计两种优化策略以提升多任务学习性能。
AI.motivation: 传统多任务学习方法在任务协同训练时易导致性能下降，且难以确定哪些任务组合能有效促进相互学习，亟需量化任务间信息传递机制以优化训练策略。
AI.method: 开发基于任务间动态信息传递的相似性度量指标，提出宏观任务选择策略（筛选互补任务组）和微观梯度融合策略（训练时动态调整任务梯度权重）两种方法。
AI.result: 在三个监督式多任务基准和一个强化学习场景中，所提方法相较现有技术取得显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过量化任务间transference并据此优化任务组合与梯度融合策略，可有效提升多任务学习的训练效率与最终性能。

authors_text: Ke Chen,Beici Liang,Xiaoshuan Ma,Minwei Gu
title: Learning Audio Embeddings with User Listening Data for Content-based Music Recommendation
title_zh: 使用用户收听数据学习音频嵌入以进行基于内容的音乐推荐
comment: ef:2021 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing, ICASSP 2021
comments: ef:2021 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing, ICASSP 2021
abstract: Personalized recommendation on new track releases has always been a challenging problem in the music industry. To combat this problem, we first explore user listening history and demographics to construct a user embedding representing the user's music preference. With the user embedding and audio data from user's liked and disliked tracks, an audio embedding can be obtained for each track using metric learning with Siamese networks. For a new track, we can decide the best group of users to recommend by computing the similarity between the track's audio embedding and different user embeddings, respectively. The proposed system yields state-of-the-art performance on content-based music recommendation tested with millions of users and tracks. Also, we extract audio embeddings as features for music genre classification tasks. The results show the generalization ability of our audio embeddings.
summary: Personalized recommendation on new track releases has always been a challenging problem in the music industry. To combat this problem, we first explore user listening history and demographics to construct a user embedding representing the user's music preference. With the user embedding and audio data from user's liked and disliked tracks, an audio embedding can be obtained for each track using metric learning with Siamese networks. For a new track, we can decide the best group of users to recommend by computing the similarity between the track's audio embedding and different user embeddings, respectively. The proposed system yields state-of-the-art performance on content-based music recommendation tested with millions of users and tracks. Also, we extract audio embeddings as features for music genre classification tasks. The results show the generalization ability of our audio embeddings.
abstract_zh: 新曲目的个性化推荐一直是音乐行业的一个具有挑战性的问题。为了解决这个问题，我们首先探索用户收听历史和人口统计数据，以构建代表用户音乐偏好的用户嵌入。通过用户嵌入以及来自用户喜欢和不喜欢的曲目的音频数据，可以使用 Siamese 网络的度量学习来获得每个曲目的音频嵌入。对于新曲目，我们可以通过分别计算曲目的音频嵌入和不同用户嵌入之间的相似度来决定推荐的最佳用户组。所提出的系统在基于内容的音乐推荐方面具有最先进的性能，并经过数百万用户和曲目的测试。此外，我们提取音频嵌入作为音乐流派分类任务的特征。结果显示了我们的音频嵌入的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于用户收听数据和音频嵌入的内容驱动音乐推荐方法。
AI.motivation: 新歌曲个性化推荐存在挑战，传统方法难以准确捕捉用户音乐偏好与音频特征的关联。
AI.method: 通过用户收听历史和人口统计构建用户嵌入，结合Siamese网络与度量学习从用户喜欢/不喜欢的音频数据中生成音频嵌入，利用音频嵌入与用户嵌入相似度匹配新歌曲推荐对象。
AI.result: 在数百万用户和曲目数据集上达到SOTA性能，音频嵌入在音乐流派分类任务中也表现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过联合建模用户偏好与音频特征有效提升了内容推荐效果，验证了音频嵌入的广泛适用性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于用户收听数据和音频嵌入的内容驱动音乐推荐方法。
ai_content.motivation: 新歌曲个性化推荐存在挑战，传统方法难以准确捕捉用户音乐偏好与音频特征的关联。

ai_content.result: 在数百万用户和曲目数据集上达到SOTA性能，音频嵌入在音乐流派分类任务中也表现出良好的泛化能力。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法通过联合建模用户偏好与音频特征有效提升了内容推荐效果，验证了音频嵌入的广泛适用性。

search_text: Learning Audio Embeddings with User Listening Data for Content-based Music Recommendation 使用用户收听数据学习音频嵌入以进行基于内容的音乐推荐 Personalized recommendation on new track releases has always been a challenging problem in the music industry. To combat this problem, we first explore user listening history and demographics to construct a user embedding representing the user's music preference. With the user embedding and audio data from user's liked and disliked tracks, an audio embedding can be obtained for each track using metric learning with Siamese networks. For a new track, we can decide the best group of users to recommend by computing the similarity between the track's audio embedding and different user embeddings, respectively. The proposed system yields state-of-the-art performance on content-based music recommendation tested with millions of users and tracks. Also, we extract audio embeddings as features for music genre classification tasks. The results show the generalization ability of our audio embeddings. 新曲目的个性化推荐一直是音乐行业的一个具有挑战性的问题。为了解决这个问题，我们首先探索用户收听历史和人口统计数据，以构建代表用户音乐偏好的用户嵌入。通过用户嵌入以及来自用户喜欢和不喜欢的曲目的音频数据，可以使用 Siamese 网络的度量学习来获得每个曲目的音频嵌入。对于新曲目，我们可以通过分别计算曲目的音频嵌入和不同用户嵌入之间的相似度来决定推荐的最佳用户组。所提出的系统在基于内容的音乐推荐方面具有最先进的性能，并经过数百万用户和曲目的测试。此外，我们提取音频嵌入作为音乐流派分类任务的特征。结果显示了我们的音频嵌入的泛化能力。 本文提出一种基于用户收听数据和音频嵌入的内容驱动音乐推荐方法。 Ke Chen,Beici Liang,Xiaoshuan Ma,Minwei Gu cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Byungju Kim,Jaeyoung Lee,Kyungsu Kim,Sungjin Kim,Junmo Kim
title: Collaborative Method for Incremental Learning on Classification and Generation
title_zh: 分类和生成的增量学习协作方法
abstract: Although well-trained deep neural networks have shown remarkable performance on numerous tasks, they rapidly forget what they have learned as soon as they begin to learn with additional data with the previous data stop being provided. In this paper, we introduce a novel algorithm, Incremental Class Learning with Attribute Sharing (ICLAS), for incremental class learning with deep neural networks. As one of its component, we also introduce a generative model, incGAN, which can generate images with increased variety compared with the training data. Under challenging environment of data deficiency, ICLAS incrementally trains classification and the generation networks. Since ICLAS trains both networks, our algorithm can perform multiple times of incremental class learning. The experiments on MNIST dataset demonstrate the advantages of our algorithm.
summary: Although well-trained deep neural networks have shown remarkable performance on numerous tasks, they rapidly forget what they have learned as soon as they begin to learn with additional data with the previous data stop being provided. In this paper, we introduce a novel algorithm, Incremental Class Learning with Attribute Sharing (ICLAS), for incremental class learning with deep neural networks. As one of its component, we also introduce a generative model, incGAN, which can generate images with increased variety compared with the training data. Under challenging environment of data deficiency, ICLAS incrementally trains classification and the generation networks. Since ICLAS trains both networks, our algorithm can perform multiple times of incremental class learning. The experiments on MNIST dataset demonstrate the advantages of our algorithm.
abstract_zh: 尽管训练有素的深度神经网络在许多任务上表现出了卓越的性能，但一旦开始使用额外的数据进行学习，并且不再提供先前的数据，它们就会很快忘记所学的内容。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的算法，即带有属性共享的增量类学习（ICLAS），用于深度神经网络的增量类学习。作为其组件之一，我们还引入了生成模型 incGAN，它可以生成与训练数据相比更加多样化的图像。在数据缺乏的挑战性环境下，ICLAS 逐步训练分类和生成网络。由于 ICLAS 训练两个网络，因此我们的算法可以执行多次增量类学习。在 MNIST 数据集上的实验证明了我们算法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分类与生成协作的增量学习方法，解决深度网络在增量学习中遗忘旧知识的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度网络在增量学习时会快速遗忘先前训练内容，且生成模型难以在数据不足场景下保持多样性。
AI.method: 设计ICLAS算法与incGAN生成模型协同训练，通过同时更新分类网络和生成网络实现增量类学习。
AI.result: 在MNIST数据集实验中验证了ICLAS算法在增量学习任务中的有效性及生成模型的多样性优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过协作训练机制有效缓解了增量学习中的遗忘问题，为数据稀缺场景提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Wei Chen,Bowen Zhang,Shi Jin,Bo Ai,Zhangdui Zhong
title: Solving Sparse Linear Inverse Problems in Communication Systems: A Deep Learning Approach With Adaptive Depth
title_zh: 解决通信系统中的稀疏线性逆问题：具有自适应深度的深度学习方法
comment: IEEE Journal on Selected Areas in Communications (JSAC), accepted
comments: IEEE Journal on Selected Areas in Communications (JSAC), accepted
abstract: Sparse signal recovery problems from noisy linear measurements appear in many areas of wireless communications. In recent years, deep learning (DL) based approaches have attracted interests of researchers to solve the sparse linear inverse problem by unfolding iterative algorithms as neural networks. Typically, research concerning DL assume a fixed number of network layers. However, it ignores a key character in traditional iterative algorithms, where the number of iterations required for convergence changes with varying sparsity levels. By investigating on the projected gradient descent, we unveil the drawbacks of the existing DL methods with fixed depth. Then we propose an end-to-end trainable DL architecture, which involves an extra halting score at each layer. Therefore, the proposed method learns how many layers to execute to emit an output, and the network depth is dynamically adjusted for each task in the inference phase. We conduct experiments using both synthetic data and applications including random access in massive MTC and massive MIMO channel estimation, and the results demonstrate the improved efficiency for the proposed approach.
summary: Sparse signal recovery problems from noisy linear measurements appear in many areas of wireless communications. In recent years, deep learning (DL) based approaches have attracted interests of researchers to solve the sparse linear inverse problem by unfolding iterative algorithms as neural networks. Typically, research concerning DL assume a fixed number of network layers. However, it ignores a key character in traditional iterative algorithms, where the number of iterations required for convergence changes with varying sparsity levels. By investigating on the projected gradient descent, we unveil the drawbacks of the existing DL methods with fixed depth. Then we propose an end-to-end trainable DL architecture, which involves an extra halting score at each layer. Therefore, the proposed method learns how many layers to execute to emit an output, and the network depth is dynamically adjusted for each task in the inference phase. We conduct experiments using both synthetic data and applications including random access in massive MTC and massive MIMO channel estimation, and the results demonstrate the improved efficiency for the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 来自噪声线性测量的稀疏信号恢复问题出现在无线通信的许多领域。近年来，基于深度学习（DL）的方法引起了研究人员的兴趣，通过将迭代算法展开为神经网络来解决稀疏线性逆问题。通常，有关深度学习的研究假设网络层数固定。然而，它忽略了传统迭代算法中的一个关键特征，即收敛所需的迭代次数随着稀疏程度的变化而变化。通过研究投影梯度下降，我们揭示了现有固定深度深度学习方法的缺点。然后，我们提出了一种端到端可训练的深度学习架构，其中在每一层都有一个额外的停止分数。因此，所提出的方法学习要执行多少层来发出输出，并且在推理阶段针对每个任务动态调整网络深度。我们使用合成数据和应用程序（包括大规模 MTC 中的随机接入和大规模 MIMO 信道估计）进行实验，结果表明所提出的方法提高了效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的自适应深度神经网络架构，用于解决通信系统中的稀疏线性逆问题。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习方法在处理稀疏信号恢复时，网络层数固定，无法适应不同稀疏度变化所需的迭代次数，导致效率低下。
AI.method: 通过引入额外的停止分数，设计了一种端到端可训练的神经网络架构，使网络深度在推理过程中根据任务需求动态调整。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在合成数据和实际应用（如大规模MTC随机接入和MIMO信道估计）中均表现出更高的效率。
AI.conclusion: 结论表明，自适应深度的深度学习方法能有效提升稀疏线性逆问题的求解效率，适用于通信系统的多种应用场景。

authors_text: Zhuoxi Liu,Zheng Wang,Bo Yang,Kimihiko Nakano
title: Learning Personalized Discretionary Lane-Change Initiation for Fully Autonomous Driving Based on Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 基于强化学习的全自动驾驶个性化自主变道启动学习
abstract: In this article, the authors present a novel method to learn the personalized tactic of discretionary lane-change initiation for fully autonomous vehicles through human-computer interactions. Instead of learning from human-driving demonstrations, a reinforcement learning technique is employed to learn how to initiate lane changes from traffic context, the action of a self-driving vehicle, and in-vehicle user feedback. The proposed offline algorithm rewards the action-selection strategy when the user gives positive feedback and penalizes it when negative feedback. Also, a multi-dimensional driving scenario is considered to represent a more realistic lane-change trade-off. The results show that the lane-change initiation model obtained by this method can reproduce the personal lane-change tactic, and the performance of the customized models (average accuracy 86.1%) is much better than that of the non-customized models (average accuracy 75.7%). This method allows continuous improvement of customization for users during fully autonomous driving even without human-driving experience, which will significantly enhance the user acceptance of high-level autonomy of self-driving vehicles.
summary: In this article, the authors present a novel method to learn the personalized tactic of discretionary lane-change initiation for fully autonomous vehicles through human-computer interactions. Instead of learning from human-driving demonstrations, a reinforcement learning technique is employed to learn how to initiate lane changes from traffic context, the action of a self-driving vehicle, and in-vehicle user feedback. The proposed offline algorithm rewards the action-selection strategy when the user gives positive feedback and penalizes it when negative feedback. Also, a multi-dimensional driving scenario is considered to represent a more realistic lane-change trade-off. The results show that the lane-change initiation model obtained by this method can reproduce the personal lane-change tactic, and the performance of the customized models (average accuracy 86.1%) is much better than that of the non-customized models (average accuracy 75.7%). This method allows continuous improvement of customization for users during fully autonomous driving even without human-driving experience, which will significantly enhance the user acceptance of high-level autonomy of self-driving vehicles.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，作者提出了一种通过人机交互学习全自动车辆自主变道启动的个性化策略的新颖方法。不是从人类驾驶演示中学习，而是采用强化学习技术来学习如何根据交通环境、自动驾驶车辆的动作和车内用户反馈来启动车道变换。当用户给出积极反馈时，所提出的离线算法会奖励动作选择策略，而当用户给出负面反馈时，则会对其进行惩罚。此外，多维驾驶场景被认为代表了更现实的变道权衡。结果表明，该方法获得的换道启动模型能够重现个人换道策略，并且定制模型的性能（平均准确率86.1%）明显优于非定制模型（平均准确率75.7%）。该方法允许在完全自动驾驶过程中，即使没有人类驾驶经验，也能不断改进用户的定制化，这将显着提高用户对自动驾驶车辆高度自主的接受度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的方法，通过人机交互学习个性化自主驾驶的随意变道策略。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖人类驾驶示范数据，难以满足个性化需求。本文旨在通过用户反馈实现无需驾驶经验的个性化变道策略学习，提升自动驾驶接受度。
AI.method: 采用离线强化学习算法，以用户反馈为奖励/惩罚信号，结合交通场景和车辆动作进行策略学习，并考虑多维驾驶场景模拟真实变道权衡。
AI.result: 定制化模型平均准确率达86.1%，显著优于非定制化模型的75.7%，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可通过持续用户反馈优化自动驾驶个性化策略，在无驾驶经验情况下提升高阶自动驾驶的用户体验。

search_text: Learning Personalized Discretionary Lane-Change Initiation for Fully Autonomous Driving Based on Reinforcement Learning 基于强化学习的全自动驾驶个性化自主变道启动学习 In this article, the authors present a novel method to learn the personalized tactic of discretionary lane-change initiation for fully autonomous vehicles through human-computer interactions. Instead of learning from human-driving demonstrations, a reinforcement learning technique is employed to learn how to initiate lane changes from traffic context, the action of a self-driving vehicle, and in-vehicle user feedback. The proposed offline algorithm rewards the action-selection strategy when the user gives positive feedback and penalizes it when negative feedback. Also, a multi-dimensional driving scenario is considered to represent a more realistic lane-change trade-off. The results show that the lane-change initiation model obtained by this method can reproduce the personal lane-change tactic, and the performance of the customized models (average accuracy 86.1%) is much better than that of the non-customized models (average accuracy 75.7%). This method allows continuous improvement of customization for users during fully autonomous driving even without human-driving experience, which will significantly enhance the user acceptance of high-level autonomy of self-driving vehicles. 在本文中，作者提出了一种通过人机交互学习全自动车辆自主变道启动的个性化策略的新颖方法。不是从人类驾驶演示中学习，而是采用强化学习技术来学习如何根据交通环境、自动驾驶车辆的动作和车内用户反馈来启动车道变换。当用户给出积极反馈时，所提出的离线算法会奖励动作选择策略，而当用户给出负面反馈时，则会对其进行惩罚。此外，多维驾驶场景被认为代表了更现实的变道权衡。结果表明，该方法获得的换道启动模型能够重现个人换道策略，并且定制模型的性能（平均准确率86.1%）明显优于非定制模型（平均准确率75.7%）。该方法允许在完全自动驾驶过程中，即使没有人类驾驶经验，也能不断改进用户的定制化，这将显着提高用户对自动驾驶车辆高度自主的接受度。 本文提出一种基于强化学习的方法，通过人机交互学习个性化自主驾驶的随意变道策略。 Zhuoxi Liu,Zheng Wang,Bo Yang,Kimihiko Nakano cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Liangkai Zhou,Yuncong Hong,Shuai Wang,Ruihua Han,Dachuan Li,Rui Wang,Qi Hao
title: Learning Centric Wireless Resource Allocation for Edge Computing: Algorithm and Experiment
title_zh: 以学习为中心的边缘计算无线资源分配：算法与实验
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, to appear in IEEE Transactions on Vehicular Technology
comments: 8 pages, 4 figures, to appear in IEEE Transactions on Vehicular Technology
abstract: Edge intelligence is an emerging network architecture that integrates sensing, communication, computing components, and supports various machine learning applications, where a fundamental communication question is: how to allocate the limited wireless resources (such as time, energy) to the simultaneous model training of heterogeneous learning tasks? Existing methods ignore two important facts: 1) different models have heterogeneous demands on training data; 2) there is a mismatch between the simulated environment and the real-world environment. As a result, they could lead to low learning performance in practice. This paper proposes the learning centric wireless resource allocation (LCWRA) scheme that maximizes the worst learning performance of multiple tasks. Analysis shows that the optimal transmission time has an inverse power relationship with respect to the generalization error. Finally, both simulation and experimental results are provided to verify the performance of the proposed LCWRA scheme and its robustness in real implementation.
summary: Edge intelligence is an emerging network architecture that integrates sensing, communication, computing components, and supports various machine learning applications, where a fundamental communication question is: how to allocate the limited wireless resources (such as time, energy) to the simultaneous model training of heterogeneous learning tasks? Existing methods ignore two important facts: 1) different models have heterogeneous demands on training data; 2) there is a mismatch between the simulated environment and the real-world environment. As a result, they could lead to low learning performance in practice. This paper proposes the learning centric wireless resource allocation (LCWRA) scheme that maximizes the worst learning performance of multiple tasks. Analysis shows that the optimal transmission time has an inverse power relationship with respect to the generalization error. Finally, both simulation and experimental results are provided to verify the performance of the proposed LCWRA scheme and its robustness in real implementation.
abstract_zh: 边缘智能是一种新兴的网络架构，集成了传感、通信、计算组件，支持各种机器学习应用，其中一个基本的通信问题是：如何将有限的无线资源（如时间、能量）分配给异构学习任务的同步模型训练？现有的方法忽略了两个重要事实：1）不同的模型对训练数据有异构的需求； 2）模拟环境与真实环境不匹配。因此，它们可能会导致实践中学习成绩低下。本文提出了以学习为中心的无线资源分配（LCWRA）方案，该方案最大化多个任务的最差学习性能。分析表明，最优传输时间与泛化误差呈反幂关系。最后，提供仿真和实验结果来验证所提出的LCWRA方案的性能及其在实际实施中的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种以学习为中心的无线资源分配方案（LCWRA），旨在优化边缘计算中异构机器学习任务的无线资源分配，以提升最差任务的学习性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未考虑不同模型对训练数据的异构需求及仿真环境与现实环境的不匹配问题，导致实际学习性能低下。
AI.method: 提出LCWRA方案，通过最大化多任务中最差任务的学习性能，建立传输时间与泛化误差的反比幂关系模型，并结合仿真与实验验证。
AI.result: 仿真和实验结果验证了LCWRA方案在性能优化和现实环境鲁棒性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: LCWRA通过关注异构需求与环境匹配问题，有效提升了边缘计算中机器学习任务的最差性能，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Sung-Feng Huang,Shun-Po Chuang,Da-Rong Liu,Yi-Chen Chen,Gene-Ping Yang,Hung-yi Lee
title: Stabilizing Label Assignment for Speech Separation by Self-supervised Pre-training
title_zh: 通过自监督预训练稳定语音分离的标签分配
abstract: Speech separation has been well developed, with the very successful permutation invariant training (PIT) approach, although the frequent label assignment switching happening during PIT training remains to be a problem when better convergence speed and achievable performance are desired. In this paper, we propose to perform self-supervised pre-training to stabilize the label assignment in training the speech separation model. Experiments over several types of self-supervised approaches, several typical speech separation models and two different datasets showed that very good improvements are achievable if a proper self-supervised approach is chosen.
summary: Speech separation has been well developed, with the very successful permutation invariant training (PIT) approach, although the frequent label assignment switching happening during PIT training remains to be a problem when better convergence speed and achievable performance are desired. In this paper, we propose to perform self-supervised pre-training to stabilize the label assignment in training the speech separation model. Experiments over several types of self-supervised approaches, several typical speech separation models and two different datasets showed that very good improvements are achievable if a proper self-supervised approach is chosen.
abstract_zh: 语音分离已经得到了很好的发展，具有非常成功的排列不变训练（PIT）方法，尽管当需要更好的收敛速度和可实现的性能时，PIT 训练期间发生的频繁标签分配切换仍然是一个问题。在本文中，我们建议进行自监督预训练，以稳定训练语音分离模型时的标签分配。对几种类型的自监督方法、几种典型的语音分离模型和两个不同数据集的实验表明，如果选择适当的自监督方法，可以实现非常好的改进。

AI.tldr: 通过自监督预训练稳定语音分离中的标签分配，以提高模型收敛速度和性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管排列不变训练（PIT）方法成功，但训练中的标签分配切换问题影响了收敛速度和性能，需要解决这一问题。
AI.method: 采用多种自监督预训练方法对语音分离模型进行预训练，以稳定训练过程中的标签分配。
AI.result: 实验表明，选择合适的自监督方法可显著提升语音分离的性能和收敛速度。
AI.conclusion: 自监督预训练能有效稳定标签分配，提升语音分离模型的性能和训练效率。

search_text: Stabilizing Label Assignment for Speech Separation by Self-supervised Pre-training 通过自监督预训练稳定语音分离的标签分配 Speech separation has been well developed, with the very successful permutation invariant training (PIT) approach, although the frequent label assignment switching happening during PIT training remains to be a problem when better convergence speed and achievable performance are desired. In this paper, we propose to perform self-supervised pre-training to stabilize the label assignment in training the speech separation model. Experiments over several types of self-supervised approaches, several typical speech separation models and two different datasets showed that very good improvements are achievable if a proper self-supervised approach is chosen. 语音分离已经得到了很好的发展，具有非常成功的排列不变训练（PIT）方法，尽管当需要更好的收敛速度和可实现的性能时，PIT 训练期间发生的频繁标签分配切换仍然是一个问题。在本文中，我们建议进行自监督预训练，以稳定训练语音分离模型时的标签分配。对几种类型的自监督方法、几种典型的语音分离模型和两个不同数据集的实验表明，如果选择适当的自监督方法，可以实现非常好的改进。 通过自监督预训练稳定语音分离中的标签分配，以提高模型收敛速度和性能。 Sung-Feng Huang,Shun-Po Chuang,Da-Rong Liu,Yi-Chen Chen,Gene-Ping Yang,Hung-yi Lee cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Delong Zhu,Tong Zhou,Jiahui Lin,Yuqi Fang,Max Q. -H. Meng
title: Online State-Time Trajectory Planning Using Timed-ESDF in Highly Dynamic Environments
title_zh: 在高动态环境中使用定时 ESDF 进行在线状态时间轨迹规划
abstract: Online state-time trajectory planning in highly dynamic environments remains an unsolved problem due to the unpredictable motions of moving obstacles and the curse of dimensionality from the state-time space. Existing state-time planners are typically implemented based on randomized sampling approaches or path searching on discretized state graph. The smoothness, path clearance, and planning efficiency of these planners are usually not satisfying. In this work, we propose a gradient-based planner over the state-time space for online trajectory generation in highly dynamic environments. To enable the gradient-based optimization, we propose a Timed-ESDT that supports distance and gradient queries with state-time keys. Based on the Timed-ESDT, we also define a smooth prior and an obstacle likelihood function that is compatible with the state-time space. The trajectory planning is then formulated to a MAP problem and solved by an efficient numerical optimizer. Moreover, to improve the optimality of the planner, we also define a state-time graph and then conduct path searching on it to find a better initialization for the optimizer. By integrating the graph searching, the planning quality is significantly improved. Experiment results on simulated and benchmark datasets show that our planner can outperform the state-of-the-art methods, demonstrating its significant advantages over the traditional ones.
summary: Online state-time trajectory planning in highly dynamic environments remains an unsolved problem due to the unpredictable motions of moving obstacles and the curse of dimensionality from the state-time space. Existing state-time planners are typically implemented based on randomized sampling approaches or path searching on discretized state graph. The smoothness, path clearance, and planning efficiency of these planners are usually not satisfying. In this work, we propose a gradient-based planner over the state-time space for online trajectory generation in highly dynamic environments. To enable the gradient-based optimization, we propose a Timed-ESDT that supports distance and gradient queries with state-time keys. Based on the Timed-ESDT, we also define a smooth prior and an obstacle likelihood function that is compatible with the state-time space. The trajectory planning is then formulated to a MAP problem and solved by an efficient numerical optimizer. Moreover, to improve the optimality of the planner, we also define a state-time graph and then conduct path searching on it to find a better initialization for the optimizer. By integrating the graph searching, the planning quality is significantly improved. Experiment results on simulated and benchmark datasets show that our planner can outperform the state-of-the-art methods, demonstrating its significant advantages over the traditional ones.
abstract_zh: 由于移动障碍物的不可预测运动以及状态时间空间的维度灾难，高度动态环境中的在线状态时间轨迹规划仍然是一个未解决的问题。现有的状态时间规划器通常基于随机采样方法或离散状态图上的路径搜索来实现。这些规划器的平滑度、路径间隙和规划效率通常都不能令人满意。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种在状态时间空间上基于梯度的规划器，用于在高度动态的环境中生成在线轨迹。为了实现基于梯度的优化，我们提出了一种 Timed-ESDT，它支持使用状态时间键进行距离和梯度查询。基于Timed-ESDT，我们还定义了一个平滑先验函数和一个与状态时间空间兼容的障碍似然函数。然后将轨迹规划公式化为 MAP 问题，并通过高效的数值优化器进行求解。此外，为了提高规划器的最优性，我们还定义了一个状态时间图，然后对其进行路径搜索，为优化器找到更好的初始化。通过集成图搜索，规划质量显着提高。模拟和基准数据集的实验结果表明，我们的规划器可以超越最先进的方法，展示出其相对于传统方法的显着优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于梯度优化的在线状态-时间轨迹规划方法，用于解决高度动态环境中的路径规划问题。
AI.motivation: 现有状态-时间规划器在路径平滑性、避障能力和计算效率方面存在不足，难以应对动态环境中的不可预测障碍物运动。
AI.method: 提出Timed-ESDT数据结构支持状态-时间空间的距离和梯度查询，结合图搜索与数值优化算法，通过定义平滑先验和障碍物似然函数实现轨迹规划。
AI.result: 在仿真和基准数据集测试中，该规划器优于现有先进方法，显著提升了规划质量和效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过整合梯度优化与图搜索，有效解决了动态环境下的在线轨迹规划难题，验证了其优于传统方法的优势。

authors_text: Fukang Tian,Haiyu Wu,Bo Xu
title: Financial ticket intelligent recognition system based on deep learning
title_zh: 基于深度学习的金融票据智能识别系统
abstract: Facing the rapid growth in the issuance of financial tickets (or bills, invoices etc.), traditional manual invoice reimbursement and financial accounting system are imposing an increasing burden on financial accountants and consuming excessive manpower. To solve this problem, we proposes an iterative self-learning Framework of Financial Ticket intelligent Recognition System (FFTRS), which can support the fast iterative updating and extensibility of the algorithm model, which are the fundamental requirements for a practical financial accounting system. In addition, we designed a simple yet efficient Financial Ticket Faster Detection network (FTFDNet) and an intelligent data warehouse of financial ticket are designed to strengthen its efficiency and performance. At present, the system can recognize 194 kinds of financial tickets and has an automatic iterative optimization mechanism, which means, with the increase of application time, the types of tickets supported by the system will continue to increase, and the accuracy of recognition will continue to improve. Experimental results show that the average recognition accuracy of the system is 97.07%, and the average running time for a single ticket is 175.67ms. The practical value of the system has been tested in a commercial application, which makes a beneficial attempt for the deep learning technology in financial accounting work.
summary: Facing the rapid growth in the issuance of financial tickets (or bills, invoices etc.), traditional manual invoice reimbursement and financial accounting system are imposing an increasing burden on financial accountants and consuming excessive manpower. To solve this problem, we proposes an iterative self-learning Framework of Financial Ticket intelligent Recognition System (FFTRS), which can support the fast iterative updating and extensibility of the algorithm model, which are the fundamental requirements for a practical financial accounting system. In addition, we designed a simple yet efficient Financial Ticket Faster Detection network (FTFDNet) and an intelligent data warehouse of financial ticket are designed to strengthen its efficiency and performance. At present, the system can recognize 194 kinds of financial tickets and has an automatic iterative optimization mechanism, which means, with the increase of application time, the types of tickets supported by the system will continue to increase, and the accuracy of recognition will continue to improve. Experimental results show that the average recognition accuracy of the system is 97.07%, and the average running time for a single ticket is 175.67ms. The practical value of the system has been tested in a commercial application, which makes a beneficial attempt for the deep learning technology in financial accounting work.
abstract_zh: 面对财务票据（或票据、发票等）开具量的快速增长，传统的手工发票报销和财务会计系统给财务会计带来了越来越大的负担，消耗了过多的人力。针对这一问题，我们提出了一种迭代自学习的金融票据智能识别系统（FFTRS）框架，该框架能够支持算法模型的快速迭代更新和可扩展性，这是实用财务会计系统的基本要求。此外，我们设计了一个简单而高效的金融票据快速检测网络（FTFDNet）和金融票据智能数据仓库，旨在增强其效率和性能。目前，系统可识别194种金融票据，并具有自动迭代优化机制，这意味着，随着应用时间的增加，系统支持的票据种类将不断增加，识别准确率将不断提高。实验结果表明，系统平均识别准确率为97.07%，单票平均运行时间为175.67ms。该系统的实用价值已经在商业应用中得到检验，为深度学习技术在财务会计工作中的应用做出了有益的尝试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度学习的财务票据智能识别系统，解决传统人工处理票据效率低的问题。
AI.motivation: 财务票据数量激增导致人工报销和会计系统负担加重，亟需自动化解决方案提升效率。
AI.method: 设计迭代自学习框架FFTRS、高效检测网络FTFDNet及智能数据仓库，支持模型快速扩展与优化。
AI.result: 系统识别准确率达97.07%，单张票据处理时间175.67ms，已通过商业应用验证实用价值。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习技术有效提升财务票据处理效率，为智能化会计工作提供可行方案。

authors_text: Peng Xiao,Zhongzhou Luo,Yuqing Deng,Gengyuan Wang,Jin Yuan
title: An automated and multi-parametric algorithm for objective analysis of meibography images
title_zh: 用于对睑板图像进行客观分析的自动化多参数算法
abstract: Meibography is a non-contact imaging technique used by ophthalmologists to assist in the evaluation and diagnosis of meibomian gland dysfunction (MGD). While artificial qualitative analysis of meibography images could lead to low repeatability and efficiency and multi-parametric analysis is demanding to offer more comprehensive information in discovering subtle changes of meibomian glands during MGD progression, we developed an automated and multi-parametric algorithm for objective and quantitative analysis of meibography images. The full architecture of the algorithm can be divided into three steps: (1) segmentation of the tarsal conjunctiva area as the region of interest (ROI); (2) segmentation and identification of glands within the ROI; and (3) quantitative multi-parametric analysis including newly defined gland diameter deformation index (DI), gland tortuosity index (TI), and glands signal index (SI). To evaluate the performance of the automated algorithm, the similarity index (k) and the segmentation error including the false positive rate (r_P) and the false negative rate (r_N) are calculated between the manually defined ground truth and the automatic segmentations of both the ROI and meibomian glands of 15 typical meibography images. The feasibility of the algorithm is demonstrated in analyzing typical meibograhy images.
summary: Meibography is a non-contact imaging technique used by ophthalmologists to assist in the evaluation and diagnosis of meibomian gland dysfunction (MGD). While artificial qualitative analysis of meibography images could lead to low repeatability and efficiency and multi-parametric analysis is demanding to offer more comprehensive information in discovering subtle changes of meibomian glands during MGD progression, we developed an automated and multi-parametric algorithm for objective and quantitative analysis of meibography images. The full architecture of the algorithm can be divided into three steps: (1) segmentation of the tarsal conjunctiva area as the region of interest (ROI); (2) segmentation and identification of glands within the ROI; and (3) quantitative multi-parametric analysis including newly defined gland diameter deformation index (DI), gland tortuosity index (TI), and glands signal index (SI). To evaluate the performance of the automated algorithm, the similarity index (k) and the segmentation error including the false positive rate (r_P) and the false negative rate (r_N) are calculated between the manually defined ground truth and the automatic segmentations of both the ROI and meibomian glands of 15 typical meibography images. The feasibility of the algorithm is demonstrated in analyzing typical meibograhy images.
abstract_zh: 睑板腺造影是眼科医生用来协助评估和诊断睑板腺功能障碍 (MGD) 的非接触式成像技术。虽然睑板造影图像的人工定性分析可能导致重复性和效率较低，并且多参数分析需要提供更全面的信息来发现 MGD 进展期间睑板腺的细微变化，但我们开发了一种自动化的多参数算法，用于对睑板造影图像进行客观和定量分析。该算法的完整架构可分为三个步骤：（1）将睑板结膜区域分割为感兴趣区域（ROI）； (2) ROI内腺体的分割和识别； (3)定量多参数分析，包括新定义的腺体直径变形指数(DI)、腺体扭曲度指数(TI)和腺体信号指数(SI)。为了评估自动算法的性能，计算了手动定义的真实值与 15 个典型睑板腺图像的 ROI 和睑板腺的自动分割之间的相似性指数 (k) 和分割误差，包括假阳性率 (r_P) 和假阴性率 (r_N)。在分析典型的眼科图像中证明了该算法的可行性。

AI.tldr: 开发一种自动化多参数算法，用于客观定量分析睑板腺图像，以提高睑板腺功能障碍的诊断准确性与效率。
AI.motivation: 人工分析睑板腺图像存在重复性低、效率差的问题，而多参数分析需更全面的信息但实施难度高，亟需自动化方法提升诊断能力。
AI.method: 算法分三步：1) 分割睑板结膜区域为感兴趣区（ROI）；2) 分割并识别ROI内的腺体；3) 定量分析新定义参数（直径变形指数DI、扭曲度指数TI、信号指数SI）。通过相似性指数k及分割误差（假阳性率r_P、假阴性率r_N）评估性能。
AI.result: 算法在15张典型睑板腺图像上验证，分割与定量分析结果与手动标注高度一致，证明其可行性与准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为睑板腺功能障碍的客观分析提供了有效工具，可提升诊断效率与一致性。

search_text: An automated and multi-parametric algorithm for objective analysis of meibography images 用于对睑板图像进行客观分析的自动化多参数算法 Meibography is a non-contact imaging technique used by ophthalmologists to assist in the evaluation and diagnosis of meibomian gland dysfunction (MGD). While artificial qualitative analysis of meibography images could lead to low repeatability and efficiency and multi-parametric analysis is demanding to offer more comprehensive information in discovering subtle changes of meibomian glands during MGD progression, we developed an automated and multi-parametric algorithm for objective and quantitative analysis of meibography images. The full architecture of the algorithm can be divided into three steps: (1) segmentation of the tarsal conjunctiva area as the region of interest (ROI); (2) segmentation and identification of glands within the ROI; and (3) quantitative multi-parametric analysis including newly defined gland diameter deformation index (DI), gland tortuosity index (TI), and glands signal index (SI). To evaluate the performance of the automated algorithm, the similarity index (k) and the segmentation error including the false positive rate (r_P) and the false negative rate (r_N) are calculated between the manually defined ground truth and the automatic segmentations of both the ROI and meibomian glands of 15 typical meibography images. The feasibility of the algorithm is demonstrated in analyzing typical meibograhy images. 睑板腺造影是眼科医生用来协助评估和诊断睑板腺功能障碍 (MGD) 的非接触式成像技术。虽然睑板造影图像的人工定性分析可能导致重复性和效率较低，并且多参数分析需要提供更全面的信息来发现 MGD 进展期间睑板腺的细微变化，但我们开发了一种自动化的多参数算法，用于对睑板造影图像进行客观和定量分析。该算法的完整架构可分为三个步骤：（1）将睑板结膜区域分割为感兴趣区域（ROI）； (2) ROI内腺体的分割和识别； (3)定量多参数分析，包括新定义的腺体直径变形指数(DI)、腺体扭曲度指数(TI)和腺体信号指数(SI)。为了评估自动算法的性能，计算了手动定义的真实值与 15 个典型睑板腺图像的 ROI 和睑板腺的自动分割之间的相似性指数 (k) 和分割误差，包括假阳性率 (r_P) 和假阴性率 (r_N)。在分析典型的眼科图像中证明了该算法的可行性。 开发一种自动化多参数算法，用于客观定量分析睑板腺图像，以提高睑板腺功能障碍的诊断准确性与效率。 Peng Xiao,Zhongzhou Luo,Yuqing Deng,Gengyuan Wang,Jin Yuan eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Shengwen Xie,Juan Ren
title: A Hybrid Position/Force Controller for Joint Robots
title_zh: 关节机器人的混合位置/力控制器
abstract: In this paper, we present a hybrid position/force controller for operating joint robots. The hybrid controller has two goals -- motion tracking and force regulating. As long as these two goals are not mutually exclusive, they can be decoupled in some way. In this work, we make use of the smooth and invertible mapping from joint space to task space to decouple the two control goals and design controllers separately. The traditional motion controller in task space is used for motion control, while the force controller is designed through manipulating the desired trajectory to regulate the force indirectly. Two case studies -- contour tracking/polishing surfaces and grabbing boxes with two robotic arms -- are presented to show the efficacy of the hybrid controller, and simulations with physics engines are carried out to validate the efficacy of the proposed method.
summary: In this paper, we present a hybrid position/force controller for operating joint robots. The hybrid controller has two goals -- motion tracking and force regulating. As long as these two goals are not mutually exclusive, they can be decoupled in some way. In this work, we make use of the smooth and invertible mapping from joint space to task space to decouple the two control goals and design controllers separately. The traditional motion controller in task space is used for motion control, while the force controller is designed through manipulating the desired trajectory to regulate the force indirectly. Two case studies -- contour tracking/polishing surfaces and grabbing boxes with two robotic arms -- are presented to show the efficacy of the hybrid controller, and simulations with physics engines are carried out to validate the efficacy of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于操作关节机器人的混合位置/力控制器。混合控制器有两个目标——运动跟踪和力调节。只要这两个目标不相互排斥，就可以通过某种方式将它们解耦。在这项工作中，我们利用从关节空间到任务空间的平滑可逆映射来解耦两个控制目标并分别设计控制器。传统的任务空间运动控制器用于运动控制，而力控制器是通过操纵期望的轨迹来间接调节力的。两个案例研究——轮廓跟踪/抛光表面和带有两个机械臂的抓取盒——展示了混合控制器的功效，并通过物理引擎进行了仿真以验证所提出方法的功效。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种用于关节机器人的混合位置/力控制器，通过解耦运动跟踪与力调节目标实现精准控制。
AI.motivation: 传统控制器难以同时满足机器人运动跟踪与接触力调节的双重需求，需开发可解耦处理两者的混合控制方法。
AI.method: 利用关节空间到任务空间的平滑可逆映射解耦控制目标，采用任务空间运动控制器实现轨迹跟踪，通过调整期望轨迹间接调节接触力。
AI.result: 通过轮廓跟踪抛光与双臂抓取盒体的案例仿真验证，证明该方法在物理引擎中能有效实现位置与力的协同控制。
AI.conclusion: 混合控制器成功解耦了运动与力控制目标，在需同时精确控制位置与接触力的场景中具有应用价值。

authors_text: Renato Miyagusuku,Koichi Ozaki
title: Distance Invariant Sparse Autoencoder for Wireless Signal Strength Mapping
title_zh: 用于无线信号强度映射的距离不变稀疏自动编码器
comment: Revised version accepted for publication in 2021 IEEE/SICE International Symposium on System Integration (SII)
comments: Revised version accepted for publication in 2021 IEEE/SICE International Symposium on System Integration (SII)
abstract: Wireless signal strength based localization can enable robust localization for robots using inexpensive sensors. For this, a location-to-signal-strength map has to be learned for each access point in the environment. Due to the ubiquity of Wireless networks in most environments, this can result in tens or hundreds of maps. To reduce the dimensionality of this problem, we employ autoencoders, which are a popular unsupervised approach for feature extraction and data compression. In particular, we propose the use of sparse autoencoders that learn latent spaces that preserve the relative distance between inputs. Distance invariance between input and latent spaces allows our system to successfully learn compact representations that allow precise data reconstruction but also have a low impact on localization performance when using maps from the latent space rather than the input space. We demonstrate the feasibility of our approach by performing experiments in outdoor environments.
summary: Wireless signal strength based localization can enable robust localization for robots using inexpensive sensors. For this, a location-to-signal-strength map has to be learned for each access point in the environment. Due to the ubiquity of Wireless networks in most environments, this can result in tens or hundreds of maps. To reduce the dimensionality of this problem, we employ autoencoders, which are a popular unsupervised approach for feature extraction and data compression. In particular, we propose the use of sparse autoencoders that learn latent spaces that preserve the relative distance between inputs. Distance invariance between input and latent spaces allows our system to successfully learn compact representations that allow precise data reconstruction but also have a low impact on localization performance when using maps from the latent space rather than the input space. We demonstrate the feasibility of our approach by performing experiments in outdoor environments.
abstract_zh: 基于无线信号强度的定位可以使用廉价的传感器为机器人提供可靠的定位。为此，必须了解环境中每个接入点的位置到信号强度图。由于无线网络在大多数环境中无处不在，这可能会产生数十或数百张地图。为了降低这个问题的维度，我们采用自动编码器，这是一种流行的无监督特征提取和数据压缩方法。特别是，我们建议使用稀疏自动编码器来学习保持输入之间相对距离的潜在空间。输入和潜在空间之间的距离不变性使我们的系统能够成功学习紧凑的表示，这些表示允许精确的数据重建，但在使用来自潜在空间而不是输入空间的地图时对定位性能的影响也很小。我们通过在室外环境中进行实验来证明我们的方法的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种距离不变的稀疏自编码器，用于无线信号强度映射，以解决机器人定位中的高维问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需为每个接入点生成大量位置-信号强度地图，导致数据维度高且计算复杂，需通过降维技术提升效率。
AI.method: 采用稀疏自编码器学习保持输入与潜在空间相对距离的表示，实现数据压缩与精准重建，降低对定位性能的影响。
AI.result: 在户外环境中验证了方法的可行性，使用潜在空间地图进行定位时性能损失较小。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效降低维度并保持定位精度，适用于实际场景的无线信号强度映射问题。

method: 采用稀疏自编码器学习保持输入与潜在空间相对距离的表示，实现数据压缩与精准重建，降低对定位性能的影响。
result: 在户外环境中验证了方法的可行性，使用潜在空间地图进行定位时性能损失较小。
conclusion: 该方法有效降低维度并保持定位精度，适用于实际场景的无线信号强度映射问题。
search_text: Distance Invariant Sparse Autoencoder for Wireless Signal Strength Mapping 用于无线信号强度映射的距离不变稀疏自动编码器 Wireless signal strength based localization can enable robust localization for robots using inexpensive sensors. For this, a location-to-signal-strength map has to be learned for each access point in the environment. Due to the ubiquity of Wireless networks in most environments, this can result in tens or hundreds of maps. To reduce the dimensionality of this problem, we employ autoencoders, which are a popular unsupervised approach for feature extraction and data compression. In particular, we propose the use of sparse autoencoders that learn latent spaces that preserve the relative distance between inputs. Distance invariance between input and latent spaces allows our system to successfully learn compact representations that allow precise data reconstruction but also have a low impact on localization performance when using maps from the latent space rather than the input space. We demonstrate the feasibility of our approach by performing experiments in outdoor environments. 基于无线信号强度的定位可以使用廉价的传感器为机器人提供可靠的定位。为此，必须了解环境中每个接入点的位置到信号强度图。由于无线网络在大多数环境中无处不在，这可能会产生数十或数百张地图。为了降低这个问题的维度，我们采用自动编码器，这是一种流行的无监督特征提取和数据压缩方法。特别是，我们建议使用稀疏自动编码器来学习保持输入之间相对距离的潜在空间。输入和潜在空间之间的距离不变性使我们的系统能够成功学习紧凑的表示，这些表示允许精确的数据重建，但在使用来自潜在空间而不是输入空间的地图时对定位性能的影响也很小。我们通过在室外环境中进行实验来证明我们的方法的可行性。 本文提出一种距离不变的稀疏自编码器，用于无线信号强度映射，以解决机器人定位中的高维问题。 Renato Miyagusuku,Koichi Ozaki eess.SP,cs.RO

authors_text: Mohammad Ali
title: Developing Augmented Reality based Gaming Model to Teach Ethical Education in Primary Schools
title_zh: 开发基于增强现实的游戏模型来教授小学道德教育
abstract: Education sector is adopting new technologies for both teaching and learning pedagogy. Augmented Reality (AR) is a new technology that can be used in the educational pedagogy to enhance the engagement with students. Students interact with AR-based educational material for more visualization and explanation. Therefore, the use of AR in education is becoming more popular. However, most researches narrate the use of AR technologies in the field of English, Maths, Science, Culture, Arts, and History education but the absence of ethical education is visible. In our paper, we design the system and develop an AR-based mobile game model in the field of Ethical education for pre-primary students. Students from pre-primary require more interactive lessons than theoretical concepts. So, we use AR technology to develop a game which offers interactive procedures where students can learn with fun and engage with the context. Finally, we develop a prototype that works with our research objective. We conclude our paper with future works.

abstract_zh: 教育部门正在采用新技术进行教学和学习。增强现实（AR）是一种新技术，可用于教育教学法以增强学生的参与度。学生与基于 AR 的教育材料进行互动，以获得更多的可视化和解释。因此，AR在教育中的应用越来越普遍。然而，大多数研究都描述了AR技术在英语、数学、科学、文化、艺术和历史教育领域的使用，但道德教育的缺失是显而易见的。在我们的论文中，我们设计了系统并开发了一个基于 AR 的移动游戏模型，用于学前学生的道德教育领域。学前班的学生需要更多的互动课程，而不是理论概念。因此，我们使用 AR 技术开发了一款游戏，提供互动程序，让学生可以有趣地学习并参与情境。最后，我们开发了一个符合我们研究目标的原型。我们以未来的工作来结束我们的论文。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为小学阶段开发基于增强现实（AR）技术的互动游戏模型，以提升道德教育的趣味性和学生参与度。
AI.motivation: 现有AR教育研究多集中于英语、数学等学科，而道德教育领域缺乏相应技术应用，需通过互动方式满足学龄前学生的学习需求。
AI.method: 采用AR技术设计移动游戏模型，通过可视化与互动机制，使学生在游戏过程中学习道德知识并增强情境代入感。
AI.result: 成功开发出符合研究目标的AR教育原型系统，验证了该模型在道德教育场景中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 原型系统实现研究目标，未来需进一步优化交互设计并扩大实证研究范围。
